diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..90b0071
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,229 @@
+# E-Menum CI Pipeline
+# Runs tests, linting, and type checking on push and pull requests
+
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, develop]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main, develop]
+
+env:
+  NODE_VERSION: '20'
+  TEST_DATABASE_URL: postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/emenum_test
+  REDIS_URL: redis://localhost:6379
+  JWT_SECRET: test-secret-key-for-ci-only
+  JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: test-refresh-secret-for-ci-only
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  lint-and-type-check:
+    name: Lint & Type Check
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run ESLint
+        run: npm run lint
+
+      - name: Run TypeScript type check
+        run: npm run type-check
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: npm run format:check
+
+  unit-tests:
+    name: Unit Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run unit tests
+        run: npm test -- --coverage
+
+      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        with:
+          files: ./coverage/lcov.info
+          flags: unit
+          fail_ci_if_error: false
+
+  integration-tests:
+    name: Integration Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [lint-and-type-check]
+    services:
+      postgres:
+        image: postgres:15
+        env:
+          POSTGRES_USER: test
+          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
+          POSTGRES_DB: emenum_test
+        ports:
+          - 5432:5432
+        options: >-
+          --health-cmd pg_isready
+          --health-interval 10s
+          --health-timeout 5s
+          --health-retries 5
+
+      redis:
+        image: redis:7
+        ports:
+          - 6379:6379
+        options: >-
+          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
+          --health-interval 10s
+          --health-timeout 5s
+          --health-retries 5
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Wait for PostgreSQL
+        run: |
+          until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432; do
+            echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL..."
+            sleep 2
+          done
+
+      - name: Run database migrations
+        run: npx prisma migrate deploy
+        env:
+          DATABASE_URL: ${{ env.TEST_DATABASE_URL }}
+
+      - name: Run integration tests
+        run: npm run test:integration -- --coverage
+        env:
+          DATABASE_URL: ${{ env.TEST_DATABASE_URL }}
+
+      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        with:
+          files: ./coverage/lcov.info
+          flags: integration
+          fail_ci_if_error: false
+
+  build:
+    name: Build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [unit-tests, integration-tests]
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build application
+        run: npm run build
+
+      - name: Upload build artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist
+          path: dist/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  e2e-tests:
+    name: E2E Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [build]
+    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
+    services:
+      postgres:
+        image: postgres:15
+        env:
+          POSTGRES_USER: test
+          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
+          POSTGRES_DB: emenum_test
+        ports:
+          - 5432:5432
+        options: >-
+          --health-cmd pg_isready
+          --health-interval 10s
+          --health-timeout 5s
+          --health-retries 5
+
+      redis:
+        image: redis:7
+        ports:
+          - 6379:6379
+        options: >-
+          --health-cmd "redis-cli ping"
+          --health-interval 10s
+          --health-timeout 5s
+          --health-retries 5
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run database migrations
+        run: npx prisma migrate deploy
+        env:
+          DATABASE_URL: ${{ env.TEST_DATABASE_URL }}
+
+      - name: Run E2E tests
+        run: npm run test:e2e
+        env:
+          DATABASE_URL: ${{ env.TEST_DATABASE_URL }}
+
+      - name: Upload test artifacts
+        if: failure()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: e2e-results
+          path: |
+            test-results/
+            playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 7

diff --git a/.github/workflows/deploy.yml b/.github/workflows/deploy.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4bb24ab
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/deploy.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,300 @@
+# ============================================
+# E-Menum Deployment Pipeline
+# ============================================
+# Deploys to Coolify on Hetzner VPS
+# Triggered after CI passes on main branch
+#
+# Required secrets:
+#   COOLIFY_WEBHOOK_URL - Coolify deployment webhook URL
+#   COOLIFY_TOKEN - Coolify API token (optional, for API-based deploy)
+#   COOLIFY_APP_UUID - Coolify application UUID (for API-based deploy)
+# ============================================
+
+name: Deploy
+
+on:
+  # Deploy on push to main (after CI passes)
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+
+  # Manual deployment trigger
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      environment:
+        description: 'Environment to deploy to'
+        required: true
+        default: 'production'
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - production
+          - staging
+
+# Ensure only one deployment runs at a time
+concurrency:
+  group: deploy-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+jobs:
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Wait for CI to pass
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  wait-for-ci:
+    name: Wait for CI
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event_name == 'push'
+    steps:
+      - name: Wait for CI workflow
+        uses: lewagon/wait-on-check-action@v1.3.4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
+          check-name: 'Build'
+          repo-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          wait-interval: 10
+          allowed-conclusions: success
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Deploy to Coolify
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  deploy:
+    name: Deploy to Coolify
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [wait-for-ci]
+    if: always() && (needs.wait-for-ci.result == 'success' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch')
+
+    environment:
+      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'production' }}
+      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.url }}
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Get deployment info
+        id: info
+        run: |
+          echo "sha_short=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "commit_message=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "timestamp=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      # Option 1: Coolify Webhook Deployment (preferred)
+      - name: Trigger Coolify Webhook
+        id: webhook
+        if: env.COOLIFY_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
+        env:
+          COOLIFY_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_WEBHOOK_URL }}
+        run: |
+          echo "🚀 Triggering deployment via Coolify webhook..."
+
+          # Coolify webhook expects a POST request
+          response=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" -X POST "${COOLIFY_WEBHOOK_URL}" \
+            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
+            -d '{
+              "ref": "refs/heads/main",
+              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "repository": "${{ github.repository }}"
+            }' || echo "failed
+000")
+
+          http_code=$(echo "$response" | tail -n1)
+          body=$(echo "$response" | sed '$d')
+
+          echo "Response code: $http_code"
+          echo "Response body: $body"
+
+          if [ "$http_code" -ge 200 ] && [ "$http_code" -lt 300 ]; then
+            echo "✅ Webhook triggered successfully"
+            echo "success=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "❌ Webhook trigger failed with status $http_code"
+            echo "success=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      # Option 2: Coolify API Deployment (alternative)
+      - name: Deploy via Coolify API
+        id: api-deploy
+        if: env.COOLIFY_TOKEN != '' && steps.webhook.outcome == 'skipped'
+        env:
+          COOLIFY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_TOKEN }}
+          COOLIFY_BASE_URL: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_BASE_URL }}
+          COOLIFY_APP_UUID: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_APP_UUID }}
+        run: |
+          echo "🚀 Triggering deployment via Coolify API..."
+
+          response=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" -X POST \
+            "${COOLIFY_BASE_URL}/api/v1/applications/${COOLIFY_APP_UUID}/restart" \
+            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${COOLIFY_TOKEN}" \
+            -H "Content-Type: application/json" || echo "failed
+000")
+
+          http_code=$(echo "$response" | tail -n1)
+          body=$(echo "$response" | sed '$d')
+
+          echo "Response code: $http_code"
+
+          if [ "$http_code" -ge 200 ] && [ "$http_code" -lt 300 ]; then
+            echo "✅ API deployment triggered successfully"
+            echo "success=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "❌ API deployment failed with status $http_code"
+            echo "success=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+      - name: Set deployment URL
+        id: deploy
+        run: |
+          echo "url=https://e-menum.net" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      # Create GitHub Deployment record
+      - name: Create deployment record
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
+
+            // Create deployment
+            const deployment = await github.rest.repos.createDeployment({
+              owner,
+              repo,
+              ref: context.sha,
+              environment: '${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'production' }}',
+              auto_merge: false,
+              required_contexts: [],
+              description: 'Deployment triggered by GitHub Actions'
+            });
+
+            if (deployment.data.id) {
+              // Mark as success
+              await github.rest.repos.createDeploymentStatus({
+                owner,
+                repo,
+                deployment_id: deployment.data.id,
+                state: 'success',
+                environment_url: 'https://e-menum.net',
+                description: 'Deployed successfully'
+              });
+            }
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Post-Deployment Verification
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  verify:
+    name: Verify Deployment
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [deploy]
+    if: success()
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Wait for deployment to propagate
+        run: sleep 60
+
+      - name: Health check
+        id: health
+        run: |
+          echo "🔍 Checking deployment health..."
+
+          max_attempts=10
+          attempt=1
+
+          while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
+            echo "Attempt $attempt/$max_attempts..."
+
+            response=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" https://e-menum.net/health || echo "failed
+000")
+            http_code=$(echo "$response" | tail -n1)
+            body=$(echo "$response" | sed '$d')
+
+            if [ "$http_code" = "200" ]; then
+              echo "✅ Health check passed!"
+              echo "$body"
+              exit 0
+            fi
+
+            echo "Health check returned $http_code, retrying in 15s..."
+            sleep 15
+            attempt=$((attempt + 1))
+          done
+
+          echo "❌ Health check failed after $max_attempts attempts"
+          exit 1
+
+      - name: Verify API availability
+        run: |
+          echo "🔍 Checking API availability..."
+
+          response=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" https://e-menum.net/api/v1/health || echo "failed
+000")
+          http_code=$(echo "$response" | tail -n1)
+
+          if [ "$http_code" = "200" ]; then
+            echo "✅ API is available"
+          else
+            echo "⚠️ API returned $http_code (may still be starting)"
+          fi
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Rollback on Failure
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  rollback:
+    name: Rollback on Failure
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [deploy, verify]
+    if: failure() && needs.deploy.result == 'success'
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Notify rollback needed
+        run: |
+          echo "⚠️ Deployment verification failed!"
+          echo "Manual rollback may be required via Coolify dashboard."
+          echo ""
+          echo "To rollback:"
+          echo "1. Go to Coolify dashboard"
+          echo "2. Select E-Menum application"
+          echo "3. Use 'Rollback' feature to revert to previous deployment"
+
+      # Optional: Automatic rollback via Coolify API
+      - name: Trigger rollback (if API available)
+        if: env.COOLIFY_TOKEN != ''
+        env:
+          COOLIFY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_TOKEN }}
+          COOLIFY_BASE_URL: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_BASE_URL }}
+          COOLIFY_APP_UUID: ${{ secrets.COOLIFY_APP_UUID }}
+        run: |
+          echo "🔄 Attempting automatic rollback..."
+
+          # Coolify rollback API call would go here
+          # curl -X POST "${COOLIFY_BASE_URL}/api/v1/applications/${COOLIFY_APP_UUID}/rollback" \
+          #   -H "Authorization: Bearer ${COOLIFY_TOKEN}"
+
+          echo "⚠️ Automatic rollback not configured. Please rollback manually."
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Notify on Completion
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  notify:
+    name: Notify
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [deploy, verify]
+    if: always()
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Deployment Summary
+        run: |
+          echo "## Deployment Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Property | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|----------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Commit** | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Branch** | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Environment** | ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'production' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Deploy Status** | ${{ needs.deploy.result }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **Verify Status** | ${{ needs.verify.result }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| **URL** | https://e-menum.net |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          if [ "${{ needs.verify.result }}" = "success" ]; then
+            echo "✅ **Deployment completed successfully!**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "❌ **Deployment verification failed. Check logs for details.**" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi

diff --git a/Dockerfile b/Dockerfile
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..dc74306
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+# ============================================
+# E-Menum Production Dockerfile
+# ============================================
+# Multi-stage build for optimal image size
+# Node.js 20 LTS with TypeScript
+# ============================================
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Stage 1: Dependencies
+# --------------------------------------------
+FROM node:20-alpine AS deps
+
+# Install build dependencies for native modules (bcrypt, sharp)
+RUN apk add --no-cache libc6-compat python3 make g++
+
+WORKDIR /app
+
+# Copy package files
+COPY package*.json ./
+COPY prisma ./prisma/
+
+# Install all dependencies (including devDependencies for build)
+RUN npm ci
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Stage 2: Builder
+# --------------------------------------------
+FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
+
+WORKDIR /app
+
+# Copy dependencies from deps stage
+COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
+COPY --from=deps /app/package*.json ./
+
+# Copy source code
+COPY . .
+
+# Generate Prisma client
+RUN npm run prisma:generate
+
+# Build TypeScript
+RUN npm run build
+
+# Remove devDependencies
+RUN npm prune --production
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Stage 3: Production Runner
+# --------------------------------------------
+FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
+
+# Security: Run as non-root user
+RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs
+RUN adduser --system --uid 1001 emenum
+
+WORKDIR /app
+
+# Set production environment
+ENV NODE_ENV=production
+ENV PORT=3000
+
+# Copy built application
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/dist ./dist
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/node_modules ./node_modules
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/package*.json ./
+
+# Copy Prisma schema and migrations for runtime
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/prisma ./prisma
+
+# Copy static assets
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/public ./public
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/locales ./locales
+COPY --from=builder --chown=emenum:nodejs /app/themes ./themes
+
+# Create uploads directory with correct permissions
+RUN mkdir -p uploads && chown -R emenum:nodejs uploads
+
+# Switch to non-root user
+USER emenum
+
+# Expose port
+EXPOSE 3000
+
+# Health check
+HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
+  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1
+
+# Start application
+CMD ["node", "dist/main.js"]

diff --git a/docker-compose.yml b/docker-compose.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0f6a479
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docker-compose.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@
+# ============================================
+# E-Menum Docker Compose Configuration
+# ============================================
+# Development environment with all services
+# Usage:
+#   docker-compose up -d          # Start all services
+#   docker-compose up -d db redis # Start only DB and Redis
+#   docker-compose down           # Stop all services
+#   docker-compose logs -f app    # Follow app logs
+# ============================================
+
+version: '3.8'
+
+services:
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Application Service
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  app:
+    build:
+      context: .
+      dockerfile: Dockerfile
+    container_name: emenum-app
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    ports:
+      - '3000:3000'
+    environment:
+      NODE_ENV: production
+      PORT: 3000
+      APP_NAME: E-Menum
+      APP_DOMAIN: e-menum.net
+      APP_URL: http://localhost:3000
+      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/emenum
+      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
+      REDIS_PREFIX: 'emenum:'
+      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-me-in-production-256-bit-secret}
+      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET:-change-me-refresh-secret}
+      JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRY: 15m
+      JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRY: 7d
+      BCRYPT_ROUNDS: 12
+      LOG_LEVEL: info
+      LOG_FORMAT: json
+    depends_on:
+      db:
+        condition: service_healthy
+      redis:
+        condition: service_healthy
+    volumes:
+      - uploads:/app/uploads
+    networks:
+      - emenum-network
+    healthcheck:
+      test: ['CMD', 'wget', '--no-verbose', '--tries=1', '--spider', 'http://localhost:3000/health']
+      interval: 30s
+      timeout: 10s
+      retries: 3
+      start_period: 10s
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # PostgreSQL Database
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  db:
+    image: postgres:15-alpine
+    container_name: emenum-db
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    ports:
+      - '5432:5432'
+    environment:
+      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
+      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
+      POSTGRES_DB: emenum
+      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
+    volumes:
+      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
+    networks:
+      - emenum-network
+    healthcheck:
+      test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -U postgres -d emenum']
+      interval: 10s
+      timeout: 5s
+      retries: 5
+      start_period: 10s
+
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  # Redis Cache & Queue
+  # --------------------------------------------
+  redis:
+    image: redis:7-alpine
+    container_name: emenum-redis
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    ports:
+      - '6379:6379'
+    command: redis-server --appendonly yes --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
+    volumes:
+      - redis_data:/data
+    networks:
+      - emenum-network
+    healthcheck:
+      test: ['CMD', 'redis-cli', 'ping']
+      interval: 10s
+      timeout: 5s
+      retries: 5
+      start_period: 5s
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Development Override (docker-compose.dev.yml)
+# --------------------------------------------
+# For development, create docker-compose.override.yml:
+#
+# version: '3.8'
+# services:
+#   app:
+#     build:
+#       target: deps
+#     command: npm run dev
+#     volumes:
+#       - .:/app
+#       - /app/node_modules
+#     environment:
+#       NODE_ENV: development
+#       LOG_LEVEL: debug
+#       LOG_FORMAT: pretty
+# --------------------------------------------
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Volumes
+# --------------------------------------------
+volumes:
+  postgres_data:
+    driver: local
+  redis_data:
+    driver: local
+  uploads:
+    driver: local
+
+# --------------------------------------------
+# Networks
+# --------------------------------------------
+networks:
+  emenum-network:
+    driver: bridge

+{
+  "name": "e-menum",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Enterprise QR Menu SaaS Platform - AI-powered digital menu system for restaurants and cafes",
+  "main": "dist/main.js",
+  "type": "module",
+  "engines": {
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "dev": "tsx watch src/main.ts",
+    "build": "tsc && tsc-alias",
+    "start": "node dist/main.js",
+    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "lint": "eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx",
+    "lint:fix": "eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx --fix",
+    "format": "prettier --write \"src/**/*.{ts,tsx,json}\"",
+    "format:check": "prettier --check \"src/**/*.{ts,tsx,json}\"",
+    "test": "vitest run",
+    "test:watch": "vitest",
+    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
+    "test:integration": "vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts",
+    "test:e2e": "vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts",
+    "verify:e2e": "tsx scripts/verify-e2e-flow.ts",
+    "prisma:generate": "prisma generate",
+    "prisma:migrate": "prisma migrate dev",
+    "prisma:deploy": "prisma migrate deploy",
+    "prisma:studio": "prisma studio",
+    "prisma:seed": "tsx prisma/seed.ts",
+    "schema:merge": "tsx scripts/merge-schema.ts",
+    "module:create": "tsx scripts/create-module.ts",
+    "module:enable": "tsx scripts/enable-module.ts",
+    "module:disable": "tsx scripts/disable-module.ts",
+    "module:install": "tsx scripts/install-module.ts",
+    "postinstall": "prisma generate"

+    "qr-menu",
+    "restaurant",
+    "saas",
+    "digital-menu",

diff --git a/prisma/schema/base.prisma b/prisma/schema/base.prisma
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6727de5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/prisma/schema/base.prisma
@@ -0,0 +1,202 @@
+// =============================================================================
+// E-Menum - Base Prisma Schema
+// =============================================================================
+// This file contains the datasource, generator configuration, and base enums
+// used across all modules. All .prisma files in this directory are merged
+// into a single schema.prisma file via npm run schema:merge.
+// =============================================================================
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Datasource Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+datasource db {
+  provider = "postgresql"
+  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Generator Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+generator client {
+  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
+  previewFeatures = ["fullTextSearch", "multiSchema"]
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// BASE ENUMS
+// =============================================================================
+// These enums are used across multiple modules and follow the patterns
+// defined in DATABASE_SCHEMA.md
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Organization & User Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Organization status enum for tenant lifecycle management
+enum OrganizationStatus {
+  ACTIVE    // Organization is active and can use the platform
+  SUSPENDED // Organization temporarily suspended (billing, violation)
+  DELETED   // Organization marked for deletion (soft delete state)
+}
+
+/// User status enum for user account lifecycle
+enum UserStatus {
+  ACTIVE    // User is active and can login
+  INVITED   // User has been invited but not yet verified
+  SUSPENDED // User account is suspended
+}
+
+/// Branch status enum for branch lifecycle management
+enum BranchStatus {
+  ACTIVE    // Branch is active and operational
+  INACTIVE  // Branch is temporarily inactive
+  SUSPENDED // Branch is suspended (violation, etc.)
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Role & Permission Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Role scope defines whether a role is platform-wide or organization-specific
+enum RoleScope {
+  PLATFORM     // System-level roles (super_admin, admin, sales, support)
+  ORGANIZATION // Tenant-level roles (owner, manager, staff, viewer)
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Table & QR Code Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Table status for restaurant table management
+enum TableStatus {
+  AVAILABLE // Table is available for seating
+  OCCUPIED  // Table is currently occupied
+  RESERVED  // Table is reserved for future seating
+}
+
+/// QR Code type enum for different QR code purposes
+enum QRCodeType {
+  MENU     // QR code links to a menu
+  TABLE    // QR code is table-specific for ordering
+  CAMPAIGN // QR code for marketing campaigns
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Order Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Order status enum for order workflow management
+/// Flow: PENDING -> CONFIRMED -> PREPARING -> READY -> DELIVERED -> COMPLETED
+///       or -> CANCELLED at any point
+enum OrderStatus {
+  PENDING    // Order placed, awaiting confirmation
+  CONFIRMED  // Order confirmed by staff
+  PREPARING  // Order is being prepared in kitchen
+  READY      // Order is ready for delivery/pickup
+  DELIVERED  // Order has been delivered to customer
+  COMPLETED  // Order completed and closed
+  CANCELLED  // Order was cancelled
+}
+
+/// Order type enum for different ordering modes
+enum OrderType {
+  DINE_IN  // Customer dining at restaurant
+  TAKEAWAY // Customer picking up order
+  DELIVERY // Order to be delivered
+}
+
+/// Order item status for individual item tracking
+enum OrderItemStatus {
+  PENDING   // Item waiting to be prepared
+  PREPARING // Item is being prepared
+  READY     // Item is ready
+  SERVED    // Item has been served to customer
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Subscription & Billing Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Subscription status for billing management
+enum SubscriptionStatus {
+  TRIALING  // In trial period
+  ACTIVE    // Active paid subscription
+  PAST_DUE  // Payment failed, grace period
+  CANCELLED // Subscription cancelled
+  PAUSED    // Subscription temporarily paused
+}
+
+/// Invoice status for payment tracking
+enum InvoiceStatus {
+  DRAFT     // Invoice being prepared
+  PENDING   // Invoice sent, awaiting payment
+  PAID      // Invoice has been paid
+  OVERDUE   // Invoice past due date
+  CANCELLED // Invoice cancelled
+  REFUNDED  // Payment refunded
+}
+
+/// Payment method types
+enum PaymentMethod {
+  CREDIT_CARD  // Credit/debit card payment
+  BANK_TRANSFER // Bank/EFT transfer
+  CASH         // Cash payment (for POS integration)
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Notification Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Notification type for different notification categories
+enum NotificationType {
+  SYSTEM  // System notifications
+  ORDER   // Order-related notifications
+  BILLING // Billing/subscription notifications
+  PROMO   // Promotional notifications
+}
+
+/// Notification status for delivery tracking
+enum NotificationStatus {
+  UNREAD // Notification not yet read
+  READ   // Notification has been read
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Media Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Media type for uploaded files
+enum MediaType {
+  IMAGE    // Image files (jpg, png, webp)
+  VIDEO    // Video files
+  DOCUMENT // Documents (pdf, etc.)
+}
+
+/// Media storage location
+enum MediaStorage {
+  LOCAL // Local file system storage
+  S3    // AWS S3 or compatible storage
+  CDN   // CDN-hosted assets
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Audit & System Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/// Audit action types for logging
+enum AuditAction {
+  CREATE // Resource created
+  UPDATE // Resource updated
+  DELETE // Resource deleted (soft)
+  VIEW   // Resource viewed
+  LOGIN  // User login
+  LOGOUT // User logout
+  EXPORT // Data export
+}
+
+/// Feature flag status
+enum FeatureFlagStatus {
+  ENABLED  // Feature is enabled
+  DISABLED // Feature is disabled
+  BETA     // Feature in beta (limited access)
+}

diff --git a/prisma/schema/core.prisma b/prisma/schema/core.prisma
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0f57033
--- /dev/null
+++ b/prisma/schema/core.prisma
@@ -0,0 +1,287 @@
+// =============================================================================
+// E-Menum - Core Prisma Schema
+// =============================================================================
+// This file contains core system entities: Organization, User, Role, Permission,
+// Session, and their junction tables. All models follow the patterns defined
+// in DATABASE_SCHEMA.md section 3.2.
+// =============================================================================
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ORGANIZATION (TENANT ROOT)
+// =============================================================================
+// The Organization model represents a tenant in the multi-tenant system.
+// All tenant-scoped data must reference an organization via organizationId.
+
+model Organization {
+  id           String             @id @default(cuid())
+  name         String
+  slug         String             @unique
+  email        String
+  phone        String?
+  logo         String?
+  settings     Json               @default("{}")
+  status       OrganizationStatus @default(ACTIVE)
+  planId       String?
+  trialEndsAt  DateTime?
+  createdAt    DateTime           @default(now())
+  updatedAt    DateTime           @updatedAt
+  deletedAt    DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  plan         Plan?              @relation(fields: [planId], references: [id])
+  subscription Subscription?
+  users        User[]
+  roles        Role[]
+  branches     Branch[]
+  menus        Menu[]
+  categories   Category[]
+  products     Product[]
+  tables       Table[]
+  zones        Zone[]
+  qrCodes      QRCode[]
+  orders       Order[]
+  customers    Customer[]
+  themes       Theme[]
+  media        Media[]
+  notifications Notification[]
+  auditLogs    AuditLog[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([status, deletedAt])
+  @@map("organizations")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// BRANCH
+// =============================================================================
+// Branch/location management for multi-location organizations.
+// Supports hierarchical structure (parent-child relationships).
+
+model Branch {
+  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  name           String
+  code           String
+  description    String?
+  phone          String?
+  email          String?
+  address        Json?
+  settings       Json         @default("{}")
+  status         BranchStatus @default(ACTIVE)
+  parentId       String?
+  sortOrder      Int          @default(0)
+  isMain         Boolean      @default(false)
+  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  parent       Branch?      @relation("BranchHierarchy", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
+  children     Branch[]     @relation("BranchHierarchy")
+  menus        Menu[]
+  tables       Table[]
+  orders       Order[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, code])
+  @@index([organizationId, status, deletedAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, parentId])
+  @@index([organizationId, isMain])
+  @@map("branches")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// USER
+// =============================================================================
+// User accounts with optional organization membership.
+// Platform users (super_admin, admin) have null organizationId.
+// Organization users have a non-null organizationId.
+
+model User {
+  id              String     @id @default(cuid())
+  email           String     @unique
+  passwordHash    String
+  firstName       String
+  lastName        String
+  avatar          String?
+  phone           String?
+  status          UserStatus @default(ACTIVE)
+  emailVerifiedAt DateTime?
+  lastLoginAt     DateTime?
+  organizationId  String?
+  createdAt       DateTime   @default(now())
+  updatedAt       DateTime   @updatedAt
+  deletedAt       DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization    Organization?  @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  userRoles       UserRole[]
+  sessions        Session[]
+  notifications   Notification[]
+  createdOrders   Order[]        @relation("OrderStaff")
+  assignedRoles   UserRole[]     @relation("RoleAssigner")
+  auditLogs       AuditLog[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([organizationId, status])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@map("users")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ROLE
+// =============================================================================
+// Roles define permission bundles for users.
+// Platform roles (PLATFORM scope) apply globally.
+// Organization roles (ORGANIZATION scope) are tenant-specific.
+
+model Role {
+  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
+  name           String
+  displayName    String
+  description    String?
+  scope          RoleScope @default(ORGANIZATION)
+  isSystem       Boolean   @default(false)
+  organizationId String?
+  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organization    Organization?    @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  userRoles       UserRole[]
+  rolePermissions RolePermission[]
+
+  // Indexes - unique compound for name+scope+org
+  @@unique([name, scope, organizationId])
+  @@index([scope])
+  @@map("roles")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PERMISSION
+// =============================================================================
+// Granular permissions for resource.action combinations.
+// Permissions are defined at platform level and assigned to roles.
+
+model Permission {
+  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
+  resource    String
+  action      String
+  scope       RoleScope @default(ORGANIZATION)
+  description String?
+
+  // Relations
+  rolePermissions RolePermission[]
+
+  // Indexes - unique compound for resource+action+scope
+  @@unique([resource, action, scope])
+  @@map("permissions")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// SESSION
+// =============================================================================
+// Session model for JWT refresh token management and session tracking.
+// Each session represents an active login from a specific device/browser.
+
+model Session {
+  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
+  userId       String
+  refreshToken String    @unique
+  userAgent    String?
+  ipAddress    String?
+  isValid      Boolean   @default(true)
+  expiresAt    DateTime
+  lastUsedAt   DateTime  @default(now())
+  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([userId, isValid])
+  @@index([refreshToken])
+  @@index([expiresAt])
+  @@map("sessions")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// JUNCTION TABLES
+// =============================================================================
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// UserRole Junction
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Maps users to roles with assignment metadata.
+
+model UserRole {
+  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
+  userId       String
+  roleId       String
+  assignedAt   DateTime @default(now())
+  assignedById String?
+
+  // Relations
+  user       User  @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  role       Role  @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  assignedBy User? @relation("RoleAssigner", fields: [assignedById], references: [id])
+
+  // Composite unique constraint
+  @@unique([userId, roleId])
+  @@index([roleId])
+  @@map("user_roles")
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// RolePermission Junction
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Maps roles to permissions (many-to-many).
+
+model RolePermission {
+  id           String @id @default(cuid())
+  roleId       String
+  permissionId String
+
+  // Relations
+  role       Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  permission Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Composite unique constraint
+  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
+  @@index([permissionId])
+  @@map("role_permissions")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// AUDIT LOG
+// =============================================================================
+// System-wide audit logging for compliance and debugging.
+// Tracks all significant actions across the platform.
+
+model AuditLog {
+  id             String      @id @default(cuid())
+  userId         String?
+  organizationId String?
+  action         AuditAction
+  resource       String
+  resourceId     String?
+  oldValues      Json?
+  newValues      Json?
+  ipAddress      String?
+  userAgent      String?
+  metadata       Json?
+  createdAt      DateTime    @default(now())
+
+  // Relations
+  user         User?         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
+  organization Organization? @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([userId])
+  @@index([organizationId, createdAt])
+  @@index([action, createdAt])
+  @@index([resource, resourceId])
+  @@map("audit_logs")
+}

diff --git a/prisma/schema/menu.prisma b/prisma/schema/menu.prisma
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..90093f3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/prisma/schema/menu.prisma
@@ -0,0 +1,320 @@
+// =============================================================================
+// E-Menum - Menu Prisma Schema
+// =============================================================================
+// This file contains menu-related entities: Menu, Category, Product,
+// ProductVariant, ProductModifier, Allergen, NutritionInfo, and Theme.
+// All models follow the patterns defined in DATABASE_SCHEMA.md section 3.3.
+// =============================================================================
+
+// =============================================================================
+// THEME
+// =============================================================================
+// Theme model for menu styling customization.
+// Each organization can have multiple themes for different menus.
+
+model Theme {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  name           String
+  slug           String
+  description    String?
+  primaryColor   String   @default("#3B82F6")
+  secondaryColor String   @default("#10B981")
+  backgroundColor String  @default("#FFFFFF")
+  textColor      String   @default("#1F2937")
+  fontFamily     String   @default("Inter")
+  logoPosition   String   @default("left")
+  customCss      String?
+  settings       Json     @default("{}")
+  isDefault      Boolean  @default(false)
+  isActive       Boolean  @default(true)
+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  menus        Menu[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, slug])
+  @@index([organizationId, isActive])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@map("themes")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// MENU
+// =============================================================================
+// Menu is the main container for restaurant menus.
+// Each organization can have multiple menus (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner).
+
+model Menu {
+  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  branchId       String?
+  name           String
+  slug           String
+  description    String?
+  isPublished    Boolean   @default(false)
+  publishedAt    DateTime?
+  isDefault      Boolean   @default(false)
+  themeId        String?
+  settings       Json      @default("{}")
+  sortOrder      Int       @default(0)
+  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  branch       Branch?      @relation(fields: [branchId], references: [id])
+  theme        Theme?       @relation(fields: [themeId], references: [id])
+  categories   Category[]
+  qrCodes      QRCode[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, slug])
+  @@index([organizationId, isPublished])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, sortOrder])
+  @@index([branchId])
+  @@map("menus")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// CATEGORY
+// =============================================================================
+// Category groups products within a menu.
+// Supports nested categories via self-referential parentId.
+
+model Category {
+  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  menuId         String
+  parentId       String?
+  name           String
+  slug           String
+  description    String?
+  image          String?
+  isActive       Boolean   @default(true)
+  sortOrder      Int       @default(0)
+  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  menu         Menu         @relation(fields: [menuId], references: [id])
+  parent       Category?    @relation("CategoryHierarchy", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
+  children     Category[]   @relation("CategoryHierarchy")
+  products     Product[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([menuId, slug])
+  @@index([menuId, sortOrder])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@index([parentId])
+  @@map("categories")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PRODUCT
+// =============================================================================
+// Product represents individual menu items.
+// Supports variants (sizes), modifiers (add-ons), and allergen information.
+
+model Product {
+  id                 String    @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId     String
+  categoryId         String
+  name               String
+  slug               String
+  description        String?
+  shortDescription   String?   @db.VarChar(100)
+  basePrice          Decimal   @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  currency           String    @default("TRY")
+  image              String?
+  gallery            String[]  @default([])
+  isActive           Boolean   @default(true)
+  isAvailable        Boolean   @default(true)
+  isFeatured         Boolean   @default(false)
+  isChefRecommended  Boolean   @default(false)
+  preparationTime    Int?
+  calories           Int?
+  spicyLevel         Int?      @db.SmallInt
+  tags               String[]  @default([])
+  sortOrder          Int       @default(0)
+  createdAt          DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt
+  deletedAt          DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization   Organization       @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  category       Category           @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
+  variants       ProductVariant[]
+  modifiers      ProductModifier[]
+  allergens      ProductAllergen[]
+  nutritionInfo  NutritionInfo?
+  orderItems     OrderItem[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([categoryId, slug])
+  @@index([organizationId, isActive, isAvailable])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, isFeatured])
+  @@map("products")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PRODUCT VARIANT
+// =============================================================================
+// ProductVariant represents size/portion options for a product.
+// E.g., "Small", "Medium", "Large" with different prices.
+
+model ProductVariant {
+  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
+  productId   String
+  name        String
+  price       Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  isDefault   Boolean  @default(false)
+  isAvailable Boolean  @default(true)
+  sortOrder   Int      @default(0)
+  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  product    Product     @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  orderItems OrderItem[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([productId, sortOrder])
+  @@index([productId, isAvailable])
+  @@map("product_variants")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PRODUCT MODIFIER
+// =============================================================================
+// ProductModifier represents add-on options for a product.
+// E.g., "Extra Cheese", "No Onions" with additional cost.
+
+model ProductModifier {
+  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
+  productId   String
+  name        String
+  price       Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  isDefault   Boolean  @default(false)
+  isRequired  Boolean  @default(false)
+  maxQuantity Int      @default(1)
+  sortOrder   Int      @default(0)
+  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  product Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([productId, sortOrder])
+  @@map("product_modifiers")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ALLERGEN
+// =============================================================================
+// Allergen represents food allergens for product labeling.
+// Platform-level (not tenant-scoped) as allergens are standardized.
+
+model Allergen {
+  id          String  @id @default(cuid())
+  code        String  @unique
+  name        String
+  icon        String?
+  description String?
+
+  // Relations
+  products ProductAllergen[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@map("allergens")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PRODUCT ALLERGEN (Junction)
+// =============================================================================
+// Many-to-many junction between Product and Allergen.
+
+model ProductAllergen {
+  id         String @id @default(cuid())
+  productId  String
+  allergenId String
+
+  // Relations
+  product  Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  allergen Allergen @relation(fields: [allergenId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Composite unique constraint
+  @@unique([productId, allergenId])
+  @@index([allergenId])
+  @@map("product_allergens")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// NUTRITION INFO
+// =============================================================================
+// NutritionInfo stores nutritional data for a product.
+// One-to-one relationship with Product.
+
+model NutritionInfo {
+  id            String   @id @default(cuid())
+  productId     String   @unique
+  calories      Int?
+  protein       Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  carbohydrates Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  fat           Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  fiber         Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  sodium        Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  sugar         Decimal? @db.Decimal(6, 2)
+  servingSize   String?
+  servingUnit   String?
+  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  product Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@map("nutrition_info")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// MEDIA
+// =============================================================================
+// Media stores uploaded files for the organization.
+// Used for menu images, product photos, etc.
+
+model Media {
+  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  filename       String
+  originalName   String
+  mimeType       String
+  size           Int
+  type           MediaType    @default(IMAGE)
+  storage        MediaStorage @default(LOCAL)
+  url            String
+  thumbnailUrl   String?
+  alt            String?
+  metadata       Json         @default("{}")
+  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([organizationId, type])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@map("media")
+}

diff --git a/prisma/schema/order.prisma b/prisma/schema/order.prisma
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7a7cb15
--- /dev/null
+++ b/prisma/schema/order.prisma
@@ -0,0 +1,385 @@
+// =============================================================================
+// E-Menum - Order Prisma Schema
+// =============================================================================
+// This file contains order-related entities: Zone, Table, QRCode, Order,
+// OrderItem, and ServiceRequest. All models follow the patterns defined
+// in DATABASE_SCHEMA.md section 3.4.
+// =============================================================================
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ZONE
+// =============================================================================
+// Zone represents table groupings within a restaurant.
+// E.g., "Garden", "Indoor", "VIP Section", "Terrace".
+
+model Zone {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  name           String
+  color          String?
+  sortOrder      Int      @default(0)
+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  tables       Table[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([organizationId])
+  @@map("zones")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// TABLE
+// =============================================================================
+// Table represents physical restaurant tables for ordering and management.
+// Tables can be grouped into zones and linked to QR codes.
+
+model Table {
+  id             String      @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  branchId       String?
+  zoneId         String?
+  number         String
+  capacity       Int
+  status         TableStatus @default(AVAILABLE)
+  currentOrderId String?     @unique
+  sortOrder      Int         @default(0)
+  createdAt      DateTime    @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime    @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization  Organization     @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  branch        Branch?          @relation(fields: [branchId], references: [id])
+  zone          Zone?            @relation(fields: [zoneId], references: [id])
+  qrCode        QRCode?
+  currentOrder  Order?           @relation("CurrentTableOrder", fields: [currentOrderId], references: [id])
+  orders        Order[]          @relation("TableOrders")
+  serviceRequests ServiceRequest[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, number])
+  @@index([organizationId, status])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@index([branchId])
+  @@index([zoneId])
+  @@map("tables")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// QR CODE
+// =============================================================================
+// QRCode represents generated QR codes for menus, tables, or campaigns.
+// Each QR code links to a menu and optionally to a specific table.
+
+model QRCode {
+  id             String     @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  menuId         String
+  tableId        String?    @unique
+  code           String     @unique
+  type           QRCodeType @default(MENU)
+  url            String
+  imageUrl       String?
+  scansCount     Int        @default(0)
+  isActive       Boolean    @default(true)
+  expiresAt      DateTime?
+  createdAt      DateTime   @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime   @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  menu         Menu         @relation(fields: [menuId], references: [id])
+  table        Table?       @relation(fields: [tableId], references: [id])
+  scans        QRScan[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([organizationId, isActive])
+  @@index([menuId])
+  @@map("qr_codes")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// QR SCAN
+// =============================================================================
+// QRScan tracks individual QR code scan events for analytics.
+// Records visitor information and scan metadata.
+
+model QRScan {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  qrCodeId       String
+  organizationId String
+  userAgent      String?
+  ipAddress      String?
+  referrer       String?
+  deviceType     String?
+  browser        String?
+  os             String?
+  country        String?
+  city           String?
+  metadata       Json     @default("{}")
+  scannedAt      DateTime @default(now())
+
+  // Relations
+  qrCode QRCode @relation(fields: [qrCodeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([qrCodeId, scannedAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, scannedAt])
+  @@map("qr_scans")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ORDER
+// =============================================================================
+// Order represents customer orders with all transaction details.
+// Supports dine-in, takeaway, and delivery order types.
+
+model Order {
+  id             String      @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  branchId       String?
+  orderNumber    String
+  tableId        String?
+  customerId     String?
+  staffId        String?
+  status         OrderStatus @default(PENDING)
+  type           OrderType   @default(DINE_IN)
+  subtotal       Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  taxAmount      Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  discountAmount Decimal     @default(0) @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  totalAmount    Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  currency       String      @default("TRY")
+  notes          String?
+  confirmedAt    DateTime?
+  preparedAt     DateTime?
+  deliveredAt    DateTime?
+  completedAt    DateTime?
+  cancelledAt    DateTime?
+  cancelReason   String?
+  createdAt      DateTime    @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime    @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organization  Organization  @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  branch        Branch?       @relation(fields: [branchId], references: [id])
+  table         Table?        @relation("TableOrders", fields: [tableId], references: [id])
+  tableAsCurrent Table?       @relation("CurrentTableOrder")
+  customer      Customer?     @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])
+  staff         User?         @relation("OrderStaff", fields: [staffId], references: [id])
+  items         OrderItem[]
+  feedback      Feedback?
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, orderNumber])
+  @@index([organizationId, status])
+  @@index([organizationId, createdAt])
+  @@index([branchId])
+  @@index([tableId, status])
+  @@index([customerId])
+  @@index([staffId])
+  @@map("orders")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ORDER ITEM
+// =============================================================================
+// OrderItem represents individual line items within an order.
+// Stores snapshots of product data at order time for historical accuracy.
+
+model OrderItem {
+  id          String          @id @default(cuid())
+  orderId     String
+  productId   String
+  variantId   String?
+  productName String
+  variantName String?
+  quantity    Int
+  unitPrice   Decimal         @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  totalPrice  Decimal         @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  modifiers   Json            @default("[]")
+  notes       String?
+  status      OrderItemStatus @default(PENDING)
+  createdAt   DateTime        @default(now())
+  updatedAt   DateTime        @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  order   Order           @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  product Product         @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])
+  variant ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([orderId])
+  @@index([productId])
+  @@index([variantId])
+  @@map("order_items")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// SERVICE REQUEST
+// =============================================================================
+// ServiceRequest represents waiter call/service requests from tables.
+// Used for call-waiter, request-bill, and other service actions.
+
+model ServiceRequest {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  tableId        String
+  organizationId String
+  type           String
+  message        String?
+  isResolved     Boolean  @default(false)
+  resolvedAt     DateTime?
+  resolvedById   String?
+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  table Table @relation(fields: [tableId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([tableId, isResolved])
+  @@index([organizationId, isResolved, createdAt])
+  @@map("service_requests")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// CUSTOMER
+// =============================================================================
+// Customer represents end customers who place orders.
+// Tracks customer information for loyalty and analytics.
+
+model Customer {
+  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  email          String?
+  phone          String?
+  firstName      String?
+  lastName       String?
+  avatar         String?
+  totalOrders    Int       @default(0)
+  totalSpent     Decimal   @default(0) @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  lastOrderAt    DateTime?
+  notes          String?
+  metadata       Json      @default("{}")
+  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt
+  deletedAt      DateTime?
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  orders       Order[]
+  feedback     Feedback[]
+  visits       CustomerVisit[]
+  loyaltyPoints LoyaltyPoint[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@unique([organizationId, email])
+  @@unique([organizationId, phone])
+  @@index([organizationId, deletedAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, lastOrderAt])
+  @@map("customers")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// CUSTOMER VISIT
+// =============================================================================
+// CustomerVisit tracks customer visits for analytics and loyalty.
+
+model CustomerVisit {
+  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
+  customerId String
+  visitedAt  DateTime @default(now())
+  metadata   Json     @default("{}")
+
+  // Relations
+  customer Customer @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([customerId, visitedAt])
+  @@map("customer_visits")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// FEEDBACK
+// =============================================================================
+// Feedback stores customer feedback and ratings for orders.
+
+model Feedback {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId String
+  orderId        String   @unique
+  customerId     String?
+  rating         Int
+  comment        String?
+  isPublic       Boolean  @default(false)
+  metadata       Json     @default("{}")
+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  order    Order     @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  customer Customer? @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([organizationId, rating])
+  @@index([organizationId, createdAt])
+  @@index([customerId])
+  @@map("feedback")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// LOYALTY POINT
+// =============================================================================
+// LoyaltyPoint tracks customer loyalty points ledger.
+
+model LoyaltyPoint {
+  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
+  customerId     String
+  organizationId String
+  points         Int
+  reason         String
+  orderId        String?
+  expiresAt      DateTime?
+  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
+
+  // Relations
+  customer Customer @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([customerId, createdAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, createdAt])
+  @@index([expiresAt])
+  @@map("loyalty_points")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// NOTIFICATION
+// =============================================================================
+// Notification stores user notifications for orders, system, and promotions.
+
+model Notification {
+  id             String             @id @default(cuid())
+  userId         String
+  organizationId String?
+  type           NotificationType   @default(SYSTEM)
+  status         NotificationStatus @default(UNREAD)
+  title          String
+  message        String
+  link           String?
+  metadata       Json               @default("{}")
+  readAt         DateTime?
+  createdAt      DateTime           @default(now())
+  updatedAt      DateTime           @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  user         User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
+  organization Organization? @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([userId, status])
+  @@index([userId, createdAt])
+  @@index([organizationId, createdAt])
+  @@map("notifications")
+}

diff --git a/prisma/schema/subscription.prisma b/prisma/schema/subscription.prisma
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..42d592a
--- /dev/null

+// =============================================================================
+// E-Menum - Subscription Prisma Schema
+// =============================================================================
+// This file contains subscription-related entities: Plan, Subscription, Invoice.
+// All models follow the patterns defined in DATABASE_SCHEMA.md.
+// =============================================================================
+
+// =============================================================================
+// PLAN
+// =============================================================================
+// Plan represents subscription tiers available for organizations.
+// 5 tiers: Free, Starter, Professional, Business, Enterprise.
+
+model Plan {
+  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
+  name            String   @unique
+  displayName     String
+  description     String?
+  monthlyPrice    Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  annualPrice     Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  currency        String   @default("TRY")
+  features        Json     @default("[]")
+  limits          Json     @default("{}")
+  isActive        Boolean  @default(true)
+  sortOrder       Int      @default(0)
+  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
+  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organizations   Organization[]
+  subscriptions   Subscription[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([isActive, sortOrder])
+  @@map("plans")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// SUBSCRIPTION
+// =============================================================================
+// Subscription links organizations to plans with billing details.
+// Tracks subscription lifecycle, trial periods, and payment status.
+
+model Subscription {
+  id                  String             @id @default(cuid())
+  organizationId      String             @unique
+  planId              String
+  status              SubscriptionStatus @default(TRIALING)
+  currentPeriodStart  DateTime
+  currentPeriodEnd    DateTime
+  cancelAtPeriodEnd   Boolean            @default(false)
+  cancelledAt         DateTime?
+  trialStart          DateTime?
+  trialEnd            DateTime?
+  paymentMethod       PaymentMethod?
+  lastPaymentAt       DateTime?
+  nextPaymentAt       DateTime?
+  metadata            Json               @default("{}")
+  createdAt           DateTime           @default(now())
+  updatedAt           DateTime           @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
+  plan         Plan         @relation(fields: [planId], references: [id])
+  invoices     Invoice[]
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([status])
+  @@index([planId])
+  @@index([currentPeriodEnd])
+  @@map("subscriptions")
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// INVOICE
+// =============================================================================
+// Invoice tracks billing records for subscriptions.
+// Supports recurring charges, one-time charges, and refunds.
+
+model Invoice {
+  id              String        @id @default(cuid())
+  subscriptionId  String
+  invoiceNumber   String        @unique
+  status          InvoiceStatus @default(DRAFT)
+  subtotal        Decimal       @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  taxAmount       Decimal       @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  totalAmount     Decimal       @db.Decimal(10, 2)
+  currency        String        @default("TRY")
+  dueDate         DateTime
+  paidAt          DateTime?
+  paymentMethod   PaymentMethod?
+  description     String?
+  lineItems       Json          @default("[]")
+  metadata        Json          @default("{}")
+  createdAt       DateTime      @default(now())
+  updatedAt       DateTime      @updatedAt
+
+  // Relations
+  subscription Subscription @relation(fields: [subscriptionId], references: [id])
+
+  // Indexes
+  @@index([subscriptionId, status])
+  @@index([status, dueDate])
+  @@index([createdAt])
+  @@map("invoices")
+}

+    description: 'Soybeans and products thereof',
+  },
+  {
+    code: 'SULPHITES',
+    name: 'Sulphur dioxide and sulphites',
+    icon: 'sulphite',
+    description: 'Sulphur dioxide and sulphites at concentrations of more than 10mg/kg or 10mg/litre',
+  },
+];
+
+// =============================================================================
+// SEED FUNCTIONS
+// =============================================================================
+
+async function seedPlans() {
+  console.log('Seeding plans...');
+
+  for (const plan of plans) {
+    await prisma.plan.upsert({
+      where: { name: plan.name },
+      update: {
+        displayName: plan.displayName,
+        description: plan.description,
+        monthlyPrice: plan.monthlyPrice,
+        annualPrice: plan.annualPrice,
+        currency: plan.currency,
+        sortOrder: plan.sortOrder,
+        features: plan.features,
+        limits: plan.limits,
+      },
+      create: {
+        name: plan.name,
+        displayName: plan.displayName,
+        description: plan.description,
+        monthlyPrice: plan.monthlyPrice,
+        annualPrice: plan.annualPrice,
+        currency: plan.currency,
+        sortOrder: plan.sortOrder,
+        features: plan.features,
+        limits: plan.limits,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  console.log(`  Created/updated ${plans.length} plans`);
+}
+
+async function seedPermissions() {
+  console.log('Seeding permissions...');
+
+  const createdPermissions: Map<string, string> = new Map();
+
+  for (const perm of permissions) {
+    const result = await prisma.permission.upsert({
+      where: {
+        resource_action_scope: {
+          resource: perm.resource,
+          action: perm.action,
+          scope: perm.scope,
+        },
+      },
+      update: {
+        description: perm.description,
+      },
+      create: {
+        resource: perm.resource,
+        action: perm.action,
+        scope: perm.scope,
+        description: perm.description,
+      },
+    });
+
+    createdPermissions.set(`${perm.resource}.${perm.action}`, result.id);
+  }
+
+  console.log(`  Created/updated ${permissions.length} permissions`);
+  return createdPermissions;
+}
+
+async function seedRoles(permissionMap: Map<string, string>) {
+  console.log('Seeding roles...');
+
+  for (const role of roles) {
+    // Create or update the role
+    const createdRole = await prisma.role.upsert({
+      where: {
+        name_scope_organizationId: {
+          name: role.name,
+          scope: role.scope,
+          organizationId: null as unknown as string, // Prisma handles null in unique compound
+        },
+      },
+      update: {
+        displayName: role.displayName,
+        description: role.description,
+        isSystem: role.isSystem,
+      },
+      create: {
+        name: role.name,
+        displayName: role.displayName,
+        description: role.description,
+        scope: role.scope,
+        isSystem: role.isSystem,
+        organizationId: null,
+      },
+    });
+
+    // Delete existing role-permission mappings for this role
+    await prisma.rolePermission.deleteMany({
+      where: { roleId: createdRole.id },
+    });
+
+    // Create role-permission mappings
+    for (const permKey of role.permissions) {
+      const permissionId = permissionMap.get(permKey);
+      if (permissionId) {
+        await prisma.rolePermission.create({
+          data: {
+            roleId: createdRole.id,
+            permissionId: permissionId,
+          },
+        });
+      } else {
+        console.warn(`  Warning: Permission ${permKey} not found for role ${role.name}`);
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  console.log(`  Created/updated ${roles.length} roles with permissions`);
+}
+
+async function seedAllergens() {
+  console.log('Seeding allergens...');
+
+  for (const allergen of allergens) {
+    await prisma.allergen.upsert({
+      where: { code: allergen.code },
+      update: {
+        name: allergen.name,
+        icon: allergen.icon,
+        description: allergen.description,
+      },
+      create: {
+        code: allergen.code,
+        name: allergen.name,
+        icon: allergen.icon,
+        description: allergen.description,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  console.log(`  Created/updated ${allergens.length} allergens`);
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// MAIN SEED FUNCTION
+// =============================================================================
+
+async function main() {
+  console.log('Starting database seed...\n');
+
+  try {
+    // Seed in order of dependencies
+    await seedPlans();
+    const permissionMap = await seedPermissions();
+    await seedRoles(permissionMap);
+    await seedAllergens();
+
+    console.log('\nDatabase seed completed successfully!');
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Error during database seed:', error);
+    throw error;
+  }
+}
+
+main()
+  .catch((e) => {
+    console.error(e);
+    process.exit(1);
+  })
+  .finally(async () => {
+    await prisma.$disconnect();
+  });
