+/**
+ * Application Constants
+ *
+ * Centralized constants for E-Menum application.
+ * Includes plan limits, feature flags, validation rules, and business constants.
+ *
+ * @module config/constants
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Plan Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Available subscription plan types
+ */
+export type PlanType = 'free' | 'starter' | 'professional' | 'business' | 'enterprise';
+
+/**
+ * Resource limit keys
+ */
+export type ResourceLimitKey =
+  | 'menus'
+  | 'categoriesPerMenu'
+  | 'products'
+  | 'qrCodes'
+  | 'users'
+  | 'branches'
+  | 'storageMb';
+
+/**
+ * Monthly limit keys
+ */
+export type MonthlyLimitKey = 'qrScans' | 'orders' | 'aiCredits' | 'apiRequests' | 'exportReports';
+
+/**
+ * Feature flag keys
+ */
+export type FeatureKey =
+  | 'digitalMenu'
+  | 'qrCodeGeneration'
+  | 'basicAnalytics'
+  | 'emenumWatermark'
+  | 'customDomain'
+  | 'whiteLabel'
+  | 'orderReceiving'
+  | 'kitchenDisplay'
+  | 'waiterApp'
+  | 'tableManagement'
+  | 'serviceRequests'
+  | 'aiContentGen'
+  | 'aiImageGen'
+  | 'aiTranslation'
+  | 'aiInsights'
+  | 'aiForecasting'
+  | 'aiNaturalQuery'
+  | 'multiBranch'
+  | 'centralMenuMgmt'
+  | 'campaigns'
+  | 'loyaltyProgram'
+  | 'apiAccess'
+  | 'webhooks'
+  | 'customIntegrations'
+  | 'prioritySupport'
+  | 'dedicatedAccount'
+  | 'slaGuarantee';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Plan Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription plan information
+ */
+export const PLANS: Record<PlanType, { displayName: string; priceMonthly: number; position: number }> = {
+  free: { displayName: 'Ücretsiz', priceMonthly: 0, position: 0 },
+  starter: { displayName: 'Starter', priceMonthly: 2000, position: 1 },
+  professional: { displayName: 'Professional', priceMonthly: 4000, position: 2 },
+  business: { displayName: 'Business', priceMonthly: 6000, position: 3 },
+  enterprise: { displayName: 'Enterprise', priceMonthly: 8000, position: 4 },
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Plan upgrade/downgrade rules
+ */
+export const PLAN_HIERARCHY: PlanType[] = ['free', 'starter', 'professional', 'business', 'enterprise'];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Tier Limits
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Resource limits per subscription plan.
+ * -1 represents unlimited.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { TIER_LIMITS } from '@/config/constants';
+ *
+ * const menuLimit = TIER_LIMITS.resources.menus.professional; // 10
+ * const isUnlimited = TIER_LIMITS.resources.menus.enterprise === -1; // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export const TIER_LIMITS = {
+  /**
+   * Resource limits (static, not resetting)
+   */
+  resources: {
+    menus: {
+      free: 1,
+      starter: 3,
+      professional: 10,
+      business: 50,
+      enterprise: -1, // Unlimited
+    },
+    categoriesPerMenu: {
+      free: 3,
+      starter: 10,
+      professional: 25,
+      business: 50,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    products: {
+      free: 15,
+      starter: 100,
+      professional: 500,
+      business: 2000,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    qrCodes: {
+      free: 1,
+      starter: 10,
+      professional: 50,
+      business: 200,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    users: {
+      free: 1,
+      starter: 3,
+      professional: 10,
+      business: 25,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    branches: {
+      free: 0,
+      starter: 0,
+      professional: 1,
+      business: 3,
+      enterprise: -1,

+    storageMb: {

+      professional: 2000,
+      business: 10000,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+  } satisfies Record<ResourceLimitKey, Record<PlanType, number>>,
+
+  /**
+   * Monthly limits (reset on billing date)
+   */
+  monthly: {
+    qrScans: {
+      free: 100,
+      starter: 5000,
+      professional: 25000,
+      business: 100000,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    orders: {
+      free: 0,
+      starter: 500,
+      professional: 2500,
+      business: 10000,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    aiCredits: {

+      starter: 500,
+      professional: 2000,
+      business: 5000,
+      enterprise: 10000,
+    },
+    apiRequests: {
+      free: 0,
+      starter: 0,
+      professional: 10000,
+      business: 50000,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+    exportReports: {
+      free: 0,
+      starter: 5,
+      professional: 20,
+      business: 100,
+      enterprise: -1,
+    },
+  } satisfies Record<MonthlyLimitKey, Record<PlanType, number>>,
+
+  /**

+  /**

+   */
+  downgradeGracePeriodDays: 7,
+} as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Feature Availability
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Feature availability matrix per plan.
+ * true = available, false = not available
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { FEATURE_FLAGS } from '@/config/constants';
+ *
+ * const hasAiContent = FEATURE_FLAGS.aiContentGen.professional; // true
+ * const hasWhiteLabel = FEATURE_FLAGS.whiteLabel.business; // false

+ */
+export const FEATURE_FLAGS: Record<FeatureKey, Record<PlanType, boolean>> = {
+  // Core Features
+  digitalMenu: { free: true, starter: true, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  qrCodeGeneration: { free: true, starter: true, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  basicAnalytics: { free: false, starter: true, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },

+
+  // Order Features
+  orderReceiving: { free: false, starter: true, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },

+  waiterApp: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  tableManagement: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  serviceRequests: { free: false, starter: true, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+
+  // AI Features
+  aiContentGen: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },

+
+  // Advanced Features
+  multiBranch: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  centralMenuMgmt: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  campaigns: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  loyaltyProgram: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  apiAccess: { free: false, starter: false, professional: true, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  webhooks: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  customIntegrations: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: false, enterprise: true },
+  prioritySupport: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: true, enterprise: true },
+  dedicatedAccount: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: false, enterprise: true },
+  slaGuarantee: { free: false, starter: false, professional: false, business: false, enterprise: true },
+} as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// AI Credit Costs
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * AI operation types
+ */
+export type AiOperationType =
+  | 'productDescriptionShort'
+  | 'productDescriptionLong'
+  | 'menuTranslation'
+  | 'contentImprovement'
+  | 'seoOptimization'
+  | 'stockPhotoSearch'
+  | 'imageGenerationBasic'

+  | 'naturalLanguageQuery'

+  | 'anomalyDetection'
+  | 'chatbotResponse';
+
+/**
+ * AI credit costs per operation
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { AI_CREDIT_COSTS } from '@/config/constants';
+ *
+ * const cost = AI_CREDIT_COSTS.imageGenerationHd; // 15 credits

+ */
+export const AI_CREDIT_COSTS: Record<AiOperationType, number> = {
+  productDescriptionShort: 1,

+  menuTranslation: 1,
+  contentImprovement: 2,

+  demandForecast: 5,

+  chatbotResponse: 1,
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * AI cache TTL in seconds (24 hours)
+ */
+export const AI_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS = 24 * 60 * 60;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Validation Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * String field validation constraints
+ */
+export const VALIDATION = {
+  /**
+   * Name fields

+  name: {
+    menu: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+    product: { min: 1, max: 150 },

+
+  /**

+  /**

+
+  /**

+  price: { min: 0.01, max: 999999.99, precision: 2 },
+  quantity: { min: 1, max: 999 },
+  sortOrder: { min: 0, max: 9999 },
+  calories: { min: 0, max: 99999 },

+
+  /**

+  tags: { maxItems: 10, itemMaxLength: 30 },

+      minWidth: 1920,

+    },
+  },
+} as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Reserved Values
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Reserved slugs that cannot be used for organizations
+ */
+export const RESERVED_SLUGS = [
+  'admin',
+  'api',
+  'www',
+  'app',
+  'help',
+  'support',
+  'billing',
+  'dashboard',
+  'login',
+  'logout',
+  'register',
+  'signup',

+  'account',

+  'menu',

+  'order',
+  'orders',
+  'static',

+  'images',
+  'uploads',
+] as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Order Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order status values
+ */
+export const ORDER_STATUS = {
+  PENDING: 'PENDING',
+  CONFIRMED: 'CONFIRMED',
+  PREPARING: 'PREPARING',
+  READY: 'READY',
+  DELIVERED: 'DELIVERED',
+  COMPLETED: 'COMPLETED',
+  CANCELLED: 'CANCELLED',
+} as const;
+
+export type OrderStatus = (typeof ORDER_STATUS)[keyof typeof ORDER_STATUS];
+
+/**
+ * Valid order status transitions
+ */
+export const ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITIONS: Record<OrderStatus, OrderStatus[]> = {
+  PENDING: ['CONFIRMED', 'CANCELLED'],
+  CONFIRMED: ['PREPARING', 'CANCELLED'],
+  PREPARING: ['READY', 'CANCELLED'],
+  READY: ['DELIVERED'],
+  DELIVERED: ['COMPLETED'],
+  COMPLETED: [],
+  CANCELLED: [],
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Order number format prefix
+ */
+export const ORDER_NUMBER_PREFIX = 'ORD';
+
+/**
+ * Auto-complete delay after delivery (milliseconds)
+ */
+export const ORDER_AUTO_COMPLETE_DELAY_MS = 30 * 60 * 1000; // 30 minutes
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Time Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Token and session expiration times
+ */
+export const EXPIRATION = {
+  /** Email verification link expiry (days) */
+  emailVerification: 7,
+  /** Unverified account auto-deletion (days) */
+  unverifiedAccount: 7,
+  /** Invitation expiry (days) */
+  invitation: 7,
+  /** Password reset link expiry (hours) */
+  passwordReset: 1,
+  /** Organization soft delete grace period (days) */
+  organizationGracePeriod: 30,
+  /** Subscription trial period (days) */
+  trialPeriod: 14,
+  /** Payment failure grace period (days) */
+  paymentGracePeriod: 7,
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Retry and rate limit settings
+ */
+export const LIMITS = {
+  /** Maximum invitation resends */
+  invitationResends: 3,
+  /** Maximum login attempts before lockout */
+  loginAttempts: 5,
+  /** Login lockout duration (minutes) */
+  loginLockoutMinutes: 15,
+  /** API rate limit requests per window */
+  apiRateLimitRequests: 100,
+  /** API rate limit window (seconds) */
+  apiRateLimitWindowSeconds: 60,
+} as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Audit Log Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Audit log event types
+ */
+export const AUDIT_EVENTS = {
+  // Authentication
+  LOGIN_SUCCESS: 'auth.login.success',
+  LOGIN_FAILURE: 'auth.login.failure',
+  LOGOUT: 'auth.logout',
+  PASSWORD_CHANGE: 'auth.password.change',
+  PASSWORD_RESET: 'auth.password.reset',
+
+  // User management
+  USER_CREATE: 'user.create',
+  USER_UPDATE: 'user.update',
+  USER_DELETE: 'user.delete',
+  USER_ROLE_CHANGE: 'user.role.change',
+  USER_INVITE: 'user.invite',
+
+  // Organization
+  ORG_CREATE: 'org.create',
+  ORG_UPDATE: 'org.update',
+  ORG_DELETE: 'org.delete',
+  ORG_SETTINGS_CHANGE: 'org.settings.change',
+
+  // Subscription
+  SUBSCRIPTION_CREATE: 'subscription.create',
+  SUBSCRIPTION_UPGRADE: 'subscription.upgrade',
+  SUBSCRIPTION_DOWNGRADE: 'subscription.downgrade',
+  SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL: 'subscription.cancel',
+  PAYMENT_SUCCESS: 'payment.success',
+  PAYMENT_FAILURE: 'payment.failure',
+
+  // Data
+  DATA_EXPORT: 'data.export',
+  DATA_DELETE_REQUEST: 'data.delete.request',
+
+  // Admin
+  ADMIN_IMPERSONATE: 'admin.impersonate',
+  PERMISSION_DENIED: 'security.permission.denied',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Audit log retention periods (days)
+ */
+export const AUDIT_RETENTION = {
+  security: 730, // 2 years
+  userActivity: 365, // 1 year
+  system: 90, // 90 days
+} as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Currency and Locale
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Default currency code
+ */
+export const DEFAULT_CURRENCY = 'TRY';
+
+/**
+ * Default locale
+ */
+export const DEFAULT_LOCALE = 'tr';
+
+/**
+ * Supported locales
+ */
+export const SUPPORTED_LOCALES = ['tr', 'en'] as const;
+
+export type SupportedLocale = (typeof SUPPORTED_LOCALES)[number];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// EU 14 Allergens
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Standard EU 14 allergens
+ */
+export const ALLERGENS = [
+  { code: 'gluten', name: 'Gluten' },
+  { code: 'crustaceans', name: 'Crustaceans' },
+  { code: 'eggs', name: 'Eggs' },
+  { code: 'fish', name: 'Fish' },
+  { code: 'peanuts', name: 'Peanuts' },
+  { code: 'soybeans', name: 'Soybeans' },
+  { code: 'milk', name: 'Milk' },
+  { code: 'nuts', name: 'Tree Nuts' },
+  { code: 'celery', name: 'Celery' },
+  { code: 'mustard', name: 'Mustard' },
+  { code: 'sesame', name: 'Sesame' },
+  { code: 'sulphites', name: 'Sulphites' },
+  { code: 'lupin', name: 'Lupin' },
+  { code: 'molluscs', name: 'Molluscs' },
+] as const;
+
+export type AllergenCode = (typeof ALLERGENS)[number]['code'];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Helper Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a resource limit is unlimited (-1)
+ *
+ * @param limit - The limit value to check
+ * @returns True if unlimited
+ */
+export function isUnlimited(limit: number): boolean {
+  return limit === -1;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets the resource limit for a plan
+ *
+ * @param resource - Resource key
+ * @param plan - Plan type
+ * @returns The limit value (-1 for unlimited)
+ */
+export function getResourceLimit(resource: ResourceLimitKey, plan: PlanType): number {
+  return TIER_LIMITS.resources[resource][plan];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets the monthly limit for a plan
+ *
+ * @param metric - Monthly metric key
+ * @param plan - Plan type
+ * @returns The limit value (-1 for unlimited)
+ */
+export function getMonthlyLimit(metric: MonthlyLimitKey, plan: PlanType): number {
+  return TIER_LIMITS.monthly[metric][plan];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a feature is available for a plan
+ *
+ * @param feature - Feature key
+ * @param plan - Plan type
+ * @returns True if feature is available
+ */
+export function hasFeature(feature: FeatureKey, plan: PlanType): boolean {
+  return FEATURE_FLAGS[feature][plan];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets the minimum plan required for a feature
+ *
+ * @param feature - Feature key
+ * @returns The minimum plan type required
+ */
+export function getMinimumPlanForFeature(feature: FeatureKey): PlanType {
+  for (const plan of PLAN_HIERARCHY) {
+    if (FEATURE_FLAGS[feature][plan]) {
+      return plan;
+    }
+  }
+  return 'enterprise'; // Fallback
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a plan can upgrade to another plan
+ *
+ * @param currentPlan - Current plan
+ * @param targetPlan - Target plan
+ * @returns True if upgrade is allowed
+ */
+export function canUpgrade(currentPlan: PlanType, targetPlan: PlanType): boolean {
+  const currentPosition = PLANS[currentPlan].position;
+  const targetPosition = PLANS[targetPlan].position;
+  return targetPosition > currentPosition;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a plan can downgrade to another plan
+ *
+ * @param currentPlan - Current plan
+ * @param targetPlan - Target plan
+ * @returns True if downgrade is allowed
+ */
+export function canDowngrade(currentPlan: PlanType, targetPlan: PlanType): boolean {
+  const currentPosition = PLANS[currentPlan].position;
+  const targetPosition = PLANS[targetPlan].position;
+  return targetPosition < currentPosition;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates if a slug is reserved
+ *
+ * @param slug - Slug to check
+ * @returns True if slug is reserved
+ */
+export function isReservedSlug(slug: string): boolean {
+  return RESERVED_SLUGS.includes(slug.toLowerCase() as (typeof RESERVED_SLUGS)[number]);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates order status transition
+ *
+ * @param currentStatus - Current order status
+ * @param newStatus - Target order status
+ * @returns True if transition is valid
+ */
+export function isValidOrderTransition(currentStatus: OrderStatus, newStatus: OrderStatus): boolean {
+  return ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITIONS[currentStatus].includes(newStatus);
+}

diff --git a/src/config/env.ts b/src/config/env.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5211eed
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/config/env.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,276 @@
+/**
+ * Environment Configuration
+ *
+ * Zod-validated environment configuration for E-Menum.
+ * All environment variables are validated at startup to fail fast.
+ *
+ * @module config/env
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schema Definitions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Application environment schema
+ */
+const AppSchema = z.object({
+  NODE_ENV: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),
+  PORT: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(3000),
+  APP_NAME: z.string().min(1).default('E-Menum'),
+  APP_DOMAIN: z.string().min(1).default('e-menum.net'),
+  APP_URL: z.string().url().default('http://localhost:3000'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Database configuration schema
+ */
+const DatabaseSchema = z.object({
+  DATABASE_URL: z.string().url().startsWith('postgresql://'),
+  DATABASE_POOL_MIN: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).default(2),
+  DATABASE_POOL_MAX: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).default(10),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Redis/Cache configuration schema
+ */
+const RedisSchema = z.object({
+  REDIS_URL: z.string().url().startsWith('redis://'),
+  REDIS_PREFIX: z.string().min(1).default('emenum:'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * JWT authentication configuration schema
+ */
+const JwtSchema = z.object({
+  JWT_SECRET: z.string().min(32, 'JWT_SECRET must be at least 32 characters'),
+  JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: z.string().min(32, 'JWT_REFRESH_SECRET must be at least 32 characters'),
+  JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRY: z.string().regex(/^\d+[smhd]$/, 'Invalid time format (e.g., 15m, 1h, 7d)').default('15m'),
+  JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRY: z.string().regex(/^\d+[smhd]$/, 'Invalid time format (e.g., 15m, 1h, 7d)').default('7d'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Security configuration schema
+ */
+const SecuritySchema = z.object({
+  BCRYPT_ROUNDS: z.coerce.number().int().min(10).max(15).default(12),
+  SESSION_SECRET: z.string().min(32, 'SESSION_SECRET must be at least 32 characters'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * SMTP/Email configuration schema
+ */
+const SmtpSchema = z.object({
+  SMTP_HOST: z.string().min(1).optional(),
+  SMTP_PORT: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(587),
+  SMTP_USER: z.string().optional(),
+  SMTP_PASS: z.string().optional(),
+  SMTP_FROM: z.string().optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * File storage configuration schema
+ */
+const StorageSchema = z.object({
+  UPLOAD_DIR: z.string().min(1).default('./uploads'),
+  UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(10485760), // 10MB
+  ALLOWED_FILE_TYPES: z
+    .string()
+    .default('image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,image/gif')
+    .transform((val) => val.split(',')),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Logging configuration schema
+ */
+const LoggingSchema = z.object({
+  LOG_LEVEL: z.enum(['error', 'warn', 'info', 'debug', 'trace']).default('info'),
+  LOG_FORMAT: z.enum(['json', 'pretty']).default('pretty'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Rate limiting configuration schema
+ */
+const RateLimitSchema = z.object({
+  RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(60000),
+  RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(100),
+});
+
+/**
+ * CORS configuration schema
+ */
+const CorsSchema = z.object({
+  CORS_ORIGIN: z
+    .string()
+    .default('http://localhost:3000')
+    .transform((val) => val.split(',')),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Feature flags schema
+ */
+const FeaturesSchema = z.object({
+  ENABLE_SWAGGER: z.coerce.boolean().default(true),
+  ENABLE_QUERY_LOGGING: z.coerce.boolean().default(false),
+});
+
+/**
+ * External services schema (optional)
+ */
+const ExternalSchema = z.object({
+  SENTRY_DSN: z.string().url().optional(),
+  GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID: z.string().optional(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Combined Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Complete environment configuration schema
+ */
+const EnvSchema = z.object({
+  ...AppSchema.shape,
+  ...DatabaseSchema.shape,
+  ...RedisSchema.shape,
+  ...JwtSchema.shape,
+  ...SecuritySchema.shape,
+  ...SmtpSchema.shape,
+  ...StorageSchema.shape,
+  ...LoggingSchema.shape,
+  ...RateLimitSchema.shape,
+  ...CorsSchema.shape,
+  ...FeaturesSchema.shape,
+  ...ExternalSchema.shape,
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Type Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Inferred environment configuration type
+ */
+export type EnvConfig = z.infer<typeof EnvSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Environment type union
+ */
+export type NodeEnv = 'development' | 'production' | 'test';
+
+/**
+ * Log level type
+ */
+export type LogLevel = 'error' | 'warn' | 'info' | 'debug' | 'trace';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Validation & Export
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validates environment variables and returns parsed configuration.
+ *
+ * @throws {Error} When environment validation fails
+ * @returns Validated environment configuration
+ */
+function validateEnv(): EnvConfig {
+  const result = EnvSchema.safeParse(process.env);
+
+  if (!result.success) {
+    const errors = result.error.format();
+    const errorMessages = Object.entries(errors)
+      .filter(([key]) => key !== '_errors')
+      .map(([key, value]) => {
+        const messages = (value as { _errors?: string[] })?._errors?.join(', ') || 'Invalid value';
+        return `  - ${key}: ${messages}`;
+      })
+      .join('\n');
+
+    throw new Error(
+      `Environment validation failed:\n${errorMessages}\n\n` +
+        'Please check your .env file and ensure all required variables are set correctly.'
+    );
+  }
+
+  return result.data;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validated environment configuration
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { env } from '@/config/env';
+ *
+ * console.log(env.NODE_ENV);    // 'development'
+ * console.log(env.PORT);        // 3000
+ * console.log(env.DATABASE_URL); // 'postgresql://...'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const env = validateEnv();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Helper Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Checks if the current environment is development
+ */
+export function isDevelopment(): boolean {
+  return env.NODE_ENV === 'development';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if the current environment is production
+ */
+export function isProduction(): boolean {
+  return env.NODE_ENV === 'production';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if the current environment is test
+ */
+export function isTest(): boolean {
+  return env.NODE_ENV === 'test';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets JWT expiry time in milliseconds
+ *
+ * @param expiry - Time string (e.g., '15m', '1h', '7d')
+ * @returns Expiry time in milliseconds
+ */
+export function parseExpiryToMs(expiry: string): number {
+  const match = expiry.match(/^(\d+)([smhd])$/);
+  if (!match) {
+    throw new Error(`Invalid expiry format: ${expiry}`);
+  }
+
+  const value = parseInt(match[1], 10);
+  const unit = match[2];
+
+  const multipliers: Record<string, number> = {
+    s: 1000,
+    m: 60 * 1000,
+    h: 60 * 60 * 1000,
+    d: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
+  };
+
+  return value * multipliers[unit];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets access token expiry in milliseconds
+ */
+export function getAccessTokenExpiryMs(): number {
+  return parseExpiryToMs(env.JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRY);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets refresh token expiry in milliseconds
+ */
+export function getRefreshTokenExpiryMs(): number {
+  return parseExpiryToMs(env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRY);
+}

diff --git a/src/core/base/base.repository.ts b/src/core/base/base.repository.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e947b70
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/core/base/base.repository.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,807 @@
+/**
+ * Base Repository with Multi-Tenant Support
+ *
+ * Abstract base class for all repositories in E-Menum.
+ * Provides common CRUD operations with automatic tenant isolation.
+ *
+ * @module core/base/base.repository
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class MenuRepository extends BaseRepository<Menu, CreateMenuDto, UpdateMenuDto> {
+ *   constructor(@inject('PrismaClient') prisma: PrismaClient) {
+ *     super(prisma, 'menu');
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { notDeleted, softDelete } from '@/config/database';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types & Interfaces
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Base entity interface that all tenant-scoped entities must implement
+ */
+export interface BaseEntity {
+  /** Unique identifier (CUID) */
+  id: string;
+  /** Organization/tenant ID for multi-tenancy */
+  organizationId: string;
+  /** Creation timestamp */
+  createdAt: Date;
+  /** Last update timestamp */
+  updatedAt: Date;
+  /** Soft delete timestamp (null if not deleted) */
+  deletedAt: Date | null;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Pagination parameters for list queries
+ */
+export interface PaginationParams {
+  /** Page number (1-indexed) */
+  page?: number;
+  /** Number of items per page */
+  perPage?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Sorting parameters for list queries
+ */
+export interface SortParams<TEntity> {
+  /** Field to sort by */
+  sortBy?: keyof TEntity;
+  /** Sort direction */
+  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Combined query parameters for list operations
+ */
+export interface QueryParams<TEntity> extends PaginationParams, SortParams<TEntity> {
+  /** Include soft-deleted records */
+  includeDeleted?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Paginated response structure
+ */
+export interface PaginatedResult<TEntity> {
+  /** Array of entities */
+  data: TEntity[];
+  /** Pagination metadata */
+  meta: {
+    /** Current page number */
+    page: number;
+    /** Items per page */
+    perPage: number;
+    /** Total number of items */
+    total: number;
+    /** Total number of pages */
+    totalPages: number;
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Tenant context for repository operations
+ */
+export interface TenantContext {
+  /** Organization/tenant ID */
+  organizationId: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/** Default number of items per page */
+const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 20;
+
+/** Maximum number of items per page */
+const MAX_PER_PAGE = 100;
+
+/** Default sort order */
+const DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER = 'desc' as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Repository Class
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Abstract base repository with multi-tenant support.
+ *
+ * This class enforces tenant isolation by requiring organizationId
+ * in all operations. It also handles soft delete automatically.
+ *
+ * @typeParam TEntity - The entity type this repository manages
+ * @typeParam TCreateInput - Input type for create operations
+ * @typeParam TUpdateInput - Input type for update operations
+ *
+ * @remarks
+ * - All queries automatically filter by organizationId
+ * - Soft delete is enforced (deletedAt null filter)
+ * - Use includeDeleted: true to include soft-deleted records
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class MenuRepository extends BaseRepository<Menu, CreateMenuDto, UpdateMenuDto> {
+ *   constructor(@inject('PrismaClient') prisma: PrismaClient) {
+ *     super(prisma, 'menu');
+ *   }
+ *
+ *   // Custom query example
+ *   async findPublished(organizationId: string): Promise<Menu[]> {
+ *     return this.prisma.menu.findMany({
+ *       where: {
+ *         organizationId,
+ *         ...notDeleted,
+ *         isPublished: true,
+ *       },
+ *     });
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export abstract class BaseRepository<
+  TEntity extends BaseEntity,
+  TCreateInput extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>,
+  TUpdateInput extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>,
+> {
+  /**
+   * The Prisma model name (lowercase) for dynamic access
+   */
+  protected readonly modelName: string;
+
+  /**
+   * Prisma client instance for database operations
+   */
+  protected readonly prisma: PrismaClient;
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new BaseRepository instance
+   *
+   * @param prisma - Prisma client instance
+   * @param modelName - Name of the Prisma model (lowercase, e.g., 'menu', 'category')
+   */
+  constructor(prisma: PrismaClient, modelName: string) {
+    this.prisma = prisma;
+    this.modelName = modelName;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all entities for an organization with pagination
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters (pagination, sorting)
+   * @returns Paginated list of entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await menuRepository.findAll('org_123', {
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 10,
+   *   sortBy: 'createdAt',
+   *   sortOrder: 'desc',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findAll(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: QueryParams<TEntity> = {}
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<TEntity>> {
+    const { page = 1, perPage = DEFAULT_PER_PAGE, sortBy, sortOrder, includeDeleted } = params;
+
+    // Validate and normalize pagination
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    // Build where clause with tenant isolation
+    const where = {
+      organizationId,
+      ...(includeDeleted ? {} : notDeleted),
+    };
+
+    // Build orderBy clause
+    const orderBy = sortBy
+      ? { [sortBy]: sortOrder || DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER }
+      : { createdAt: DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER };
+
+    // Execute count and find in parallel
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+      this.prisma[this.modelName].count({ where }),
+      // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+      this.prisma[this.modelName].findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy,
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data,
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all entities without pagination
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param options - Optional query options
+   * @returns Array of entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menus = await menuRepository.findAllWithoutPagination('org_123');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findAllWithoutPagination(
+    organizationId: string,
+    options: { includeDeleted?: boolean; sortBy?: keyof TEntity; sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc' } = {}
+  ): Promise<TEntity[]> {
+    const { includeDeleted, sortBy, sortOrder } = options;
+
+    const where = {
+      organizationId,
+      ...(includeDeleted ? {} : notDeleted),
+    };
+
+    const orderBy = sortBy
+      ? { [sortBy]: sortOrder || DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER }
+      : { createdAt: DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER };
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].findMany({
+      where,
+      orderBy,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a single entity by ID with tenant isolation
+   *
+   * @param id - Entity ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns The entity or null if not found
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.findById('menu_123', 'org_123');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findById(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<TEntity | null> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].findFirst({
+      where: {
+        id,
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a single entity by ID or throws an exception
+   *
+   * @param id - Entity ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns The entity
+   * @throws {AppException} When entity is not found (404)
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * try {
+   *   const menu = await menuRepository.findByIdOrThrow('menu_123', 'org_123');
+   * } catch (e) {
+   *   // Handle not found
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findByIdOrThrow(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<TEntity> {
+    const entity = await this.findById(id, organizationId);
+
+    if (!entity) {
+      throw AppException.notFound(this.getResourceName(), id);
+    }
+
+    return entity;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a single entity by custom criteria with tenant isolation
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param criteria - Additional where conditions
+   * @returns The entity or null if not found
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.findOne('org_123', { slug: 'main-menu' });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findOne(
+    organizationId: string,
+    criteria: Record<string, unknown>
+  ): Promise<TEntity | null> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].findFirst({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...criteria,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if an entity exists with given criteria
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param criteria - Where conditions to check
+   * @returns True if entity exists
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const exists = await menuRepository.exists('org_123', { slug: 'main-menu' });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async exists(organizationId: string, criteria: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<boolean> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    const count = await this.prisma[this.modelName].count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...criteria,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return count > 0;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts entities matching criteria
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param criteria - Optional where conditions
+   * @returns Count of matching entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const count = await menuRepository.count('org_123', { isPublished: true });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async count(organizationId: string, criteria: Record<string, unknown> = {}): Promise<number> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...criteria,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new entity with tenant association
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant association
+   * @param data - Entity creation data
+   * @returns The created entity
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.create('org_123', {
+   *   name: 'Main Menu',
+   *   description: 'Our main offerings',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(organizationId: string, data: TCreateInput): Promise<TEntity> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].create({
+      data: {
+        ...data,
+        organizationId,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates multiple entities in a batch
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant association
+   * @param dataList - Array of entity creation data
+   * @returns The count of created entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const { count } = await menuRepository.createMany('org_123', [
+   *   { name: 'Menu 1' },
+   *   { name: 'Menu 2' },
+   * ]);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async createMany(
+    organizationId: string,
+    dataList: TCreateInput[]
+  ): Promise<{ count: number }> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].createMany({
+      data: dataList.map((data) => ({
+        ...data,
+        organizationId,
+      })),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an entity with tenant isolation
+   *
+   * @param id - Entity ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param data - Entity update data
+   * @returns The updated entity
+   * @throws {AppException} When entity is not found (404)
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.update('menu_123', 'org_123', {
+   *   name: 'Updated Menu Name',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async update(id: string, organizationId: string, data: TUpdateInput): Promise<TEntity> {
+    // First verify entity exists and belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].update({
+      where: { id },
+      data,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates multiple entities matching criteria
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param criteria - Where conditions for entities to update
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns The count of updated entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const { count } = await menuRepository.updateMany('org_123',
+   *   { isPublished: true },
+   *   { isPublished: false }
+   * );
+   * ```
+   */
+  async updateMany(
+    organizationId: string,
+    criteria: Record<string, unknown>,
+    data: TUpdateInput
+  ): Promise<{ count: number }> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].updateMany({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...criteria,
+      },
+      data,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations (Soft Delete)
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes an entity (sets deletedAt timestamp)
+   *
+   * @param id - Entity ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns The soft-deleted entity
+   * @throws {AppException} When entity is not found (404)
+   *
+   * @remarks
+   * This performs a soft delete, not a physical delete.
+   * The entity remains in the database with deletedAt set.
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.softDelete('menu_123', 'org_123');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async softDelete(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<TEntity> {
+    // First verify entity exists and belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes multiple entities matching criteria
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param criteria - Where conditions for entities to delete
+   * @returns The count of deleted entities
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const { count } = await menuRepository.softDeleteMany('org_123', {
+   *   isPublished: false,
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async softDeleteMany(
+    organizationId: string,
+    criteria: Record<string, unknown>
+  ): Promise<{ count: number }> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].updateMany({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...criteria,
+      },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted entity
+   *
+   * @param id - Entity ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns The restored entity
+   * @throws {AppException} When entity is not found (404)
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const menu = await menuRepository.restore('menu_123', 'org_123');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async restore(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<TEntity> {
+    // Find including deleted
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    const entity = await this.prisma[this.modelName].findFirst({
+      where: {
+        id,
+        organizationId,
+      },
+    });
+
+    if (!entity) {
+      throw AppException.notFound(this.getResourceName(), id);
+    }
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { deletedAt: null },
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets the resource name for error messages
+   * Override in subclass for custom resource names
+   *
+   * @returns Resource name (e.g., 'Menu', 'Category')
+   */
+  protected getResourceName(): string {
+    // Capitalize first letter of model name
+    return this.modelName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + this.modelName.slice(1);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Builds a where clause with tenant isolation
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param additionalCriteria - Additional where conditions
+   * @param includeDeleted - Whether to include soft-deleted records
+   * @returns Complete where clause
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const where = this.buildWhereClause('org_123', { isPublished: true });
+   * ```
+   */
+  protected buildWhereClause(
+    organizationId: string,
+    additionalCriteria: Record<string, unknown> = {},
+    includeDeleted = false
+  ): Record<string, unknown> {
+    return {
+      organizationId,
+      ...(includeDeleted ? {} : notDeleted),
+      ...additionalCriteria,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Validates that the organizationId is provided
+   * Call this in methods that require tenant context
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID to validate
+   * @throws {AppException} When organizationId is missing
+   */
+  protected validateTenantContext(organizationId: string): void {
+    if (!organizationId) {
+      throw new AppException('TENANT_CONTEXT_MISSING', 400, {
+        message: 'Organization ID is required for this operation',
+      });
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Non-Tenant Repository Base
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Base repository for entities that don't require tenant isolation.
+ * Use this for platform-level entities like Plan, Feature, etc.
+ *
+ * @typeParam TEntity - The entity type this repository manages
+ * @typeParam TCreateInput - Input type for create operations
+ * @typeParam TUpdateInput - Input type for update operations
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class PlanRepository extends BaseNonTenantRepository<Plan, CreatePlanDto, UpdatePlanDto> {
+ *   constructor(@inject('PrismaClient') prisma: PrismaClient) {
+ *     super(prisma, 'plan');
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export abstract class BaseNonTenantRepository<
+  TEntity extends Omit<BaseEntity, 'organizationId'>,
+  TCreateInput extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>,
+  TUpdateInput extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>,
+> {
+  protected readonly modelName: string;
+  protected readonly prisma: PrismaClient;
+
+  constructor(prisma: PrismaClient, modelName: string) {
+    this.prisma = prisma;
+    this.modelName = modelName;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all entities with pagination
+   */
+  async findAll(params: QueryParams<TEntity> = {}): Promise<PaginatedResult<TEntity>> {
+    const { page = 1, perPage = DEFAULT_PER_PAGE, sortBy, sortOrder, includeDeleted } = params;
+
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    const where = includeDeleted ? {} : notDeleted;
+    const orderBy = sortBy
+      ? { [sortBy]: sortOrder || DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER }
+      : { createdAt: DEFAULT_SORT_ORDER };
+
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+      this.prisma[this.modelName].count({ where }),
+      // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+      this.prisma[this.modelName].findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy,
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data,
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a single entity by ID
+   */
+  async findById(id: string): Promise<TEntity | null> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].findFirst({
+      where: { id, ...notDeleted },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a single entity by ID or throws
+   */
+  async findByIdOrThrow(id: string): Promise<TEntity> {
+    const entity = await this.findById(id);
+
+    if (!entity) {
+      throw AppException.notFound(this.getResourceName(), id);
+    }
+
+    return entity;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new entity
+   */
+  async create(data: TCreateInput): Promise<TEntity> {
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].create({ data });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an entity
+   */
+  async update(id: string, data: TUpdateInput): Promise<TEntity> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].update({
+      where: { id },
+      data,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes an entity
+   */
+  async softDelete(id: string): Promise<TEntity> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // @ts-expect-error - Dynamic model access
+    return this.prisma[this.modelName].update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets the resource name for error messages
+   */
+  protected getResourceName(): string {
+    return this.modelName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + this.modelName.slice(1);
+  }
+}

--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/core/exceptions/app.exception.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,428 @@
+/**
+ * Application Exception Base Class
+ *
+ * Custom exception class for E-Menum application errors.
+ * All application errors should use this class or its factory methods.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // Direct instantiation
+ * throw new AppException('MENU_NOT_FOUND', 404);
+ *
+ * // Using factory methods
+ * throw AppException.notFound('Menu', menuId);
+ * throw AppException.forbidden('menu.delete');
+ * throw AppException.validation([{ field: 'name', message: 'Required' }]);
+ * ```
+ */
+export class AppException extends Error {
+  /**
+   * Creates a new AppException instance
+   *
+   * @param code - Error code for i18n and identification (e.g., 'MENU_NOT_FOUND')
+   * @param statusCode - HTTP status code (default: 400)
+   * @param details - Additional error details for debugging
+   */
+  constructor(
+    public readonly code: string,
+    public readonly statusCode: number = 400,
+    public readonly details?: Record<string, unknown>
+  ) {
+    super(code);
+    this.name = 'AppException';
+
+    // Maintains proper stack trace for where error was thrown (V8 engines)
+    if (Error.captureStackTrace) {
+      Error.captureStackTrace(this, AppException);
+    }
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Converts the exception to a JSON-serializable object
+   */
+  toJSON(): Record<string, unknown> {
+    return {
+      name: this.name,
+      code: this.code,
+      statusCode: this.statusCode,
+      message: this.message,
+      details: this.details,
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Authentication (401)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an unauthorized exception (401)
+   * Use when authentication is required but not provided or invalid
+   *
+   * @param message - Optional custom message
+   */
+  static unauthorized(message?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('UNAUTHORIZED', 401, {
+      message: message || 'Authentication required',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a token expired exception (401)
+   * Use when JWT access token has expired
+   */
+  static tokenExpired(): AppException {
+    return new AppException('TOKEN_EXPIRED', 401, {
+      message: 'Access token has expired',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an invalid credentials exception (401)
+   * Use when login credentials are incorrect
+   */
+  static invalidCredentials(): AppException {
+    return new AppException('INVALID_CREDENTIALS', 401, {
+      message: 'Invalid email or password',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an invalid token exception (401)
+   * Use when JWT token is malformed or invalid
+   */
+  static invalidToken(): AppException {
+    return new AppException('INVALID_TOKEN', 401, {
+      message: 'Invalid or malformed token',
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Authorization (403)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a forbidden exception (403)
+   * Use when user lacks permission for an action
+   *
+   * @param action - The action that was forbidden (e.g., 'menu.delete')
+   */
+  static forbidden(action?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('FORBIDDEN', 403, {
+      action,
+      message: action ? `You do not have permission to: ${action}` : 'Access forbidden',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an insufficient plan exception (403)
+   * Use when feature requires a higher subscription tier
+   *
+   * @param feature - The feature that requires upgrade
+   * @param requiredPlan - The minimum plan required
+   */
+  static insufficientPlan(feature: string, requiredPlan: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('INSUFFICIENT_PLAN', 403, {
+      feature,
+      requiredPlan,
+      message: `Feature '${feature}' requires ${requiredPlan} plan or higher`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a feature disabled exception (403)
+   * Use when a feature is disabled for the organization
+   *
+   * @param feature - The disabled feature name
+   */
+  static featureDisabled(feature: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('FEATURE_DISABLED', 403, {
+      feature,
+      message: `Feature '${feature}' is not enabled for your organization`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Validation (400)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Validation error details interface
+   */
+  static validation(errors: ValidationError[]): AppException {
+    return new AppException('VALIDATION_ERROR', 400, {
+      errors,
+      message: 'Validation failed',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an invalid input exception (400)
+   * Use for general bad request scenarios
+   *
+   * @param message - Description of what's wrong
+   * @param field - Optional field name that caused the error
+   */
+  static invalidInput(message: string, field?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('INVALID_INPUT', 400, {
+      message,
+      field,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a bad request exception (400)
+   * Use for general malformed request scenarios
+   *
+   * @param message - Description of what's wrong
+   */
+  static badRequest(message: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('BAD_REQUEST', 400, {
+      message,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Resource Errors (404, 409)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a not found exception (404)
+   * Use when a requested resource doesn't exist
+   *
+   * @param resource - The resource type (e.g., 'Menu', 'User')
+   * @param id - Optional resource identifier
+   */
+  static notFound(resource: string, id?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException(`${resource.toUpperCase()}_NOT_FOUND`, 404, {
+      resource,
+      id,
+      message: id ? `${resource} with ID '${id}' not found` : `${resource} not found`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an already exists exception (409)
+   * Use when trying to create a resource that already exists
+   *
+   * @param resource - The resource type
+   * @param identifier - The conflicting identifier (e.g., email, slug)
+   */
+  static alreadyExists(resource: string, identifier?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException(`${resource.toUpperCase()}_ALREADY_EXISTS`, 409, {
+      resource,
+      identifier,
+      message: identifier
+        ? `${resource} with identifier '${identifier}' already exists`
+        : `${resource} already exists`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a conflict exception (409)
+   * Use for general conflict scenarios (e.g., optimistic locking failures)
+   *
+   * @param message - Description of the conflict
+   */
+  static conflict(message: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('CONFLICT', 409, {
+      message,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Rate Limiting (429)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a rate limited exception (429)
+   * Use when request rate limit is exceeded
+   *
+   * @param retryAfter - Seconds until rate limit resets
+   */
+  static rateLimited(retryAfter?: number): AppException {
+    return new AppException('RATE_LIMITED', 429, {
+      retryAfter,
+      message: retryAfter
+        ? `Rate limit exceeded. Try again in ${retryAfter} seconds`
+        : 'Rate limit exceeded',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a quota exceeded exception (429)
+   * Use when a plan-based quota is exceeded
+   *
+   * @param resource - The resource type (e.g., 'menus', 'products')
+   * @param limit - The quota limit
+   */
+  static quotaExceeded(resource: string, limit: number): AppException {
+    return new AppException('QUOTA_EXCEEDED', 429, {
+      resource,
+      limit,
+      message: `${resource} quota exceeded. Limit: ${limit}`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Server Errors (500, 503)
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an internal server error (500)
+   * Use for unexpected server-side errors
+   *
+   * @param message - Optional error message (not exposed to client in production)
+   */
+  static internal(message?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('INTERNAL_ERROR', 500, {
+      message: message || 'An unexpected error occurred',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a service unavailable exception (503)
+   * Use when a dependent service is unavailable
+   *
+   * @param service - The unavailable service name
+   */
+  static serviceUnavailable(service?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE', 503, {
+      service,
+      message: service ? `Service '${service}' is temporarily unavailable` : 'Service unavailable',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a database error exception (500)
+   * Use for database-related failures
+   *
+   * @param operation - The failed operation (e.g., 'insert', 'update')
+   */
+  static databaseError(operation?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('DATABASE_ERROR', 500, {
+      operation,
+      message: 'A database error occurred',
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Module System
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a module not found exception (404)
+   * Use when a module doesn't exist
+   *
+   * @param moduleId - The module identifier
+   */
+  static moduleNotFound(moduleId: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('MODULE_NOT_FOUND', 404, {
+      moduleId,
+      message: `Module '${moduleId}' not found`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a module dependency error (400)
+   * Use when module dependencies are not satisfied
+   *
+   * @param moduleId - The module identifier
+   * @param missingDependencies - List of missing dependency module IDs
+   */
+  static moduleDependencyError(moduleId: string, missingDependencies: string[]): AppException {
+    return new AppException('MODULE_DEPENDENCY_ERROR', 400, {
+      moduleId,
+      missingDependencies,
+      message: `Module '${moduleId}' has unmet dependencies: ${missingDependencies.join(', ')}`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a core module protection error (400)
+   * Use when trying to disable a core module
+   *
+   * @param moduleId - The core module identifier
+   */
+  static coreModuleProtected(moduleId: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('CORE_MODULE_PROTECTED', 400, {
+      moduleId,
+      message: `Core module '${moduleId}' cannot be disabled`,
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ============================================
+  // Factory Methods - Multi-tenancy
+  // ============================================
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a tenant not found exception (404)
+   * Use when organization/tenant doesn't exist
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - The organization identifier
+   */
+  static tenantNotFound(organizationId: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('TENANT_NOT_FOUND', 404, {
+      organizationId,
+      message: 'Organization not found or access denied',
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a tenant access denied exception (403)
+   * Use when user tries to access another tenant's data
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - The organization identifier being accessed
+   */
+  static tenantAccessDenied(organizationId?: string): AppException {
+    return new AppException('TENANT_ACCESS_DENIED', 403, {
+      organizationId,
+      message: 'Access to this organization is denied',
+    });
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validation error structure for field-level validation errors
+ */
+export interface ValidationError {
+  /** The field that failed validation */
+  field: string;
+  /** The validation error message */
+  message: string;
+  /** The invalid value (optional, may be omitted for security) */
+  value?: unknown;
+  /** The validation rule that failed (e.g., 'min', 'max', 'email') */
+  rule?: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Type guard to check if an error is an AppException
+ *
+ * @param error - The error to check
+ */
+export function isAppException(error: unknown): error is AppException {
+  return error instanceof AppException;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Helper to ensure an error is an AppException
+ * Wraps unknown errors in an internal error AppException
+ *
+ * @param error - The error to wrap
+ */
+export function toAppException(error: unknown): AppException {
+  if (isAppException(error)) {
+    return error;
+  }
+
+  if (error instanceof Error) {
+    return new AppException('INTERNAL_ERROR', 500, {
+      originalMessage: error.message,
+      originalName: error.name,
+    });
+  }
+
+  return new AppException('INTERNAL_ERROR', 500, {
+    originalError: String(error),
+  });
+}

+/**

+ *
+ * throw new AppException(ErrorCodes.MENU_NOT_FOUND, getHttpStatus(ErrorCodes.MENU_NOT_FOUND));

+
+// ============================================

+} as const;

+/**

+
+/**

+
+// ============================================
+// Helper Functions
+// ============================================
+
+/**
+ * Gets the HTTP status code for a given error code
+ *
+ * @param code - The error code
+ * @returns HTTP status code (defaults to 500 for unknown codes)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const status = getHttpStatus('MENU_NOT_FOUND'); // 404
+ * const status = getHttpStatus('UNKNOWN_CODE');   // 500
+ * ```
+ */
+export function getHttpStatus(code: string): number {
+  return ERROR_STATUS_MAP[code as ErrorCode] ?? 500;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a string is a valid error code
+ *
+ * @param code - The code to check
+ * @returns true if the code is a valid ErrorCode
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isValidErrorCode('MENU_NOT_FOUND');  // true
+ * isValidErrorCode('RANDOM_STRING');   // false
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidErrorCode(code: string): code is ErrorCode {
+  return code in ERROR_STATUS_MAP;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets the error category for a given error code
+ *
+ * @param code - The error code
+ * @returns Error category name
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * getErrorCategory('MENU_NOT_FOUND');    // 'NOT_FOUND'
+ * getErrorCategory('RATE_LIMITED');      // 'RATE_LIMIT'
+ * getErrorCategory('INTERNAL_ERROR');    // 'SERVER'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function getErrorCategory(code: string): string {
+  if (Object.values(AUTH_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof AUTH_ERRORS)[keyof typeof AUTH_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'AUTH';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(AUTHZ_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof AUTHZ_ERRORS)[keyof typeof AUTHZ_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'AUTHZ';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(VALIDATION_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof VALIDATION_ERRORS)[keyof typeof VALIDATION_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'VALIDATION';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(NOT_FOUND_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof NOT_FOUND_ERRORS)[keyof typeof NOT_FOUND_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'NOT_FOUND';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(CONFLICT_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof CONFLICT_ERRORS)[keyof typeof CONFLICT_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'CONFLICT';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(BUSINESS_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof BUSINESS_ERRORS)[keyof typeof BUSINESS_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'BUSINESS';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(RATE_LIMIT_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof RATE_LIMIT_ERRORS)[keyof typeof RATE_LIMIT_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'RATE_LIMIT';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(SERVER_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof SERVER_ERRORS)[keyof typeof SERVER_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'SERVER';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(MODULE_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof MODULE_ERRORS)[keyof typeof MODULE_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'MODULE';
+  }
+  if (Object.values(TENANT_ERRORS).includes(code as (typeof TENANT_ERRORS)[keyof typeof TENANT_ERRORS])) {
+    return 'TENANT';
+  }
+  return 'UNKNOWN';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if an error code represents a client error (4xx)
+ *
+ * @param code - The error code
+ * @returns true if the error is a client error
+ */
+export function isClientError(code: string): boolean {
+  const status = getHttpStatus(code);
+  return status >= 400 && status < 500;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if an error code represents a server error (5xx)
+ *
+ * @param code - The error code
+ * @returns true if the error is a server error
+ */
+export function isServerError(code: string): boolean {
+  const status = getHttpStatus(code);
+  return status >= 500;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if an error code represents a retryable error
+ * Retryable errors are typically rate limits or temporary server issues
+ *
+ * @param code - The error code
+ * @returns true if the error is potentially retryable
+ */
+export function isRetryableError(code: string): boolean {
+  const status = getHttpStatus(code);
+  // 429 (rate limited) and 503 (service unavailable) are retryable
+  return status === 429 || status === 503;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates a resource-specific NOT_FOUND error code
+ *
+ * @param resource - The resource name (e.g., 'Menu', 'Product')
+ * @returns Error code like 'MENU_NOT_FOUND'
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * createNotFoundCode('Menu');     // 'MENU_NOT_FOUND'
+ * createNotFoundCode('Product');  // 'PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function createNotFoundCode(resource: string): string {
+  return `${resource.toUpperCase()}_NOT_FOUND`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates a resource-specific ALREADY_EXISTS error code
+ *
+ * @param resource - The resource name (e.g., 'User', 'Menu')
+ * @returns Error code like 'USER_ALREADY_EXISTS'
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * createAlreadyExistsCode('User');  // 'USER_ALREADY_EXISTS'
+ * createAlreadyExistsCode('Menu');  // 'MENU_ALREADY_EXISTS'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function createAlreadyExistsCode(resource: string): string {
+  return `${resource.toUpperCase()}_ALREADY_EXISTS`;
+}

diff --git a/src/core/kernel/container.ts b/src/core/kernel/container.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..da70be3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/core/kernel/container.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,357 @@
+/**
+ * Dependency Injection Container
+ *
+ * DI container setup using tsyringe for E-Menum.
+ * Provides centralized dependency injection and service registration.
+ *
+ * @module core/kernel/container
+ */
+
+import 'reflect-metadata';
+import { container, DependencyContainer, InjectionToken } from 'tsyringe';
+import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
+import Redis from 'ioredis';
+import { prisma } from '@/config/database';
+import { redis } from '@/config/redis';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Injection Tokens
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Standard injection tokens for core services.
+ * Use these tokens when injecting dependencies in constructors.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class MenuService {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject(TOKENS.PrismaClient) private prisma: PrismaClient,
+ *     @inject(TOKENS.Redis) private redis: Redis,
+ *   ) {}
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export const TOKENS = {
+  /** Prisma database client */
+  PrismaClient: 'PrismaClient' as InjectionToken<PrismaClient>,
+
+  /** Redis cache client */
+  Redis: 'Redis' as InjectionToken<Redis>,
+
+  /** Event emitter service */
+  EventService: 'EventService' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+
+  /** Logger service */
+  Logger: 'Logger' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+
+  /** Configuration service */
+  Config: 'Config' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+
+  /** Module loader service */
+  ModuleLoader: 'ModuleLoader' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+
+  /** Permission/ability service */
+  PermissionService: 'PermissionService' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+
+  /** Authentication service */
+  AuthService: 'AuthService' as InjectionToken<unknown>,
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Type for available token names
+ */
+export type TokenName = keyof typeof TOKENS;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Container Setup
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Global DI container instance.
+ * All services and dependencies are registered and resolved through this container.
+ */
+export const appContainer: DependencyContainer = container;
+
+/**
+ * Registers core infrastructure services with the container.
+ * Call this once during application bootstrap before loading modules.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { registerCoreServices } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * // In bootstrap.ts
+ * await registerCoreServices();
+ * ```
+ */
+export function registerCoreServices(): void {
+  // Register Prisma client singleton
+  if (!container.isRegistered(TOKENS.PrismaClient)) {
+    container.register(TOKENS.PrismaClient, { useValue: prisma });
+  }
+
+  // Register Redis client singleton
+  if (!container.isRegistered(TOKENS.Redis)) {
+    container.register(TOKENS.Redis, { useValue: redis });
+  }
+
+  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
+  console.log('[Container] Core services registered');
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service Registration Helpers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Registers a singleton service with the container.
+ * Singleton services are created once and reused for all requests.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service
+ * @param implementation - Service class or constructor
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { registerSingleton } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class EmailService { ... }
+ *
+ * registerSingleton('EmailService', EmailService);
+ * ```
+ */
+export function registerSingleton<T>(
+  token: InjectionToken<T>,
+  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
+  implementation: new (...args: any[]) => T
+): void {
+  container.registerSingleton(token, implementation);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Registers an instance as a singleton with the container.
+ * Useful for external instances or pre-configured objects.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service
+ * @param instance - Pre-created instance to register
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { registerInstance } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const eventEmitter = new EventEmitter2();
+ * registerInstance('EventEmitter', eventEmitter);
+ * ```
+ */
+export function registerInstance<T>(token: InjectionToken<T>, instance: T): void {
+  container.register(token, { useValue: instance });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Registers a factory function with the container.
+ * Factory is called each time the dependency is resolved.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service
+ * @param factory - Factory function that creates the instance
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { registerFactory } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * registerFactory('RequestLogger', (c) => {
+ *   const logger = c.resolve('Logger');
+ *   return new RequestLogger(logger);
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+export function registerFactory<T>(
+  token: InjectionToken<T>,
+  factory: (container: DependencyContainer) => T
+): void {
+  container.register(token, { useFactory: factory });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Registers a scoped service with the container.
+ * Scoped services are resolved once per scope (e.g., per request).
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service
+ * @param implementation - Service class or constructor
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { registerScoped } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class RequestContext { ... }
+ *
+ * registerScoped('RequestContext', RequestContext);
+ * ```
+ */
+export function registerScoped<T>(
+  token: InjectionToken<T>,
+  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
+  implementation: new (...args: any[]) => T
+): void {
+  // tsyringe doesn't have built-in scoped lifetime, but we use child containers
+  container.register(token, implementation);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service Resolution Helpers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Resolves a service from the container.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service to resolve
+ * @returns Resolved service instance
+ * @throws When service is not registered
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { resolve, TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const prisma = resolve(TOKENS.PrismaClient);
+ * const users = await prisma.user.findMany();
+ * ```
+ */
+export function resolve<T>(token: InjectionToken<T>): T {
+  return container.resolve(token);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Attempts to resolve a service, returning undefined if not registered.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token for the service
+ * @returns Resolved service or undefined
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const analytics = resolveOptional('AnalyticsService');
+ * analytics?.trackEvent('page_view');
+ * ```
+ */
+export function resolveOptional<T>(token: InjectionToken<T>): T | undefined {
+  try {
+    if (container.isRegistered(token)) {
+      return container.resolve(token);
+    }
+    return undefined;
+  } catch {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a service is registered in the container.
+ *
+ * @param token - Injection token to check
+ * @returns True if service is registered
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * if (isRegistered('PaymentService')) {
+ *   const paymentService = resolve('PaymentService');
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isRegistered<T>(token: InjectionToken<T>): boolean {
+  return container.isRegistered(token);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Scoped Container (Request Scope)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Creates a child container for request-scoped dependencies.
+ * Each HTTP request should get its own child container.
+ *
+ * @returns Child container with isolated scope
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // In request middleware
+ * app.use((req, res, next) => {
+ *   req.container = createChildContainer();
+ *   req.container.register('RequestId', { useValue: generateRequestId() });
+ *   next();
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+export function createChildContainer(): DependencyContainer {
+  return container.createChildContainer();
+}
+
+/**
+ * Disposes a child container and cleans up resources.
+ * Call this at the end of each request to prevent memory leaks.
+ *
+ * @param childContainer - Child container to dispose
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // After request handling
+ * disposeChildContainer(req.container);
+ * ```
+ */
+export function disposeChildContainer(childContainer: DependencyContainer): void {
+  childContainer.clearInstances();
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Container Reset (Testing)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Resets the container to its initial state.
+ * Only use this in test environments to clean up between tests.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // In test setup
+ * beforeEach(() => {
+ *   resetContainer();
+ *   registerCoreServices();
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+export function resetContainer(): void {
+  container.clearInstances();
+  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
+  console.log('[Container] Reset complete');
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Decorator Re-exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Re-export tsyringe decorators for convenience.
+ * Use these decorators to mark classes as injectable.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { injectable, inject, TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class MenuService {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject(TOKENS.PrismaClient) private prisma: PrismaClient,
+ *   ) {}
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export { injectable, inject, singleton, delay, injectAll } from 'tsyringe';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Type Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Re-export tsyringe types for type annotations
+ */
+export type { DependencyContainer, InjectionToken } from 'tsyringe';
