diff --git a/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2c30126
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,553 @@
+/**
+ * Branch Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for branch endpoints.
+ * Handles branch CRUD, settings management, and hierarchy operations.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/branch/branch.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List branches
+ * GET /api/v1/branches
+ *
+ * // Get branch by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/branches/:id
+ *
+ * // Create branch
+ * POST /api/v1/branches
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, CurrentOrg, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { BranchService } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Branch,
+  BranchWithRelations,
+  CreateBranchRequest,
+  CreateBranchResponse,
+  UpdateBranchRequest,
+  UpdateBranchResponse,
+  UpdateBranchSettingsRequest,
+  UpdateBranchSettingsResponse,
+  ChangeBranchStatusRequest,
+  ChangeBranchStatusResponse,
+  BranchListParams,
+  BranchSummary,
+  BranchSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization context from middleware
+ */
+interface OrganizationContext {
+  id: string;
+  name?: string;
+  slug?: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all branch-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete branches
+ * - Settings management
+ * - Status changes
+ * - Hierarchy operations
+ * - Validation endpoints
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List branches
+ * GET /api/v1/branches?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+ *
+ * // Get branch by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/branches/branch_123
+ *
+ * // Create branch
+ * POST /api/v1/branches
+ * {
+ *   "name": "Downtown Location",
+ *   "code": "DOWNTOWN"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/branches')
+@injectable()
+export class BranchController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('BranchService') private readonly branchService: BranchService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List branches with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, status, search, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of branches
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/branches?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 10, "total": 5, "totalPages": 1 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @QueryParams() query: BranchListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<Branch>>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.list(org.id, query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List branch summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/summaries
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @returns Array of branch summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized()
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<BranchSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.listSummaries(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get branch hierarchy (tree structure).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/hierarchy
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @returns Array of root branches with children
+   */
+  @Get('/hierarchy')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async getHierarchy(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch[]>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getHierarchy(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get children of a specific branch.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/:id/children
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Parent branch ID
+   * @returns Array of child branches
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/children')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async getChildren(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch[]>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getHierarchy(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get branch by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @returns Branch details
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/branches/branch_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "branch_123",
+   *     "name": "Downtown Location",
+   *     ...
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async getById(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<BranchWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getByIdWithRelations(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get branch by code.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/code/:code
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param code - Branch code
+   * @returns Branch details
+   */
+  @Get('/code/:code')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async getByCode(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('code') code: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch | null>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getByCode(org.id, code);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get the main branch.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/main
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @returns Main branch or null
+   */
+  @Get('/main')
+  @Authorized('branch.read')
+  async getMain(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch | null>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getMainBranch(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get branch settings.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/:id/settings
+   * @access Authenticated (branch manager+)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @returns Branch settings
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('branch.settings.read')
+  async getSettings(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<BranchSettings>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.getSettings(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new branch.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/branches
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param data - Branch creation data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created branch
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/branches
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Downtown Location",
+   *   "code": "DOWNTOWN",
+   *   "phone": "+90 555 123 4567"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "branch": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Branch created successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('branch.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Body() data: CreateBranchRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateBranchResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.create(org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update a branch.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/branches/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (branch manager+)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated branch
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PUT /api/v1/branches/branch_123
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Updated Branch Name",
+   *   "phone": "+90 555 987 6543"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized('branch.update')
+  async update(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateBranchRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateBranchResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.update(org.id, id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update branch settings.
+   *
+   * Settings are merged with existing settings, not replaced.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/branches/:id/settings
+   * @access Authenticated (branch manager+)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param data - Settings update data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated settings
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/branches/branch_123/settings
+   * {
+   *   "settings": {
+   *     "features": {
+   *       "enableOnlineOrdering": true
+   *     }
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('branch.settings.update')
+  async updateSettings(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateBranchSettingsRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateBranchSettingsResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.updateSettings(org.id, id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change branch status.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/branches/:id/status
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin+)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param data - Status change data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Status change response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/branches/branch_123/status
+   * {
+   *   "status": "INACTIVE",
+   *   "reason": "Temporarily closed for renovation"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/status')
+  @Authorized('branch.update')
+  async changeStatus(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ChangeBranchStatusRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeBranchStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.changeStatus(org.id, id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Set a branch as the main branch.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/branches/:id/set-main
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated branch
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/set-main')
+  @Authorized('branch.manage')
+  async setAsMain(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.setAsMain(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a branch (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/branches/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/branches/branch_123
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('branch.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.branchService.delete(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted branch.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/branches/:id/restore
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - Branch ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Restored branch
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('branch.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Branch>> {
+    const result = await this.branchService.restore(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a branch code is available.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/branches/check-code/:code
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param code - Code to check
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-code/:code')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkCode(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: OrganizationContext,
+    @Param('code') code: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.branchService.isCodeAvailable(org.id, code);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+}

+/**
+ * Branch Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Branch module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for the branch module.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/branch/branch.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { branchRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/branches/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/branches/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch module route configuration
+ */
+export interface BranchRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Branch module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the branch module:
+ * - Protected endpoints (all branch operations require authentication)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { branchRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(branchRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/branches'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const branchRoutes: BranchRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for branch endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/branches',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/branches',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for branch module - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/hierarchy',
+    '/main',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/children',
+    '/:id/settings',
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/set-main',
+    '/:id/restore',
+    '/code/:code',
+    '/check-code/:code',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a branch endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/summaries')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/branches/summaries')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildBranchApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/branches/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildBranchApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${branchRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a branch endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/list')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/branches/list')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildBranchAdminPath('/list');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/branches/list'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildBranchAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${branchRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected branch route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedBranchRoute('/api/v1/branches'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedBranchRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with branch prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(branchRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All branch routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface BranchEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all branch endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const branchEndpoints: BranchEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List branches with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List branch summaries for dropdowns',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/hierarchy',
+    description: 'Get branch hierarchy tree',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/main',
+    description: 'Get the main branch',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get branch by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/children',
+    description: 'Get child branches',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/code/:code',
+    description: 'Get branch by code',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Get branch settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:settings.read'],
+  },
+
+  // Create endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create a new branch',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:create'],
+  },
+
+  // Update endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update a branch',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Update branch settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:settings.update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/status',
+    description: 'Change branch status',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/set-main',
+    description: 'Set branch as main',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:manage'],
+  },
+
+  // Delete endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete a branch (soft delete)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/restore',
+    description: 'Restore a deleted branch',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['branch:delete'],
+  },
+
+  // Validation endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-code/:code',
+    description: 'Check if a branch code is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default branchRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e03aeed
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,504 @@
+/**
+ * Branch Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Branch module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/branch/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createBranchSchema,
+ *   updateBranchSchema,
+ *   updateBranchSettingsSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validatedData = createBranchSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Reserved branch codes that cannot be used
+ */
+const RESERVED_CODES = [
+  'main',
+  'default',
+  'all',
+  'none',
+  'system',
+  'admin',
+  'api',
+  'test',
+] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Valid branch statuses
+ */
+const BRANCH_STATUSES = ['ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', 'SUSPENDED'] as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch name schema
+ * - Required, 2-100 characters
+ * - Allows letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and some punctuation
+ */
+export const branchNameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(2, 'Branch name must be at least 2 characters')
+  .max(100, 'Branch name must be at most 100 characters')
+  .regex(
+    /^[a-zA-ZÀ-ÿĞğÜüŞşİıÖöÇç0-9\s\-'&.#]+$/,
+    'Branch name contains invalid characters'
+  );
+
+/**
+ * Branch code schema
+ * - Uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
+ * - Not in reserved list
+ */
+export const branchCodeSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toUpperCase()
+  .min(2, 'Branch code must be at least 2 characters')
+  .max(20, 'Branch code must be at most 20 characters')
+  .regex(/^[A-Z0-9]+(?:-[A-Z0-9]+)*$/, 'Branch code must be uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only')
+  .refine((val) => !RESERVED_CODES.includes(val.toLowerCase() as typeof RESERVED_CODES[number]), {
+    message: 'This branch code is reserved and cannot be used',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * Branch description schema
+ */
+export const branchDescriptionSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(500, 'Description must be at most 500 characters')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Email validation schema
+ */
+export const emailSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .email('Invalid email format')
+  .max(255, 'Email is too long')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Phone number schema (optional, Turkish format support)
+ */
+export const phoneSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .optional()
+  .nullable()
+  .refine((val) => !val || /^\+?[\d\s\-()]{10,20}$/.test(val), {
+    message: 'Invalid phone number format',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * URL schema for images
+ */
+export const urlSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .url('Invalid URL format')
+  .max(500, 'URL is too long')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Color hex schema for theming
+ */
+export const colorHexSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(/^#([A-Fa-f0-9]{6}|[A-Fa-f0-9]{3})$/, 'Invalid hex color format')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Time format schema (HH:mm)
+ */
+export const timeSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/, 'Invalid time format (use HH:mm)')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Latitude schema
+ */
+export const latitudeSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .min(-90, 'Latitude must be between -90 and 90')
+  .max(90, 'Latitude must be between -90 and 90')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Longitude schema
+ */
+export const longitudeSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .min(-180, 'Longitude must be between -180 and 180')
+  .max(180, 'Longitude must be between -180 and 180')
+  .optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Address Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch address schema
+ */
+export const branchAddressSchema = z.object({
+  street1: z.string().max(200).optional(),
+  street2: z.string().max(200).optional(),
+  city: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  state: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  postalCode: z.string().max(20).optional(),
+  country: z.string().length(2, 'Country must be 2-letter ISO code').optional(),
+  latitude: latitudeSchema,
+  longitude: longitudeSchema,
+}).optional().nullable();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Settings Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Day hours schema
+ */
+export const dayHoursSchema = z.object({
+  isOpen: z.boolean(),
+  open: timeSchema,
+  close: timeSchema,
+  breaks: z.array(z.object({
+    start: z.string().regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/),
+    end: z.string().regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/),
+  })).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Operating hours schema
+ */
+export const operatingHoursSchema = z.object({
+  monday: dayHoursSchema,
+  tuesday: dayHoursSchema,
+  wednesday: dayHoursSchema,
+  thursday: dayHoursSchema,
+  friday: dayHoursSchema,
+  saturday: dayHoursSchema,
+  sunday: dayHoursSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Branch feature settings schema
+ */
+export const branchFeatureSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  enableOnlineOrdering: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableReservations: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableTakeaway: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableDelivery: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableDineIn: z.boolean().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Branch display settings schema
+ */
+export const branchDisplaySettingsSchema = z.object({
+  displayName: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  logo: urlSchema,
+  coverImage: urlSchema,
+  themeColor: colorHexSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Branch notification settings schema
+ */
+export const branchNotificationSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  orderNotificationEmail: z.string().email().optional(),
+  orderNotificationPhone: phoneSchema,
+  enablePushNotifications: z.boolean().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Complete branch settings schema
+ */
+export const branchSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  operatingHours: operatingHoursSchema,
+  features: branchFeatureSettingsSchema,
+  display: branchDisplaySettingsSchema,
+  notifications: branchNotificationSettingsSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CRUD Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create branch request schema
+ */
+export const createBranchSchema = z.object({
+  name: branchNameSchema,
+  code: branchCodeSchema,
+  description: branchDescriptionSchema,
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  email: emailSchema,
+  address: branchAddressSchema,
+  settings: branchSettingsSchema,
+  parentId: z.string().cuid('Invalid parent branch ID').optional().nullable(),
+  sortOrder: z.number().int().min(0).optional().default(0),
+  isMain: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create schema
+ */
+export type CreateBranchInput = z.infer<typeof createBranchSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update branch request schema
+ */
+export const updateBranchSchema = z.object({
+  name: branchNameSchema.optional(),
+  code: branchCodeSchema.optional(),
+  description: branchDescriptionSchema,
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  email: emailSchema,
+  address: branchAddressSchema,
+  parentId: z.string().cuid('Invalid parent branch ID').optional().nullable(),
+  sortOrder: z.number().int().min(0).optional(),
+  isMain: z.boolean().optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update schema
+ */
+export type UpdateBranchInput = z.infer<typeof updateBranchSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update branch settings request schema
+ */
+export const updateBranchSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  settings: branchSettingsSchema.unwrap(), // Make settings required in this context
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update settings schema
+ */
+export type UpdateBranchSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof updateBranchSettingsSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change branch status request schema
+ */
+export const changeBranchStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: z.enum(BRANCH_STATUSES),
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change status schema
+ */
+export type ChangeBranchStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeBranchStatusSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch list query schema
+ */
+export const branchListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  status: z.enum(BRANCH_STATUSES).optional(),
+  parentId: z.string().cuid().optional().nullable(),
+  isMain: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  includeDeleted: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['name', 'code', 'createdAt', 'sortOrder']).optional().default('sortOrder'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('asc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list query schema
+ */
+export type BranchListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof branchListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Branch ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const branchIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid('Invalid branch ID'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from ID schema
+ */
+export type BranchIdInput = z.infer<typeof branchIdSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas (for API documentation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch response schema
+ */
+export const branchResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid(),
+  name: z.string(),
+  code: z.string(),
+  description: z.string().nullable(),
+  phone: z.string().nullable(),
+  email: z.string().email().nullable(),
+  address: z.record(z.unknown()).nullable(),
+  settings: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  status: z.enum(BRANCH_STATUSES),
+  parentId: z.string().cuid().nullable(),
+  sortOrder: z.number().int(),
+  isMain: z.boolean(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+  deletedAt: z.date().nullable(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Branch summary schema
+ */
+export const branchSummarySchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  name: z.string(),
+  code: z.string(),
+  status: z.enum(BRANCH_STATUSES),
+  isMain: z.boolean(),
+  parentId: z.string().cuid().nullable(),
+  city: z.string().optional(),
+  childCount: z.number().int().optional(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Branch module settings schema
+ */
+export const branchModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  defaultBranchCode: z.string().default('MAIN'),
+  allowBranchHierarchy: z.boolean().default(true),
+  maxHierarchyDepth: z.number().int().positive().default(3),
+  requireUniqueCode: z.boolean().default(true),
+  inheritParentSettings: z.boolean().default(true),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type BranchModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof branchModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Generates a branch code from a name
+ *
+ * @param name - Branch name
+ * @returns Generated branch code
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const code = generateBranchCode('Main Branch');
+ * // Returns: 'MAIN-BRANCH'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateBranchCode(name: string): string {
+  return name
+    .toUpperCase()
+    .trim()
+    .normalize('NFD')
+    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '') // Remove accents
+    .replace(/[ğ]/gi, 'G')
+    .replace(/[ü]/gi, 'U')
+    .replace(/[ş]/gi, 'S')
+    .replace(/[ı]/gi, 'I')
+    .replace(/[ö]/gi, 'O')
+    .replace(/[ç]/gi, 'C')
+    .replace(/[^A-Z0-9\s-]/g, '') // Remove invalid chars
+    .replace(/\s+/g, '-') // Replace spaces with hyphens
+    .replace(/-+/g, '-') // Remove duplicate hyphens
+    .replace(/^-|-$/g, '') // Remove leading/trailing hyphens
+    .slice(0, 20); // Max length
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates and generates a unique branch code
+ *
+ * @param name - Branch name
+ * @param existingCodes - Array of existing codes to check against
+ * @returns Unique branch code
+ */
+export function generateUniqueBranchCode(name: string, existingCodes: string[]): string {
+  const baseCode = generateBranchCode(name);
+  let code = baseCode;
+  let counter = 1;
+
+  const normalizedExisting = existingCodes.map((c) => c.toUpperCase());
+  const normalizedReserved = RESERVED_CODES.map((c) => c.toUpperCase());
+
+  while (
+    normalizedExisting.includes(code) ||
+    normalizedReserved.includes(code)
+  ) {
+    code = `${baseCode}-${counter}`;
+    counter++;
+  }
+
+  return code;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Merges branch settings with defaults
+ *
+ * @param existing - Existing settings
+ * @param updates - Settings updates
+ * @returns Merged settings
+ */
+export function mergeSettings(
+  existing: Record<string, unknown>,
+  updates: Record<string, unknown>
+): Record<string, unknown> {
+  const merged = { ...existing };
+
+  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(updates)) {
+    if (value !== undefined && value !== null) {
+      if (typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
+        merged[key] = mergeSettings(
+          (merged[key] as Record<string, unknown>) || {},
+          value as Record<string, unknown>
+        );
+      } else {
+        merged[key] = value;
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  return merged;
+}

+/**
+ * Branch Module Public API
+ *
+ * Centralized exports for the Branch module.
+ * Import from this file when using branch module functionality
+ * from other parts of the application.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/branch
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   BranchModule,
+ *   BranchService,
+ *   branchRoutes,
+ *   type Branch,
+ *   type CreateBranchRequest,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/branch';
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Definition
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { BranchModule, default } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.module';
+export type {
+  BranchModuleContext,
+  BranchModuleHooks,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.module';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { BranchService } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.service';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { BranchRepository } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.repository';
+export type {
+  PaginatedResult,
+  CreateBranchData,
+  UpdateBranchData,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.repository';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { BranchController } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.controller';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Routes
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  branchRoutes,
+  buildBranchApiPath,
+  buildBranchAdminPath,
+  isProtectedBranchRoute,
+  branchEndpoints,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.routes';

+  BranchRouteConfig,
+  BranchEndpointMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.routes';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+// Enums and status
+export type { BranchStatus } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+export { BRANCH_STATUSES, isBranchStatus } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Core entity types
+export type {
+  Branch,
+  BranchWithRelations,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Address and settings types
+export type {
+  BranchAddress,
+  BranchSettings,
+  OperatingHours,
+  DayHours,
+  BranchFeatureSettings,
+  BranchDisplaySettings,
+  BranchNotificationSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Request/Response types
+export type {
+  CreateBranchRequest,
+  CreateBranchResponse,
+  UpdateBranchRequest,
+  UpdateBranchResponse,
+  UpdateBranchSettingsRequest,
+  UpdateBranchSettingsResponse,
+  ChangeBranchStatusRequest,
+  ChangeBranchStatusResponse,
+  BranchSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Query/Filter types
+export type {
+  BranchListFilters,
+  BranchListParams,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Event types
+export type {
+  BranchCreatedEvent,
+  BranchUpdatedEvent,
+  BranchDeletedEvent,
+  BranchSettingsUpdatedEvent,
+  BranchStatusChangedEvent,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Hook context types
+export type {
+  BeforeCreateContext,
+  AfterCreateContext,
+  BeforeUpdateContext,
+  AfterUpdateContext,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Module settings types
+export type { BranchModuleSettings } from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// Type guards
+export {
+  isBranch,
+  isBranchSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schemas (Zod validation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Base schemas
+  branchNameSchema,
+  branchCodeSchema,
+  branchDescriptionSchema,
+  emailSchema,
+  phoneSchema,
+  urlSchema,
+  colorHexSchema,
+  latitudeSchema,
+  longitudeSchema,
+
+  // Address schema

+
+  // Settings schemas
+  dayHoursSchema,
+  operatingHoursSchema,
+  branchFeatureSettingsSchema,
+  branchDisplaySettingsSchema,
+  branchNotificationSettingsSchema,
+  branchSettingsSchema,
+
+  // CRUD schemas

+  updateBranchSchema,
+  updateBranchSettingsSchema,
+  changeBranchStatusSchema,
+
+  // Query schemas
+  branchListQuerySchema,
+  branchIdSchema,
+
+  // Response schemas
+  branchResponseSchema,
+  branchSummarySchema,
+
+  // Module settings schema
+  branchModuleSettingsSchema,
+
+  // Utility functions
+  generateBranchCode,
+  generateUniqueBranchCode,
+  mergeSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema';
+
+export type {

+  UpdateBranchInput,
+  UpdateBranchSettingsInput,
+  ChangeBranchStatusInput,
+  BranchListQueryInput,
+  BranchIdInput,
+  BranchModuleSettingsInput,
+} from '@/modules/_core/branch/branch.schema';

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "branch",
+  "name": "Branch Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Core branch management module providing multi-location support, branch hierarchy, and branch-specific settings",
+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
+    "optional": []
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "branch.created",
+      "branch.updated",
+      "branch.deleted",
+      "branch.settings.updated",
+      "branch.status.changed"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeCreate",
+      "afterCreate",
+      "beforeUpdate",
+      "afterUpdate",
+      "beforeDelete",
+      "afterDelete"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "branch:read",
+      "branch:create",
+      "branch:update",
+      "branch:delete",
+      "branch:settings.read",
+      "branch:settings.update",
+      "branch:manage"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "BranchService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read"],
+    "events": ["organization.created"]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["single_branch"],
+      "starter": ["up_to_3_branches"],
+      "professional": ["up_to_10_branches", "branch_hierarchy"],
+      "business": ["unlimited_branches", "advanced_hierarchy"],
+      "enterprise": ["custom_branch_settings", "cross_branch_analytics"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Branches",
+      "icon": "ph-storefront",
+      "route": "/admin/branches",
+      "order": 15,
+      "hidden": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "defaultBranchCode": "MAIN",
+      "allowBranchHierarchy": true,
+      "maxHierarchyDepth": 3,
+      "requireUniqueCode": true,
+      "inheritParentSettings": true
+    }
+  }
+}

+  isVideoMimeType,
+  isDocumentMimeType,
+} from '@/modules/_core/media/media.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schemas (Zod validation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Constants
+  ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES,
+  ALLOWED_VIDEO_TYPES,
+  ALLOWED_DOCUMENT_TYPES,
+  ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES,
+  MAX_FILE_SIZE,
+  MAX_IMAGE_SIZE,
+  MAX_VIDEO_SIZE,
+
+  // Base schemas
+  filenameSchema,
+  originalNameSchema,
+  mimeTypeSchema,
+  altTextSchema,
+  tagsSchema,
+  urlSchema,
+  fileSizeSchema,
+
+  // Dimension schemas
+  dimensionsSchema,
+
+  // Metadata schemas
+  videoMetadataSchema,
+  processingMetadataSchema,
+  mediaMetadataSchema,
+
+  // Processing schemas
+  imageProcessingOptionsSchema,
+
+  // CRUD schemas
+  uploadMediaSchema,
+  updateMediaSchema,
+  processMediaSchema,
+
+  // Query schemas
+  mediaListQuerySchema,
+  mediaIdSchema,
+
+  // Response schemas
+  mediaResponseSchema,
+  mediaSummarySchema,
+
+  // Module settings schema
+  mediaModuleSettingsSchema,
+
+  // Utility functions
+  validateFileSize,
+  validateMimeType,
+  getMediaTypeFromMime,
+  generateUniqueFilename,
+  formatFileSize,
+  getExtensionFromMime,
+} from '@/modules/_core/media/media.schema';
+
+export type {
+  UploadMediaInput,

+} from '@/modules/_core/media/media.schema';

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/media/media.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/media/media.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..96e1bcd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/media/media.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,477 @@
+/**
+ * Media Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for media endpoints.
+ * Handles file uploads, image processing, and media management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/media/media.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List media
+ * GET /api/v1/media
+ *
+ * // Upload media
+ * POST /api/v1/media/upload
+ *
+ * // Get media by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/media/:id
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+  UploadedFile,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, CurrentOrgId, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { MediaService } from '@/modules/_core/media/media.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/media/media.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Media,
+  UploadMediaRequest,
+  UploadMediaResponse,
+  UpdateMediaRequest,
+  UpdateMediaResponse,
+  MediaListParams,
+  MediaSummary,
+  ImageProcessingOptions,
+  ProcessingResult,
+} from '@/modules/_core/media/media.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * File upload interface for multer
+ */
+interface UploadedFileInfo {
+  originalname: string;
+  mimetype: string;
+  size: number;
+  buffer: Buffer;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all media-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, upload, update, delete media
+ * - Image processing
+ * - Bulk operations
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List media
+ * GET /api/v1/media?page=1&perPage=20&type=IMAGE
+ *
+ * // Upload file
+ * POST /api/v1/media/upload
+ * Content-Type: multipart/form-data
+ * file: [binary]
+ * alt: "Description"
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/media')
+@injectable()
+export class MediaController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('MediaService') private readonly mediaService: MediaService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List media with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/media
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, type, search, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of media
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/media?page=1&perPage=20&type=IMAGE
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 20, "total": 50, "totalPages": 3 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('media.read')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @QueryParams() query: MediaListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<Media>>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.list(organizationId, query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List media summaries (for galleries, selectors).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/media/summaries
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @returns Array of media summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized()
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<MediaSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.listSummaries(organizationId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get storage usage for organization.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/media/storage
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @returns Storage usage info
+   */
+  @Get('/storage')
+  @Authorized('media.manage')
+  async getStorageUsage(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ used: number; count: number }>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.getStorageUsage(organizationId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get media by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/media/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param id - Media ID
+   * @returns Media details
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/media/med_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "med_123",
+   *     "originalName": "photo.jpg",
+   *     "url": "/uploads/org_123/photo-1706745600000.jpg",
+   *     ...
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('media.read')
+  async getById(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Media>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.getByIdOrThrow(organizationId, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Upload Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Upload a file.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/media/upload
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member with upload permission)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param file - Uploaded file
+   * @param body - Upload options
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Upload response with created media
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/media/upload
+   * Content-Type: multipart/form-data
+   *
+   * file: [binary]
+   * alt: "Product photo"
+   * tags: ["product", "featured"]
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "media": { ... },
+   *     "message": "File uploaded successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/upload')
+  @Authorized('media.upload')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async upload(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @UploadedFile('file') file: UploadedFileInfo,
+    @Body() body: Partial<UploadMediaRequest>,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UploadMediaResponse>> {
+    const uploadData: UploadMediaRequest = {
+      originalName: file.originalname,
+      mimeType: file.mimetype,
+      size: file.size,
+      buffer: file.buffer,
+      alt: body.alt,
+      tags: body.tags,
+      generateThumbnail: body.generateThumbnail ?? true,
+      optimize: body.optimize ?? true,
+    };
+
+    const result = await this.mediaService.upload(organizationId, uploadData, {
+      userId: user.id,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Upload from URL (server-side fetch).
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/media/upload-url
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param body - URL and options
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Upload response
+   */
+  @Post('/upload-url')
+  @Authorized('media.upload')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async uploadFromUrl(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Body() body: { url: string; alt?: string; tags?: string[] },
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UploadMediaResponse>> {
+    // Fetch URL and create upload request
+    // This is a simplified implementation
+    const response = await fetch(body.url);
+    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer());
+    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') || 'application/octet-stream';
+    const urlParts = body.url.split('/');
+    const filename = urlParts[urlParts.length - 1] || 'downloaded-file';
+
+    const uploadData: UploadMediaRequest = {
+      originalName: filename,
+      mimeType: contentType,
+      size: buffer.length,
+      buffer,
+      alt: body.alt,
+      tags: body.tags,
+      generateThumbnail: true,
+      optimize: true,
+    };
+
+    const result = await this.mediaService.upload(organizationId, uploadData, {
+      userId: user.id,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update media metadata.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/media/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param id - Media ID
+   * @param body - Update data
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Update response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/media/med_123
+   * {
+   *   "alt": "Updated description",
+   *   "tags": ["updated", "featured"]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id')
+  @Authorized('media.upload')
+  async update(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: UpdateMediaRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateMediaResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.update(organizationId, id, body, {
+      userId: user.id,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Processing Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Process an image with specified options.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/media/:id/process
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param id - Media ID
+   * @param body - Processing options
+   * @returns Processing result
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/media/med_123/process
+   * {
+   *   "width": 800,
+   *   "height": 600,
+   *   "format": "webp",
+   *   "quality": 80
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/process')
+  @Authorized('media.manage')
+  async processImage(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: ImageProcessingOptions
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ProcessingResult>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.processImage(organizationId, id, body);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete media (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/media/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (with delete permission)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param id - Media ID
+   * @param user - Current user
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('media.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.mediaService.delete(organizationId, id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete multiple media (bulk delete).
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/media/bulk-delete
+   * @access Authenticated (with delete permission)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param body - Array of media IDs
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Number of deleted items
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/media/bulk-delete
+   * {
+   *   "ids": ["med_123", "med_456", "med_789"]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/bulk-delete')
+  @Authorized('media.delete')
+  async deleteMany(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Body() body: { ids: string[] },
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ deleted: number }>> {
+    const count = await this.mediaService.deleteMany(organizationId, body.ids, {
+      userId: user.id,
+    });
+    return this.success({ deleted: count });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted media.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/media/:id/restore
+   * @access Authenticated (with delete permission)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID from context
+   * @param id - Media ID
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Restored media
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('media.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @CurrentOrgId() organizationId: string,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Media>> {
+    const result = await this.mediaService.restore(organizationId, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+}
