index 0000000..6e5d55c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/media/media.routes.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,323 @@
+/**
+ * Media Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Media module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for media management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/media/media.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { mediaRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/media/media.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/media/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/media/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media module route configuration
+ */
+export interface MediaRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Media module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the media module:
+ * - Protected endpoints (all media operations require authentication)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { mediaRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/media/media.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(mediaRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/media'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const mediaRoutes: MediaRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for media endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/media',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/media',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for media module - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/storage',
+    '/:id',
+    '/upload',
+    '/upload-url',
+    '/:id/process',
+    '/bulk-delete',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a media endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/upload')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/media/upload')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildMediaApiPath('/upload');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/media/upload'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildMediaApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${mediaRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a media endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/library')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/media/library')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildMediaAdminPath('/library');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/media/library'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildMediaAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${mediaRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected media route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedMediaRoute('/api/v1/media/upload'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedMediaRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with media prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(mediaRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All media routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface MediaEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+  /** Content type */
+  contentType?: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all media endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const mediaEndpoints: MediaEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List media with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List media summaries for galleries',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/storage',
+    description: 'Get storage usage for organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:manage'],
+  },
+
+  // Read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get media by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Upload endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/upload',
+    description: 'Upload a file',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:upload'],
+    contentType: 'multipart/form-data',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/upload-url',
+    description: 'Upload file from URL',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:upload'],
+  },
+
+  // Update endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update media metadata',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:upload'],
+  },
+
+  // Processing endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/process',
+    description: 'Process image with options',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:manage'],
+  },
+
+  // Delete endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete media (soft delete)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/bulk-delete',
+    description: 'Bulk delete media',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/restore',
+    description: 'Restore deleted media',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['media:delete'],
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// File Type Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Supported file types by category
+ */
+export const supportedFileTypes = {
+  images: {
+    extensions: ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp', '.gif', '.avif'],
+    mimeTypes: ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'image/gif', 'image/avif'],
+    maxSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
+  },
+  videos: {
+    extensions: ['.mp4', '.webm', '.ogg'],
+    mimeTypes: ['video/mp4', 'video/webm', 'video/ogg'],
+    maxSize: 50 * 1024 * 1024, // 50MB
+  },
+  documents: {
+    extensions: ['.pdf', '.doc', '.docx'],
+    mimeTypes: [
+      'application/pdf',
+      'application/msword',
+      'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
+    ],
+    maxSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024, // 10MB
+  },
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Gets allowed file types for a given context
+ *
+ * @param context - Upload context (e.g., 'menu', 'product', 'general')
+ * @returns Allowed file type configuration
+ */
+export function getAllowedFileTypes(context: 'menu' | 'product' | 'general' = 'general'): {
+  extensions: readonly string[];
+  mimeTypes: readonly string[];
+  maxSize: number;
+} {
+  switch (context) {
+    case 'menu':
+    case 'product':
+      return supportedFileTypes.images;
+    default:
+      return {
+        extensions: [
+          ...supportedFileTypes.images.extensions,
+          ...supportedFileTypes.videos.extensions,
+          ...supportedFileTypes.documents.extensions,
+        ],
+        mimeTypes: [
+          ...supportedFileTypes.images.mimeTypes,
+          ...supportedFileTypes.videos.mimeTypes,
+          ...supportedFileTypes.documents.mimeTypes,
+        ],
+        maxSize: supportedFileTypes.videos.maxSize,
+      };
+  }
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default mediaRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/media/media.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/media/media.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c477c8c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/media/media.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,518 @@
+/**
+ * Media Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Media module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/media/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   uploadMediaSchema,
+ *   updateMediaSchema,
+ *   mediaListQuerySchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/media/media.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate upload input
+ * const validatedData = uploadMediaSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Allowed MIME types for media uploads
+ */
+export const ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES = [
+  'image/jpeg',
+  'image/png',
+  'image/webp',
+  'image/gif',
+  'image/avif',
+] as const;
+
+export const ALLOWED_VIDEO_TYPES = [
+  'video/mp4',
+  'video/webm',
+  'video/ogg',
+] as const;
+
+export const ALLOWED_DOCUMENT_TYPES = [
+  'application/pdf',
+  'application/msword',
+  'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
+] as const;
+
+export const ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES = [
+  ...ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES,
+  ...ALLOWED_VIDEO_TYPES,
+  ...ALLOWED_DOCUMENT_TYPES,
+] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Media types (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const MEDIA_TYPES = ['IMAGE', 'VIDEO', 'DOCUMENT'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Storage types (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const STORAGE_TYPES = ['LOCAL', 'S3', 'CDN'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Maximum file sizes
+ */
+export const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB
+export const MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
+export const MAX_VIDEO_SIZE = 50 * 1024 * 1024; // 50MB
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Filename schema
+ */
+export const filenameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Filename is required')
+  .max(255, 'Filename is too long')
+  .regex(
+    /^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]+$/,
+    'Filename can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and dots'
+  );
+
+/**
+ * Original filename schema (more permissive)
+ */
+export const originalNameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Original filename is required')
+  .max(500, 'Original filename is too long');
+
+/**
+ * MIME type schema
+ */
+export const mimeTypeSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'MIME type is required')
+  .refine((val) => val.includes('/'), {
+    message: 'Invalid MIME type format',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * Alt text schema
+ */
+export const altTextSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(500, 'Alt text is too long')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Tags schema
+ */
+export const tagsSchema = z
+  .array(z.string().trim().min(1).max(50))
+  .max(20, 'Maximum 20 tags allowed')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * URL schema
+ */
+export const urlSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .url('Invalid URL format')
+  .max(2000, 'URL is too long');
+
+/**
+ * File size schema
+ */
+export const fileSizeSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int('File size must be an integer')
+  .positive('File size must be positive')
+  .max(MAX_VIDEO_SIZE, `File size must be less than ${MAX_VIDEO_SIZE / 1024 / 1024}MB`);
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Dimension Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Image dimensions schema
+ */
+export const dimensionsSchema = z.object({
+  width: z.number().int().positive(),
+  height: z.number().int().positive(),
+  aspectRatio: z.number().positive().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Metadata Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Video metadata schema
+ */
+export const videoMetadataSchema = z.object({
+  duration: z.number().positive().optional(),
+  codec: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+  frameRate: z.number().positive().optional(),
+  bitrate: z.number().positive().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Processing metadata schema
+ */
+export const processingMetadataSchema = z.object({
+  processed: z.boolean(),
+  originalSize: z.number().positive().optional(),
+  compressionRatio: z.number().positive().optional(),
+  variants: z.array(z.object({
+    name: z.string().max(50),
+    url: z.string().url(),
+    width: z.number().int().positive(),
+    height: z.number().int().positive(),
+    size: z.number().int().positive(),
+  })).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Complete media metadata schema
+ */
+export const mediaMetadataSchema = z.object({
+  dimensions: dimensionsSchema,
+  video: videoMetadataSchema,
+  processing: processingMetadataSchema,
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  source: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  uploadedBy: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Processing Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Image processing options schema
+ */
+export const imageProcessingOptionsSchema = z.object({
+  width: z.number().int().positive().max(4096).optional(),
+  height: z.number().int().positive().max(4096).optional(),
+  fit: z.enum(['cover', 'contain', 'fill', 'inside', 'outside']).optional(),
+  format: z.enum(['jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'avif']).optional(),
+  quality: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
+  thumbnails: z.array(z.object({
+    name: z.string().min(1).max(50),
+    width: z.number().int().positive().max(1000),
+    height: z.number().int().positive().max(1000).optional(),
+    format: z.enum(['jpeg', 'png', 'webp']).optional(),
+    quality: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).optional(),
+  })).max(5).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CRUD Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Upload media request schema
+ */
+export const uploadMediaSchema = z.object({
+  originalName: originalNameSchema,
+  mimeType: mimeTypeSchema,
+  size: fileSizeSchema,
+  alt: altTextSchema,
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  generateThumbnail: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+  optimize: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from upload schema
+ */
+export type UploadMediaInput = z.infer<typeof uploadMediaSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update media request schema
+ */
+export const updateMediaSchema = z.object({
+  alt: altTextSchema,
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  metadata: mediaMetadataSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update schema
+ */
+export type UpdateMediaInput = z.infer<typeof updateMediaSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Process media request schema
+ */
+export const processMediaSchema = z.object({
+  processing: imageProcessingOptionsSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from process schema
+ */
+export type ProcessMediaInput = z.infer<typeof processMediaSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media list query schema
+ */
+export const mediaListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  type: z.enum(MEDIA_TYPES).optional(),
+  mimeType: z.string().optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  createdAfter: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  createdBefore: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  includeDeleted: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  tags: z.union([
+    z.string().transform((val) => val.split(',')),
+    z.array(z.string()),
+  ]).optional(),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['createdAt', 'originalName', 'size', 'type']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list query schema
+ */
+export type MediaListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof mediaListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Media ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const mediaIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid('Invalid media ID'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from ID schema
+ */
+export type MediaIdInput = z.infer<typeof mediaIdSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media response schema
+ */
+export const mediaResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid(),
+  filename: z.string(),
+  originalName: z.string(),
+  mimeType: z.string(),
+  size: z.number().int(),
+  type: z.enum(MEDIA_TYPES),
+  storage: z.enum(STORAGE_TYPES),
+  url: z.string().url(),
+  thumbnailUrl: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  alt: z.string().nullable(),
+  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+  deletedAt: z.date().nullable(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Media summary schema
+ */
+export const mediaSummarySchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  originalName: z.string(),
+  type: z.enum(MEDIA_TYPES),
+  url: z.string().url(),
+  thumbnailUrl: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  size: z.number().int(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Media module settings schema
+ */
+export const mediaModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  maxFileSize: z.number().int().positive().default(5242880),
+  allowedMimeTypes: z.array(z.string()).default([...ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES]),
+  thumbnailSizes: z.object({
+    small: z.number().int().positive().default(150),
+    medium: z.number().int().positive().default(300),
+    large: z.number().int().positive().default(600),
+  }),
+  storageProvider: z.enum(['local', 's3', 'cdn']).default('local'),
+  cdnEnabled: z.boolean().default(false),
+  autoOptimize: z.boolean().default(true),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type MediaModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof mediaModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validates file size based on MIME type
+ *
+ * @param mimeType - File MIME type
+ * @param size - File size in bytes
+ * @returns True if file size is valid
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = validateFileSize('image/jpeg', 1024 * 1024); // 1MB
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function validateFileSize(mimeType: string, size: number): boolean {
+  if (mimeType.startsWith('image/')) {
+    return size <= MAX_IMAGE_SIZE;
+  }
+  if (mimeType.startsWith('video/')) {
+    return size <= MAX_VIDEO_SIZE;
+  }
+  return size <= MAX_FILE_SIZE;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates MIME type
+ *
+ * @param mimeType - MIME type to validate
+ * @returns True if MIME type is allowed
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = validateMimeType('image/jpeg');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function validateMimeType(mimeType: string): boolean {
+  return ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES.includes(mimeType as typeof ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES[number]);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Determines media type from MIME type
+ *
+ * @param mimeType - MIME type
+ * @returns Media type ('IMAGE' | 'VIDEO' | 'DOCUMENT')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const type = getMediaTypeFromMime('image/jpeg');
+ * // Returns: 'IMAGE'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function getMediaTypeFromMime(mimeType: string): 'IMAGE' | 'VIDEO' | 'DOCUMENT' {
+  if (mimeType.startsWith('image/')) return 'IMAGE';
+  if (mimeType.startsWith('video/')) return 'VIDEO';
+  return 'DOCUMENT';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generates a unique filename with timestamp
+ *
+ * @param originalName - Original filename
+ * @returns Unique filename with timestamp
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const filename = generateUniqueFilename('photo.jpg');
+ * // Returns: 'photo-1706745600000.jpg'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateUniqueFilename(originalName: string): string {
+  const timestamp = Date.now();
+  const ext = originalName.split('.').pop() || '';
+  const baseName = originalName.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, '');
+
+  // Sanitize base name
+  const sanitized = baseName
+    .toLowerCase()
+    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '-')
+    .replace(/-+/g, '-')
+    .replace(/^-|-$/g, '')
+    .substring(0, 50);
+
+  return ext ? `${sanitized}-${timestamp}.${ext}` : `${sanitized}-${timestamp}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Formats file size for display
+ *
+ * @param bytes - File size in bytes
+ * @returns Formatted file size string
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const formatted = formatFileSize(1536000);
+ * // Returns: '1.5 MB'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
+  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
+  let size = bytes;
+  let unitIndex = 0;
+
+  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
+    size /= 1024;
+    unitIndex++;
+  }
+
+  return `${size.toFixed(unitIndex > 0 ? 1 : 0)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets file extension from MIME type
+ *
+ * @param mimeType - MIME type
+ * @returns File extension
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const ext = getExtensionFromMime('image/jpeg');
+ * // Returns: 'jpg'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function getExtensionFromMime(mimeType: string): string {
+  const mimeToExt: Record<string, string> = {
+    'image/jpeg': 'jpg',
+    'image/png': 'png',
+    'image/webp': 'webp',
+    'image/gif': 'gif',
+    'image/avif': 'avif',
+    'video/mp4': 'mp4',
+    'video/webm': 'webm',
+    'video/ogg': 'ogv',
+    'application/pdf': 'pdf',
+    'application/msword': 'doc',
+    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document': 'docx',
+  };
+
+  return mimeToExt[mimeType] || 'bin';
+}

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "media",
+  "name": "Media Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Core media management module providing file upload, image processing, and asset management for E-Menum",
+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
+    "optional": []
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "media.uploaded",
+      "media.deleted",
+      "media.processed",
+      "media.thumbnail.created"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeUpload",
+      "afterUpload",
+      "beforeDelete",
+      "afterDelete",
+      "onProcess"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "media:read",
+      "media:upload",
+      "media:delete",
+      "media:manage"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "MediaService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read"],
+    "events": []
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["basic_upload", "image_resize"],
+      "starter": ["multiple_upload", "gallery"],
+      "professional": ["video_upload", "advanced_processing"],
+      "business": ["cdn_storage", "bulk_operations"],
+      "enterprise": ["custom_storage", "api_access"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Media Library",
+      "icon": "ph-images",
+      "route": "/admin/media",
+      "order": 40,
+      "hidden": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "maxFileSize": 5242880,
+      "allowedMimeTypes": ["image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/webp", "image/gif"],
+      "thumbnailSizes": {
+        "small": 150,
+        "medium": 300,
+        "large": 600
+      },
+      "storageProvider": "local",
+      "cdnEnabled": false,
+      "autoOptimize": true
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.controller.ts

+/**
+ * Module Loader Admin Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for module management endpoints.
+ * Provides admin-level access to module discovery, activation, and management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List all modules
+ * GET /api/v1/admin/modules
+ *
+ * // Get module by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/admin/modules/:id
+ *
+ * // Activate module
+ * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/activate
+ *
+ * // Deactivate module
+ * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/deactivate
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Param,
+  Body,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { ModuleLoaderService } from '@/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.service';
+
+import type {
+  ModuleInfo,
+  ModuleSummary,
+  ModuleStats,
+  ModuleListParams,
+  ModuleListResponse,
+  ModuleActionResponse,
+  DependencyCheckResult,
+  ModuleHealthCheckResult,
+} from '@/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module Loader Admin Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all module management HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List and filter modules
+ * - Get module details
+ * - Activate/deactivate modules
+ * - Check dependencies
+ * - Health checks
+ *
+ * All endpoints require admin authentication and permissions.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List all modules with filters
+ * GET /api/v1/admin/modules?category=feature&status=active
+ *
+ * // Activate a module
+ * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/menu/activate
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/admin/modules')
+@injectable()
+export class ModuleLoaderController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('ModuleLoaderService') private readonly moduleService: ModuleLoaderService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List all modules with optional filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user from JWT
+   * @param query - Query parameters
+   * @returns Module list with stats
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/admin/modules?category=feature&status=active&includeStats=true
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "modules": [...],
+   *     "stats": { "total": 10, "active": 8, ... }
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @QueryParams() query: ModuleListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleListResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.listModules(query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List module summaries for quick display.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/summaries
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of module summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async listSummaries(): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.listModuleSummaries();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get active modules only.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/active
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of active modules
+   */
+  @Get('/active')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getActive(): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleInfo[]>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.getActiveModules();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get core modules only.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/core
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of core modules
+   */
+  @Get('/core')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getCore(): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleInfo[]>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.getCoreModules();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get module statistics.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/stats
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Module statistics
+   */
+  @Get('/stats')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getStats(): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleStats>> {
+    const result = this.moduleService.getStats();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get admin menu items from active modules.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/menu-items
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of admin menu items
+   */
+  @Get('/menu-items')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getMenuItems(): Promise<
+    ApiResponse<Array<{ moduleId: string; menu: { label: string; icon?: string; position: number } }>>
+  > {
+    const result = this.moduleService.getAdminMenuItems();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get all permissions from active modules.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/permissions
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of permission strings
+   */
+  @Get('/permissions')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getPermissions(): Promise<ApiResponse<string[]>> {
+    const result = this.moduleService.getAllPermissions();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Single Module Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get module by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/:id
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @returns Module details
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getById(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleInfo>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.getModuleByIdOrThrow(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get module dependents.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/dependents
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @returns Array of dependent module IDs
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/dependents')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async getDependents(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<string[]>> {
+    // Verify module exists
+    await this.moduleService.getModuleByIdOrThrow(id);
+    const result = this.moduleService.getModuleDependents(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Check module health.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/health
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @returns Health check result
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/health')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async checkHealth(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleHealthCheckResult>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.checkModuleHealth(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Activation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Activate a module.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/activate
+   * @access Admin only (module.activate permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @param body - Activation options
+   * @returns Action response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/menu/activate
+   * { "force": false }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "success": true,
+   *     "module": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Module menu activated successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/activate')
+  @Authorized('module.activate')
+  @HttpCode(200)
+  async activate(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: { force?: boolean } = {}
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleActionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.activateModule({
+      moduleId: id,
+      force: body.force,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deactivate a module.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/deactivate
+   * @access Admin only (module.deactivate permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @param body - Deactivation options
+   * @returns Action response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/analytics/deactivate
+   * { "force": false }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/deactivate')
+  @Authorized('module.deactivate')
+  @HttpCode(200)
+  async deactivate(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: { force?: boolean } = {}
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleActionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.deactivateModule({
+      moduleId: id,
+      force: body.force,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Dependency Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check dependencies for all modules.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/admin/modules/check-dependencies
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Dependency check result
+   */
+  @Post('/check-dependencies')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  @HttpCode(200)
+  async checkAllDependencies(): Promise<ApiResponse<DependencyCheckResult>> {
+    const result = this.moduleService.checkDependencies();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Check dependencies for a specific module.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/admin/modules/:id/check-dependencies
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @param id - Module ID
+   * @returns Dependency check result
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/check-dependencies')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  @HttpCode(200)
+  async checkModuleDependencies(
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<DependencyCheckResult>> {
+    // Verify module exists
+    await this.moduleService.getModuleByIdOrThrow(id);
+    const result = this.moduleService.checkDependencies(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Health Check Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check health of all active modules.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/admin/modules/health
+   * @access Admin only (module.read permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of health check results
+   */
+  @Get('/health')
+  @Authorized('module.read')
+  async checkAllHealth(): Promise<ApiResponse<ModuleHealthCheckResult[]>> {
+    const result = await this.moduleService.checkAllModulesHealth();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Discovery Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Trigger module discovery.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/admin/modules/discover
+   * @access Admin only (module.manage permission)
+   *
+   * @returns Array of newly discovered module IDs
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/admin/modules/discover
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": ["new-module-1", "new-module-2"]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/discover')
+  @Authorized('module.manage')
+  @HttpCode(200)
+  async discover(): Promise<ApiResponse<{ discovered: string[]; message: string }>> {
+    const discovered = await this.moduleService.discoverModules();
+    return this.success({
+      discovered,
+      message: `Discovered ${discovered.length} module(s).`,
+    });
+  }
+}

+/**
+ * Module Loader Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Module Loader admin module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for module management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { moduleLoaderRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/admin/modules/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/modules/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module loader route configuration
+ */
+export interface ModuleLoaderRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Module loader routes configuration.
+ *
+ * All endpoints require admin authentication with appropriate permissions.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { moduleLoaderRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/module-loader/module-loader.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(moduleLoaderRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/admin/modules'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const moduleLoaderRoutes: ModuleLoaderRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for module management endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/admin/modules',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/modules',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for module loader - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token and admin permissions
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/active',
+    '/core',
+    '/stats',
+    '/menu-items',
+    '/permissions',
+    '/health',
+    '/discover',
+    '/check-dependencies',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/dependents',
+    '/:id/health',
+    '/:id/activate',
+    '/:id/deactivate',
+    '/:id/check-dependencies',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a module loader endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/stats')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/admin/modules/stats')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildModuleLoaderApiPath('/stats');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/admin/modules/stats'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildModuleLoaderApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${moduleLoaderRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a module loader endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/menu')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/modules/menu')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildModuleLoaderAdminPath('/menu');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/modules/menu'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildModuleLoaderAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${moduleLoaderRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected module loader route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedModuleLoaderRoute('/api/v1/admin/modules/stats'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedModuleLoaderRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with module loader prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(moduleLoaderRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All module loader routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module loader endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface ModuleLoaderEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all module loader endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const moduleLoaderEndpoints: ModuleLoaderEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List all modules with filtering and stats',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List module summaries for quick display',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/active',
+    description: 'List active modules only',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/core',
+    description: 'List core modules only',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/stats',
+    description: 'Get module statistics',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],

+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/menu-items',
+    description: 'Get admin menu items from active modules',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/permissions',
+    description: 'Get all permissions from active modules',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Single module endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get module by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/dependents',
+    description: 'Get modules that depend on this module',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/health',
+    description: 'Check module health',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Activation endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/activate',
+    description: 'Activate a module',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:activate'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/deactivate',
+    description: 'Deactivate a module',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:deactivate'],
+  },
+
+  // Dependency endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/check-dependencies',
+    description: 'Check dependencies for all modules',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/check-dependencies',
+    description: 'Check dependencies for a specific module',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Health endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/health',
+    description: 'Check health of all active modules',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Discovery endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/discover',
+    description: 'Trigger module discovery',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['module:manage'],
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Status Helpers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module status display labels
+ */
+export const moduleStatusLabels = {
+  discovered: 'Discovered',
+  validated: 'Validated',
+  loaded: 'Loaded',
+  active: 'Active',
+  disabled: 'Disabled',
+  error: 'Error',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Module status icons (Phosphor icons)
+ */
+export const moduleStatusIcons = {
+  discovered: 'ph-magnifying-glass',
+  validated: 'ph-check-circle',
+  loaded: 'ph-package',
+  active: 'ph-power',
+  disabled: 'ph-prohibit',
+  error: 'ph-warning-circle',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Module status colors
+ */
+export const moduleStatusColors = {
+  discovered: 'gray',
+  validated: 'blue',
+  loaded: 'yellow',
+  active: 'green',
+  disabled: 'gray',
+  error: 'red',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Gets display label for module status.
+ *
+ * @param status - Module status
+ * @returns Display label
+ */
+export function getModuleStatusLabel(status: keyof typeof moduleStatusLabels): string {
+  return moduleStatusLabels[status] || status;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets icon class for module status.
+ *
+ * @param status - Module status

+ */
+export function getModuleStatusIcon(status: keyof typeof moduleStatusIcons): string {

+}
+

+ * Gets color for module status.

+export function getModuleStatusColor(status: keyof typeof moduleStatusColors): string {
+  return moduleStatusColors[status] || 'gray';
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Category Helpers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module category display labels
+ */
+export const moduleCategoryLabels = {
+  core: 'Core',
+  feature: 'Feature',
+  ai: 'AI',
+  integration: 'Integration',
+  example: 'Example',
+  stub: 'Stub',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Module category icons (Phosphor icons)
+ */
+export const moduleCategoryIcons = {
+  core: 'ph-gear',
+  feature: 'ph-sparkle',
+  ai: 'ph-brain',
+  integration: 'ph-plugs-connected',
+  example: 'ph-book-open',
+  stub: 'ph-placeholder',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Module category colors
+ */
+export const moduleCategoryColors = {
+  core: 'purple',
+  feature: 'blue',
+  ai: 'pink',
+  integration: 'orange',
+  example: 'gray',
+  stub: 'gray',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Gets display label for module category.

+export function getModuleCategoryLabel(category: keyof typeof moduleCategoryLabels): string {
+  return moduleCategoryLabels[category] || category;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets icon class for module category.
+ *
+ * @param category - Module category
+ * @returns Icon class
+ */
+export function getModuleCategoryIcon(category: keyof typeof moduleCategoryIcons): string {
+  return moduleCategoryIcons[category] || 'ph-puzzle-piece';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets color for module category.
+ *
+ * @param category - Module category
+ * @returns Color name
+ */
+export function getModuleCategoryColor(category: keyof typeof moduleCategoryColors): string {
+  return moduleCategoryColors[category] || 'gray';
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default moduleLoaderRoutes;

+/**
+ * Notification Module Public API
+ *
+ * Centralized exports for the Notification module.
+ * Import from this file when using notification module functionality
+ * from other parts of the application.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   NotificationModule,
+ *   NotificationService,
+ *   notificationRoutes,
+ *   type Notification,
+ *   type CreateNotificationRequest,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/notification';
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Definition
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { NotificationModule, default } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.module';
+export type {
+  NotificationModuleContext,
+  NotificationModuleHooks,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.module';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { NotificationService } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.service';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { NotificationRepository } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository';
+export type {
+  PaginatedResult,
+  CreateNotificationData,
+  UpdateNotificationData,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { NotificationController } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.controller';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Routes
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  notificationRoutes,
+  buildNotificationApiPath,
+  buildNotificationAdminPath,
+  isProtectedNotificationRoute,
+  notificationEndpoints,
+  notificationTypeLabels,
+  notificationTypeIcons,
+  notificationTypeColors,
+  getNotificationTypeLabel,
+  getNotificationTypeIcon,
+  getNotificationTypeColor,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes';
+export type {
+  NotificationRouteConfig,
+  NotificationEndpointMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+// Core entity types
+export type {
+  Notification,
+  NotificationWithRelations,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Metadata types
+export type {
+  NotificationMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Request/Response types
+export type {
+  CreateNotificationRequest,
+  CreateNotificationResponse,
+  BroadcastNotificationRequest,
+  BroadcastNotificationResponse,
+  MarkAsReadRequest,
+  MarkAsReadResponse,
+  NotificationSummary,
+  NotificationCounts,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Query/Filter types
+export type {
+  NotificationListFilters,
+  NotificationListParams,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Event types
+export type {
+  NotificationCreatedEvent,
+  NotificationReadEvent,
+  NotificationDeletedEvent,
+  NotificationBroadcastEvent,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Hook context types
+export type {
+  BeforeSendContext,
+  AfterSendContext,
+  BeforeReadContext,
+  AfterReadContext,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Module settings types
+export type { NotificationModuleSettings } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Email types
+export type {
+  EmailNotificationOptions,
+  EmailSendResult,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Type guards
+export {
+  isNotification,
+  isUnread,
+  isValidNotificationType,
+  isValidNotificationStatus,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// Re-export Prisma types
+export type {
+  NotificationType,
+  NotificationStatus,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schemas (Zod validation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Constants
+  NOTIFICATION_TYPES,
+  NOTIFICATION_STATUSES,
+  PRIORITY_LEVELS,
+  MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH,
+  MAX_TITLE_LENGTH,
+
+  // Base schemas
+  titleSchema,
+  messageSchema,
+  linkSchema,
+  notificationTypeSchema,
+  notificationStatusSchema,
+  prioritySchema,
+
+  // Metadata schemas
+  notificationMetadataSchema,
+
+  // CRUD schemas
+  createNotificationSchema,
+  broadcastNotificationSchema,
+  markAsReadSchema,
+  markAllAsReadSchema,
+
+  // Query schemas
+  notificationListQuerySchema,
+  notificationIdSchema,
+
+  // Response schemas
+  notificationResponseSchema,
+  notificationSummarySchema,
+  notificationCountsSchema,
+
+  // Module settings schema
+  notificationModuleSettingsSchema,
+
+  // Utility functions
+  truncateMessage,
+  isValidNotificationType as validateNotificationType,
+  isValidNotificationStatus as validateNotificationStatus,
+  generateTitle,
+  parseNotificationIds,
+  formatNotificationSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema';
+
+export type {
+  CreateNotificationInput,
+  BroadcastNotificationInput,
+  MarkAsReadInput,
+  MarkAllAsReadInput,
+  NotificationListQueryInput,
+  NotificationIdInput,
+  NotificationModuleSettingsInput,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema';

+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",

+
+  "dependencies": {

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..94c148a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,454 @@
+/**
+ * Notification Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for notification endpoints.
+ * Handles in-app notification management for users.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification/notification.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List notifications
+ * GET /api/v1/notifications
+ *
+ * // Get notification by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/notifications/:id
+ *
+ * // Mark as read
+ * POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-read
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { NotificationService } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Notification,
+  CreateNotificationRequest,
+  CreateNotificationResponse,
+  BroadcastNotificationRequest,
+  BroadcastNotificationResponse,
+  MarkAsReadResponse,
+  NotificationListParams,
+  NotificationCounts,
+  NotificationSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all notification-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, mark as read, delete notifications
+ * - Notification counts and summaries
+ * - Admin: broadcast notifications
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List notifications
+ * GET /api/v1/notifications?page=1&perPage=20&status=UNREAD
+ *
+ * // Mark notifications as read
+ * POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-read
+ * { "notificationIds": ["notif_123", "notif_456"] }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/notifications')
+@injectable()
+export class NotificationController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('NotificationService') private readonly notificationService: NotificationService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List notifications for the current user.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user from JWT
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, status, type, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of notifications
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/notifications?page=1&perPage=20&status=UNREAD
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 20, "total": 50, "totalPages": 3 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized()
+  async list(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @QueryParams() query: NotificationListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<Notification>>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.list(user.id, query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List notification summaries for quick display.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications/summaries
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Array of notification summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized()
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<NotificationSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.listSummaries(user.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get unread notifications (for real-time display).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications/unread
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Array of unread notifications
+   */
+  @Get('/unread')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getUnread(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Notification[]>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.getUnread(user.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get notification counts by status and type.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications/counts
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Notification counts
+   */
+  @Get('/counts')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getCounts(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<NotificationCounts>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.getCounts(user.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get unread count only.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Unread count
+   */
+  @Get('/unread-count')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getUnreadCount(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ count: number }>> {
+    const count = await this.notificationService.getUnreadCount(user.id);
+    return this.success({ count });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get notification by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/notifications/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (owner only)
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Notification details
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/notifications/notif_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "notif_123",
+   *     "title": "New Order",
+   *     "message": "You have a new order...",
+   *     ...
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getById(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Notification>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.getByIdOrThrow(user.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Mark as Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Mark notifications as read.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-read
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param body - Notification IDs to mark as read
+   * @returns Number of notifications marked as read
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-read
+   * {
+   *   "notificationIds": ["notif_123", "notif_456"]
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "count": 2,
+   *     "message": "2 notification(s) marked as read."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/mark-read')
+  @Authorized()
+  async markAsRead(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() body: { notificationIds: string | string[] }
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<MarkAsReadResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.markManyAsRead(
+      user.id,
+      body.notificationIds
+    );
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Mark a single notification as read.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/:id/read
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Updated notification
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/read')
+  @Authorized()
+  async markOneAsRead(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Notification>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.markAsRead(user.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Mark all notifications as read.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/mark-all-read
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param body - Optional filters (type, organizationId)
+   * @returns Number of notifications marked as read
+   */
+  @Post('/mark-all-read')
+  @Authorized()
+  async markAllAsRead(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() body: { type?: 'SYSTEM' | 'ORDER' | 'BILLING' | 'PROMO'; organizationId?: string } = {}
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<MarkAsReadResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.markAllAsRead(
+      user.id,
+      body.type,
+      body.organizationId
+    );
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a notification.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/notifications/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (owner only)
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized()
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.notificationService.delete(user.id, id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete multiple notifications.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/bulk-delete
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param body - Array of notification IDs
+   * @returns Number of deleted notifications
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/notifications/bulk-delete
+   * {
+   *   "ids": ["notif_123", "notif_456"]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/bulk-delete')
+  @Authorized()
+  async deleteMany(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() body: { ids: string[] }
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ deleted: number }>> {
+    const count = await this.notificationService.deleteMany(user.id, body.ids);
+    return this.success({ deleted: count });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete all read notifications.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/delete-read
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @returns Number of deleted notifications
+   */
+  @Post('/delete-read')
+  @Authorized()
+  async deleteAllRead(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ deleted: number }>> {
+    const count = await this.notificationService.deleteAllRead(user.id);
+    return this.success({ deleted: count });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Admin Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a notification (admin only).
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications
+   * @access Admin only
+   *
+   * @param body - Notification data
+   * @returns Created notification
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/notifications
+   * {
+   *   "userId": "user_123",
+   *   "type": "SYSTEM",
+   *   "title": "System Maintenance",
+   *   "message": "The system will be under maintenance..."
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('notification.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @Body() body: CreateNotificationRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateNotificationResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.create(body.userId, body);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Broadcast notification to multiple users (admin only).
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/notifications/broadcast
+   * @access Admin only
+   *
+   * @param body - Broadcast data with user IDs
+   * @returns Number of notifications sent
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/notifications/broadcast
+   * {
+   *   "userIds": ["user_1", "user_2", "user_3"],
+   *   "type": "PROMO",
+   *   "title": "New Feature Available",
+   *   "message": "Check out our new feature!"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/broadcast')
+  @Authorized('notification.manage')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async broadcast(
+    @Body() body: BroadcastNotificationRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<BroadcastNotificationResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.notificationService.broadcast(body);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+}
