diff --git a/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository.ts b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..960cad9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,564 @@
+/**
+ * Notification Repository
+ *
+ * Data access layer for Notification entities.
+ * Handles user-scoped notification operations.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification/notification.repository
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { NotificationRepository } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository';
+ *
+ * const repo = container.resolve('NotificationRepository');
+ * const notifications = await repo.findByUserId(userId);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { PrismaClient, NotificationType, NotificationStatus, Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+
+import type {
+  Notification,
+  NotificationListParams,
+  NotificationSummary,
+  NotificationCounts,
+  NotificationMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Paginated result type
+ */
+export interface PaginatedResult<T> {
+  /** Array of entities */
+  data: T[];
+  /** Pagination metadata */
+  meta: {
+    page: number;
+    perPage: number;
+    total: number;
+    totalPages: number;
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create notification data (input for repository)
+ */
+export interface CreateNotificationData {
+  userId: string;
+  organizationId?: string | null;
+  type: NotificationType;
+  status?: NotificationStatus;
+  title: string;
+  message: string;
+  link?: string | null;
+  metadata?: Prisma.JsonValue;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update notification data (input for repository)
+ */
+export interface UpdateNotificationData {
+  status?: NotificationStatus;
+  readAt?: Date | null;
+  metadata?: Prisma.JsonValue;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 20;
+const MAX_PER_PAGE = 100;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Notification Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Repository for Notification entity operations.
+ *
+ * Handles all database operations for notifications including:
+ * - CRUD operations (user-scoped)
+ * - Pagination and filtering
+ * - Mark as read operations
+ * - Counting and statistics
+ *
+ * @remarks
+ * Notifications are user-scoped (not organization-scoped).
+ * No soft delete - notifications can be hard deleted.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class NotificationService {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('NotificationRepository') private repo: NotificationRepository
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async getNotifications(userId: string) {
+ *     return this.repo.findByUserId(userId);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class NotificationRepository {
+  constructor(
+    @inject(TOKENS.PrismaClient) private readonly prisma: PrismaClient
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all notifications for a user with pagination and filtering
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param params - Query parameters (pagination, sorting, filtering)
+   * @returns Paginated list of notifications
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await repo.findByUserId(userId, {
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 20,
+   *   status: 'UNREAD',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findByUserId(
+    userId: string,
+    params: NotificationListParams = {}
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Notification>> {
+    const {
+      page = 1,
+      perPage = DEFAULT_PER_PAGE,
+      type,
+      status,
+      organizationId,
+      search,
+      createdAfter,
+      createdBefore,
+      sortBy = 'createdAt',
+      sortOrder = 'desc',
+    } = params;
+
+    // Normalize pagination
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    // Build where clause
+    const where: Prisma.NotificationWhereInput = {
+      userId,
+      ...(type && { type }),
+      ...(status && { status }),
+      ...(organizationId && { organizationId }),
+      ...(search && {
+        OR: [
+          { title: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
+          { message: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
+        ],
+      }),
+      ...(createdAfter && { createdAt: { gte: createdAfter } }),
+      ...(createdBefore && { createdAt: { lte: createdBefore } }),
+    };
+
+    // Build orderBy
+    const orderBy: Prisma.NotificationOrderByWithRelationInput = {
+      [sortBy]: sortOrder,
+    };
+
+    // Execute count and find in parallel
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      this.prisma.notification.count({ where }),
+      this.prisma.notification.findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy,
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data: data.map((n) => this.mapToNotification(n)),
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds notification by ID
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID (for authorization)
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Notification or null
+   */
+  async findById(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.findFirst({
+      where: { id, userId },
+    });
+
+    return result ? this.mapToNotification(result) : null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds notification by ID or throws
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Notification
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async findByIdOrThrow(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification> {
+    const notification = await this.findById(userId, id);
+
+    if (!notification) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Notification', id);
+    }
+
+    return notification;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds multiple notifications by IDs
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param ids - Array of notification IDs
+   * @returns Array of notifications
+   */
+  async findByIds(userId: string, ids: string[]): Promise<Notification[]> {
+    const results = await this.prisma.notification.findMany({
+      where: {
+        id: { in: ids },
+        userId,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return results.map((n) => this.mapToNotification(n));
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts notifications for a user
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(userId: string, status?: NotificationStatus): Promise<number> {
+    return this.prisma.notification.count({
+      where: {
+        userId,
+        ...(status && { status }),
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets notification counts by status and type
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @returns Notification counts
+   */
+  async getCounts(userId: string): Promise<NotificationCounts> {
+    const [total, unread, read, byType] = await Promise.all([
+      this.prisma.notification.count({ where: { userId } }),
+      this.prisma.notification.count({ where: { userId, status: 'UNREAD' } }),
+      this.prisma.notification.count({ where: { userId, status: 'READ' } }),
+      this.prisma.notification.groupBy({
+        by: ['type'],
+        where: { userId },
+        _count: true,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    // Build byType object
+    const typeCountMap = new Map(byType.map((t) => [t.type, t._count]));
+
+    return {
+      total,
+      unread,
+      read,
+      byType: {
+        system: typeCountMap.get('SYSTEM') || 0,
+        order: typeCountMap.get('ORDER') || 0,
+        billing: typeCountMap.get('BILLING') || 0,
+        promo: typeCountMap.get('PROMO') || 0,
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets unread notifications for a user (for real-time notifications)
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param limit - Maximum number to return
+   * @returns Array of notifications
+   */
+  async getUnread(userId: string, limit: number = 10): Promise<Notification[]> {
+    const results = await this.prisma.notification.findMany({
+      where: { userId, status: 'UNREAD' },
+      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
+      take: limit,
+    });
+
+    return results.map((n) => this.mapToNotification(n));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new notification
+   *
+   * @param data - Create data
+   * @returns Created notification
+   */
+  async create(data: CreateNotificationData): Promise<Notification> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.create({
+      data: {
+        userId: data.userId,
+        organizationId: data.organizationId || null,
+        type: data.type,
+        status: data.status || 'UNREAD',
+        title: data.title,
+        message: data.message,
+        link: data.link || null,
+        metadata: data.metadata || {},
+      },
+    });
+
+    return this.mapToNotification(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates multiple notifications (batch insert)
+   *
+   * @param data - Array of create data
+   * @returns Created notification count
+   */
+  async createMany(data: CreateNotificationData[]): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.createMany({
+      data: data.map((d) => ({
+        userId: d.userId,
+        organizationId: d.organizationId || null,
+        type: d.type,
+        status: d.status || 'UNREAD',
+        title: d.title,
+        message: d.message,
+        link: d.link || null,
+        metadata: d.metadata || {},
+      })),
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a notification
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID (for authorization)
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns Updated notification
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async update(
+    userId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateNotificationData
+  ): Promise<Notification> {
+    // Verify exists and belongs to user
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(userId, id);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: {
+        ...(data.status !== undefined && { status: data.status }),
+        ...(data.readAt !== undefined && { readAt: data.readAt }),
+        ...(data.metadata !== undefined && { metadata: data.metadata }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return this.mapToNotification(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks a notification as read
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Updated notification
+   */
+  async markAsRead(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification> {
+    return this.update(userId, id, {
+      status: 'READ',
+      readAt: new Date(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks multiple notifications as read
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param ids - Array of notification IDs
+   * @returns Number of updated records
+   */
+  async markManyAsRead(userId: string, ids: string[]): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.updateMany({
+      where: {
+        id: { in: ids },
+        userId,
+        status: 'UNREAD',
+      },
+      data: {
+        status: 'READ',
+        readAt: new Date(),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks all notifications as read for a user
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param type - Optional type filter
+   * @param organizationId - Optional organization filter
+   * @returns Number of updated records
+   */
+  async markAllAsRead(
+    userId: string,
+    type?: NotificationType,
+    organizationId?: string
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.updateMany({
+      where: {
+        userId,
+        status: 'UNREAD',
+        ...(type && { type }),
+        ...(organizationId && { organizationId }),
+      },
+      data: {
+        status: 'READ',
+        readAt: new Date(),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes a notification (hard delete)
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async delete(userId: string, id: string): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify exists and belongs to user
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(userId, id);
+
+    await this.prisma.notification.delete({
+      where: { id },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes multiple notifications
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param ids - Array of notification IDs
+   * @returns Number of deleted records
+   */
+  async deleteMany(userId: string, ids: string[]): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.deleteMany({
+      where: {
+        id: { in: ids },
+        userId,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes all read notifications for a user
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @returns Number of deleted records
+   */
+  async deleteAllRead(userId: string): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.deleteMany({
+      where: {
+        userId,
+        status: 'READ',
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes old notifications (older than specified days)
+   *
+   * @param days - Delete notifications older than this many days
+   * @returns Number of deleted records
+   */
+  async deleteOld(days: number = 30): Promise<number> {
+    const cutoffDate = new Date();
+    cutoffDate.setDate(cutoffDate.getDate() - days);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.notification.deleteMany({
+      where: {
+        createdAt: { lt: cutoffDate },
+        status: 'READ',
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Maps Prisma result to Notification type
+   */
+  private mapToNotification(result: Prisma.NotificationGetPayload<object>): Notification {
+    return {
+      id: result.id,
+      userId: result.userId,
+      organizationId: result.organizationId,
+      type: result.type,
+      status: result.status,
+      title: result.title,
+      message: result.message,
+      link: result.link,
+      metadata: result.metadata as NotificationMetadata,
+      readAt: result.readAt,
+      createdAt: result.createdAt,
+      updatedAt: result.updatedAt,
+    };
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes.ts b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..fe8e616
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,340 @@
+/**
+ * Notification Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Notification module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for notification management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification/notification.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { notificationRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/notifications/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/notifications/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification module route configuration
+ */
+export interface NotificationRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Notification module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the notification module:
+ * - All endpoints require authentication (user-specific notifications)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { notificationRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(notificationRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/notifications'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const notificationRoutes: NotificationRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for notification endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/notifications',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/notifications',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for notification module - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/unread',
+    '/counts',
+    '/unread-count',
+    '/:id',
+    '/mark-read',
+    '/:id/read',
+    '/mark-all-read',
+    '/bulk-delete',
+    '/delete-read',
+    '/broadcast',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a notification endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/mark-read')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/notifications/mark-read')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildNotificationApiPath('/mark-read');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/notifications/mark-read'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildNotificationApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${notificationRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a notification endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/broadcast')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/notifications/broadcast')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildNotificationAdminPath('/broadcast');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/notifications/broadcast'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildNotificationAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${notificationRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected notification route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedNotificationRoute('/api/v1/notifications/mark-read'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedNotificationRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with notification prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(notificationRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All notification routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface NotificationEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all notification endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const notificationEndpoints: NotificationEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List notifications with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List notification summaries for quick display',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/unread',
+    description: 'Get unread notifications',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/counts',
+    description: 'Get notification counts by status and type',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/unread-count',
+    description: 'Get unread notification count',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get notification by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Mark as read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/mark-read',
+    description: 'Mark notifications as read',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/read',
+    description: 'Mark single notification as read',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/mark-all-read',
+    description: 'Mark all notifications as read',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Delete endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete notification',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/bulk-delete',
+    description: 'Bulk delete notifications',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/delete-read',
+    description: 'Delete all read notifications',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Admin endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create notification (admin)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['notification:create'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/broadcast',
+    description: 'Broadcast notification to multiple users',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['notification:manage'],
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Notification Type Helpers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification type display names
+ */
+export const notificationTypeLabels = {
+  SYSTEM: 'System',
+  ORDER: 'Order',
+  BILLING: 'Billing',
+  PROMO: 'Promotion',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Notification type icons (Phosphor icons)
+ */
+export const notificationTypeIcons = {
+  SYSTEM: 'ph-info',
+  ORDER: 'ph-receipt',
+  BILLING: 'ph-credit-card',
+  PROMO: 'ph-megaphone',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Notification type colors
+ */
+export const notificationTypeColors = {
+  SYSTEM: 'gray',
+  ORDER: 'blue',
+  BILLING: 'green',
+  PROMO: 'purple',
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Gets display label for notification type.
+ *
+ * @param type - Notification type
+ * @returns Display label
+ */
+export function getNotificationTypeLabel(
+  type: keyof typeof notificationTypeLabels
+): string {
+  return notificationTypeLabels[type] || type;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets icon class for notification type.
+ *
+ * @param type - Notification type
+ * @returns Icon class
+ */
+export function getNotificationTypeIcon(
+  type: keyof typeof notificationTypeIcons
+): string {
+  return notificationTypeIcons[type] || 'ph-bell';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets color for notification type.
+ *
+ * @param type - Notification type
+ * @returns Color name
+ */
+export function getNotificationTypeColor(
+  type: keyof typeof notificationTypeColors
+): string {
+  return notificationTypeColors[type] || 'gray';
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default notificationRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0fd53d2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,445 @@
+/**
+ * Notification Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Notification module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createNotificationSchema,
+ *   notificationListQuerySchema,
+ *   markAsReadSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validatedData = createNotificationSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification types (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+export const NOTIFICATION_TYPES = ['SYSTEM', 'ORDER', 'BILLING', 'PROMO'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Notification statuses (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+export const NOTIFICATION_STATUSES = ['UNREAD', 'READ'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Priority levels
+ */
+export const PRIORITY_LEVELS = ['low', 'normal', 'high', 'urgent'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Maximum message length
+ */
+export const MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 2000;
+
+/**
+ * Maximum title length
+ */
+export const MAX_TITLE_LENGTH = 200;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Title schema
+ */
+export const titleSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Title is required')
+  .max(MAX_TITLE_LENGTH, `Title must be less than ${MAX_TITLE_LENGTH} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Message schema
+ */
+export const messageSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Message is required')
+  .max(MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH, `Message must be less than ${MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Link schema
+ */
+export const linkSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(2000, 'Link is too long')
+  .refine((val) => val === '' || val.startsWith('/') || val.startsWith('http'), {
+    message: 'Link must be a valid URL or path',
+  })
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Notification type schema
+ */
+export const notificationTypeSchema = z.enum(NOTIFICATION_TYPES);
+
+/**
+ * Notification status schema
+ */
+export const notificationStatusSchema = z.enum(NOTIFICATION_STATUSES);
+
+/**
+ * Priority schema
+ */
+export const prioritySchema = z.enum(PRIORITY_LEVELS).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Metadata Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification metadata schema
+ */
+export const notificationMetadataSchema = z
+  .object({
+    resourceType: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+    resourceId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+    action: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+    priority: prioritySchema,
+    expiresAt: z.string().datetime().optional(),
+    emailSent: z.boolean().optional(),
+    emailSentAt: z.string().datetime().optional(),
+    pushSent: z.boolean().optional(),
+    smsSent: z.boolean().optional(),
+    data: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
+  })
+  .optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CRUD Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create notification request schema
+ */
+export const createNotificationSchema = z.object({
+  userId: z.string().cuid('Invalid user ID'),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid('Invalid organization ID').optional().nullable(),
+  type: notificationTypeSchema.default('SYSTEM'),
+  title: titleSchema,
+  message: messageSchema,
+  link: linkSchema,
+  metadata: notificationMetadataSchema,
+  sendEmail: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  sendPush: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create schema
+ */
+export type CreateNotificationInput = z.infer<typeof createNotificationSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Broadcast notification request schema
+ */
+export const broadcastNotificationSchema = z.object({
+  userIds: z
+    .array(z.string().cuid('Invalid user ID'))
+    .min(1, 'At least one user ID is required')
+    .max(1000, 'Maximum 1000 users per broadcast'),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid('Invalid organization ID').optional().nullable(),
+  type: notificationTypeSchema.default('SYSTEM'),
+  title: titleSchema,
+  message: messageSchema,
+  link: linkSchema,
+  metadata: notificationMetadataSchema,
+  sendEmail: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from broadcast schema
+ */
+export type BroadcastNotificationInput = z.infer<typeof broadcastNotificationSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Mark as read request schema
+ */
+export const markAsReadSchema = z.object({
+  notificationIds: z.union([
+    z.string().cuid('Invalid notification ID'),
+    z.array(z.string().cuid('Invalid notification ID')).min(1).max(100),
+  ]),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from mark as read schema
+ */
+export type MarkAsReadInput = z.infer<typeof markAsReadSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Mark all as read request schema
+ */
+export const markAllAsReadSchema = z.object({
+  type: notificationTypeSchema.optional(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid('Invalid organization ID').optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from mark all as read schema
+ */
+export type MarkAllAsReadInput = z.infer<typeof markAllAsReadSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification list query schema
+ */
+export const notificationListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  type: notificationTypeSchema.optional(),
+  status: notificationStatusSchema.optional(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  createdAfter: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  createdBefore: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['createdAt', 'type', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list query schema
+ */
+export type NotificationListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof notificationListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Notification ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const notificationIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid('Invalid notification ID'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from ID schema
+ */
+export type NotificationIdInput = z.infer<typeof notificationIdSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification response schema
+ */
+export const notificationResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  userId: z.string().cuid(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid().nullable(),
+  type: notificationTypeSchema,
+  status: notificationStatusSchema,
+  title: z.string(),
+  message: z.string(),
+  link: z.string().nullable(),
+  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  readAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Notification summary schema
+ */
+export const notificationSummarySchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  type: notificationTypeSchema,
+  status: notificationStatusSchema,
+  title: z.string(),
+  messagePreview: z.string(),
+  link: z.string().nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Notification counts schema
+ */
+export const notificationCountsSchema = z.object({
+  total: z.number().int(),
+  unread: z.number().int(),
+  read: z.number().int(),
+  byType: z.object({
+    system: z.number().int(),
+    order: z.number().int(),
+    billing: z.number().int(),
+    promo: z.number().int(),
+  }),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification module settings schema
+ */
+export const notificationModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  emailProvider: z.enum(['smtp', 'sendgrid', 'ses']).default('smtp'),
+  emailEnabled: z.boolean().default(true),
+  inAppEnabled: z.boolean().default(true),
+  smsEnabled: z.boolean().default(false),
+  pushEnabled: z.boolean().default(false),
+  batchDelay: z.number().int().positive().default(5000),
+  maxRetries: z.number().int().positive().max(10).default(3),
+  retryDelay: z.number().int().positive().default(60000),
+  digestEnabled: z.boolean().default(false),
+  digestInterval: z.enum(['hourly', 'daily', 'weekly']).default('daily'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type NotificationModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof notificationModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Truncates message for preview
+ *
+ * @param message - Full message
+ * @param maxLength - Maximum length for preview
+ * @returns Truncated message with ellipsis
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const preview = truncateMessage('This is a very long message...', 50);
+ * // Returns: 'This is a very long message...'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function truncateMessage(message: string, maxLength: number = 100): string {
+  if (message.length <= maxLength) {
+    return message;
+  }
+  return message.substring(0, maxLength - 3).trim() + '...';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates notification type string
+ *
+ * @param type - Type string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid notification type
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidNotificationType('SYSTEM');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidNotificationType(type: string): boolean {
+  return NOTIFICATION_TYPES.includes(type as typeof NOTIFICATION_TYPES[number]);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates notification status string
+ *
+ * @param status - Status string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid notification status
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidNotificationStatus('UNREAD');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidNotificationStatus(status: string): boolean {
+  return NOTIFICATION_STATUSES.includes(status as typeof NOTIFICATION_STATUSES[number]);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generates notification title from template
+ *
+ * @param template - Title template with placeholders
+ * @param data - Data to interpolate
+ * @returns Interpolated title
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const title = generateTitle('Order #{orderNumber} confirmed', { orderNumber: '12345' });
+ * // Returns: 'Order #12345 confirmed'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateTitle(
+  template: string,
+  data: Record<string, string | number>
+): string {
+  let result = template;
+  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
+    result = result.replace(new RegExp(`\\{${key}\\}`, 'g'), String(value));
+  }
+  return result;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Parses notification IDs from input (handles both single ID and array)
+ *
+ * @param input - Single ID or array of IDs
+ * @returns Array of notification IDs
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const ids = parseNotificationIds('abc123');
+ * // Returns: ['abc123']
+ *
+ * const ids = parseNotificationIds(['abc123', 'def456']);
+ * // Returns: ['abc123', 'def456']
+ * ```
+ */
+export function parseNotificationIds(input: string | string[]): string[] {
+  if (Array.isArray(input)) {
+    return input;
+  }
+  return [input];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Formats notification for display
+ *
+ * @param notification - Raw notification data
+ * @returns Formatted notification summary
+ */
+export function formatNotificationSummary(notification: {
+  id: string;
+  type: string;
+  status: string;
+  title: string;
+  message: string;
+  link: string | null;
+  createdAt: Date;
+}): {
+  id: string;
+  type: string;
+  status: string;
+  title: string;
+  messagePreview: string;
+  link: string | null;
+  createdAt: Date;
+} {
+  return {
+    id: notification.id,
+    type: notification.type,
+    status: notification.status,
+    title: notification.title,
+    messagePreview: truncateMessage(notification.message, 100),
+    link: notification.link,
+    createdAt: notification.createdAt,
+  };
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.service.ts b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..751d424
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/notification/notification.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,610 @@
+/**
+ * Notification Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Notification module.
+ * Handles in-app notifications and email notification delivery.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/notification/notification.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { NotificationService } from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const notificationService = resolve<NotificationService>('NotificationService');
+ *
+ * // Create a notification
+ * const result = await notificationService.create(userId, {
+ *   type: 'ORDER',
+ *   title: 'New Order',
+ *   message: 'You have a new order #12345',
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { NotificationType, Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import {
+  NotificationRepository,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  CreateNotificationData,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Notification,
+  CreateNotificationRequest,
+  CreateNotificationResponse,
+  BroadcastNotificationRequest,
+  BroadcastNotificationResponse,
+  MarkAsReadResponse,
+  NotificationListParams,
+  NotificationCounts,
+  NotificationSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.types';
+
+import {
+  createNotificationSchema,
+  broadcastNotificationSchema,
+  markAsReadSchema,
+  notificationListQuerySchema,
+  parseNotificationIds,
+  formatNotificationSummary,
+  type CreateNotificationInput,
+  type BroadcastNotificationInput,
+  type MarkAsReadInput,
+  type NotificationListQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/_core/notification/notification.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Notification Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Notification module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all notification-related business operations including:
+ * - Creating in-app notifications
+ * - Broadcasting to multiple users
+ * - Email notification delivery
+ * - Mark as read operations
+ * - Notification statistics
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('NotificationService') private notificationService: NotificationService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleOrderCreated(userId: string, orderId: string) {
+ *     await this.notificationService.create(userId, {
+ *       type: 'ORDER',
+ *       title: 'Order Received',
+ *       message: 'Your order has been received and is being processed.',
+ *       link: `/orders/${orderId}`,
+ *     });
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class NotificationService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('NotificationRepository') private readonly repository: NotificationRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists notifications for a user with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of notifications
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await notificationService.list(userId, {
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 20,
+   *   status: 'UNREAD',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    userId: string,
+    params: NotificationListParams
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Notification>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      params,
+      notificationListQuerySchema
+    ) as NotificationListQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findByUserId(userId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists notification summaries for quick display.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param limit - Maximum number to return
+   * @returns Array of notification summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    userId: string,
+    limit: number = 20
+  ): Promise<NotificationSummary[]> {
+    const result = await this.repository.findByUserId(userId, { perPage: limit });
+    return result.data.map((n) => formatNotificationSummary(n));
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets unread notifications for real-time display.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param limit - Maximum number to return
+   * @returns Array of unread notifications
+   */
+  async getUnread(userId: string, limit: number = 10): Promise<Notification[]> {
+    return this.repository.getUnread(userId, limit);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets notification by ID.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Notification or null
+   */
+  async getById(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(userId, id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets notification by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Notification
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(userId, id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets notification counts for a user.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @returns Notification counts
+   */
+  async getCounts(userId: string): Promise<NotificationCounts> {
+    return this.repository.getCounts(userId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets unread count for a user.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @returns Unread count
+   */
+  async getUnreadCount(userId: string): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(userId, 'UNREAD');
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a notification for a user.
+   *
+   * Creates an in-app notification and optionally sends
+   * email/push notifications based on settings.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID to notify
+   * @param data - Notification data
+   * @returns Create response with notification
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await notificationService.create(userId, {
+   *   type: 'ORDER',
+   *   title: 'Order Confirmed',
+   *   message: 'Your order #12345 has been confirmed.',
+   *   link: '/orders/12345',
+   *   metadata: { orderId: '12345' },
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    userId: string,
+    data: Omit<CreateNotificationRequest, 'userId'>
+  ): Promise<CreateNotificationResponse> {
+    // Build full request with userId
+    const fullData = { ...data, userId };
+
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      fullData,
+      createNotificationSchema
+    ) as CreateNotificationInput;
+
+    // Create notification
+    const createData: CreateNotificationData = {
+      userId: validated.userId,
+      organizationId: validated.organizationId,
+      type: validated.type,
+      title: validated.title,
+      message: validated.message,
+      link: validated.link,
+      metadata: validated.metadata as Prisma.JsonValue,
+    };
+
+    const notification = await this.repository.create(createData);
+
+    // Send email if requested
+    let emailSent = false;
+    if (validated.sendEmail) {
+      emailSent = await this.sendEmailNotification(userId, notification);
+    }
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('notification.created', {
+      notificationId: notification.id,
+      userId: notification.userId,
+      organizationId: notification.organizationId,
+      type: notification.type,
+      title: notification.title,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      notification,
+      message: 'Notification created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Broadcasts a notification to multiple users.
+   *
+   * @param data - Broadcast request data
+   * @returns Broadcast response with count
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await notificationService.broadcast({
+   *   userIds: ['user1', 'user2', 'user3'],
+   *   type: 'PROMO',
+   *   title: 'New Feature Available',
+   *   message: 'Check out our new feature!',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async broadcast(
+    data: BroadcastNotificationRequest
+  ): Promise<BroadcastNotificationResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      data,
+      broadcastNotificationSchema
+    ) as BroadcastNotificationInput;
+
+    // Create notifications for all users
+    const createDataList: CreateNotificationData[] = validated.userIds.map((userId) => ({
+      userId,
+      organizationId: validated.organizationId,
+      type: validated.type,
+      title: validated.title,
+      message: validated.message,
+      link: validated.link,
+      metadata: validated.metadata as Prisma.JsonValue,
+    }));
+
+    const count = await this.repository.createMany(createDataList);
+
+    // Emit broadcast event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('notification.broadcast', {
+      count,
+      userIds: validated.userIds,
+      organizationId: validated.organizationId || null,
+      type: validated.type,
+      title: validated.title,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      count,
+      message: `Notification sent to ${count} users.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a system notification.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param title - Notification title
+   * @param message - Notification message
+   * @param link - Optional link
+   * @returns Created notification
+   */
+  async createSystemNotification(
+    userId: string,
+    title: string,
+    message: string,
+    link?: string
+  ): Promise<Notification> {
+    const result = await this.create(userId, {
+      type: 'SYSTEM',
+      title,
+      message,
+      link,
+    });
+    return result.notification;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an order notification.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param title - Notification title
+   * @param message - Notification message
+   * @param orderId - Order ID for link
+   * @returns Created notification
+   */
+  async createOrderNotification(
+    userId: string,
+    title: string,
+    message: string,
+    orderId: string
+  ): Promise<Notification> {
+    const result = await this.create(userId, {
+      type: 'ORDER',
+      title,
+      message,
+      link: `/orders/${orderId}`,
+      metadata: { resourceType: 'order', resourceId: orderId },
+    });
+    return result.notification;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a billing notification.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param title - Notification title
+   * @param message - Notification message
+   * @param link - Optional link
+   * @returns Created notification
+   */
+  async createBillingNotification(
+    userId: string,
+    title: string,
+    message: string,
+    link?: string
+  ): Promise<Notification> {
+    const result = await this.create(userId, {
+      type: 'BILLING',
+      title,
+      message,
+      link: link || '/billing',
+    });
+    return result.notification;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Mark as Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Marks a notification as read.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   * @returns Updated notification
+   */
+  async markAsRead(userId: string, id: string): Promise<Notification> {
+    const notification = await this.repository.markAsRead(userId, id);
+
+    // Emit read event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('notification.read', {
+      notificationId: notification.id,
+      userId,
+      readAt: notification.readAt?.toISOString() || new Date().toISOString(),
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return notification;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks multiple notifications as read.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param notificationIds - Notification ID(s)
+   * @returns Mark as read response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * // Single notification
+   * await notificationService.markManyAsRead(userId, 'notif_123');
+   *
+   * // Multiple notifications
+   * await notificationService.markManyAsRead(userId, ['notif_123', 'notif_456']);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async markManyAsRead(
+    userId: string,
+    notificationIds: string | string[]
+  ): Promise<MarkAsReadResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      { notificationIds },
+      markAsReadSchema
+    ) as MarkAsReadInput;
+
+    const ids = parseNotificationIds(validated.notificationIds);
+    const count = await this.repository.markManyAsRead(userId, ids);
+
+    return {
+      count,
+      message: `${count} notification(s) marked as read.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks all notifications as read for a user.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param type - Optional type filter
+   * @param organizationId - Optional organization filter
+   * @returns Mark as read response
+   */
+  async markAllAsRead(
+    userId: string,
+    type?: NotificationType,
+    organizationId?: string
+  ): Promise<MarkAsReadResponse> {
+    const count = await this.repository.markAllAsRead(userId, type, organizationId);
+
+    return {
+      count,
+      message: count > 0 ? `${count} notification(s) marked as read.` : 'No unread notifications.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes a notification.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param id - Notification ID
+   */
+  async delete(userId: string, id: string): Promise<void> {
+    await this.repository.delete(userId, id);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('notification.deleted', {
+      notificationId: id,
+      userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes multiple notifications.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param ids - Array of notification IDs
+   * @returns Number of deleted notifications
+   */
+  async deleteMany(userId: string, ids: string[]): Promise<number> {
+    const count = await this.repository.deleteMany(userId, ids);
+
+    // Emit deletion events
+    for (const id of ids) {
+      await this.eventService.emitCustom('notification.deleted', {
+        notificationId: id,
+        userId,
+        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+      });
+    }
+
+    return count;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes all read notifications for a user.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @returns Number of deleted notifications
+   */
+  async deleteAllRead(userId: string): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.deleteAllRead(userId);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Email Notification
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Sends an email notification.
+   *
+   * @param userId - User ID
+   * @param notification - Notification to send
+   * @returns Whether email was sent successfully
+   */
+  private async sendEmailNotification(
+    userId: string,
+    notification: Notification
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    try {
+      // In a real implementation, this would:
+      // 1. Look up user email
+      // 2. Use email service to send
+      // 3. Handle templates based on notification type
+
+      // For now, just log that we would send an email
+      // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
+      console.log(`[NotificationService] Would send email to user ${userId}:`, {
+        title: notification.title,
+        message: notification.message,
+      });
+
+      // Update notification metadata
+      await this.repository.update(userId, notification.id, {
+        metadata: {
+          ...notification.metadata,
+          emailSent: true,
+          emailSentAt: new Date().toISOString(),
+        } as Prisma.JsonValue,
+      });
+
+      return true;
+    } catch (error) {
+      // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
+      console.error(`[NotificationService] Failed to send email:`, error);
+      return false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(
+    data: unknown,
+    schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }
+  ): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as {
+          errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }>;
+        };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "organization",
+  "name": "Organization Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Core organization/tenant management module providing multi-tenant support, organization CRUD, and settings management",
+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth"],
+    "optional": []
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "organization.created",
+      "organization.updated",
+      "organization.deleted",
+      "organization.settings.updated",
+      "organization.status.changed",
+      "organization.plan.changed"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeCreate",
+      "afterCreate",
+      "beforeUpdate",
+      "afterUpdate",
+      "beforeDelete",
+      "afterDelete"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "organization:read",
+      "organization:create",
+      "organization:update",
+      "organization:delete",
+      "organization:settings.read",
+      "organization:settings.update",
+      "organization:members.read",
+      "organization:members.manage"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "OrganizationService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify"],
+    "events": []
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["basic_settings", "single_branch"],
+      "starter": ["custom_branding", "analytics_basic"],
+      "professional": ["multi_branch", "advanced_analytics"],
+      "business": ["white_label", "api_access"],
+      "enterprise": ["custom_integrations", "dedicated_support"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {

+      "icon": "ph-buildings",
+      "route": "/admin/organizations",
+      "order": 10,
+      "hidden": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "defaultTimezone": "Europe/Istanbul",
+      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
+      "defaultLanguage": "tr",
+      "allowPublicRegistration": false,
+      "requireEmailVerification": true,
+      "maxUsersPerOrg": 50,
+      "maxBranchesPerOrg": 10
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..13adfb7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,455 @@
+/**
+ * Organization Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for organization endpoints.
+ * Handles organization CRUD, settings management, and tenant operations.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/organization/organization.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List organizations
+ * GET /api/v1/organizations
+ *
+ * // Get organization by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/organizations/:id
+ *
+ * // Create organization
+ * POST /api/v1/organizations
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { OrganizationService } from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Organization,
+  OrganizationWithRelations,
+  CreateOrganizationRequest,
+  CreateOrganizationResponse,
+  UpdateOrganizationRequest,
+  UpdateOrganizationResponse,
+  UpdateSettingsRequest,
+  UpdateSettingsResponse,
+  ChangeStatusRequest,
+  ChangeStatusResponse,
+  OrganizationListParams,
+  OrganizationSummary,
+  OrganizationSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all organization-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete organizations
+ * - Settings management
+ * - Status changes
+ * - Validation endpoints
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List organizations
+ * GET /api/v1/organizations?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+ *
+ * // Get organization by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/organizations/org_123
+ *
+ * // Create organization
+ * POST /api/v1/organizations
+ * {
+ *   "name": "My Restaurant",
+ *   "email": "contact@myrestaurant.com"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/organizations')
+@injectable()
+export class OrganizationController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('OrganizationService') private readonly organizationService: OrganizationService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List organizations with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin only)
+   *
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, status, search, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of organizations
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/organizations?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 10, "total": 50, "totalPages": 5 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('organization.read')
+  async list(
+    @QueryParams() query: OrganizationListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<Organization>>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.list(query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List organization summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/summaries
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @returns Array of organization summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized()
+  async listSummaries(): Promise<ApiResponse<OrganizationSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.listSummaries();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get organization by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @returns Organization details
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/organizations/org_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "org_123",
+   *     "name": "My Restaurant",
+   *     ...
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('organization.read')
+  async getById(
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrganizationWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.getByIdWithRelations(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get organization by slug.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/slug/:slug
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param slug - Organization slug
+   * @returns Organization details
+   */
+  @Get('/slug/:slug')
+  @Authorized('organization.read')
+  async getBySlug(
+    @Param('slug') slug: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Organization>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.getBySlugOrThrow(slug);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get organization settings.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/:id/settings
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @returns Organization settings
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('organization.settings.read')
+  async getSettings(
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrganizationSettings>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.getSettings(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new organization.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/organizations
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin or registration flow)
+   *
+   * @param data - Organization creation data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created organization
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/organizations
+   * {
+   *   "name": "My Restaurant",
+   *   "email": "contact@myrestaurant.com",
+   *   "phone": "+90 555 123 4567"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "organization": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Organization created successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('organization.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @Body() data: CreateOrganizationRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateOrganizationResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.create(data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update an organization.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/organizations/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated organization
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PUT /api/v1/organizations/org_123
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Updated Restaurant Name",
+   *   "phone": "+90 555 987 6543"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized('organization.update')
+  async update(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateOrganizationRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateOrganizationResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.update(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update organization settings.
+   *
+   * Settings are merged with existing settings, not replaced.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/organizations/:id/settings
+   * @access Authenticated (organization owner/admin)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Settings update data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated settings
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/organizations/org_123/settings
+   * {
+   *   "settings": {
+   *     "localization": {
+   *       "timezone": "Europe/Istanbul",
+   *       "currency": "TRY"
+   *     }
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('organization.settings.update')
+  async updateSettings(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateSettingsRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateSettingsResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.updateSettings(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change organization status.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/organizations/:id/status
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin only)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Status change data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Status change response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/organizations/org_123/status
+   * {
+   *   "status": "SUSPENDED",
+   *   "reason": "Payment overdue"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/status')
+  @Authorized('organization.update')
+  async changeStatus(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ChangeStatusRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.changeStatus(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete an organization (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/organizations/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin only)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/organizations/org_123
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('organization.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.organizationService.delete(id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted organization.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/organizations/:id/restore
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin only)
+   *
+   * @param id - Organization ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Restored organization
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('organization.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Organization>> {
+    const result = await this.organizationService.restore(id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a slug is available.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/check-slug/:slug
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-slug/:slug')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkSlug(
+    @Param('slug') slug: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.organizationService.isSlugAvailable(slug);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Check if an email is available.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/organizations/check-email/:email
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param email - Email to check
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-email/:email')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkEmail(
+    @Param('email') email: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.organizationService.isEmailAvailable(email);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+}
