@@ -0,0 +1,271 @@
+/**
+ * Organization Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Organization module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for the organization module.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/organization/organization.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { organizationRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/organizations/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/organizations/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization module route configuration
+ */
+export interface OrganizationRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Organization module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the organization module:
+ * - Protected endpoints (all organization operations require authentication)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { organizationRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(organizationRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/organizations'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const organizationRoutes: OrganizationRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for organization endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/organizations',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/organizations',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for organization module - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/:id',
+    '/slug/:slug',
+    '/:id/settings',
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/restore',
+    '/check-slug/:slug',
+    '/check-email/:email',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for an organization endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/summaries')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/organizations/summaries')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildOrganizationApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/organizations/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildOrganizationApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${organizationRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for an organization endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/list')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/organizations/list')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildOrganizationAdminPath('/list');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/organizations/list'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildOrganizationAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${organizationRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected organization route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedOrganizationRoute('/api/v1/organizations'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedOrganizationRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with organization prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(organizationRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All organization routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface OrganizationEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all organization endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const organizationEndpoints: OrganizationEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List organizations with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List organization summaries for dropdowns',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get organization by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/slug/:slug',
+    description: 'Get organization by slug',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Get organization settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:settings.read'],
+  },
+
+  // Create endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create a new organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:create'],
+  },
+
+  // Update endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update an organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Update organization settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:settings.update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/status',
+    description: 'Change organization status',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:update'],
+  },
+
+  // Delete endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete an organization (soft delete)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/restore',
+    description: 'Restore a deleted organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['organization:delete'],
+  },
+
+  // Validation endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-slug/:slug',
+    description: 'Check if a slug is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-email/:email',
+    description: 'Check if an email is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default organizationRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d873eed
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/organization/organization.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,490 @@
+/**
+ * Organization Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Organization module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/organization/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createOrganizationSchema,
+ *   updateOrganizationSchema,
+ *   updateSettingsSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/organization/organization.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validatedData = createOrganizationSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Reserved slugs that cannot be used for organizations
+ */
+const RESERVED_SLUGS = [
+  'admin',
+  'api',
+  'app',
+  'auth',
+  'dashboard',
+  'help',
+  'login',
+  'logout',
+  'register',
+  'settings',
+  'support',
+  'www',
+  'static',
+  'assets',
+  'public',
+  'private',
+] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Valid organization statuses (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const ORGANIZATION_STATUSES = ['ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', 'SUSPENDED', 'PENDING'] as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization name schema
+ * - Required, 2-100 characters
+ * - No special characters except spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
+ */
+export const organizationNameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(2, 'Organization name must be at least 2 characters')
+  .max(100, 'Organization name must be at most 100 characters')
+  .regex(
+    /^[a-zA-ZÀ-ÿĞğÜüŞşİıÖöÇç0-9\s\-'&.]+$/,
+    'Organization name contains invalid characters'
+  );
+
+/**
+ * Organization slug schema
+ * - URL-friendly format
+ * - Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
+ * - Not in reserved list
+ */
+export const organizationSlugSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(2, 'Slug must be at least 2 characters')
+  .max(50, 'Slug must be at most 50 characters')
+  .regex(/^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/, 'Slug must be URL-friendly (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens)')
+  .refine((val) => !RESERVED_SLUGS.includes(val as typeof RESERVED_SLUGS[number]), {
+    message: 'This slug is reserved and cannot be used',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * Email validation schema
+ */
+export const emailSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(1, 'Email is required')
+  .email('Invalid email format')
+  .max(255, 'Email is too long');
+
+/**
+ * Phone number schema (optional, Turkish format support)
+ */
+export const phoneSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .optional()
+  .nullable()
+  .refine((val) => !val || /^\+?[\d\s\-()]{10,20}$/.test(val), {
+    message: 'Invalid phone number format',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * URL schema for logo and other URLs
+ */
+export const urlSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .url('Invalid URL format')
+  .max(500, 'URL is too long')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Color hex schema for branding
+ */
+export const colorHexSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(/^#([A-Fa-f0-9]{6}|[A-Fa-f0-9]{3})$/, 'Invalid hex color format')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Time format schema (HH:mm)
+ */
+export const timeSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/, 'Invalid time format (use HH:mm)')
+  .optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Settings Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Address schema
+ */
+export const addressSchema = z.object({
+  street1: z.string().max(200).optional(),
+  street2: z.string().max(200).optional(),
+  city: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  state: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  postalCode: z.string().max(20).optional(),
+  country: z.string().length(2, 'Country must be 2-letter ISO code').optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Day hours schema
+ */
+export const dayHoursSchema = z.object({
+  isOpen: z.boolean(),
+  open: timeSchema,
+  close: timeSchema,
+  breaks: z.array(z.object({
+    start: z.string().regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/),
+    end: z.string().regex(/^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/),
+  })).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Operating hours schema
+ */
+export const operatingHoursSchema = z.object({
+  monday: dayHoursSchema,
+  tuesday: dayHoursSchema,
+  wednesday: dayHoursSchema,
+  thursday: dayHoursSchema,
+  friday: dayHoursSchema,
+  saturday: dayHoursSchema,
+  sunday: dayHoursSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Business settings schema
+ */
+export const businessSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  legalName: z.string().max(200).optional(),
+  taxId: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+  address: addressSchema,
+  businessType: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+  operatingHours: operatingHoursSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Localization settings schema
+ */
+export const localizationSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  language: z.string().min(2).max(10).optional(),
+  timezone: z.string().max(50).optional(),
+  currency: z.string().length(3, 'Currency must be 3-letter ISO code').optional(),
+  dateFormat: z.string().max(20).optional(),
+  timeFormat: z.enum(['12h', '24h']).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Feature settings schema
+ */
+export const featureSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  enableOnlineOrdering: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableReservations: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableReviews: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableAIFeatures: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableMultiLanguage: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableAllergenInfo: z.boolean().optional(),
+  enableNutritionInfo: z.boolean().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Notification settings schema
+ */
+export const notificationSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  emailOnNewOrder: z.boolean().optional(),
+  smsOnNewOrder: z.boolean().optional(),
+  pushEnabled: z.boolean().optional(),
+  dailySummaryEmail: z.boolean().optional(),
+  weeklyReportEmail: z.boolean().optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Branding settings schema
+ */
+export const brandingSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  primaryColor: colorHexSchema,
+  secondaryColor: colorHexSchema,
+  fontFamily: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  favicon: urlSchema,
+  customCss: z.string().max(10000).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Complete organization settings schema
+ */
+export const organizationSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  business: businessSettingsSchema,
+  localization: localizationSettingsSchema,
+  features: featureSettingsSchema,
+  notifications: notificationSettingsSchema,
+  branding: brandingSettingsSchema,
+}).optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CRUD Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create organization request schema
+ */
+export const createOrganizationSchema = z.object({
+  name: organizationNameSchema,
+  slug: organizationSlugSchema.optional(),
+  email: emailSchema,
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  settings: organizationSettingsSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create schema
+ */
+export type CreateOrganizationInput = z.infer<typeof createOrganizationSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update organization request schema
+ */
+export const updateOrganizationSchema = z.object({
+  name: organizationNameSchema.optional(),
+  slug: organizationSlugSchema.optional(),
+  email: emailSchema.optional(),
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  logo: urlSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update schema
+ */
+export type UpdateOrganizationInput = z.infer<typeof updateOrganizationSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update organization settings request schema
+ */
+export const updateSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  settings: organizationSettingsSchema.unwrap(), // Make settings required in this context
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update settings schema
+ */
+export type UpdateSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof updateSettingsSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change organization status request schema
+ */
+export const changeStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: z.enum(ORGANIZATION_STATUSES),
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change status schema
+ */
+export type ChangeStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeStatusSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization list query schema
+ */
+export const organizationListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  status: z.enum(ORGANIZATION_STATUSES).optional(),
+  planId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  createdAfter: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  createdBefore: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  includeDeleted: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['name', 'createdAt', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list query schema
+ */
+export type OrganizationListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof organizationListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Organization ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const organizationIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid('Invalid organization ID'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from ID schema
+ */
+export type OrganizationIdInput = z.infer<typeof organizationIdSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas (for API documentation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization response schema
+ */
+export const organizationResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  name: z.string(),
+  slug: z.string(),
+  email: z.string().email(),
+  phone: z.string().nullable(),
+  logo: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  settings: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  status: z.enum(ORGANIZATION_STATUSES),
+  planId: z.string().cuid().nullable(),
+  trialEndsAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+  deletedAt: z.date().nullable(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Organization summary schema
+ */
+export const organizationSummarySchema = z.object({
+  id: z.string().cuid(),
+  name: z.string(),
+  slug: z.string(),
+  logo: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  status: z.enum(ORGANIZATION_STATUSES),
+  planName: z.string().optional(),
+  userCount: z.number().int().optional(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Organization module settings schema
+ */
+export const organizationModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  defaultTimezone: z.string().default('Europe/Istanbul'),
+  defaultCurrency: z.string().length(3).default('TRY'),
+  defaultLanguage: z.string().min(2).max(10).default('tr'),
+  allowPublicRegistration: z.boolean().default(false),
+  requireEmailVerification: z.boolean().default(true),
+  maxUsersPerOrg: z.number().int().positive().default(50),
+  maxBranchesPerOrg: z.number().int().positive().default(10),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type OrganizationModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof organizationModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Generates a URL-friendly slug from a name
+ *
+ * @param name - Organization name
+ * @returns URL-friendly slug
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const slug = generateSlug('My Restaurant & Bar');
+ * // Returns: 'my-restaurant-bar'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateSlug(name: string): string {
+  return name
+    .toLowerCase()
+    .trim()
+    .normalize('NFD')
+    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '') // Remove accents
+    .replace(/[ğ]/g, 'g')
+    .replace(/[ü]/g, 'u')
+    .replace(/[ş]/g, 's')
+    .replace(/[ı]/g, 'i')
+    .replace(/[ö]/g, 'o')
+    .replace(/[ç]/g, 'c')
+    .replace(/[&]/g, 'and')
+    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '') // Remove invalid chars
+    .replace(/\s+/g, '-') // Replace spaces with hyphens
+    .replace(/-+/g, '-') // Remove duplicate hyphens
+    .replace(/^-|-$/g, ''); // Remove leading/trailing hyphens
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates and generates a unique slug
+ *
+ * @param name - Organization name
+ * @param existingSlugs - Array of existing slugs to check against
+ * @returns Unique slug
+ */
+export function generateUniqueSlug(name: string, existingSlugs: string[]): string {
+  const baseSlug = generateSlug(name);
+  let slug = baseSlug;
+  let counter = 1;
+
+  while (existingSlugs.includes(slug) || RESERVED_SLUGS.includes(slug as typeof RESERVED_SLUGS[number])) {
+    slug = `${baseSlug}-${counter}`;
+    counter++;
+  }
+
+  return slug;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Merges organization settings with defaults
+ *
+ * @param existing - Existing settings
+ * @param updates - Settings updates
+ * @returns Merged settings
+ */
+export function mergeSettings(
+  existing: Record<string, unknown>,
+  updates: Record<string, unknown>
+): Record<string, unknown> {
+  const merged = { ...existing };
+
+  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(updates)) {
+    if (value !== undefined && value !== null) {
+      if (typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
+        merged[key] = mergeSettings(
+          (merged[key] as Record<string, unknown>) || {},
+          value as Record<string, unknown>
+        );
+      } else {
+        merged[key] = value;
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  return merged;
+}

+/**

+ *
+ * Centralized exports for the Subscription module.
+ * Import from this file when using subscription module functionality
+ * from other parts of the application.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/subscription
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   SubscriptionModule,
+ *   SubscriptionService,
+ *   subscriptionRoutes,
+ *   type Plan,
+ *   type Subscription,
+ *   type FeatureCheckResult,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/subscription';
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Definition
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { SubscriptionModule, default } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.module';
+export type {
+  SubscriptionModuleContext,
+  SubscriptionModuleHooks,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.module';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { SubscriptionService } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { SubscriptionRepository } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.repository';
+export type {
+  PaginatedResult,
+  CreateSubscriptionData,
+  UpdateSubscriptionData,
+  CreateInvoiceData,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.repository';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { SubscriptionController } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.controller';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Routes
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  subscriptionRoutes,
+  buildSubscriptionApiPath,
+  buildSubscriptionAdminPath,
+  isPublicSubscriptionRoute,
+  isProtectedSubscriptionRoute,
+  subscriptionEndpoints,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes';
+export type {
+  SubscriptionRouteConfig,
+  SubscriptionEndpointMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+// Plan types
+export type {
+  Plan,
+  PlanTier,
+  PlanFeatures,
+  CoreFeatures,
+  OrderFeatures,
+  AIFeatures,
+  AdvancedFeatures,
+  PlanLimits,
+  ResourceLimits,
+  MonthlyLimits,

+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Subscription types
+export type {
+  Subscription,
+  SubscriptionWithRelations,

+  PlanChangeRecord,
+  SubscriptionSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Invoice types
+export type {
+  Invoice,
+  InvoiceLineItem,
+  InvoiceMetadata,
+  BillingAddress,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Feature gating types
+export type {
+  FeatureCheckResult,
+  LimitCheckResult,
+  UsageSummary,
+  UsageItem,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Request/Response types
+export type {
+  CreateSubscriptionRequest,
+  CreateSubscriptionResponse,
+  UpdateSubscriptionRequest,
+  UpdateSubscriptionResponse,
+  ChangePlanRequest,
+  ChangePlanResponse,
+  CancelSubscriptionRequest,
+  CancelSubscriptionResponse,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionRequest,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionResponse,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Query/Filter types
+export type {
+  SubscriptionListFilters,
+  SubscriptionListParams,
+  InvoiceListFilters,
+  InvoiceListParams,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Event types
+export type {
+  SubscriptionCreatedEvent,
+  SubscriptionCancelledEvent,
+  PlanChangedEvent,
+  TrialStartedEvent,
+  TrialEndedEvent,
+  InvoicePaidEvent,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Hook context types
+export type {
+  BeforeCreateContext,
+  AfterCreateContext,
+  BeforePlanChangeContext,
+  AfterPlanChangeContext,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Module settings types
+export type { SubscriptionModuleSettings } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// Type guards
+export {
+  isPlan,
+  isSubscription,
+  isPlanTier,
+  getTierOrder,
+  isTierHigher,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schemas (Zod validation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Base schemas
+  planNameSchema,
+  displayNameSchema,
+  priceSchema,
+  currencySchema,
+  cuidSchema,
+
+  // Plan schemas
+  planFeaturesSchema,

+
+  // Subscription schemas

+  // Query schemas

+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema';

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "subscription",
+  "name": "Subscription Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Core subscription management module providing plan management, billing, and feature gating for E-Menum",
+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
+    "optional": []
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "subscription.created",
+      "subscription.updated",
+      "subscription.cancelled",
+      "subscription.expired",
+      "subscription.plan.changed",
+      "subscription.trial.started",
+      "subscription.trial.ended",
+      "invoice.created",
+      "invoice.paid"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeCreate",
+      "afterCreate",
+      "beforeCancel",
+      "afterCancel",
+      "beforePlanChange",
+      "afterPlanChange"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "subscription:read",
+      "subscription:create",
+      "subscription:update",
+      "subscription:cancel",
+      "plan:read",
+      "plan:manage",
+      "invoice:read",
+      "invoice:manage"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "SubscriptionService",
+      "PlanService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read"],
+    "events": ["organization.created"]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["view_plan", "basic_billing"],
+      "starter": ["invoices", "payment_history"],
+      "professional": ["usage_analytics", "forecast"],
+      "business": ["custom_billing", "api_access"],
+      "enterprise": ["contract_billing", "dedicated_support"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Subscriptions",
+      "icon": "ph-credit-card",
+      "route": "/admin/subscriptions",
+      "order": 15,
+      "hidden": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "trialDays": 14,
+      "gracePeriodDays": 7,
+      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
+      "autoRenew": true,
+      "sendRenewalReminders": true,
+      "reminderDays": [7, 3, 1]
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..3d63c6c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,500 @@
+/**
+ * Subscription Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for subscription endpoints.
+ * Handles plan management, subscription lifecycle, and feature gating.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/subscription/subscription.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List plans
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans
+ *
+ * // Get subscription for organization
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/organization/:organizationId
+ *
+ * // Check feature availability
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature?organizationId=...&feature=...
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  QueryParam,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+
+import { SubscriptionService } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Plan,
+  Subscription,
+  SubscriptionWithRelations,
+  Invoice,
+  CreateSubscriptionRequest,
+  CreateSubscriptionResponse,
+  UpdateSubscriptionRequest,
+  UpdateSubscriptionResponse,
+  ChangePlanRequest,
+  ChangePlanResponse,
+  CancelSubscriptionRequest,
+  CancelSubscriptionResponse,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionRequest,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionResponse,
+  SubscriptionListParams,
+  InvoiceListParams,
+  SubscriptionSummary,
+  PlanSummary,
+  FeatureCheckResult,
+  LimitCheckResult,
+  UsageSummary,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all subscription-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - Plan listing and details
+ * - Subscription CRUD and lifecycle
+ * - Feature and limit checking
+ * - Invoice listing
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List available plans
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans
+ *
+ * // Get subscription for organization
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/organization/org_123
+ *
+ * // Check if feature is available
+ * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature?organizationId=org_123&feature=ai.contentGeneration
+ *
+ * // Change plan
+ * POST /api/v1/subscriptions/sub_123/change-plan
+ * {
+ *   "planId": "plan_456",
+ *   "immediate": true
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/subscriptions')
+@injectable()
+export class SubscriptionController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('SubscriptionService') private readonly subscriptionService: SubscriptionService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Plan Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List all available plans.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans
+   * @access Public
+   *
+   * @param includeInactive - Whether to include inactive plans
+   * @returns Array of plans
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [
+   *     { "id": "plan_1", "name": "free", "displayName": "Free", ... },
+   *     { "id": "plan_2", "name": "starter", "displayName": "Starter", ... }
+   *   ]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/plans')
+  async listPlans(
+    @QueryParam('includeInactive') includeInactive?: boolean
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Plan[]>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.listPlans(includeInactive);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List plan summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans/summaries
+   * @access Public
+   *
+   * @returns Array of plan summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/plans/summaries')
+  async listPlanSummaries(): Promise<ApiResponse<PlanSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.listPlanSummaries();
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get plan by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/plans/:id
+   * @access Public
+   *
+   * @param id - Plan ID
+   * @returns Plan details
+   */
+  @Get('/plans/:id')
+  async getPlanById(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<Plan>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getPlanByIdOrThrow(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Subscription List Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List subscriptions with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin)
+   *
+   * @param query - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of subscription summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('subscription.read')
+  async list(
+    @QueryParams() query: SubscriptionListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<SubscriptionSummary>>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.list(query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Subscription Read Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get subscription by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @returns Subscription details with relations
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('subscription.read')
+  async getById(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<SubscriptionWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getByIdWithRelations(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get subscription by organization ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/organization/:organizationId
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Subscription details or null
+   */
+  @Get('/organization/:organizationId')
+  @Authorized('subscription.read')
+  async getByOrganizationId(
+    @Param('organizationId') organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<SubscriptionWithRelations | null>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getByOrganizationIdWithRelations(organizationId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Subscription Write Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new subscription.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/subscriptions
+   * @access Authenticated (platform admin)
+   *
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created subscription
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('subscription.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @Body() data: CreateSubscriptionRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateSubscriptionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.create(data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update a subscription.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/:id
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated subscription
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized('subscription.update')
+  async update(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateSubscriptionRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateSubscriptionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.update(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change subscription plan.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/subscriptions/:id/change-plan
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Change plan request data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Change plan response
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/change-plan')
+  @Authorized('subscription.update')
+  async changePlan(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ChangePlanRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangePlanResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.changePlan(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Cancel a subscription.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/subscriptions/:id/cancel
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Cancel request data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Cancel response
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/cancel')
+  @Authorized('subscription.cancel')
+  async cancel(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: CancelSubscriptionRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CancelSubscriptionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.cancel(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Reactivate a cancelled subscription.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/subscriptions/:id/reactivate
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Reactivate request data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Reactivate response
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/reactivate')
+  @Authorized('subscription.update')
+  async reactivate(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ReactivateSubscriptionRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ReactivateSubscriptionResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.reactivate(id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Feature Gating Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a feature is available for an organization.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param feature - Feature path (e.g., 'ai.contentGeneration')
+   * @returns Feature check result
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature?organizationId=org_123&feature=ai.contentGeneration
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "allowed": false,
+   *     "currentTier": "starter",
+   *     "requiredTier": "professional",
+   *     "message": "This feature requires professional plan or higher"
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/check-feature')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkFeature(
+    @QueryParam('organizationId') organizationId: string,
+    @QueryParam('feature') feature: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<FeatureCheckResult>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.checkFeature(organizationId, feature);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a resource limit is within bounds.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-limit
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param resource - Resource type (e.g., 'menus', 'products')
+   * @param currentUsage - Current usage count
+   * @returns Limit check result
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/subscriptions/check-limit?organizationId=org_123&resource=menus&currentUsage=5
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "allowed": true,
+   *     "current": 5,
+   *     "limit": 10,
+   *     "usagePercent": 50
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/check-limit')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkLimit(
+    @QueryParam('organizationId') organizationId: string,
+    @QueryParam('resource') resource: string,
+    @QueryParam('currentUsage') currentUsage: number
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<LimitCheckResult>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.checkLimit(
+      organizationId,
+      resource,
+      currentUsage
+    );
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get usage summary for an organization.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/usage/:organizationId
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Usage summary
+   */
+  @Get('/usage/:organizationId')
+  @Authorized('subscription.read')
+  async getUsageSummary(
+    @Param('organizationId') organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UsageSummary>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getUsageSummary(organizationId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Invoice Endpoints
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List invoices with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/invoices
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param query - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of invoices
+   */
+  @Get('/invoices')
+  @Authorized('invoice.read')
+  async listInvoices(
+    @QueryParams() query: InvoiceListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<Invoice>>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.listInvoices(query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get invoices for a subscription.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/:id/invoices
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @returns Array of invoices
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/invoices')
+  @Authorized('invoice.read')
+  async getSubscriptionInvoices(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<ApiResponse<Invoice[]>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getInvoicesBySubscriptionId(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get invoice by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/subscriptions/invoices/:invoiceId
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param invoiceId - Invoice ID
+   * @returns Invoice details
+   */
+  @Get('/invoices/:invoiceId')
+  @Authorized('invoice.read')
+  async getInvoiceById(@Param('invoiceId') invoiceId: string): Promise<ApiResponse<Invoice | null>> {
+    const result = await this.subscriptionService.getInvoiceById(invoiceId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+}

--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,344 @@
+/**
+ * Subscription Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Subscription module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for the subscription module.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { subscriptionRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/subscriptions/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/subscriptions/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription module route configuration
+ */
+export interface SubscriptionRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Subscription module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the subscription module:
+ * - Public endpoints (plan listing)
+ * - Protected endpoints (subscription operations require authentication)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { subscriptionRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(subscriptionRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/subscriptions'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const subscriptionRoutes: SubscriptionRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for subscription endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/subscriptions',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/subscriptions',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * Plans can be viewed by anyone
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/plans',
+    '/plans/summaries',
+    '/plans/:id',
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/organization/:organizationId',
+    '/:id/change-plan',
+    '/:id/cancel',
+    '/:id/reactivate',
+    '/check-feature',
+    '/check-limit',
+    '/usage/:organizationId',
+    '/invoices',
+    '/:id/invoices',
+    '/invoices/:invoiceId',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a subscription endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/plans')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/subscriptions/plans')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildSubscriptionApiPath('/plans');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/subscriptions/plans'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildSubscriptionApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${subscriptionRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a subscription endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/list')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/subscriptions/list')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildSubscriptionAdminPath('/list');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/subscriptions/list'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildSubscriptionAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${subscriptionRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a public subscription route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a public route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isPublicSubscriptionRoute('/api/v1/subscriptions/plans'); // true
+ * isPublicSubscriptionRoute('/api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature'); // false
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isPublicSubscriptionRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with subscription prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(subscriptionRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // Get the endpoint part
+  const endpoint = normalizedPath.replace(subscriptionRoutes.prefix, '') || '/';
+
+  // Check against public routes (with parameter matching)
+  return subscriptionRoutes.public.some((route) => {
+    // Convert route pattern to regex
+    const pattern = route.replace(/:[\w]+/g, '[^/]+');
+    const regex = new RegExp(`^${pattern}$`);
+    return regex.test(endpoint);
+  });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected subscription route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedSubscriptionRoute('/api/v1/subscriptions/check-feature'); // true
+ * isProtectedSubscriptionRoute('/api/v1/subscriptions/plans'); // false
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedSubscriptionRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with subscription prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(subscriptionRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // If it's public, it's not protected
+  if (isPublicSubscriptionRoute(path)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All other subscription routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface SubscriptionEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all subscription endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const subscriptionEndpoints: SubscriptionEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // Plan endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/plans',
+    description: 'List all available plans',
+    requiresAuth: false,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/plans/summaries',
+    description: 'List plan summaries for dropdowns',
+    requiresAuth: false,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/plans/:id',
+    description: 'Get plan by ID',
+    requiresAuth: false,
+  },
+
+  // Subscription list endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List subscriptions with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Subscription read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get subscription by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/organization/:organizationId',
+    description: 'Get subscription by organization ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Subscription write endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create a new subscription',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:create'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update a subscription',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/change-plan',
+    description: 'Change subscription plan',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/cancel',
+    description: 'Cancel a subscription',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:cancel'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/reactivate',
+    description: 'Reactivate a cancelled subscription',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:update'],
+  },
+
+  // Feature gating endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-feature',
+    description: 'Check if a feature is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-limit',
+    description: 'Check if a resource limit is within bounds',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/usage/:organizationId',
+    description: 'Get usage summary for an organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['subscription:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Invoice endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/invoices',
+    description: 'List invoices with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['invoice:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/invoices',
+    description: 'Get invoices for a subscription',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['invoice:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/invoices/:invoiceId',
+    description: 'Get invoice by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['invoice:read'],
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default subscriptionRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..60d5970
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,541 @@
+/**
+ * Subscription Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Subscription module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/subscription/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createSubscriptionSchema,
+ *   changePlanSchema,
+ *   cancelSubscriptionSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validatedData = createSubscriptionSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Valid subscription statuses (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const SUBSCRIPTION_STATUSES = [
+  'TRIALING',
+  'ACTIVE',
+  'PAST_DUE',
+  'CANCELLED',
+  'PAUSED',
+] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Valid invoice statuses (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const INVOICE_STATUSES = [
+  'DRAFT',
+  'PENDING',
+  'PAID',
+  'OVERDUE',
+  'CANCELLED',
+  'REFUNDED',
+] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Valid payment methods (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const PAYMENT_METHODS = ['CREDIT_CARD', 'BANK_TRANSFER', 'CASH'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Valid plan tiers
+ */
+const PLAN_TIERS = ['free', 'starter', 'professional', 'business', 'enterprise'] as const;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Plan name schema
+ */
+export const planNameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(1, 'Plan name is required')
+  .max(50, 'Plan name must be at most 50 characters')
+  .regex(/^[a-z0-9_-]+$/, 'Plan name must be lowercase alphanumeric with underscores or hyphens');
+
+/**
+ * Display name schema
+ */
+export const displayNameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Display name is required')
+  .max(100, 'Display name must be at most 100 characters');
+
+/**
+ * Price schema
+ */
+export const priceSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .min(0, 'Price must be non-negative')
+  .max(999999.99, 'Price is too high');
+
+/**
+ * Currency schema (ISO 4217)
+ */
+export const currencySchema = z
+  .string()
+  .length(3, 'Currency must be 3-letter ISO code')
+  .toUpperCase()
+  .default('TRY');
+
+/**
+ * CUID schema for IDs
+ */
+export const cuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format');
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Plan Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Plan features schema
+ */
+export const planFeaturesSchema = z.object({
+  core: z.object({
+    digitalMenu: z.boolean().optional(),
+    qrCodeGeneration: z.boolean().optional(),
+    basicAnalytics: z.boolean().optional(),
+    watermark: z.boolean().optional(),
+    customDomain: z.boolean().optional(),
+    whiteLabel: z.boolean().optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+  orders: z.object({
+    orderReceiving: z.boolean().optional(),
+    kitchenDisplay: z.boolean().optional(),
+    waiterApp: z.boolean().optional(),
+    tableManagement: z.boolean().optional(),
+    serviceRequests: z.boolean().optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+  ai: z.object({
+    contentGeneration: z.boolean().optional(),
+    imageGeneration: z.boolean().optional(),
+    translation: z.boolean().optional(),
+    insights: z.boolean().optional(),
+    forecasting: z.boolean().optional(),
+    naturalQuery: z.boolean().optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+  advanced: z.object({
+    multiBranch: z.boolean().optional(),
+    centralMenuManagement: z.boolean().optional(),
+    campaigns: z.boolean().optional(),
+    loyaltyProgram: z.boolean().optional(),
+    apiAccess: z.boolean().optional(),
+    webhooks: z.boolean().optional(),
+    customIntegrations: z.boolean().optional(),
+    prioritySupport: z.boolean().optional(),
+    dedicatedAccount: z.boolean().optional(),
+    slaGuarantee: z.boolean().optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Plan limits schema
+ */
+export const planLimitsSchema = z.object({
+  resources: z.object({
+    menus: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    categoriesPerMenu: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    products: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    qrCodes: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    users: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    branches: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    storageMB: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+  monthly: z.object({
+    qrScans: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    orders: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    aiCredits: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    apiRequests: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+    exports: z.number().int().min(-1).optional(),
+  }).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Create plan request schema
+ */
+export const createPlanSchema = z.object({
+  name: planNameSchema,
+  displayName: displayNameSchema,
+  description: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+  monthlyPrice: priceSchema,
+  annualPrice: priceSchema,
+  currency: currencySchema,
+  features: planFeaturesSchema,
+  limits: planLimitsSchema,
+  isActive: z.boolean().default(true),
+  sortOrder: z.number().int().min(0).default(0),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create plan schema
+ */
+export type CreatePlanInput = z.infer<typeof createPlanSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update plan request schema
+ */
+export const updatePlanSchema = z.object({
+  displayName: displayNameSchema.optional(),
+  description: z.string().max(500).optional().nullable(),
+  monthlyPrice: priceSchema.optional(),
+  annualPrice: priceSchema.optional(),
+  currency: currencySchema.optional(),
+  features: planFeaturesSchema,
+  limits: planLimitsSchema,
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
+  sortOrder: z.number().int().min(0).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update plan schema
+ */
+export type UpdatePlanInput = z.infer<typeof updatePlanSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Subscription Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription metadata schema
+ */
+export const subscriptionMetadataSchema = z.object({
+  previousPlanId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  cancellationReason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+  notes: z.string().max(1000).optional(),
+  externalReference: z.string().max(255).optional(),
+}).optional();
+
+/**
+ * Create subscription request schema
+ */
+export const createSubscriptionSchema = z.object({
+  organizationId: cuidSchema,
+  planId: cuidSchema,
+  startTrial: z.boolean().default(true),
+  paymentMethod: z.enum(PAYMENT_METHODS).optional(),
+  metadata: subscriptionMetadataSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create subscription schema
+ */
+export type CreateSubscriptionInput = z.infer<typeof createSubscriptionSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update subscription request schema
+ */
+export const updateSubscriptionSchema = z.object({
+  paymentMethod: z.enum(PAYMENT_METHODS).optional(),
+  cancelAtPeriodEnd: z.boolean().optional(),
+  metadata: subscriptionMetadataSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update subscription schema
+ */
+export type UpdateSubscriptionInput = z.infer<typeof updateSubscriptionSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change plan request schema
+ */
+export const changePlanSchema = z.object({
+  planId: cuidSchema,
+  immediate: z.boolean().default(false),
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change plan schema
+ */
+export type ChangePlanInput = z.infer<typeof changePlanSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Cancel subscription request schema
+ */
+export const cancelSubscriptionSchema = z.object({
+  immediate: z.boolean().default(false),
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from cancel subscription schema
+ */
+export type CancelSubscriptionInput = z.infer<typeof cancelSubscriptionSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Reactivate subscription request schema
+ */
+export const reactivateSubscriptionSchema = z.object({
+  planId: cuidSchema.optional(),
+  paymentMethod: z.enum(PAYMENT_METHODS).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from reactivate subscription schema
+ */
+export type ReactivateSubscriptionInput = z.infer<typeof reactivateSubscriptionSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription list query schema
+ */
+export const subscriptionListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  status: z.enum(SUBSCRIPTION_STATUSES).optional(),
+  planId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  expiringSoon: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(90).optional(),
+  inTrial: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['createdAt', 'currentPeriodEnd', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from subscription list query schema
+ */
+export type SubscriptionListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof subscriptionListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Plan list query schema
+ */
+export const planListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  includeInactive: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['sortOrder', 'monthlyPrice', 'name']).optional().default('sortOrder'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('asc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from plan list query schema
+ */
+export type PlanListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof planListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Invoice list query schema
+ */
+export const invoiceListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  status: z.enum(INVOICE_STATUSES).optional(),
+  subscriptionId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  organizationId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
+  startDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  endDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['createdAt', 'dueDate', 'totalAmount', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from invoice list query schema
+ */
+export type InvoiceListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof invoiceListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Subscription ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const subscriptionIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from subscription ID schema
+ */
+export type SubscriptionIdInput = z.infer<typeof subscriptionIdSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Feature check query schema
+ */
+export const featureCheckSchema = z.object({
+  feature: z.string().min(1).max(100),
+  organizationId: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from feature check schema
+ */
+export type FeatureCheckInput = z.infer<typeof featureCheckSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Limit check query schema
+ */
+export const limitCheckSchema = z.object({
+  resource: z.string().min(1).max(50),
+  organizationId: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from limit check schema
+ */
+export type LimitCheckInput = z.infer<typeof limitCheckSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas (for API documentation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Plan response schema
+ */
+export const planResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  name: z.string(),
+  displayName: z.string(),
+  description: z.string().nullable(),
+  monthlyPrice: z.number(),
+  annualPrice: z.number(),
+  currency: z.string(),
+  features: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  limits: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  isActive: z.boolean(),
+  sortOrder: z.number(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Subscription response schema
+ */
+export const subscriptionResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  organizationId: cuidSchema,
+  planId: cuidSchema,
+  status: z.enum(SUBSCRIPTION_STATUSES),
+  currentPeriodStart: z.date(),
+  currentPeriodEnd: z.date(),
+  cancelAtPeriodEnd: z.boolean(),
+  cancelledAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  trialStart: z.date().nullable(),
+  trialEnd: z.date().nullable(),
+  paymentMethod: z.enum(PAYMENT_METHODS).nullable(),
+  lastPaymentAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  nextPaymentAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription module settings schema
+ */
+export const subscriptionModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  trialDays: z.number().int().min(0).max(90).default(14),
+  gracePeriodDays: z.number().int().min(0).max(30).default(7),
+  defaultCurrency: currencySchema.default('TRY'),
+  autoRenew: z.boolean().default(true),
+  sendRenewalReminders: z.boolean().default(true),
+  reminderDays: z.array(z.number().int().positive().max(30)).default([7, 3, 1]),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type SubscriptionModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof subscriptionModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Calculates prorated amount for plan change
+ *
+ * @param currentPrice - Current plan price
+ * @param newPrice - New plan price
+ * @param daysRemaining - Days remaining in current period
+ * @param totalDays - Total days in billing period
+ * @returns Prorated amount (positive = charge, negative = credit)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const prorated = calculateProration(4000, 6000, 15, 30);
+ * // Returns: 1000 (charge 1000 TRY)
+ * ```
+ */
+export function calculateProration(
+  currentPrice: number,
+  newPrice: number,
+  daysRemaining: number,
+  totalDays: number
+): number {
+  const dailyCurrentRate = currentPrice / totalDays;
+  const dailyNewRate = newPrice / totalDays;
+  const unusedCredit = dailyCurrentRate * daysRemaining;
+  const newCharge = dailyNewRate * daysRemaining;
+  return Math.round((newCharge - unusedCredit) * 100) / 100;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Calculates days until subscription expiry
+ *
+ * @param periodEnd - Period end date
+ * @returns Days until expiry (negative if already expired)
+ */
+export function daysUntilExpiry(periodEnd: Date): number {
+  const now = new Date();
+  const diffTime = periodEnd.getTime() - now.getTime();
+  return Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generates invoice number
+ *
+ * @param prefix - Invoice prefix (default: 'INV')
+ * @returns Generated invoice number
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const invoiceNumber = generateInvoiceNumber();
+ * // Returns: 'INV-20260131-XXXXX'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateInvoiceNumber(prefix = 'INV'): string {
+  const date = new Date();
+  const dateStr = date.toISOString().slice(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');
+  const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 7).toUpperCase();
+  return `${prefix}-${dateStr}-${random}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a plan tier is higher than another
+ *
+ * @param tier1 - First tier
+ * @param tier2 - Second tier
+ * @returns True if tier1 > tier2
+ */
+export function compareTiers(tier1: string, tier2: string): number {
+  const order: Record<string, number> = {
+    free: 0,
+    starter: 1,
+    professional: 2,
+    business: 3,
+    enterprise: 4,
+  };
+  return (order[tier1] ?? 0) - (order[tier2] ?? 0);
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service.ts b/src/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service.ts

--- /dev/null
