@@ -0,0 +1,943 @@
+/**
+ * Subscription Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Subscription module.
+ * Handles subscription lifecycle, plan management, and feature gating.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { SubscriptionService } from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const subService = resolve<SubscriptionService>('SubscriptionService');
+ *
+ * // Check if feature is available
+ * const result = await subService.checkFeature(orgId, 'ai.contentGeneration');
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { SubscriptionStatus, Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import {
+  SubscriptionRepository,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  type CreateSubscriptionData,
+  type UpdateSubscriptionData,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Plan,
+  Subscription,
+  SubscriptionWithRelations,
+  Invoice,
+  CreateSubscriptionRequest,
+  CreateSubscriptionResponse,
+  UpdateSubscriptionRequest,
+  UpdateSubscriptionResponse,
+  ChangePlanRequest,
+  ChangePlanResponse,
+  CancelSubscriptionRequest,
+  CancelSubscriptionResponse,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionRequest,
+  ReactivateSubscriptionResponse,
+  SubscriptionListParams,
+  InvoiceListParams,
+  SubscriptionSummary,
+  PlanSummary,
+  FeatureCheckResult,
+  LimitCheckResult,
+  UsageSummary,
+  UsageItem,
+  PlanTier,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.types';
+
+import {
+  createSubscriptionSchema,
+  updateSubscriptionSchema,
+  changePlanSchema,
+  cancelSubscriptionSchema,
+  reactivateSubscriptionSchema,
+  subscriptionListQuerySchema,
+  invoiceListQuerySchema,
+  generateInvoiceNumber,
+  calculateProration,
+  daysUntilExpiry,
+  type CreateSubscriptionInput,
+  type UpdateSubscriptionInput,
+  type ChangePlanInput,
+  type CancelSubscriptionInput,
+  type ReactivateSubscriptionInput,
+  type SubscriptionListQueryInput,
+  type InvoiceListQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/_core/subscription/subscription.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Module settings
+ */
+interface ModuleSettings {
+  trialDays: number;
+  gracePeriodDays: number;
+  defaultCurrency: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+const DEFAULT_TRIAL_DAYS = 14;
+const DEFAULT_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS = 7;
+const DEFAULT_CURRENCY = 'TRY';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Subscription Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Subscription module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all subscription-related business operations including:
+ * - Subscription CRUD and lifecycle management
+ * - Plan management and comparison
+ * - Feature gating and limit checking
+ * - Invoice generation
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('SubscriptionService') private subService: SubscriptionService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleFeatureCheck(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.subService.checkFeature(orgId, 'ai.contentGeneration');
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class SubscriptionService {
+  /** Module settings */
+  private settings: ModuleSettings = {
+    trialDays: DEFAULT_TRIAL_DAYS,
+    gracePeriodDays: DEFAULT_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS,
+    defaultCurrency: DEFAULT_CURRENCY,
+  };
+
+  constructor(
+    @inject('SubscriptionRepository') private readonly repository: SubscriptionRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Plan Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists all available plans.
+   *
+   * @param includeInactive - Whether to include inactive plans
+   * @returns Array of plans
+   */
+  async listPlans(includeInactive = false): Promise<Plan[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllPlans(includeInactive);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists plan summaries (for UI dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @param includeInactive - Whether to include inactive plans
+   * @returns Array of plan summaries
+   */
+  async listPlanSummaries(includeInactive = false): Promise<PlanSummary[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllPlanSummaries(includeInactive);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a plan by ID.
+   *
+   * @param id - Plan ID
+   * @returns Plan or null
+   */
+  async getPlanById(id: string): Promise<Plan | null> {
+    return this.repository.findPlanById(id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a plan by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param id - Plan ID
+   * @returns Plan
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getPlanByIdOrThrow(id: string): Promise<Plan> {
+    return this.repository.findPlanByIdOrThrow(id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a plan by name.
+   *
+   * @param name - Plan name (e.g., 'starter', 'professional')
+   * @returns Plan or null
+   */
+  async getPlanByName(name: string): Promise<Plan | null> {
+    return this.repository.findPlanByName(name);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets the free plan.
+   *
+   * @returns Free plan
+   */
+  async getFreePlan(): Promise<Plan> {
+    return this.repository.getFreePlan();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Subscription Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists subscriptions with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of subscription summaries
+   */
+  async list(params: SubscriptionListParams): Promise<PaginatedResult<SubscriptionSummary>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      params,
+      subscriptionListQuerySchema
+    ) as SubscriptionListQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAllSubscriptions(validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a subscription by ID.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @returns Subscription or null
+   */
+  async getById(id: string): Promise<Subscription | null> {
+    return this.repository.findSubscriptionById(id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a subscription by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @returns Subscription with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(id: string): Promise<SubscriptionWithRelations> {
+    const subscription = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdWithRelations(id);
+
+    if (!subscription) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Subscription', id);
+    }
+
+    return subscription;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a subscription by organization ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Subscription or null
+   */
+  async getByOrganizationId(organizationId: string): Promise<Subscription | null> {
+    return this.repository.findByOrganizationId(organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a subscription by organization ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Subscription with relations or null
+   */
+  async getByOrganizationIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<SubscriptionWithRelations | null> {
+    return this.repository.findByOrganizationIdWithRelations(organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts subscriptions by status.
+   *
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(status?: SubscriptionStatus): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.countSubscriptions(status);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Subscription Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new subscription for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created subscription response
+   * @throws {AppException} If organization already has subscription
+   */
+  async create(
+    data: CreateSubscriptionRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateSubscriptionResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      data,
+      createSubscriptionSchema
+    ) as CreateSubscriptionInput;
+
+    // Check if organization already has a subscription
+    const existing = await this.repository.findByOrganizationId(validated.organizationId);
+    if (existing) {
+      throw AppException.conflict('Organization already has a subscription');
+    }
+
+    // Get the plan
+    const plan = await this.repository.findPlanByIdOrThrow(validated.planId);
+
+    // Calculate period dates
+    const now = new Date();
+    const periodEnd = this.addMonths(now, 1);
+
+    // Determine if starting with trial
+    const startTrial = validated.startTrial ?? true;
+    const trialEnd = startTrial ? this.addDays(now, this.settings.trialDays) : null;
+
+    // Create subscription data
+    const createData: CreateSubscriptionData = {
+      organizationId: validated.organizationId,
+      planId: validated.planId,
+      status: startTrial ? SubscriptionStatus.TRIALING : SubscriptionStatus.ACTIVE,
+      currentPeriodStart: now,
+      currentPeriodEnd: startTrial ? trialEnd! : periodEnd,
+      trialStart: startTrial ? now : null,
+      trialEnd: trialEnd,
+      paymentMethod: validated.paymentMethod || null,
+      metadata: (validated.metadata || {}) as Prisma.JsonValue,
+    };
+
+    // Create subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.createSubscription(createData);
+
+    // Get subscription with relations
+    const subscriptionWithRelations = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdWithRelations(
+      subscription.id
+    );
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.created', {
+      subscriptionId: subscription.id,
+      organizationId: subscription.organizationId,
+      planId: subscription.planId,
+      planName: plan.displayName,
+      isTrial: startTrial,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    // Emit trial started event if applicable
+    if (startTrial) {
+      await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.trial.started', {
+        subscriptionId: subscription.id,
+        organizationId: subscription.organizationId,
+        planId: subscription.planId,
+        trialEndsAt: trialEnd!.toISOString(),
+        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+      });
+    }
+
+    return {
+      subscription: subscriptionWithRelations!,
+      message: startTrial
+        ? `Subscription created with ${this.settings.trialDays}-day trial.`
+        : 'Subscription created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a subscription.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated subscription response
+   */
+  async update(
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateSubscriptionRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateSubscriptionResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      data,
+      updateSubscriptionSchema
+    ) as UpdateSubscriptionInput;
+
+    // Get current subscription
+    const current = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: UpdateSubscriptionData = {};
+    if (validated.paymentMethod !== undefined) {
+      updateData.paymentMethod = validated.paymentMethod || null;
+    }
+    if (validated.cancelAtPeriodEnd !== undefined) {
+      updateData.cancelAtPeriodEnd = validated.cancelAtPeriodEnd;
+    }
+    if (validated.metadata !== undefined) {
+      const currentMetadata = current.metadata || {};
+      updateData.metadata = { ...currentMetadata, ...validated.metadata } as Prisma.JsonValue;
+    }
+
+    // Update subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.updateSubscription(id, updateData);
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.updated', {
+      subscriptionId: subscription.id,
+      organizationId: subscription.organizationId,
+      changes: updateData,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      subscription,
+      message: 'Subscription updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes the plan for a subscription.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Change plan request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change plan response
+   */
+  async changePlan(
+    id: string,
+    data: ChangePlanRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangePlanResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changePlanSchema) as ChangePlanInput;
+
+    // Get current subscription
+    const current = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdWithRelations(id);
+    if (!current) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Subscription', id);
+    }
+
+    const previousPlan = current.plan;
+
+    // Check if it's the same plan
+    if (current.planId === validated.planId) {
+      throw AppException.badRequest('Already on this plan');
+    }
+
+    // Get new plan
+    const newPlan = await this.repository.findPlanByIdOrThrow(validated.planId);
+
+    // Check if plan is active
+    if (!newPlan.isActive) {
+      throw AppException.badRequest('Selected plan is not available');
+    }
+
+    // Calculate proration if immediate
+    let proratedAmount: number | undefined;
+    if (validated.immediate) {
+      const daysRemaining = daysUntilExpiry(current.currentPeriodEnd);
+      const totalDays = 30; // Simplified - could calculate actual days
+      proratedAmount = calculateProration(
+        previousPlan.monthlyPrice,
+        newPlan.monthlyPrice,
+        Math.max(0, daysRemaining),
+        totalDays
+      );
+    }
+
+    // Update subscription
+    const now = new Date();
+    const updateData: UpdateSubscriptionData = {
+      planId: newPlan.id,
+      metadata: {
+        ...current.metadata,
+        previousPlanId: previousPlan.id,
+        planHistory: [
+          ...(current.metadata.planHistory || []),
+          {
+            fromPlanId: previousPlan.id,
+            toPlanId: newPlan.id,
+            changedAt: now.toISOString(),
+            reason: validated.reason,
+            changedBy: context?.userId,
+          },
+        ],
+      } as Prisma.JsonValue,
+    };
+
+    const subscription = await this.repository.updateSubscription(id, updateData);
+
+    // Get updated subscription with relations
+    const updatedWithRelations = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdWithRelations(id);
+
+    // Emit plan changed event
+    const isUpgrade = newPlan.sortOrder > previousPlan.sortOrder;
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.plan.changed', {
+      subscriptionId: subscription.id,
+      organizationId: subscription.organizationId,
+      previousPlanId: previousPlan.id,
+      newPlanId: newPlan.id,
+      isUpgrade,
+      changedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      subscription: updatedWithRelations!,
+      previousPlan,
+      newPlan,
+      proratedAmount,
+      message: isUpgrade ? 'Plan upgraded successfully.' : 'Plan changed successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Cancels a subscription.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Cancel request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Cancel response
+   */
+  async cancel(
+    id: string,
+    data: CancelSubscriptionRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CancelSubscriptionResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      data,
+      cancelSubscriptionSchema
+    ) as CancelSubscriptionInput;
+
+    // Get current subscription
+    const current = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Check if already cancelled
+    if (current.status === SubscriptionStatus.CANCELLED) {
+      throw AppException.badRequest('Subscription is already cancelled');
+    }
+
+    const now = new Date();
+    let accessEndsAt: Date;
+
+    if (validated.immediate) {
+      // Immediate cancellation
+      accessEndsAt = now;
+      await this.repository.updateSubscription(id, {
+        status: SubscriptionStatus.CANCELLED,
+        cancelledAt: now,
+        cancelAtPeriodEnd: true,
+        metadata: {
+          ...current.metadata,
+          cancellationReason: validated.reason,
+        } as Prisma.JsonValue,
+      });
+    } else {
+      // Cancel at period end
+      accessEndsAt = current.currentPeriodEnd;
+      await this.repository.updateSubscription(id, {
+        cancelAtPeriodEnd: true,
+        cancelledAt: now,
+        metadata: {
+          ...current.metadata,
+          cancellationReason: validated.reason,
+        } as Prisma.JsonValue,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Get updated subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Emit cancellation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.cancelled', {
+      subscriptionId: subscription.id,
+      organizationId: subscription.organizationId,
+      reason: validated.reason,
+      accessEndsAt: accessEndsAt.toISOString(),
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      subscription,
+      accessEndsAt,
+      message: validated.immediate
+        ? 'Subscription cancelled immediately.'
+        : `Subscription will be cancelled at the end of the billing period (${accessEndsAt.toLocaleDateString()}).`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Reactivates a cancelled subscription.
+   *
+   * @param id - Subscription ID
+   * @param data - Reactivate request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Reactivate response
+   */
+  async reactivate(
+    id: string,
+    data: ReactivateSubscriptionRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ReactivateSubscriptionResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      data,
+      reactivateSubscriptionSchema
+    ) as ReactivateSubscriptionInput;
+
+    // Get current subscription
+    const current = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Check if can be reactivated
+    if (
+      current.status !== SubscriptionStatus.CANCELLED &&
+      !current.cancelAtPeriodEnd
+    ) {
+      throw AppException.badRequest('Subscription is not cancelled');
+    }
+
+    // Determine plan (use new plan or previous)
+    const planId = validated.planId || current.planId;
+    const plan = await this.repository.findPlanByIdOrThrow(planId);
+
+    const now = new Date();
+    const periodEnd = this.addMonths(now, 1);
+
+    // Update subscription
+    await this.repository.updateSubscription(id, {
+      planId,
+      status: SubscriptionStatus.ACTIVE,
+      cancelAtPeriodEnd: false,
+      cancelledAt: null,
+      currentPeriodStart: now,
+      currentPeriodEnd: periodEnd,
+      paymentMethod: validated.paymentMethod || current.paymentMethod,
+      metadata: {
+        ...current.metadata,
+        cancellationReason: undefined, // Clear cancellation reason
+      } as Prisma.JsonValue,
+    });
+
+    // Get updated subscription with relations
+    const subscriptionWithRelations = await this.repository.findSubscriptionByIdWithRelations(id);
+
+    // Emit reactivation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('subscription.reactivated', {
+      subscriptionId: current.id,
+      organizationId: current.organizationId,
+      planId,
+      reactivatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      subscription: subscriptionWithRelations!,
+      message: 'Subscription reactivated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Feature Gating
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a feature is available for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param feature - Feature path (e.g., 'ai.contentGeneration')
+   * @returns Feature check result
+   */
+  async checkFeature(organizationId: string, feature: string): Promise<FeatureCheckResult> {
+    // Get subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.findByOrganizationIdWithRelations(organizationId);
+
+    // No subscription means free tier
+    if (!subscription) {
+      return this.checkFeatureAgainstPlan(await this.repository.getFreePlan(), feature);
+    }
+
+    // Check subscription status
+    if (
+      subscription.status !== SubscriptionStatus.ACTIVE &&
+      subscription.status !== SubscriptionStatus.TRIALING
+    ) {
+      return {
+        allowed: false,
+        currentTier: 'free' as PlanTier,
+        message: 'Subscription is not active',
+      };
+    }
+
+    return this.checkFeatureAgainstPlan(subscription.plan, feature);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a resource limit is within bounds.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param resource - Resource type (e.g., 'menus', 'products')
+   * @param currentUsage - Current usage count
+   * @returns Limit check result
+   */
+  async checkLimit(
+    organizationId: string,
+    resource: string,
+    currentUsage: number
+  ): Promise<LimitCheckResult> {
+    // Get subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.findByOrganizationIdWithRelations(organizationId);
+
+    // Determine plan
+    const plan = subscription?.plan || (await this.repository.getFreePlan());
+
+    // Get limit from plan
+    const limits = plan.limits?.resources as Record<string, number> | undefined;
+    const limit = limits?.[resource] ?? -1; // -1 means unlimited
+
+    // Calculate
+    const usagePercent = limit > 0 ? Math.round((currentUsage / limit) * 100) : 0;
+    const allowed = limit === -1 || currentUsage < limit;
+
+    return {
+      allowed,
+      current: currentUsage,
+      limit,
+      usagePercent,
+      message: allowed
+        ? undefined
+        : `${resource} limit reached (${currentUsage}/${limit})`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets usage summary for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Usage summary
+   */
+  async getUsageSummary(organizationId: string): Promise<UsageSummary> {
+    // Get subscription
+    const subscription = await this.repository.findByOrganizationIdWithRelations(organizationId);
+
+    // Determine plan
+    const plan = subscription?.plan || (await this.repository.getFreePlan());
+    const limits = plan.limits || {};
+    const resourceLimits = (limits.resources || {}) as Record<string, number>;
+    const monthlyLimits = (limits.monthly || {}) as Record<string, number>;
+
+    // Helper to create usage item
+    const createUsageItem = (current: number, limit: number): UsageItem => {
+      const percent = limit > 0 ? Math.round((current / limit) * 100) : 0;
+      return {
+        current,
+        limit,
+        percent,
+        atLimit: limit > 0 && current >= limit,
+        nearLimit: limit > 0 && percent >= 80,
+      };
+    };
+
+    // Get current billing period
+    const periodStart = subscription?.currentPeriodStart || new Date();
+    const periodEnd = subscription?.currentPeriodEnd || this.addMonths(new Date(), 1);
+    const daysRemaining = Math.max(0, daysUntilExpiry(periodEnd));
+
+    // Note: In a real implementation, you would query actual usage from the database
+    // This is a placeholder that returns limit values with 0 usage
+    return {
+      organizationId,
+      plan: {
+        id: plan.id,
+        name: plan.name,
+        displayName: plan.displayName,
+      },
+      resources: {
+        menus: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.menus ?? -1),
+        products: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.products ?? -1),
+        qrCodes: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.qrCodes ?? -1),
+        users: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.users ?? -1),
+        branches: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.branches ?? -1),
+        storageMB: createUsageItem(0, resourceLimits.storageMB ?? -1),
+      },
+      monthly: {
+        qrScans: createUsageItem(0, monthlyLimits.qrScans ?? -1),
+        orders: createUsageItem(0, monthlyLimits.orders ?? -1),
+        aiCredits: createUsageItem(0, monthlyLimits.aiCredits ?? -1),
+        apiRequests: createUsageItem(0, monthlyLimits.apiRequests ?? -1),
+        exports: createUsageItem(0, monthlyLimits.exports ?? -1),
+      },
+      billingPeriod: {
+        start: periodStart,
+        end: periodEnd,
+        daysRemaining,
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Invoice Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists invoices with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of invoices
+   */
+  async listInvoices(params: InvoiceListParams): Promise<PaginatedResult<Invoice>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(
+      params,
+      invoiceListQuerySchema
+    ) as InvoiceListQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAllInvoices(validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets invoices for a subscription.
+   *
+   * @param subscriptionId - Subscription ID
+   * @returns Array of invoices
+   */
+  async getInvoicesBySubscriptionId(subscriptionId: string): Promise<Invoice[]> {
+    return this.repository.findInvoicesBySubscriptionId(subscriptionId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an invoice by ID.
+   *
+   * @param id - Invoice ID
+   * @returns Invoice or null
+   */
+  async getInvoiceById(id: string): Promise<Invoice | null> {
+    return this.repository.findInvoiceById(id);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks a feature against a plan.
+   */
+  private checkFeatureAgainstPlan(plan: Plan, featurePath: string): FeatureCheckResult {
+    const parts = featurePath.split('.');
+    const category = parts[0] as keyof Plan['features'];
+    const feature = parts[1];
+
+    // Map plan name to tier
+    const tierMap: Record<string, PlanTier> = {
+      free: 'free',
+      starter: 'starter',
+      professional: 'professional',
+      business: 'business',
+      enterprise: 'enterprise',
+    };
+    const currentTier = tierMap[plan.name] || 'free';
+
+    // Navigate to feature
+    const features = plan.features || {};
+    const categoryFeatures = features[category] as Record<string, boolean> | undefined;
+
+    if (!categoryFeatures || !feature) {
+      return {
+        allowed: false,
+        currentTier,
+        message: 'Feature not found',
+      };
+    }
+
+    const allowed = categoryFeatures[feature] === true;
+
+    // Determine required tier for this feature (simplified logic)
+    let requiredTier: PlanTier | undefined;
+    if (!allowed) {
+      // Could have a mapping of features to required tiers
+      requiredTier = 'professional' as PlanTier;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      allowed,
+      currentTier,
+      requiredTier,
+      message: allowed ? undefined : `This feature requires ${requiredTier} plan or higher`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Adds days to a date.
+   */
+  private addDays(date: Date, days: number): Date {
+    const result = new Date(date);
+    result.setDate(result.getDate() + days);
+    return result;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Adds months to a date.
+   */
+  private addMonths(date: Date, months: number): Date {
+    const result = new Date(date);
+    result.setMonth(result.getMonth() + months);
+    return result;
+  }
+}

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "user",
+  "name": "User Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Core user management module providing user CRUD, role assignment, and profile management",
+
+  "type": "core",
+  "category": "system",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
+    "optional": []
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "user.created",
+      "user.updated",
+      "user.deleted",
+      "user.status.changed",
+      "user.role.assigned",
+      "user.role.removed",
+      "user.profile.updated",
+      "user.password.changed"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeCreate",
+      "afterCreate",
+      "beforeUpdate",
+      "afterUpdate",
+      "beforeDelete",
+      "afterDelete"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "user:read",
+      "user:create",
+      "user:update",
+      "user:delete",
+      "user:profile.read",
+      "user:profile.update",
+      "user:role.assign",
+      "user:role.remove",
+      "user:status.update"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "UserService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read"],
+    "events": ["organization.created"]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["basic_users", "single_role"],
+      "starter": ["multiple_roles", "user_invite"],
+      "professional": ["advanced_permissions", "user_groups"],
+      "business": ["sso_integration", "audit_trail"],
+      "enterprise": ["custom_roles", "ldap_integration"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Users",
+      "icon": "ph-users",
+      "route": "/admin/users",
+      "order": 20,
+      "hidden": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "defaultRole": "staff",
+      "requireEmailVerification": true,
+      "allowSelfRegistration": false,
+      "maxUsersPerOrg": 50,
+      "passwordMinLength": 8,
+      "passwordRequireUppercase": true,
+      "passwordRequireNumbers": true,
+      "sessionMaxAge": 604800000
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/user/user.controller.ts b/src/modules/_core/user/user.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..3b00dd0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/user/user.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,595 @@
+/**
+ * User Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for user endpoints.
+ * Handles user CRUD, role management, profile updates, and status changes.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/user/user.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List users in organization
+ * GET /api/v1/users
+ *
+ * // Get user by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/users/:id
+ *
+ * // Create user
+ * POST /api/v1/users
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, CurrentOrg, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+import { TenantOrganization } from '@/core/middleware/tenant.middleware';
+
+import { UserService } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.repository';
+
+import type {
+  SafeUser,
+  UserWithRelations,
+  CreateUserRequest,
+  CreateUserResponse,
+  UpdateUserRequest,
+  UpdateUserResponse,
+  UpdateProfileRequest,
+  UpdateProfileResponse,
+  ChangePasswordRequest,
+  ChangePasswordResponse,
+  ChangeStatusRequest,
+  ChangeStatusResponse,
+  AssignRoleRequest,
+  AssignRoleResponse,
+  RemoveRoleRequest,
+  RemoveRoleResponse,
+  InviteUserRequest,
+  InviteUserResponse,
+  UserListParams,
+  UserSummary,
+  UserProfile,
+} from '@/modules/_core/user/user.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all user-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete users
+ * - Profile management (self-update)
+ * - Role management
+ * - Status changes
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List users in organization
+ * GET /api/v1/users?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+ *
+ * // Get user by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/users/user_123
+ *
+ * // Create user
+ * POST /api/v1/users
+ * {
+ *   "email": "user@example.com",
+ *   "password": "SecurePass123",
+ *   "firstName": "John",
+ *   "lastName": "Doe"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/users')
+@injectable()
+export class UserController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('UserService') private readonly userService: UserService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List users in organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, status, search, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of users
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/users?page=1&perPage=10&status=ACTIVE
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": { "data": [...], "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 10, "total": 50, "totalPages": 5 } }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('user.read')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: UserListParams
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PaginatedResult<SafeUser>>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.list(org.id, query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List user summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/summaries
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @returns Array of user summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized()
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UserSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.listSummaries(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Profile Operations (Self)
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get current user's profile.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/me
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Current user's profile
+   */
+  @Get('/me')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getMyProfile(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UserProfile>> {
+    const profile = await this.userService.getProfile(user.id);
+    return this.success(profile);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update current user's profile.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/users/me
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @param data - Profile update data
+   * @returns Updated profile
+   */
+  @Put('/me')
+  @Authorized()
+  async updateMyProfile(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() data: UpdateProfileRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateProfileResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.updateProfile(user.id, data);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change current user's password.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/users/me/change-password
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @param data - Change password data
+   * @returns Password change confirmation
+   */
+  @Post('/me/change-password')
+  @Authorized()
+  async changeMyPassword(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() data: ChangePasswordRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangePasswordResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.changePassword(user.id, data);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get current user's roles.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/me/roles
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns User's roles
+   */
+  @Get('/me/roles')
+  @Authorized()
+  async getMyRoles(
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Array<{ roleId: string; roleName: string; roleDisplayName: string }>>> {
+    const roles = await this.userService.getRoles(user.id);
+    return this.success(roles);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get user by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns User details
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/users/user_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "user_123",
+   *     "email": "user@example.com",
+   *     ...
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('user.read')
+  async getById(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UserWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.getByIdWithRelations(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get user's profile by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/:id/profile
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns User profile
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/profile')
+  @Authorized('user.profile.read')
+  async getProfile(
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UserProfile>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.getProfile(id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get user's roles.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/:id/roles
+   * @access Authenticated (organization member)
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns User's roles
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/roles')
+  @Authorized('user.read')
+  async getRoles(
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Array<{ roleId: string; roleName: string; roleDisplayName: string }>>> {
+    const roles = await this.userService.getRoles(id);
+    return this.success(roles);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new user.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/users
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param data - User creation data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/users
+   * {
+   *   "email": "newuser@example.com",
+   *   "password": "SecurePass123",
+   *   "firstName": "John",
+   *   "lastName": "Doe"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "user": { ... },
+   *     "inviteSent": false,
+   *     "message": "User created successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('user.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Body() data: CreateUserRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateUserResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.create(org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Invite a user to the organization.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/users/invite
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param data - Invite data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Invite response
+   */
+  @Post('/invite')
+  @Authorized('user.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async invite(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Body() data: InviteUserRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<InviteUserResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.invite(org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update a user.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/users/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PUT /api/v1/users/user_123
+   * {
+   *   "firstName": "Jane",
+   *   "phone": "+90 555 123 4567"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized('user.update')
+  async update(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateUserRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateUserResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.update(id, org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change user's status.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/users/:id/status
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param data - Status change data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Status change response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/users/user_123/status
+   * {
+   *   "status": "SUSPENDED",
+   *   "reason": "Inactive for 90 days"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/status')
+  @Authorized('user.status.update')
+  async changeStatus(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ChangeStatusRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.changeStatus(id, org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Role Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Assign a role to a user.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/users/:id/roles
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param data - Role assignment data
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Role assignment response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/users/user_123/roles
+   * {
+   *   "roleId": "role_456"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/roles')
+  @Authorized('user.role.assign')
+  async assignRole(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: AssignRoleRequest,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AssignRoleResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.assignRole(id, org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Remove a role from a user.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/users/:id/roles/:roleId
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param roleId - Role ID to remove
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Role removal response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/users/user_123/roles/role_456
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/roles/:roleId')
+  @Authorized('user.role.remove')
+  async removeRole(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('roleId') roleId: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<RemoveRoleResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.removeRole(id, org.id, { roleId }, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a user (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/users/:id
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization context
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/users/user_123
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('user.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.userService.delete(id, org.id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted user.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/users/:id/restore
+   * @access Authenticated (organization admin/manager)
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Restored user
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('user.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<SafeUser>> {
+    const result = await this.userService.restore(id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if an email is available.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/users/check-email/:email
+   * @access Authenticated
+   *
+   * @param email - Email to check
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-email/:email')
+  @Authorized()
+  async checkEmail(
+    @Param('email') email: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.userService.isEmailAvailable(email);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+}
