+/**
+ * User Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the User module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for the user module.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/user/user.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { userRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/users/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/users/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User module route configuration
+ */
+export interface UserRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * User module routes configuration.
+ *
+ * Defines the route structure for the user module:
+ * - Protected endpoints (all user operations require authentication)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { userRoutes } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.routes';
+ *
+ * console.log(userRoutes.prefix); // '/api/v1/users'
+ * ```
+ */
+export const userRoutes: UserRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for user endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/users',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/users',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * (None for user module - all routes are protected)
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/me',
+    '/me/change-password',
+    '/me/roles',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/profile',
+    '/:id/roles',
+    '/:id/roles/:roleId',
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/restore',
+    '/invite',
+    '/check-email/:email',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a user endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/summaries')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/users/summaries')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildUserApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/users/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildUserApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${userRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a user endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/list')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/users/list')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildUserAdminPath('/list');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/users/list'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildUserAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${userRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected user route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * isProtectedUserRoute('/api/v1/users'); // true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isProtectedUserRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with user prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(userRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // All user routes are protected
+  return true;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User route endpoint metadata
+ */
+export interface UserEndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions (if any) */
+  permissions?: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all user endpoints.
+ * Useful for documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const userEndpoints: UserEndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List users with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List user summaries for dropdowns',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Profile endpoints (self)
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/me',
+    description: 'Get current user profile',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/me',
+    description: 'Update current user profile',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/me/change-password',
+    description: 'Change current user password',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/me/roles',
+    description: 'Get current user roles',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+
+  // Read endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get user by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/profile',
+    description: 'Get user profile by ID',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:profile.read'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/roles',
+    description: 'Get user roles',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:read'],
+  },
+
+  // Create endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create a new user',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:create'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/invite',
+    description: 'Invite a user to the organization',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:create'],
+  },
+
+  // Update endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update a user',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:update'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/status',
+    description: 'Change user status',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:status.update'],
+  },
+
+  // Role endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/roles',
+    description: 'Assign a role to a user',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:role.assign'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id/roles/:roleId',
+    description: 'Remove a role from a user',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:role.remove'],
+  },
+
+  // Delete endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete a user (soft delete)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/restore',
+    description: 'Restore a deleted user',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['user:delete'],
+  },
+
+  // Validation endpoints
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-email/:email',
+    description: 'Check if an email is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+  },
+];
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default userRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/user/user.schema.ts b/src/modules/_core/user/user.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a78ef93
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/user/user.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,445 @@
+/**
+ * User Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all User module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/user/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createUserSchema,
+ *   updateUserSchema,
+ *   changePasswordSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validatedData = createUserSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Valid user statuses (from Prisma enum)
+ */
+const USER_STATUSES = ['ACTIVE', 'INVITED', 'SUSPENDED'] as const;
+
+/**
+ * Password constraints
+ */
+const PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH = 8;
+const PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH = 100;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Email validation schema
+ */
+export const emailSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(1, 'Email is required')
+  .email('Invalid email format')
+  .max(255, 'Email is too long');
+
+/**
+ * Password validation schema
+ * - Required, 8-100 characters
+ * - Must contain at least one uppercase letter
+ * - Must contain at least one number
+ */
+export const passwordSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .min(PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH, `Password must be at least ${PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH} characters`)
+  .max(PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH, `Password must be at most ${PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH} characters`)
+  .regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter')
+  .regex(/[0-9]/, 'Password must contain at least one number');
+
+/**
+ * Name validation schema (first or last name)
+ * - Required, 1-100 characters
+ * - Allows letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
+ */
+export const nameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(1, 'Name is required')
+  .max(100, 'Name must be at most 100 characters')
+  .regex(
+    /^[a-zA-ZÀ-ÿĞğÜüŞşİıÖöÇç\s\-']+$/,
+    'Name contains invalid characters'
+  );
+
+/**
+ * Phone number schema (optional, Turkish format support)
+ */
+export const phoneSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .optional()
+  .nullable()
+  .refine((val) => !val || /^\+?[\d\s\-()]{10,20}$/.test(val), {
+    message: 'Invalid phone number format',
+  });
+
+/**
+ * URL schema for avatar and other URLs
+ */
+export const urlSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .url('Invalid URL format')
+  .max(500, 'URL is too long')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * CUID validation schema
+ */
+export const cuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format');
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CRUD Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create user request schema
+ */
+export const createUserSchema = z.object({
+  email: emailSchema,
+  password: passwordSchema,
+  firstName: nameSchema,
+  lastName: nameSchema,
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  organizationId: cuidSchema.optional().nullable(),
+  roleIds: z.array(cuidSchema).optional(),
+  sendInvite: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create schema
+ */
+export type CreateUserInput = z.infer<typeof createUserSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update user request schema
+ */
+export const updateUserSchema = z.object({
+  firstName: nameSchema.optional(),
+  lastName: nameSchema.optional(),
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  avatar: urlSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update schema
+ */
+export type UpdateUserInput = z.infer<typeof updateUserSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update profile request schema (self-update)
+ */
+export const updateProfileSchema = z.object({
+  firstName: nameSchema.optional(),
+  lastName: nameSchema.optional(),
+  phone: phoneSchema,
+  avatar: urlSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update profile schema
+ */
+export type UpdateProfileInput = z.infer<typeof updateProfileSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change password request schema
+ */
+export const changePasswordSchema = z.object({
+  currentPassword: z.string().min(1, 'Current password is required'),
+  newPassword: passwordSchema,
+  confirmPassword: z.string().min(1, 'Password confirmation is required'),
+}).refine((data) => data.newPassword === data.confirmPassword, {
+  message: 'Passwords do not match',
+  path: ['confirmPassword'],
+}).refine((data) => data.currentPassword !== data.newPassword, {
+  message: 'New password must be different from current password',
+  path: ['newPassword'],
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change password schema
+ */
+export type ChangePasswordInput = z.infer<typeof changePasswordSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change user status request schema
+ */
+export const changeStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: z.enum(USER_STATUSES),
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change status schema
+ */
+export type ChangeStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeStatusSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Assign role request schema
+ */
+export const assignRoleSchema = z.object({
+  roleId: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from assign role schema
+ */
+export type AssignRoleInput = z.infer<typeof assignRoleSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Remove role request schema
+ */
+export const removeRoleSchema = z.object({
+  roleId: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from remove role schema
+ */
+export type RemoveRoleInput = z.infer<typeof removeRoleSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Invite user request schema
+ */
+export const inviteUserSchema = z.object({
+  email: emailSchema,
+  firstName: nameSchema,
+  lastName: nameSchema,
+  roleId: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from invite user schema
+ */
+export type InviteUserInput = z.infer<typeof inviteUserSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User list query schema
+ */
+export const userListQuerySchema = z.object({
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  status: z.enum(USER_STATUSES).optional(),
+  roleId: cuidSchema.optional(),
+  search: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+  emailVerified: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),
+  createdAfter: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  createdBefore: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  includeDeleted: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['email', 'firstName', 'lastName', 'createdAt', 'lastLoginAt', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list query schema
+ */
+export type UserListQueryInput = z.infer<typeof userListQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * User ID parameter schema
+ */
+export const userIdSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from ID schema
+ */
+export type UserIdInput = z.infer<typeof userIdSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas (for API documentation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Safe user response schema (without password)
+ */
+export const safeUserResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  email: z.string().email(),
+  firstName: z.string(),
+  lastName: z.string(),
+  fullName: z.string(),
+  avatar: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  phone: z.string().nullable(),
+  status: z.enum(USER_STATUSES),
+  emailVerifiedAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  lastLoginAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  organizationId: cuidSchema.nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+  deletedAt: z.date().nullable(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * User profile response schema
+ */
+export const userProfileResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  email: z.string().email(),
+  firstName: z.string(),
+  lastName: z.string(),
+  fullName: z.string(),
+  avatar: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  phone: z.string().nullable(),
+  isEmailVerified: z.boolean(),
+  roles: z.array(z.string()),
+  organization: z.object({
+    id: cuidSchema,
+    name: z.string(),
+    slug: z.string(),
+  }).nullable().optional(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * User summary schema
+ */
+export const userSummarySchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  email: z.string().email(),
+  fullName: z.string(),
+  avatar: z.string().url().nullable(),
+  status: z.enum(USER_STATUSES),
+  primaryRole: z.string().optional(),
+  roleCount: z.number().int(),
+  lastLoginAt: z.date().nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User module settings schema
+ */
+export const userModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  defaultRole: z.string().default('staff'),
+  requireEmailVerification: z.boolean().default(true),
+  allowSelfRegistration: z.boolean().default(false),
+  maxUsersPerOrg: z.number().int().positive().default(50),
+  passwordMinLength: z.number().int().min(6).max(128).default(8),
+  passwordRequireUppercase: z.boolean().default(true),
+  passwordRequireNumbers: z.boolean().default(true),
+  sessionMaxAge: z.number().int().positive().default(604800000), // 7 days
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from module settings schema
+ */
+export type UserModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof userModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validates email format
+ *
+ * @param email - Email to validate
+ * @returns True if valid
+ */
+export function isValidEmail(email: string): boolean {
+  try {
+    emailSchema.parse(email);
+    return true;
+  } catch {
+    return false;
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates password strength
+ *
+ * @param password - Password to validate
+ * @returns Object with validation result and errors
+ */
+export function validatePassword(password: string): {
+  isValid: boolean;
+  errors: string[];
+} {
+  const errors: string[] = [];
+
+  if (password.length < PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH) {
+    errors.push(`Password must be at least ${PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH} characters`);
+  }
+
+  if (password.length > PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH) {
+    errors.push(`Password must be at most ${PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH} characters`);
+  }
+
+  if (!/[A-Z]/.test(password)) {
+    errors.push('Password must contain at least one uppercase letter');
+  }
+
+  if (!/[0-9]/.test(password)) {
+    errors.push('Password must contain at least one number');
+  }
+
+  return {
+    isValid: errors.length === 0,
+    errors,
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Normalizes a name (capitalize first letter)
+ *
+ * @param name - Name to normalize
+ * @returns Normalized name
+ */
+export function normalizeName(name: string): string {
+  return name
+    .trim()
+    .split(/\s+/)
+    .map((word) => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())
+    .join(' ');
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generates a display name from first and last name
+ *
+ * @param firstName - First name
+ * @param lastName - Last name
+ * @returns Full display name
+ */
+export function getFullName(firstName: string, lastName: string): string {
+  return `${firstName} ${lastName}`.trim();
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets initials from a name
+ *
+ * @param firstName - First name
+ * @param lastName - Last name
+ * @returns Initials (e.g., "JD" for "John Doe")
+ */
+export function getInitials(firstName: string, lastName: string): string {
+  const first = firstName.trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase();
+  const last = lastName.trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase();
+  return `${first}${last}`;
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_core/user/user.service.ts b/src/modules/_core/user/user.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..adcb8a7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_core/user/user.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,870 @@
+/**
+ * User Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the User module.
+ * Handles user CRUD, role management, profile updates, and status changes.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_core/user/user.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { UserService } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const userService = resolve<UserService>('UserService');
+ *
+ * // Create a new user
+ * const result = await userService.create('org_123', {
+ *   email: 'user@example.com',
+ *   password: 'SecurePass123',
+ *   firstName: 'John',
+ *   lastName: 'Doe',
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { UserStatus } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { AuthService } from '@/core/services/auth.service';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import { UserRepository, PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.repository';
+
+import type {
+  User,
+  SafeUser,
+  UserWithRelations,
+  CreateUserRequest,
+  CreateUserResponse,
+  UpdateUserRequest,
+  UpdateUserResponse,
+  UpdateProfileRequest,
+  UpdateProfileResponse,
+  ChangePasswordRequest,
+  ChangePasswordResponse,
+  ChangeStatusRequest,
+  ChangeStatusResponse,
+  AssignRoleRequest,
+  AssignRoleResponse,
+  RemoveRoleRequest,
+  RemoveRoleResponse,
+  InviteUserRequest,
+  InviteUserResponse,
+  UserListParams,
+  UserSummary,
+  UserProfile,
+} from '@/modules/_core/user/user.types';
+
+import { toSafeUser, toUserProfile } from '@/modules/_core/user/user.types';
+
+import {
+  createUserSchema,
+  updateUserSchema,
+  updateProfileSchema,
+  changePasswordSchema,
+  changeStatusSchema,
+  assignRoleSchema,
+  removeRoleSchema,
+  inviteUserSchema,
+  userListQuerySchema,
+  type CreateUserInput,
+  type UpdateUserInput,
+  type UpdateProfileInput,
+  type ChangePasswordInput,
+  type ChangeStatusInput,
+  type AssignRoleInput,
+  type RemoveRoleInput,
+  type InviteUserInput,
+  type UserListQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/_core/user/user.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// User Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all user-related business operations including:
+ * - User CRUD operations (tenant-scoped)
+ * - Profile management
+ * - Role assignment and removal
+ * - Status changes
+ * - Password management
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('UserService') private userService: UserService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.userService.create(req.org.id, req.body);
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class UserService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('UserRepository') private readonly repository: UserRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.AuthService) private readonly authService: AuthService,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists users in an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID to filter by
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of safe users
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await userService.list('org_123', {
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 10,
+   *   status: 'ACTIVE',
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: UserListParams
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<SafeUser>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, userListQuerySchema) as UserListQueryInput;
+    const result = await this.repository.findAllByOrganization(organizationId, validated);
+
+    return {
+      data: result.data.map(toSafeUser),
+      meta: result.meta,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists user summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID to filter by
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of user summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params?: Partial<UserListParams>
+  ): Promise<UserSummary[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a user by ID.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns Safe user or null
+   */
+  async getById(id: string): Promise<SafeUser | null> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findById(id);
+    return user ? toSafeUser(user) : null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a user by ID with tenant verification.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID to verify
+   * @returns Safe user or null
+   */
+  async getByIdInOrganization(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<SafeUser | null> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    return user ? toSafeUser(user) : null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a user by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns User with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(id: string): Promise<UserWithRelations> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id);
+
+    if (!user) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    return user;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a user by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns Safe user
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(id: string): Promise<SafeUser> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id);
+    return toSafeUser(user);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a user by email.
+   *
+   * @param email - User email
+   * @returns Safe user or null
+   */
+  async getByEmail(email: string): Promise<SafeUser | null> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findByEmail(email);
+    return user ? toSafeUser(user) : null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets user profile.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns User profile
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getProfile(id: string): Promise<UserProfile> {
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id);
+
+    if (!user) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    const roles = user.userRoles?.map((ur) => ur.role.name) || [];
+
+    return toUserProfile(user, roles, user.organization);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets user roles.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @returns Array of role information
+   */
+  async getRoles(id: string): Promise<Array<{
+    roleId: string;
+    roleName: string;
+    roleDisplayName: string;
+  }>> {
+    return this.repository.getUserRoles(id);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts users in an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(organizationId: string, status?: UserStatus): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.countByOrganization(organizationId, status);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new user.
+   *
+   * Validates input, hashes password, creates user,
+   * assigns roles, and emits creation event.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for the new user
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created user response
+   * @throws {AppException} If email already exists
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await userService.create('org_123', {
+   *   email: 'newuser@example.com',
+   *   password: 'SecurePass123',
+   *   firstName: 'John',
+   *   lastName: 'Doe',
+   * });
+   * console.log('Created:', result.user.id);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateUserRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateUserResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createUserSchema) as CreateUserInput;
+
+    // Check if email already exists
+    if (await this.repository.emailExists(validated.email)) {
+      throw AppException.alreadyExists('User email', validated.email);
+    }
+
+    // Hash password
+    const passwordHash = await this.authService.hashPassword(validated.password);
+
+    // Create user
+    const user = await this.repository.create({
+      email: validated.email,
+      passwordHash,
+      firstName: validated.firstName,
+      lastName: validated.lastName,
+      phone: validated.phone || null,
+      organizationId: organizationId,
+      status: validated.sendInvite ? UserStatus.INVITED : UserStatus.ACTIVE,
+    });
+
+    // Assign roles if provided
+    if (validated.roleIds && validated.roleIds.length > 0) {
+      for (const roleId of validated.roleIds) {
+        await this.repository.assignRole(user.id, roleId, context?.userId);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.created', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      email: user.email,
+      organizationId,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    // TODO: Send invitation email if sendInvite is true
+    // if (validated.sendInvite) {
+    //   await this.notificationService.sendInvitationEmail(user.email, inviteToken);
+    // }
+
+    return {
+      user: toSafeUser(user),
+      inviteSent: validated.sendInvite || false,
+      message: validated.sendInvite
+        ? 'User created successfully. Invitation email sent.'
+        : 'User created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a user.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant verification
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated user response
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or not in organization
+   */
+  async update(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: UpdateUserRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateUserResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateUserSchema) as UpdateUserInput;
+
+    // Verify user exists in organization
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    if (!current) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.firstName !== undefined) updateData.firstName = validated.firstName;
+    if (validated.lastName !== undefined) updateData.lastName = validated.lastName;
+    if (validated.phone !== undefined) updateData.phone = validated.phone;
+    if (validated.avatar !== undefined) updateData.avatar = validated.avatar;
+
+    // Update user
+    const user = await this.repository.update(id, updateData);
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.updated', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      changes: updateData,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      user: toSafeUser(user),
+      message: 'User updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates user profile (self-update).
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param data - Profile update request data
+   * @returns Updated profile response
+   */
+  async updateProfile(
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateProfileRequest
+  ): Promise<UpdateProfileResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateProfileSchema) as UpdateProfileInput;
+
+    // Verify user exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.firstName !== undefined) updateData.firstName = validated.firstName;
+    if (validated.lastName !== undefined) updateData.lastName = validated.lastName;
+    if (validated.phone !== undefined) updateData.phone = validated.phone;
+    if (validated.avatar !== undefined) updateData.avatar = validated.avatar;
+
+    // Update user
+    const user = await this.repository.update(id, updateData);
+
+    // Emit profile update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.profile.updated', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      changes: updateData,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    // Get profile with roles
+    const profile = await this.getProfile(id);
+
+    return {
+      profile,
+      message: 'Profile updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes user password.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param data - Change password request data
+   * @returns Change password response
+   * @throws {AppException} If current password is incorrect
+   */
+  async changePassword(
+    id: string,
+    data: ChangePasswordRequest
+  ): Promise<ChangePasswordResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changePasswordSchema) as ChangePasswordInput;
+
+    // Get user (need passwordHash for verification)
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id);
+
+    // Verify current password
+    const isCurrentPasswordValid = await this.authService.verifyPassword(
+      validated.currentPassword,
+      user.passwordHash
+    );
+
+    if (!isCurrentPasswordValid) {
+      throw new AppException('INVALID_CURRENT_PASSWORD', 400, {
+        message: 'Current password is incorrect',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Hash new password
+    const newPasswordHash = await this.authService.hashPassword(validated.newPassword);
+
+    // Update password
+    await this.repository.update(id, { passwordHash: newPasswordHash });
+
+    // Emit password changed event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.password.changed', {
+      userId: id,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      message: 'Password changed successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes user status.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant verification
+   * @param data - Status change request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Status change response
+   */
+  async changeStatus(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: ChangeStatusRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changeStatusSchema) as ChangeStatusInput;
+
+    // Verify user exists in organization
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    if (!current) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    const previousStatus = current.status;
+
+    // Check if status is actually changing
+    if (previousStatus === validated.status) {
+      return {
+        user: toSafeUser(current),
+        previousStatus,
+        message: 'Status unchanged.',
+      };
+    }
+
+    // Update status
+    const user = await this.repository.updateStatus(id, validated.status);
+
+    // Emit status change event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.status.changed', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      previousStatus,
+      newStatus: validated.status,
+      reason: validated.reason,
+      changedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      user: toSafeUser(user),
+      previousStatus,
+      message: `User status changed to ${validated.status}.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Invites a user to an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Invite request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Invite response
+   */
+  async invite(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: InviteUserRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<InviteUserResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, inviteUserSchema) as InviteUserInput;
+
+    // Check if email already exists
+    if (await this.repository.emailExists(validated.email)) {
+      throw AppException.alreadyExists('User email', validated.email);
+    }
+
+    // Generate a temporary password (user will reset on first login)
+    const tempPassword = this.generateTempPassword();
+    const passwordHash = await this.authService.hashPassword(tempPassword);
+
+    // Create user with INVITED status
+    const user = await this.repository.create({
+      email: validated.email,
+      passwordHash,
+      firstName: validated.firstName,
+      lastName: validated.lastName,
+      organizationId,
+      status: UserStatus.INVITED,
+    });
+
+    // Assign role
+    await this.repository.assignRole(user.id, validated.roleId, context?.userId);
+
+    // Emit invite event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.invited', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      email: user.email,
+      organizationId,
+      invitedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    // TODO: Send invitation email
+    // await this.notificationService.sendInvitationEmail(user.email, inviteToken);
+
+    return {
+      user: toSafeUser(user),
+      message: 'Invitation sent successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Role Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Assigns a role to a user.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant verification
+   * @param data - Assign role request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Assign role response
+   */
+  async assignRole(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: AssignRoleRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<AssignRoleResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, assignRoleSchema) as AssignRoleInput;
+
+    // Verify user exists in organization
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    if (!user) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    // Assign role
+    const assigned = await this.repository.assignRole(
+      id,
+      validated.roleId,
+      context?.userId
+    );
+
+    if (!assigned) {
+      throw new AppException('ROLE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED', 400, {
+        message: 'User already has this role',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Emit role assigned event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.role.assigned', {
+      userId: id,
+      roleId: validated.roleId,
+      assignedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      userId: id,
+      roleId: validated.roleId,
+      message: 'Role assigned successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Removes a role from a user.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant verification
+   * @param data - Remove role request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Remove role response
+   */
+  async removeRole(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: RemoveRoleRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<RemoveRoleResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, removeRoleSchema) as RemoveRoleInput;
+
+    // Verify user exists in organization
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    if (!user) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    // Remove role
+    const removed = await this.repository.removeRole(id, validated.roleId);
+
+    if (!removed) {
+      throw new AppException('ROLE_NOT_ASSIGNED', 400, {
+        message: 'User does not have this role',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Emit role removed event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.role.removed', {
+      userId: id,
+      roleId: validated.roleId,
+      removedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      userId: id,
+      roleId: validated.roleId,
+      message: 'Role removed successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes a user.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant verification
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async delete(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify user exists in organization
+    const user = await this.repository.findByIdInOrganization(id, organizationId);
+    if (!user) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('User', id);
+    }
+
+    // Soft delete
+    await this.repository.softDelete(id);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.deleted', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      email: user.email,
+      organizationId,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted user.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Restored user
+   */
+  async restore(id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<SafeUser> {
+    const user = await this.repository.restore(id);
+
+    // Emit restore event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('user.restored', {
+      userId: user.id,
+      email: user.email,
+      restoredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return toSafeUser(user);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if an email is available.
+   *
+   * @param email - Email to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isEmailAvailable(email: string, excludeId?: string): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.emailExists(email, excludeId));
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if user has a specific role.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param roleId - Role ID
+   * @returns True if user has the role
+   */
+  async hasRole(id: string, roleId: string): Promise<boolean> {
+    return this.repository.hasRole(id, roleId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if user has a role by name.
+   *
+   * @param id - User ID
+   * @param roleName - Role name
+   * @returns True if user has the role
+   */
+  async hasRoleByName(id: string, roleName: string): Promise<boolean> {
+    return this.repository.hasRoleByName(id, roleName);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Generates a temporary password.
+   */
+  private generateTempPassword(): string {
+    const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
+    let result = '';
+
+    // Ensure at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one number
+    result += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * 26)]; // uppercase
+    result += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * 26) + 26]; // lowercase
+    result += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * 10) + 52]; // number
+
+    // Fill remaining characters
+    for (let i = 3; i < 12; i++) {
+      result += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
+    }
+
+    // Shuffle the result
+    return result
+      .split('')
+      .sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5)
+      .join('');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/README.md b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/README.md
new file mode 100644

+++ b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,269 @@
+# Advanced Example Module
+
+> **Reference implementation demonstrating all E-Menum module patterns and best practices.**
+> Use this module as a template when building new modules for the platform.
+
+## Overview
+
+The Advanced Example Module is a comprehensive reference implementation that showcases every aspect of E-Menum's module architecture. It demonstrates proper patterns for:
+
+- Module structure and organization
+- Lifecycle management (load, enable, disable, unload)
+- Service layer patterns
+- Repository patterns with tenant isolation
+- Controller patterns with authorization
+- Event system integration
+- Hook system for extensibility
+- Validation with Zod schemas
+- TypeScript types and interfaces
+
+## Quick Start
+
+```typescript
+// Import from the module's public API
+import {
+  AdvancedExampleModule,
+  AdvancedExampleService,
+  type AdvancedExample,
+  type CreateExampleRequest,
+  ExampleStatus,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example';
+
+// Use the service in your code
+const service = container.resolve<AdvancedExampleService>('AdvancedExampleService');
+
+// Create an example
+const result = await service.create('org_123', {
+  name: 'My Example',
+  description: 'A test example',
+  status: ExampleStatus.DRAFT,
+});
+
+console.log('Created:', result.example.id);
+```
+
+## Module Structure
+
+```
+src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/
+├── module.json                    # Module manifest
+├── index.ts                       # Public API exports
+├── advanced-example.module.ts     # Module lifecycle
+├── advanced-example.controller.ts # HTTP handlers
+├── advanced-example.service.ts    # Business logic
+├── advanced-example.repository.ts # Data access
+├── advanced-example.schema.ts     # Zod validation
+├── advanced-example.types.ts      # TypeScript types
+├── advanced-example.routes.ts     # Route configuration
+├── advanced-example.events.ts     # Event definitions
+├── advanced-example.hooks.ts      # Hook system
+└── README.md                      # This file
+```
+
+## File Purposes
+
+| File | Purpose |
+|------|---------|
+| `module.json` | Module manifest defining metadata, dependencies, permissions, events |
+| `index.ts` | Single entry point for all public exports |
+| `*.module.ts` | Module class implementing lifecycle hooks |
+| `*.controller.ts` | HTTP endpoint handlers with authorization |
+| `*.service.ts` | Business logic and orchestration |
+| `*.repository.ts` | Database operations with tenant isolation |
+| `*.schema.ts` | Zod validation schemas |
+| `*.types.ts` | TypeScript type definitions |
+| `*.routes.ts` | Route configuration and path builders |
+| `*.events.ts` | Event definitions and emitters |
+| `*.hooks.ts` | Extensibility hook system |
+
+## Key Patterns Demonstrated
+
+### 1. Multi-Tenant Data Isolation
+
+Every database query includes `organizationId` for tenant isolation:
+
+```typescript
+// Repository pattern - ALWAYS include organizationId
+async findById(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample | null> {
+  const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findFirst({
+    where: {
+      id,
+      organizationId,      // CRITICAL: Tenant isolation
+      ...notDeleted,       // Soft delete filter
+    },
+  });
+  return result;
+}
+```
+
+### 2. Authorization with @Authorized Decorator
+
+All endpoints use permission-based authorization:
+
+```typescript
+@Get('/:id')
+@Authorized(['example:read'])  // Permission check
+async getById(
+  @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,  // Tenant context
+  @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,           // User context
+  @Param('id') id: string
+): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+  const example = await this.service.getByIdOrThrow(org.id, id);
+  return this.success(example);
+}
+```
+
+### 3. Validation with Zod Schemas
+
+All inputs are validated:
+
+```typescript
+// Schema definition
+export const createExampleSchema = z.object({
+  name: z.string().min(1).max(100),
+  slug: z.string().regex(/^[a-z0-9-]+$/).optional(),
+  status: z.nativeEnum(ExampleStatus).default(ExampleStatus.DRAFT),
+  // ... more fields
+});
+
+// Usage in service
+const validated = createExampleSchema.parse(data);
+```
+
+### 4. Event-Driven Communication
+
+Modules communicate through events:
+
+```typescript
+// Emit event after creation
+await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.created', {
+  exampleId: example.id,
+  organizationId,
+  name: example.name,
+  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+});
+
+// Listen for events
+this.eventService.on('organization.deleted', async (payload) => {
+  // Clean up examples for deleted organization
+});
+```
+
+### 5. Hook System for Extensibility
+
+Hooks allow extending module behavior:
+
+```typescript
+// Register a hook
+hooks.register('beforeExampleCreate', async (context) => {
+  // Custom validation
+  if (context.data.name.includes('forbidden')) {
+    throw new Error('Name contains forbidden word');
+  }
+}, { priority: 10 });
+
+// Execute hooks
+const result = await hooks.execute('beforeExampleCreate', {
+  data,
+  organizationId,
+  userId,
+});
+```
+
+### 6. Soft Delete Pattern
+
+Data is never physically deleted:
+
+```typescript
+// Soft delete
+async softDelete(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+  await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+  const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+    where: { id },
+    data: softDelete(),  // Sets deletedAt to current timestamp
+  });
+
+  return result;
+}
+```
+
+## API Endpoints
+
+| Method | Path | Description | Permission |
+|--------|------|-------------|------------|
+| GET | `/api/v1/examples` | List examples | `example:read` |
+| GET | `/api/v1/examples/summaries` | List summaries | `example:read` |
+| GET | `/api/v1/examples/statistics` | Get statistics | `example:read` |
+| GET | `/api/v1/examples/:id` | Get by ID | `example:read` |
+| GET | `/api/v1/examples/slug/:slug` | Get by slug | `example:read` |
+| POST | `/api/v1/examples` | Create | `example:create` |
+| PUT | `/api/v1/examples/:id` | Update | `example:update` |
+| PATCH | `/api/v1/examples/:id/status` | Change status | `example:update` |
+| POST | `/api/v1/examples/:id/process` | Process | `example:process` |
+| DELETE | `/api/v1/examples/:id` | Soft delete | `example:delete` |
+| POST | `/api/v1/examples/:id/restore` | Restore | `example:delete` |
+
+## Events
+
+| Event | Payload | Description |
+|-------|---------|-------------|
+| `advanced-example.created` | `ExampleCreatedEventPayload` | Fired after creation |
+| `advanced-example.updated` | `ExampleUpdatedEventPayload` | Fired after update |
+| `advanced-example.deleted` | `ExampleDeletedEventPayload` | Fired after deletion |
+| `advanced-example.status.changed` | `ExampleStatusChangedEventPayload` | Fired on status change |
+| `advanced-example.processed` | `ExampleProcessedEventPayload` | Fired after processing |
+
+## Hooks
+
+| Hook | When Fired | Context |
+|------|------------|---------|
+| `beforeExampleCreate` | Before creation | `BeforeCreateContext` |
+| `afterExampleCreate` | After creation | `AfterCreateContext` |
+| `beforeExampleUpdate` | Before update | `BeforeUpdateContext` |
+| `afterExampleUpdate` | After update | `AfterUpdateContext` |
+| `beforeExampleDelete` | Before deletion | `BeforeDeleteContext` |
+| `afterExampleDelete` | After deletion | `AfterDeleteContext` |
+| `onExampleProcess` | During processing | `ProcessContext` |
+| `onValidate` | During validation | Validation context |
+
+## Using as a Template
+
+When creating a new module, copy this structure and:
+
+1. **Rename files**: Replace `advanced-example` with your module name
+2. **Update module.json**: Set your module's ID, name, dependencies, permissions
+3. **Define types**: Create your entity types in `*.types.ts`
+4. **Create schemas**: Define validation in `*.schema.ts`
+5. **Implement repository**: Data access in `*.repository.ts`
+6. **Implement service**: Business logic in `*.service.ts`
+7. **Create controller**: HTTP handlers in `*.controller.ts`
+8. **Configure routes**: API paths in `*.routes.ts`
+9. **Define events**: Event types in `*.events.ts`
+10. **Export public API**: Update `index.ts` with your exports
+
+## Best Practices Checklist
+
+When building a module, ensure:
+
+- [ ] Every query includes `organizationId` for tenant isolation
+- [ ] All endpoints have `@Authorized` decorator with appropriate permissions
+- [ ] All inputs are validated with Zod schemas
+- [ ] Data is soft-deleted, never physically deleted
+- [ ] Events are emitted for important state changes
+- [ ] Hooks are available for extensibility
+- [ ] Types are properly exported from `index.ts`
+- [ ] Import paths use `@/` alias, not relative paths
+- [ ] Error handling uses `AppException`
+- [ ] Module implements all lifecycle hooks
+
+## Further Reading
+
+- [MODULE_SYSTEM.md](/.auto-claude/MODULE_SYSTEM.md) - Module architecture details
+- [MODULE_DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md](/.auto-claude/MODULE_DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md) - Step-by-step guide
+- [CODING_STANDARDS.md](/.auto-claude/standards/CODING_STANDARDS.md) - Code conventions
+- [API_CONTRACTS.md](/.auto-claude/architecture/API_CONTRACTS.md) - API patterns
+
+---
+
+*This module is part of the E-Menum platform. Use it as your guide for building enterprise-grade modules.*

@@ -0,0 +1,535 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Controller
+ *
+ * HTTP controller demonstrating E-Menum controller patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - routing-controllers decorators
+ * - @Authorized permission checking
+ * - @CurrentOrg tenant context
+ * - Response formatting
+ * - Error handling
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // Controller is automatically registered by routing-controllers
+ * // Endpoints are available at /api/v1/examples/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Param,
+  Body,
+  QueryParams,
+  Authorized,
+  CurrentUser,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { CurrentOrg, CurrentOrgId } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse, PaginatedApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+
+import { AdvancedExampleService } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service';
+
+import type {
+  AdvancedExample,
+  AdvancedExampleWithRelations,
+  CreateExampleRequest,
+  UpdateExampleRequest,
+  ChangeStatusRequest,
+  ProcessExampleRequest,
+  BulkOperationRequest,
+  ListExamplesQuery,
+  ExampleSummary,
+  ExampleStatistics,
+  ExampleSettings,
+  ExampleItem,
+  CreateExampleItemRequest,
+  UpdateExampleItemRequest,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.types';
+
+import type { AuthUser, TenantOrganization } from '@/shared/decorators';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controller Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Slug check response
+ */
+interface SlugCheckResponse {
+  available: boolean;
+  slug: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Advanced Example Controller
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * HTTP controller for Advanced Example endpoints.
+ *
+ * Demonstrates:
+ * - RESTful CRUD endpoints
+ * - Permission-based authorization
+ * - Tenant-scoped operations
+ * - Query parameter handling
+ * - Consistent response formatting
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List examples
+ * GET /api/v1/examples?page=1&perPage=20&status=ACTIVE
+ *
+ * // Get example by ID
+ * GET /api/v1/examples/:id
+ *
+ * // Create example
+ * POST /api/v1/examples
+ * { "name": "My Example" }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/examples')
+@injectable()
+export class AdvancedExampleController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('AdvancedExampleService') private readonly service: AdvancedExampleService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists examples with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * GET /api/v1/examples
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization (from @CurrentOrg decorator)
+   * @param query - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of examples
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized(['example:read'])
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: ListExamplesQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const result = await this.service.list(org.id, query);
+    return this.paginated(result.data, result.meta);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists example summaries (for dropdowns).
+   *
+   * GET /api/v1/examples/summaries
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized(['example:read'])
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ExampleSummary[]>> {
+    const summaries = await this.service.listSummaries(org.id);
+    return this.success(summaries);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets example statistics.
+   *
+   * GET /api/v1/examples/statistics
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Statistics object
+   */
+  @Get('/statistics')
+  @Authorized(['example:read'])
+  async getStatistics(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ExampleStatistics>> {
+    const statistics = await this.service.getStatistics(org.id);
+    return this.success(statistics);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Single Item Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**

+  @Get('/:id')

+
+  /**

+
+  /**

+  @Get('/:id/settings')

+
+  /**

+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new example.
+   *
+   * POST /api/v1/examples
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization

+  @Post('/')

+  async create(

+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const result = await this.service.create(org.id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.created(result.example, result.message);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an example.
+   *
+   * PUT /api/v1/examples/:id

+   * @param org - Current organization

+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param body - Update request
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async update(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: UpdateExampleRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const result = await this.service.update(org.id, id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result.example, result.message);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates example settings.
+   *
+   * PATCH /api/v1/examples/:id/settings
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param body - Settings to merge
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async updateSettings(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: Partial<ExampleSettings>
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const example = await this.service.updateSettings(org.id, id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(example, 'Settings updated successfully.');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes example status.
+   *
+   * PATCH /api/v1/examples/:id/status
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param body - Status change request
+   * @returns Status change response
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/status')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async changeStatus(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: ChangeStatusRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const result = await this.service.changeStatus(org.id, id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result.example, result.message);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Action Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Processes an example.
+   *
+   * POST /api/v1/examples/:id/process
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param body - Process request
+   * @returns Process response
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/process')
+  @Authorized(['example:process'])
+  async process(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body?: ProcessExampleRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ result: string; duration: number }>> {
+    const result = await this.service.process(org.id, id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(
+      { result: result.result, duration: result.duration },
+      result.message
+    );
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Performs bulk operation.
+   *
+   * POST /api/v1/examples/bulk
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization

+   * @param body - Bulk operation request
+   * @returns Bulk operation response
+   */
+  @Post('/bulk')
+  @Authorized(['example:update', 'example:delete'])
+  async bulkOperation(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Body() body: BulkOperationRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ affected: number }>> {
+    const result = await this.service.bulkOperation(org.id, body, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success({ affected: result.affected }, result.message);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes an example.
+   *
+   * DELETE /api/v1/examples/:id
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized(['example:delete'])
+  async delete(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
+    await this.service.delete(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.noContent();
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted example.
+   *
+   * POST /api/v1/examples/:id/restore
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current user
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @returns Restored example
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized(['example:delete'])
+  async restore(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const example = await this.service.restore(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(example, 'Example restored successfully.');
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Item Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists items for an example.
+   *
+   * GET /api/v1/examples/:id/items
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @returns Paginated items
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/items')
+  @Authorized(['example:read'])
+  async listItems(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string
+  ): Promise<PaginatedApiResponse<ExampleItem>> {
+    const result = await this.service.listItems(org.id, id);
+    return this.paginated(result.data, result.meta);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an item.
+   *
+   * POST /api/v1/examples/:id/items
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param body - Item data
+   * @returns Created item
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/items')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async createItem(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: CreateExampleItemRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ExampleItem>> {
+    const result = await this.service.createItem(org.id, id, body);
+    return this.created(result.item, result.message);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an item.
+   *
+   * PUT /api/v1/examples/:id/items/:itemId
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param body - Update data
+   * @returns Updated item
+   */
+  @Put('/:id/items/:itemId')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async updateItem(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('itemId') itemId: string,
+    @Body() body: UpdateExampleItemRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ExampleItem>> {
+    const result = await this.service.updateItem(org.id, id, itemId, body);
+    return this.success(result.item, result.message);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes an item.
+   *
+   * DELETE /api/v1/examples/:id/items/:itemId
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/items/:itemId')
+  @Authorized(['example:update'])
+  async deleteItem(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('itemId') itemId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
+    await this.service.deleteItem(org.id, id, itemId);
+    return this.noContent();
+  }
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Export Default
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default AdvancedExampleController;
