@@ -0,0 +1,527 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Module Definition
+ *
+ * Module class demonstrating E-Menum module lifecycle patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - ModuleInstance interface implementation
+ * - Lifecycle hooks (onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload)
+ * - Service registration with DI container
+ * - Event listener setup
+ * - Route and controller registration
+ * - Settings management
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/module
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { AdvancedExampleModule } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.module';
+ *
+ * // Module is automatically discovered and loaded by ModuleLoader
+ * // Access module instance via DI container
+ * const module = container.resolve(AdvancedExampleModule);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { TOKENS, registerSingleton, appContainer } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import type { ModuleInstance } from '@/core/kernel/module-loader';
+import type { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import { AdvancedExampleController } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.controller';
+import { AdvancedExampleService } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service';
+import { AdvancedExampleRepository } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository';
+import { advancedExampleRoutes } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.routes';
+import { createHookManager, HookManager } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.hooks';
+import { registerExampleEventListeners, ADVANCED_EXAMPLE_EVENTS } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.events';
+
+import type { AdvancedExampleModuleSettings } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Module context for lifecycle hooks
+ */
+export interface AdvancedExampleModuleContext {
+  /** Event service for pub/sub */
+  events: EventService;
+  /** Module settings */
+  settings: AdvancedExampleModuleSettings;
+  /** Logger function */
+  log: (message: string) => void;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Module hook definitions
+ */
+export interface ModuleHooks {
+  /** Called before example creation */
+  beforeExampleCreate?: (data: { name: string; organizationId: string }) => Promise<void>;
+  /** Called after example creation */
+  afterExampleCreate?: (data: { exampleId: string; organizationId: string }) => Promise<void>;
+  /** Called before example processing */
+  beforeExampleProcess?: (data: { exampleId: string; organizationId: string }) => Promise<void>;
+  /** Called after example processing */
+  afterExampleProcess?: (data: { exampleId: string; organizationId: string; result: 'success' | 'failure' }) => Promise<void>;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Advanced Example Module Class
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Module
+ *
+ * Reference implementation demonstrating all E-Menum module patterns.
+ * Use this as a template when building new modules.
+ *
+ * Features demonstrated:
+ * - ModuleInstance lifecycle (onLoad, onEnable, onDisable, onUnload)
+ * - DI registration for services, repositories, controllers
+ * - Event listener setup and teardown
+ * - Hook system integration
+ * - Settings management with defaults
+ * - Route configuration
+ *
+ * Module Lifecycle:
+ * 1. discover - ModuleLoader finds the module
+ * 2. validate - module.json is validated
+ * 3. resolve dependencies - dependencies are checked
+ * 4. onLoad - services registered with DI
+ * 5. onEnable - event listeners set up, routes registered
+ * 6. ready - module is fully operational
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // Module is automatically loaded by ModuleLoader
+ * // Use AdvancedExampleService for business logic:
+ *
+ * const service = container.resolve('AdvancedExampleService');
+ * await service.create(orgId, { name: 'My Example' });
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class AdvancedExampleModule implements ModuleInstance {
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Static Properties
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /** Module ID - unique identifier */
+  static readonly id = 'advanced-example';
+
+  /** Module display name */
+  static readonly name = 'Advanced Example Module';
+
+  /** Module version (semver) */
+  static readonly version = '1.0.0';
+
+  /** Is core module (cannot be disabled) */
+  static readonly isCore = false;
+
+  /** Module type */
+  static readonly type = 'example';
+
+  /** Module routes configuration */
+  static readonly routes = advancedExampleRoutes;
+
+  /** Providers (services) to register */
+  static readonly providers = [
+    AdvancedExampleService,
+    AdvancedExampleRepository,
+  ];
+
+  /** Controllers to register */
+  static readonly controllers = [
+    AdvancedExampleController,
+  ];
+
+  /** Module dependencies */
+  static readonly dependencies = {
+    required: ['auth', 'organization'],
+    optional: ['notification', 'media'],
+  };
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Instance Properties
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /** Module hooks registry */
+  private hooks: ModuleHooks = {};
+
+  /** Hook manager instance */
+  private hookManager: HookManager;
+
+  /** Module initialized flag */
+  private initialized = false;
+
+  /** Event listener cleanup functions */
+  private eventCleanups: Array<() => void> = [];
+
+  constructor(
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {
+    // Initialize hook manager
+    this.hookManager = createHookManager();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // ModuleInstance Lifecycle Hooks
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Called when module is loaded.
+   *
+   * This is where you register services with the DI container.
+   * The module is not yet active - just loaded into memory.
+   *
+   * DO:
+   * - Register repositories, services with DI
+   * - Set up module-level configuration
+   *
+   * DON'T:
+   * - Set up event listeners (do this in onEnable)
+   * - Access other modules (dependencies may not be loaded)
+   */
+  async onLoad(): Promise<void> {
+    this.log('Loading advanced-example module...');
+
+    // Register repository
+    if (!appContainer.isRegistered('AdvancedExampleRepository')) {
+      registerSingleton('AdvancedExampleRepository', AdvancedExampleRepository);
+    }
+
+    // Register service
+    if (!appContainer.isRegistered('AdvancedExampleService')) {
+      registerSingleton('AdvancedExampleService', AdvancedExampleService);
+    }
+
+    this.log('Advanced-example module loaded');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Called when module is enabled/activated.
+   *
+   * This is where you set up event listeners, register routes,
+   * and start any background processes.
+   *
+   * DO:
+   * - Set up event listeners
+   * - Register routes with Express
+   * - Initialize background processes
+   * - Access other modules (dependencies are loaded)
+   *
+   * DON'T:
+   * - Register services (already done in onLoad)
+   */
+  async onEnable(): Promise<void> {
+    if (this.initialized) {
+      this.log('Advanced-example module already initialized');
+      return;
+    }
+
+    this.log('Enabling advanced-example module...');
+
+    // Set up event listeners
+    this.setupEventListeners();
+
+    // Register internal hooks
+    this.registerInternalHooks();
+
+    this.initialized = true;
+    this.log('Advanced-example module enabled');
+
+    // Emit module activated event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('module.activated', {
+      moduleId: AdvancedExampleModule.id,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Called when module is disabled/deactivated.
+   *
+   * This is where you clean up event listeners, unregister routes,
+   * and stop background processes.
+   *
+   * DO:
+   * - Remove event listeners
+   * - Stop background processes
+   * - Clean up temporary resources
+   *
+   * DON'T:
+   * - Unregister from DI (done in onUnload)
+   * - Delete persistent data
+   */
+  async onDisable(): Promise<void> {
+    this.log('Disabling advanced-example module...');
+
+    // Clean up event listeners
+    this.eventCleanups.forEach((cleanup) => cleanup());
+    this.eventCleanups = [];
+
+    // Clear hooks
+    this.hookManager.clearAll();
+
+    this.initialized = false;
+    this.log('Advanced-example module disabled');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Called when module is unloaded.
+   *
+   * This is the final cleanup - module will be removed from memory.
+   *
+   * DO:
+   * - Final cleanup of any resources
+   * - Clear module-level caches
+   *
+   * DON'T:
+   * - Delete user data
+   * - Make breaking changes to database
+   */
+  async onUnload(): Promise<void> {
+    this.log('Unloading advanced-example module...');
+
+    // Clear hooks
+    this.hooks = {};
+
+    this.log('Advanced-example module unloaded');
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // ModuleInstance Interface Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Returns module routes for registration with Express.
+   *
+   * @returns Route configuration array
+   */
+  getRoutes(): unknown[] {
+    return [AdvancedExampleModule.routes];
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Returns module controllers for registration with routing-controllers.
+   *
+   * @returns Controller class array
+   */
+  getControllers(): unknown[] {
+    return AdvancedExampleModule.controllers;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Hook System
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets the hook manager instance.
+   *
+   * @returns Hook manager
+   */
+  getHookManager(): HookManager {
+    return this.hookManager;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets current module hooks.
+   *
+   * @returns Module hooks object
+   */
+  getHooks(): ModuleHooks {
+    return { ...this.hooks };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Registers a hook handler.
+   *
+   * @param hookName - Name of the hook
+   * @param handler - Hook handler function
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * module.registerHook('afterExampleCreate', async (data) => {
+   *   console.log('Example created:', data.exampleId);
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  registerHook<K extends keyof ModuleHooks>(
+    hookName: K,
+    handler: ModuleHooks[K]
+  ): void {
+    this.hooks[hookName] = handler;
+    this.log(`Registered hook: ${hookName}`);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Unregisters a hook handler.
+   *
+   * @param hookName - Name of the hook to unregister
+   */
+  unregisterHook(hookName: keyof ModuleHooks): void {
+    delete this.hooks[hookName];
+    this.log(`Unregistered hook: ${hookName}`);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Executes a hook if registered.
+   *
+   * @param hookName - Name of the hook
+   * @param data - Data to pass to the hook
+   */
+  async executeHook<K extends keyof ModuleHooks>(
+    hookName: K,
+    data: Parameters<NonNullable<ModuleHooks[K]>>[0]
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    const hook = this.hooks[hookName];
+    if (hook) {
+      try {
+        await (hook as (data: typeof data) => Promise<void>)(data);
+      } catch (error) {
+        this.log(
+          `Hook execution error (${hookName}): ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'}`
+        );
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Event Listeners
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Sets up event listeners for the module.
+   */
+  private setupEventListeners(): void {
+    // Listen for organization deletion to clean up examples
+    this.eventService.on('organization.deleted', async (payload) => {
+      this.log(`Organization deleted event received: ${payload.organizationId}`);
+      // Could trigger example cleanup for deleted organization
+    });
+
+    // Listen for user creation (example of cross-module communication)
+    this.eventService.on('user.created', async (payload) => {
+      this.log(`User created event received: ${payload.userId}`);
+      // Could create default examples for new users
+    });
+
+    // Register module-specific event listeners
+    registerExampleEventListeners(this.eventService, {
+      onCreated: async (payload) => {
+        this.log(`Example created: ${payload.exampleId}`);
+        // Execute registered hooks
+        await this.executeHook('afterExampleCreate', {
+          exampleId: payload.exampleId,
+          organizationId: payload.organizationId,
+        });
+      },
+      onProcessed: async (payload) => {
+        this.log(`Example processed: ${payload.exampleId} - ${payload.result}`);
+        await this.executeHook('afterExampleProcess', {
+          exampleId: payload.exampleId,
+          organizationId: payload.organizationId,
+          result: payload.result,
+        });
+      },
+    });
+
+    this.log('Event listeners set up');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Registers internal hooks for the module.
+   */
+  private registerInternalHooks(): void {
+    // Example: Log all creations
+    this.hookManager.register('beforeExampleCreate', async (context) => {
+      this.log(`[Hook] Creating example: ${context.data.name} for org ${context.organizationId}`);
+    }, { priority: 1, id: 'internal-log-create' });
+
+    // Example: Validate data
+    this.hookManager.register('onValidate', async (context) => {
+      this.log(`[Hook] Validating ${context.operation} for org ${context.organizationId}`);
+    }, { priority: 10, id: 'internal-validate' });
+
+    this.log('Internal hooks registered');
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Module Settings
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets default module settings.
+   *
+   * @returns Default settings object
+   */
+  static getDefaultSettings(): AdvancedExampleModuleSettings {
+    return {
+      maxItemsPerPage: 20,
+      enableProcessing: true,
+      processingTimeout: 30000,
+      notifyOnCreate: false,
+      logLevel: 'info',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Utility Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Logs a message with module prefix.
+   *
+   * @param message - Message to log
+   */
+  private log(message: string): void {
+    // Using structured logging approach
+    // In production, this would use a proper logger
+    const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
+    // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
+    console.log(`[${timestamp}] [AdvancedExampleModule] ${message}`);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if module is initialized.
+   *
+   * @returns True if module is initialized
+   */
+  isInitialized(): boolean {
+    return this.initialized;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets module metadata.
+   *
+   * @returns Module metadata object
+   */
+  static getMetadata() {
+    return {
+      id: AdvancedExampleModule.id,
+      name: AdvancedExampleModule.name,
+      version: AdvancedExampleModule.version,
+      type: AdvancedExampleModule.type,
+      isCore: AdvancedExampleModule.isCore,
+      routes: AdvancedExampleModule.routes,
+      providers: AdvancedExampleModule.providers.map((p) => p.name),
+      controllers: AdvancedExampleModule.controllers.map((c) => c.name),
+      dependencies: AdvancedExampleModule.dependencies,
+      events: Object.values(ADVANCED_EXAMPLE_EVENTS),
+    };
+  }
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Default export for module loader dynamic import
+ */
+export default AdvancedExampleModule;
+
+/**
+ * Export module metadata
+ */
+export const metadata = AdvancedExampleModule.getMetadata();

diff --git a/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository.ts b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2b79370
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,915 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Repository
+ *
+ * Data access layer demonstrating E-Menum repository patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - Tenant-scoped queries with organizationId
+ * - Soft delete support
+ * - Pagination and filtering
+ * - Relations and eager loading
+ * - Transactions
+ * - Complex queries
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/repository
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { AdvancedExampleRepository } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository';
+ *
+ * const repo = container.resolve('AdvancedExampleRepository');
+ * const example = await repo.findBySlug('org_123', 'my-example');
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { PrismaClient, Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { notDeleted, softDelete } from '@/config/database';
+
+import type {
+  AdvancedExample,
+  AdvancedExampleWithRelations,
+  ExampleItem,
+  ListExamplesQuery,
+  ListExampleItemsQuery,
+  ExampleStatus,
+  ExampleType,
+  ExamplePriority,
+  ExampleSummary,
+  ExampleStatistics,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  ExampleSettings,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create example data (repository input)
+ */
+export interface CreateExampleData {
+  name: string;
+  slug: string;
+  description?: string | null;
+  type?: ExampleType;
+  status?: ExampleStatus;
+  priority?: ExamplePriority;
+  branchId?: string | null;
+  settings?: Prisma.JsonValue;
+  tags?: string[];
+  sortOrder?: number;
+  isFeatured?: boolean;
+  createdBy?: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update example data (repository input)
+ */
+export interface UpdateExampleData {
+  name?: string;
+  slug?: string;
+  description?: string | null;
+  type?: ExampleType;
+  status?: ExampleStatus;
+  priority?: ExamplePriority;
+  branchId?: string | null;
+  settings?: Prisma.JsonValue;
+  tags?: string[];
+  sortOrder?: number;
+  isFeatured?: boolean;
+  isProcessed?: boolean;
+  updatedBy?: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create item data (repository input)
+ */
+export interface CreateItemData {
+  name: string;
+  value: string | number;
+  sortOrder?: number;
+  isActive?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update item data (repository input)
+ */
+export interface UpdateItemData {
+  name?: string;
+  value?: string | number;
+  sortOrder?: number;
+  isActive?: boolean;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 20;
+const MAX_PER_PAGE = 100;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Advanced Example Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Repository for Advanced Example entity operations.
+ *
+ * Demonstrates comprehensive repository patterns:
+ * - Multi-tenant data isolation (organizationId in all queries)
+ * - Soft delete (deletedAt filtering and updates)
+ * - Pagination with metadata
+ * - Complex filtering and sorting
+ * - Relation handling
+ * - Transaction support
+ *
+ * CRITICAL: Every query MUST include organizationId for tenant isolation!
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class ExampleService {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('AdvancedExampleRepository') private repo: AdvancedExampleRepository
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async getBySlug(orgId: string, slug: string) {
+ *     // ALWAYS pass organizationId first
+ *     return this.repo.findBySlug(orgId, slug);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class AdvancedExampleRepository {
+  constructor(
+    @inject(TOKENS.PrismaClient) private readonly prisma: PrismaClient
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all examples for an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * Demonstrates:
+   * - Complex where clause building
+   * - Multiple filter conditions
+   * - Search across fields
+   * - Dynamic sorting
+   * - Parallel count and data queries
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID (REQUIRED for tenant isolation)
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated result with metadata
+   */
+  async findAll(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListExamplesQuery = {}
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const {
+      page = 1,
+      perPage = DEFAULT_PER_PAGE,
+      status,
+      type,
+      priority,
+      branchId,
+      isFeatured,
+      isProcessed,
+      tags,
+      search,
+      sortBy = 'sortOrder',
+      sortOrder = 'asc',
+      createdAfter,
+      createdBefore,
+    } = params;
+
+    // Normalize pagination
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    // Build where clause - ALWAYS include organizationId
+    const where: Prisma.AdvancedExampleWhereInput = {
+      organizationId, // CRITICAL: Tenant isolation
+      ...notDeleted, // Soft delete filter
+      ...(status !== undefined && { status }),
+      ...(type !== undefined && { type }),
+      ...(priority !== undefined && { priority }),
+      ...(branchId !== undefined && { branchId }),
+      ...(isFeatured !== undefined && { isFeatured }),
+      ...(isProcessed !== undefined && { isProcessed }),
+      ...(tags && tags.length > 0 && { tags: { hasSome: tags } }),
+      ...(createdAfter && { createdAt: { gte: createdAfter } }),
+      ...(createdBefore && { createdAt: { lte: createdBefore } }),
+      ...(search && {
+        OR: [
+          { name: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
+          { slug: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
+          { description: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' } },
+        ],
+      }),
+    };
+
+    // Build orderBy
+    const orderBy: Prisma.AdvancedExampleOrderByWithRelationInput = {
+      [sortBy]: sortOrder,
+    };
+
+    // Execute count and find in parallel for performance
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.count({ where }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy,
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data: data as unknown as AdvancedExample[],
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all examples as summaries (for dropdowns, lists)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Optional filtering
+   * @returns Array of example summaries
+   */
+  async findAllSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: Partial<ListExamplesQuery> = {}
+  ): Promise<ExampleSummary[]> {
+    const { status, type, isFeatured } = params;
+
+    const where: Prisma.AdvancedExampleWhereInput = {
+      organizationId,
+      ...notDeleted,
+      ...(status !== undefined && { status }),
+      ...(type !== undefined && { type }),
+      ...(isFeatured !== undefined && { isFeatured }),
+    };
+
+    const examples = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findMany({
+      where,
+      select: {
+        id: true,
+        name: true,
+        slug: true,
+        status: true,
+        createdAt: true,
+        _count: {
+          select: { items: true },
+        },
+      },
+      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { name: 'asc' }],
+    });
+
+    return examples.map((ex) => ({
+      id: ex.id,
+      name: ex.name,
+      slug: ex.slug,
+      status: ex.status as ExampleStatus,
+      itemCount: ex._count.items,
+      createdAt: ex.createdAt,
+    }));
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds an example by ID with tenant isolation.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID (REQUIRED)
+   * @returns Example or null
+   */
+  async findById(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample | null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds an example by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param include - Relations to include
+   * @returns Example with relations or null
+   */
+  async findByIdWithRelations(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    include: Array<'items' | 'creator' | 'organization'> = ['items']
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExampleWithRelations | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+      include: {
+        ...(include.includes('items') && {
+          items: {
+            orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { name: 'asc' }],
+          },
+        }),
+        ...(include.includes('creator') && {
+          creator: {
+            select: { id: true, name: true, email: true },
+          },
+        }),
+        ...(include.includes('organization') && {
+          organization: {
+            select: { id: true, name: true, slug: true },
+          },
+        }),
+        _count: {
+          select: { items: true },
+        },
+      },
+    });
+
+    if (!result) return null;
+
+    return {
+      ...result,
+      itemCount: result._count.items,
+    } as unknown as AdvancedExampleWithRelations;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds an example by ID or throws AppException.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Example
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async findByIdOrThrow(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const example = await this.findById(id, organizationId);
+
+    if (!example) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('AdvancedExample', id);
+    }
+
+    return example;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds an example by slug.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Example slug
+   * @returns Example or null
+   */
+  async findBySlug(organizationId: string, slug: string): Promise<AdvancedExample | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findFirst({
+      where: { organizationId, slug, ...notDeleted },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample | null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds an example by slug or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Example slug
+   * @returns Example
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async findBySlugOrThrow(organizationId: string, slug: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const example = await this.findBySlug(organizationId, slug);
+
+    if (!example) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('AdvancedExample', slug);
+    }
+
+    return example;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a slug exists within an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if slug exists
+   */
+  async slugExists(
+    organizationId: string,
+    slug: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    const count = await this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        slug,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...(excludeId && { id: { not: excludeId } }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return count > 0;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts examples for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param filters - Optional filters
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(
+    organizationId: string,
+    filters?: { status?: ExampleStatus; type?: ExampleType }
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    return this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...(filters?.status && { status: filters.status }),
+        ...(filters?.type && { type: filters.type }),
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets statistics for an organization's examples.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Statistics object
+   */
+  async getStatistics(organizationId: string): Promise<ExampleStatistics> {
+    const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
+    sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
+
+    // Run multiple queries in parallel
+    const [
+      total,
+      byStatus,
+      byType,
+      featured,
+      processed,
+      recentCreated,
+      recentUpdated,
+    ] = await Promise.all([
+      this.count(organizationId),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.groupBy({
+        by: ['status'],
+        where: { organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+        _count: true,
+      }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.groupBy({
+        by: ['type'],
+        where: { organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+        _count: true,
+      }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+        where: { organizationId, isFeatured: true, ...notDeleted },
+      }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+        where: { organizationId, isProcessed: true, ...notDeleted },
+      }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+        where: { organizationId, createdAt: { gte: sevenDaysAgo }, ...notDeleted },
+      }),
+      this.prisma.advancedExample.count({
+        where: { organizationId, updatedAt: { gte: sevenDaysAgo }, ...notDeleted },
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      total,
+      byStatus: Object.fromEntries(
+        byStatus.map((s) => [s.status, s._count])
+      ) as Record<ExampleStatus, number>,
+      byType: Object.fromEntries(
+        byType.map((t) => [t.type, t._count])
+      ) as Record<ExampleType, number>,
+      featured,
+      processed,
+      recentActivity: {
+        created: recentCreated,
+        updated: recentUpdated,
+        deleted: 0, // Would need soft delete tracking
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create data
+   * @returns Created example
+   */
+  async create(organizationId: string, data: CreateExampleData): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.create({
+      data: {
+        organizationId,
+        name: data.name,
+        slug: data.slug,
+        description: data.description || null,
+        type: data.type || 'STANDARD',
+        status: data.status || 'DRAFT',
+        priority: data.priority || 'MEDIUM',
+        branchId: data.branchId || null,
+        settings: data.settings || {},
+        tags: data.tags || [],
+        sortOrder: data.sortOrder ?? 0,
+        isFeatured: data.isFeatured ?? false,
+        isProcessed: false,
+        createdBy: data.createdBy || null,
+        updatedBy: data.createdBy || null,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an example with items in a transaction.
+   *
+   * Demonstrates transaction usage for creating related entities.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create data
+   * @param items - Items to create
+   * @returns Created example with items
+   */
+  async createWithItems(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateExampleData,
+    items: CreateItemData[]
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExampleWithRelations> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
+      // Create example
+      const example = await tx.advancedExample.create({
+        data: {
+          organizationId,
+          name: data.name,
+          slug: data.slug,
+          description: data.description || null,
+          type: data.type || 'STANDARD',
+          status: data.status || 'DRAFT',
+          priority: data.priority || 'MEDIUM',
+          branchId: data.branchId || null,
+          settings: data.settings || {},
+          tags: data.tags || [],
+          sortOrder: data.sortOrder ?? 0,
+          isFeatured: data.isFeatured ?? false,
+          isProcessed: false,
+          createdBy: data.createdBy || null,
+          updatedBy: data.createdBy || null,
+        },
+      });
+
+      // Create items if any
+      if (items.length > 0) {
+        await tx.exampleItem.createMany({
+          data: items.map((item, index) => ({
+            exampleId: example.id,
+            name: item.name,
+            value: String(item.value),
+            sortOrder: item.sortOrder ?? index,
+            isActive: item.isActive ?? true,
+          })),
+        });
+      }
+
+      // Return with items
+      return tx.advancedExample.findUnique({
+        where: { id: example.id },
+        include: { items: true },
+      });
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExampleWithRelations;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an example.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  async update(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: UpdateExampleData
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    // Verify exists
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: {
+        ...(data.name !== undefined && { name: data.name }),
+        ...(data.slug !== undefined && { slug: data.slug }),
+        ...(data.description !== undefined && { description: data.description }),
+        ...(data.type !== undefined && { type: data.type }),
+        ...(data.status !== undefined && { status: data.status }),
+        ...(data.priority !== undefined && { priority: data.priority }),
+        ...(data.branchId !== undefined && { branchId: data.branchId }),
+        ...(data.settings !== undefined && { settings: data.settings }),
+        ...(data.tags !== undefined && { tags: data.tags }),
+        ...(data.sortOrder !== undefined && { sortOrder: data.sortOrder }),
+        ...(data.isFeatured !== undefined && { isFeatured: data.isFeatured }),
+        ...(data.isProcessed !== undefined && { isProcessed: data.isProcessed }),
+        ...(data.updatedBy !== undefined && { updatedBy: data.updatedBy }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates example settings (merge).
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param settings - Settings to merge
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  async updateSettings(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    settings: Partial<ExampleSettings>
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const example = await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const currentSettings = (example.settings as Record<string, unknown>) || {};
+    const mergedSettings = { ...currentSettings, ...settings };
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { settings: mergedSettings },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates example status.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - New status
+   * @param updatedBy - User making the change
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  async updateStatus(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    status: ExampleStatus,
+    updatedBy?: string
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { status, updatedBy },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks example as processed.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  async markProcessed(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { isProcessed: true },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes an example.
+   *
+   * IMPORTANT: We NEVER physically delete data. Always use soft delete.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Deleted example
+   */
+  async softDelete(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted example.
+   *
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Restored example
+   */
+  async restore(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    // Find including deleted
+    const example = await this.prisma.advancedExample.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId },
+    });
+
+    if (!example) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('AdvancedExample', id);
+    }
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { deletedAt: null },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as AdvancedExample;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Bulk soft delete.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param ids - IDs to delete
+   * @returns Count of deleted records
+   */
+  async bulkSoftDelete(organizationId: string, ids: string[]): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.advancedExample.updateMany({
+      where: {
+        id: { in: ids },
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Item Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Finds items for an example.
+   *
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID (for security)
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated items
+   */
+  async findItems(
+    exampleId: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListExampleItemsQuery = {}
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<ExampleItem>> {
+    // Verify example belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(exampleId, organizationId);
+
+    const { page = 1, perPage = 50, isActive, search } = params;
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    const where: Prisma.ExampleItemWhereInput = {
+      exampleId,
+      ...(isActive !== undefined && { isActive }),
+      ...(search && {
+        name: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' },
+      }),
+    };
+
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      this.prisma.exampleItem.count({ where }),
+      this.prisma.exampleItem.findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { name: 'asc' }],
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data: data as unknown as ExampleItem[],
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an item for an example.
+   *
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Item data
+   * @returns Created item
+   */
+  async createItem(
+    exampleId: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateItemData
+  ): Promise<ExampleItem> {
+    // Verify example belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(exampleId, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.exampleItem.create({
+      data: {
+        exampleId,
+        name: data.name,
+        value: String(data.value),
+        sortOrder: data.sortOrder ?? 0,
+        isActive: data.isActive ?? true,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as ExampleItem;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an item.
+   *
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns Updated item
+   */
+  async updateItem(
+    itemId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: UpdateItemData
+  ): Promise<ExampleItem> {
+    // Verify example belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(exampleId, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.exampleItem.update({
+      where: { id: itemId },
+      data: {
+        ...(data.name !== undefined && { name: data.name }),
+        ...(data.value !== undefined && { value: String(data.value) }),
+        ...(data.sortOrder !== undefined && { sortOrder: data.sortOrder }),
+        ...(data.isActive !== undefined && { isActive: data.isActive }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as unknown as ExampleItem;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes an item.
+   *
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   */
+  async deleteItem(
+    itemId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify example belongs to organization
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(exampleId, organizationId);
+
+    await this.prisma.exampleItem.delete({
+      where: { id: itemId },
+    });
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.routes.ts b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.routes.ts
