+++ b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.routes.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,468 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration demonstrating E-Menum routing patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - API route prefixes
+ * - Public vs protected routes
+ * - Admin panel routes
+ * - Route path builders
+ * - Route metadata for documentation
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   advancedExampleRoutes,
+ *   buildExampleApiPath,
+ *   isProtectedExampleRoute,
+ * } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.routes';
+ *
+ * // Build full API path
+ * const path = buildExampleApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/examples/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Route configuration
+ */
+export interface RouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Endpoint metadata for documentation
+ */
+export interface EndpointMetadata {
+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+  /** Endpoint path */
+  path: string;
+  /** Description */
+  description: string;
+  /** Requires authentication */
+  requiresAuth: boolean;
+  /** Required permissions */
+  permissions?: string[];
+  /** Request body schema (for documentation) */
+  requestBody?: string;
+  /** Response schema (for documentation) */
+  responseSchema?: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configurations
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Advanced Example routes configuration
+ */
+export const advancedExampleRoutes: RouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/examples',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/examples',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * In this example module, we have one public endpoint
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/public/:slug', // Public example view
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    // List operations
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/statistics',
+
+    // Single item operations
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/settings',
+    '/:id/items',
+    '/slug/:slug',
+
+    // Validation
+    '/check-slug/:slug',
+
+    // Actions
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/process',
+    '/:id/duplicate',
+    '/:id/restore',
+
+    // Bulk operations
+    '/bulk',
+
+    // Item operations
+    '/:id/items/:itemId',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Item routes configuration (nested under examples)
+ */
+export const itemRoutes: RouteConfig = {
+  prefix: '/api/v1/examples/:exampleId/items',
+  admin: '/admin/examples/:exampleId/items',
+  public: [],
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:itemId',
+  ],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for an example endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * buildExampleApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/examples/summaries'
+ *
+ * buildExampleApiPath('/abc123');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/examples/abc123'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildExampleApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${advancedExampleRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for an example endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full admin path
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * buildExampleAdminPath('/create');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/examples/create'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildExampleAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${advancedExampleRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for an item endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param exampleId - Example ID
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildItemApiPath(exampleId: string, endpoint: string = ''): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : endpoint ? `/${endpoint}` : '';
+  return `/api/v1/examples/${exampleId}/items${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Validators
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a public route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a public route
+ */
+export function isPublicExampleRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  for (const publicRoute of advancedExampleRoutes.public) {
+    const fullPublicPath = buildExampleApiPath(publicRoute);
+
+    // Handle routes with parameters
+    if (publicRoute.includes(':')) {
+      const pattern = fullPublicPath.replace(/:[\w]+/g, '[^/]+');
+      const regex = new RegExp(`^${pattern}$`);
+      if (regex.test(normalizedPath)) {
+        return true;
+      }
+    } else if (normalizedPath === fullPublicPath) {
+      return true;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ */
+export function isProtectedExampleRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with our prefix
+  if (!normalizedPath.startsWith(advancedExampleRoutes.prefix)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // If not public, it's protected
+  return !isPublicExampleRoute(path);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Endpoint Metadata
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Metadata for all example endpoints.
+ * Useful for API documentation and OpenAPI generation.
+ */
+export const exampleEndpoints: EndpointMetadata[] = [
+  // List operations
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'List examples with pagination and filtering',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'PaginatedResult<AdvancedExample>',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/summaries',
+    description: 'List example summaries for dropdowns',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'ExampleSummary[]',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/statistics',
+    description: 'Get example statistics',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'ExampleStatistics',
+  },
+
+  // Single item operations
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Get example by ID with relations',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'AdvancedExampleWithRelations',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/slug/:slug',
+    description: 'Get example by slug',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'AdvancedExample',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Get example settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'ExampleSettings',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/check-slug/:slug',
+    description: 'Check if slug is available',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: '{ available: boolean }',
+  },
+
+  // Create operation
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/',
+    description: 'Create a new example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:create'],
+    requestBody: 'CreateExampleRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'CreateExampleResponse',
+  },
+
+  // Update operations
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Update an example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+    requestBody: 'UpdateExampleRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'UpdateExampleResponse',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/settings',
+    description: 'Update example settings',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+    requestBody: 'Partial<ExampleSettings>',
+    responseSchema: 'AdvancedExample',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PATCH',
+    path: '/:id/status',
+    description: 'Change example status',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+    requestBody: 'ChangeStatusRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'StatusChangeResponse',
+  },
+
+  // Action operations
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/process',
+    description: 'Process an example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:process'],
+    requestBody: 'ProcessExampleRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'ProcessExampleResponse',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/duplicate',
+    description: 'Duplicate an example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:create'],
+    responseSchema: 'CreateExampleResponse',
+  },
+
+  // Bulk operations
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/bulk',
+    description: 'Perform bulk operation',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update', 'example:delete'],
+    requestBody: 'BulkOperationRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'BulkOperationResponse',
+  },
+
+  // Delete operations
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id',
+    description: 'Delete an example (soft delete)',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:delete'],
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/restore',
+    description: 'Restore a deleted example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:delete'],
+    responseSchema: 'AdvancedExample',
+  },
+
+  // Public routes
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/public/:slug',
+    description: 'Get public example view by slug',
+    requiresAuth: false,
+    responseSchema: 'PublicExampleResponse',
+  },
+
+  // Item operations
+  {
+    method: 'GET',
+    path: '/:id/items',
+    description: 'List items for an example',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:read'],
+    responseSchema: 'PaginatedResult<ExampleItem>',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'POST',
+    path: '/:id/items',
+    description: 'Create an item',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+    requestBody: 'CreateExampleItemRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'ItemResponse',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'PUT',
+    path: '/:id/items/:itemId',
+    description: 'Update an item',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+    requestBody: 'UpdateExampleItemRequest',
+    responseSchema: 'ItemResponse',
+  },
+  {
+    method: 'DELETE',
+    path: '/:id/items/:itemId',
+    description: 'Delete an item',
+    requiresAuth: true,
+    permissions: ['example:update'],
+  },
+];
+
+/**
+ * Get all endpoints as a flat list
+ */
+export function getAllEndpoints(): EndpointMetadata[] {
+  return exampleEndpoints;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Get endpoints by method
+ */
+export function getEndpointsByMethod(method: EndpointMetadata['method']): EndpointMetadata[] {
+  return exampleEndpoints.filter((e) => e.method === method);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Get protected endpoints
+ */
+export function getProtectedEndpoints(): EndpointMetadata[] {
+  return exampleEndpoints.filter((e) => e.requiresAuth);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Get public endpoints
+ */
+export function getPublicEndpoints(): EndpointMetadata[] {
+  return exampleEndpoints.filter((e) => !e.requiresAuth);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Exports
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export default advancedExampleRoutes;

diff --git a/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.schema.ts b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.schema.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6adeb47
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.schema.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,536 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Comprehensive validation schemas demonstrating E-Menum validation patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - Input validation schemas
+ * - Query parameter schemas
+ * - Nested object validation
+ * - Custom refinements and transforms
+ * - Type inference from schemas
+ * - Utility functions
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createExampleSchema,
+ *   updateExampleSchema,
+ *   listExamplesQuerySchema,
+ *   generateSlug,
+ * } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate create input
+ * const validated = createExampleSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+import {
+  ExampleStatus,
+  ExampleType,
+  ExamplePriority,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validation limits for the module
+ */
+const LIMITS = {
+  name: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+  slug: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+  description: { max: 2000 },
+  tags: { max: 20, itemMax: 50 },
+  items: { max: 100 },
+  sortOrder: { min: 0, max: 10000 },
+  value: { max: 10000 },
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Slug validation regex (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens)
+ */
+const SLUG_REGEX = /^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas (Reusable)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Name schema
+ */
+export const nameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(LIMITS.name.min, 'Name is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.name.max, `Name must be at most ${LIMITS.name.max} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Slug schema
+ */
+export const slugSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(LIMITS.slug.min, 'Slug is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.slug.max, `Slug must be at most ${LIMITS.slug.max} characters`)
+  .regex(SLUG_REGEX, 'Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens');
+
+/**
+ * Optional slug schema
+ */
+export const optionalSlugSchema = slugSchema.optional();
+
+/**
+ * Description schema
+ */
+export const descriptionSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.description.max, `Description must be at most ${LIMITS.description.max} characters`)
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * CUID schema
+ */
+export const cuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format');
+
+/**
+ * Optional CUID schema
+ */
+export const optionalCuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format').optional().nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Sort order schema
+ */
+export const sortOrderSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.sortOrder.min)
+  .max(LIMITS.sortOrder.max)
+  .optional()
+  .default(0);
+
+/**
+ * Tags array schema
+ */
+export const tagsSchema = z
+  .array(z.string().trim().min(1).max(LIMITS.tags.itemMax))
+  .max(LIMITS.tags.max, `Maximum ${LIMITS.tags.max} tags allowed`)
+  .optional()
+  .default([]);
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Enum Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Example status enum schema
+ */
+export const exampleStatusSchema = z.nativeEnum(ExampleStatus);
+
+/**
+ * Example type enum schema
+ */
+export const exampleTypeSchema = z.nativeEnum(ExampleType);
+
+/**
+ * Example priority enum schema
+ */
+export const examplePrioritySchema = z.nativeEnum(ExamplePriority);
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Example settings schema
+ */
+export const exampleSettingsSchema = z
+  .object({
+    notificationsEnabled: z.boolean().optional(),
+    themeColor: z
+      .string()
+      .regex(/^#([A-Fa-f0-9]{6}|[A-Fa-f0-9]{3})$/, 'Invalid hex color')
+      .optional(),
+    maxItems: z.number().int().min(1).max(1000).optional(),
+    features: z.record(z.boolean()).optional(),
+    metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
+  })
+  .optional()
+  .default({});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from settings schema
+ */
+export type ExampleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof exampleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Item Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create item schema (nested in example)
+ */
+export const createItemNestedSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema,
+  value: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]).refine(
+    (val) => {
+      if (typeof val === 'string') return val.length <= LIMITS.value.max;
+      return val >= 0 && val <= LIMITS.value.max;
+    },
+    { message: 'Value exceeds maximum allowed' }
+  ),
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Create item schema (standalone)
+ */
+export const createItemSchema = z.object({
+  exampleId: cuidSchema,
+  name: nameSchema,
+  value: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]),
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create item schema
+ */
+export type CreateItemInput = z.infer<typeof createItemSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update item schema
+ */
+export const updateItemSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema.optional(),
+  value: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]).optional(),
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update item schema
+ */
+export type UpdateItemInput = z.infer<typeof updateItemSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Example Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create example schema
+ *
+ * Demonstrates comprehensive validation with:
+ * - Required and optional fields
+ * - Enum validation
+ * - Nested object validation
+ * - Array validation with limits
+ * - Default values
+ */
+export const createExampleSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema,
+  slug: optionalSlugSchema,
+  description: descriptionSchema,
+  type: exampleTypeSchema.optional().default(ExampleType.STANDARD),
+  status: exampleStatusSchema.optional().default(ExampleStatus.DRAFT),
+  priority: examplePrioritySchema.optional().default(ExamplePriority.MEDIUM),
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  settings: exampleSettingsSchema,
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+  isFeatured: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  items: z
+    .array(createItemNestedSchema)
+    .max(LIMITS.items.max, `Maximum ${LIMITS.items.max} items allowed`)
+    .optional()
+    .default([]),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create example schema
+ */
+export type CreateExampleInput = z.infer<typeof createExampleSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update example schema
+ *
+ * All fields optional for partial updates
+ */
+export const updateExampleSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema.optional(),
+  slug: slugSchema.optional(),
+  description: descriptionSchema,
+  type: exampleTypeSchema.optional(),
+  status: exampleStatusSchema.optional(),
+  priority: examplePrioritySchema.optional(),
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  settings: exampleSettingsSchema,
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+  isFeatured: z.boolean().optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update example schema
+ */
+export type UpdateExampleInput = z.infer<typeof updateExampleSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change status schema
+ */
+export const changeStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: exampleStatusSchema,
+  reason: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from change status schema
+ */
+export type ChangeStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeStatusSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Process example schema
+ */
+export const processExampleSchema = z.object({
+  options: z
+    .object({
+      async: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+      notifyOnComplete: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+      processor: z.string().max(100).optional(),
+    })
+    .optional()
+    .default({}),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from process example schema
+ */
+export type ProcessExampleInput = z.infer<typeof processExampleSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Bulk operation schema
+ */
+export const bulkOperationSchema = z.object({
+  ids: z.array(cuidSchema).min(1, 'At least one ID required').max(100, 'Maximum 100 items'),
+  operation: z.enum(['delete', 'archive', 'activate', 'deactivate']),
+  options: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from bulk operation schema
+ */
+export type BulkOperationInput = z.infer<typeof bulkOperationSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Query Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * List examples query schema
+ *
+ * Demonstrates query parameter validation with:
+ * - String to boolean transforms
+ * - String to number coercion
+ * - Enum validation
+ * - Array parsing from comma-separated strings
+ * - Date parsing
+ */
+export const listExamplesQuerySchema = z.object({
+  status: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val as ExampleStatus)
+    .pipe(exampleStatusSchema)
+    .optional(),
+  type: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val as ExampleType)
+    .pipe(exampleTypeSchema)
+    .optional(),
+  priority: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val as ExamplePriority)
+    .pipe(examplePrioritySchema)
+    .optional(),
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  isFeatured: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  isProcessed: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  tags: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val.split(',').map((t) => t.trim()).filter(Boolean))
+    .optional(),
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  include: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val.split(',') as Array<'items' | 'creator' | 'organization'>)
+    .optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  sortBy: z
+    .enum(['name', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt', 'sortOrder', 'priority'])
+    .optional()
+    .default('sortOrder'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('asc'),
+  createdAfter: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+  createdBefore: z.coerce.date().optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list examples query schema
+ */
+export type ListExamplesQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listExamplesQuerySchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List items query schema
+ */
+export const listItemsQuerySchema = z.object({
+  isActive: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list items query schema
+ */
+export type ListItemsQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listItemsQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Schemas (for documentation/testing)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Example response schema
+ */
+export const exampleResponseSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  organizationId: cuidSchema,
+  branchId: z.string().nullable(),
+  name: z.string(),
+  slug: z.string(),
+  description: z.string().nullable(),
+  type: exampleTypeSchema,
+  status: exampleStatusSchema,
+  priority: examplePrioritySchema,
+  settings: exampleSettingsSchema,
+  tags: z.array(z.string()),
+  sortOrder: z.number(),
+  isProcessed: z.boolean(),
+  isFeatured: z.boolean(),
+  createdBy: z.string().nullable(),
+  updatedBy: z.string().nullable(),
+  createdAt: z.date(),
+  updatedAt: z.date(),
+});
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Generates a URL-friendly slug from a string
+ *
+ * @param text - Text to convert to slug
+ * @returns URL-friendly slug
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const slug = generateSlug('Hello World Example');
+ * // Returns: 'hello-world-example'
+ *
+ * const turkishSlug = generateSlug('Merhaba Dunya');
+ * // Returns: 'merhaba-dunya'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateSlug(text: string): string {
+  return text
+    .toLowerCase()
+    .trim()
+    // Turkish character replacements
+    .replace(/ğ/g, 'g')
+    .replace(/ü/g, 'u')
+    .replace(/ş/g, 's')
+    .replace(/ı/g, 'i')
+    .replace(/ö/g, 'o')
+    .replace(/ç/g, 'c')
+    // General transformations
+    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '') // Remove special characters
+    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-') // Replace spaces and underscores with hyphens
+    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, ''); // Remove leading/trailing hyphens
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates slug format
+ *
+ * @param slug - Slug string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid slug
+ */
+export function isValidSlug(slug: string): boolean {
+  return SLUG_REGEX.test(slug);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates if a status transition is allowed
+ *
+ * @param currentStatus - Current status
+ * @param newStatus - Target status
+ * @returns True if transition is allowed
+ */
+export function isValidStatusTransition(
+  currentStatus: ExampleStatus,
+  newStatus: ExampleStatus
+): boolean {
+  const transitions: Record<ExampleStatus, ExampleStatus[]> = {
+    [ExampleStatus.DRAFT]: [ExampleStatus.PENDING, ExampleStatus.ACTIVE],
+    [ExampleStatus.PENDING]: [ExampleStatus.DRAFT, ExampleStatus.ACTIVE, ExampleStatus.INACTIVE],
+    [ExampleStatus.ACTIVE]: [ExampleStatus.INACTIVE, ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED],
+    [ExampleStatus.INACTIVE]: [ExampleStatus.ACTIVE, ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED],
+    [ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED]: [], // No transitions allowed from archived
+  };
+
+  return transitions[currentStatus]?.includes(newStatus) ?? false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Gets allowed status transitions for a given status
+ *
+ * @param currentStatus - Current status
+ * @returns Array of allowed target statuses
+ */
+export function getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: ExampleStatus): ExampleStatus[] {
+  const transitions: Record<ExampleStatus, ExampleStatus[]> = {
+    [ExampleStatus.DRAFT]: [ExampleStatus.PENDING, ExampleStatus.ACTIVE],
+    [ExampleStatus.PENDING]: [ExampleStatus.DRAFT, ExampleStatus.ACTIVE, ExampleStatus.INACTIVE],
+    [ExampleStatus.ACTIVE]: [ExampleStatus.INACTIVE, ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED],
+    [ExampleStatus.INACTIVE]: [ExampleStatus.ACTIVE, ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED],
+    [ExampleStatus.ARCHIVED]: [],
+  };
+
+  return transitions[currentStatus] ?? [];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Parses and validates settings, merging with defaults
+ *
+ * @param settings - Settings to parse
+ * @returns Validated settings
+ */
+export function parseSettings(settings: unknown): ExampleSettingsInput {
+  return exampleSettingsSchema.parse(settings);
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service.ts b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..3a5bc94
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,841 @@
+/**
+ * Advanced Example Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service demonstrating E-Menum service patterns.
+ * This file showcases:
+ * - CRUD operations with validation
+ * - Event emission
+ * - Hook execution
+ * - Error handling with AppException
+ * - Transaction management
+ * - Plan/tier restrictions
+ *
+ * @module modules/_examples/advanced-example/service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { AdvancedExampleService } from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.service';
+ *
+ * const service = container.resolve('AdvancedExampleService');
+ * const result = await service.create('org_123', { name: 'My Example' });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import {
+  AdvancedExampleRepository,
+  CreateExampleData,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.repository';
+
+import type {
+  AdvancedExample,
+  AdvancedExampleWithRelations,
+  CreateExampleRequest,
+  UpdateExampleRequest,
+  ProcessExampleRequest,
+  ChangeStatusRequest,
+  BulkOperationRequest,
+  ListExamplesQuery,
+  ListExampleItemsQuery,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  ExampleStatus,
+  ExampleSummary,
+  ExampleStatistics,
+  ExampleSettings,
+  ExampleItem,
+  CreateExampleItemRequest,
+  UpdateExampleItemRequest,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.types';
+
+import {
+  createExampleSchema,
+  updateExampleSchema,
+  processExampleSchema,
+  changeStatusSchema,
+  bulkOperationSchema,
+  listExamplesQuerySchema,
+  createItemSchema,
+  updateItemSchema,
+  generateSlug,
+  isValidStatusTransition,
+  type CreateExampleInput,
+  type UpdateExampleInput,
+  type ProcessExampleInput,
+  type ChangeStatusInput,
+  type BulkOperationInput,
+  type ListExamplesQueryInput,
+  type CreateItemInput,
+  type UpdateItemInput,
+} from '@/modules/_examples/advanced-example/advanced-example.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create response
+ */
+export interface CreateExampleResponse {
+  example: AdvancedExample;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update response
+ */
+export interface UpdateExampleResponse {
+  example: AdvancedExample;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Status change response
+ */
+export interface StatusChangeResponse {
+  example: AdvancedExample;
+  previousStatus: ExampleStatus;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Process response
+ */
+export interface ProcessExampleResponse {
+  example: AdvancedExample;
+  result: 'success' | 'failure';
+  duration: number;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Bulk operation response
+ */
+export interface BulkOperationResponse {
+  affected: number;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Item response
+ */
+export interface ItemResponse {
+  item: ExampleItem;
+  message: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// User Context
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  userId?: string;
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Advanced Example Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Service for Advanced Example business logic.
+ *
+ * Demonstrates comprehensive service patterns:
+ * - Input validation with Zod
+ * - Business rule enforcement
+ * - Event emission for pub/sub
+ * - Error handling with typed exceptions
+ * - Audit logging
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('AdvancedExampleService') private service: AdvancedExampleService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(orgId: string, data: unknown) {
+ *     return this.service.create(orgId, data as CreateExampleRequest);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class AdvancedExampleService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('AdvancedExampleRepository') private readonly repository: AdvancedExampleRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists examples with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated result
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListExamplesQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<AdvancedExample>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listExamplesQuerySchema) as ListExamplesQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAll(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists example summaries (for dropdowns).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Optional filters
+   * @returns Array of summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params?: Partial<ListExamplesQuery>
+  ): Promise<ExampleSummary[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an example by ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @returns Example or null
+   */
+  async getById(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<AdvancedExample | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an example by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param include - Relations to include
+   * @returns Example with relations
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    include?: Array<'items' | 'creator' | 'organization'>
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExampleWithRelations> {
+    const example = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id, organizationId, include);
+
+    if (!example) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('AdvancedExample', id);
+    }
+
+    return example;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an example by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @returns Example
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an example by slug.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Example slug
+   * @returns Example or null
+   */
+  async getBySlug(organizationId: string, slug: string): Promise<AdvancedExample | null> {
+    return this.repository.findBySlug(organizationId, slug);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets statistics for examples.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Statistics
+   */
+  async getStatistics(organizationId: string): Promise<ExampleStatistics> {
+    return this.repository.getStatistics(organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts examples.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param filters - Optional filters
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(
+    organizationId: string,
+    filters?: { status?: ExampleStatus }
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(organizationId, filters);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new example.
+   *
+   * Process:
+   * 1. Validate input with Zod
+   * 2. Generate slug if not provided
+   * 3. Check slug uniqueness
+   * 4. Create example
+   * 5. Emit creation event
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Create response
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateExampleRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateExampleResponse> {
+    // 1. Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createExampleSchema) as CreateExampleInput;
+
+    // 2. Generate slug if not provided
+    let slug = validated.slug;
+    if (!slug) {
+      slug = generateSlug(validated.name);
+      // Ensure uniqueness
+      let counter = 1;
+      const baseSlug = slug;
+      while (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug)) {
+        slug = `${baseSlug}-${counter}`;
+        counter++;
+      }
+    } else {
+      // 3. Check slug uniqueness
+      if (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Example slug', slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // 4. Create example
+    const createData: CreateExampleData = {
+      name: validated.name,
+      slug,
+      description: validated.description || null,
+      type: validated.type,
+      status: validated.status,
+      priority: validated.priority,
+      branchId: validated.branchId || null,
+      settings: validated.settings,
+      tags: validated.tags,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder,
+      isFeatured: validated.isFeatured,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+    };
+
+    let example: AdvancedExample;
+
+    // Create with items if provided
+    if (validated.items && validated.items.length > 0) {
+      const result = await this.repository.createWithItems(
+        organizationId,
+        createData,
+        validated.items.map((item) => ({
+          name: item.name,
+          value: item.value,
+          sortOrder: item.sortOrder,
+          isActive: item.isActive,
+        }))
+      );
+      example = result;
+    } else {
+      example = await this.repository.create(organizationId, createData);
+    }
+
+    // 5. Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.created', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: example.name,
+      status: example.status,
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      example,
+      message: 'Example created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param data - Update request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Update response
+   */
+  async update(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateExampleRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateExampleResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateExampleSchema) as UpdateExampleInput;
+
+    // Get current example
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check slug uniqueness if changing
+    if (validated.slug && validated.slug !== current.slug) {
+      if (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, validated.slug, id)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Example slug', validated.slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.name !== undefined) updateData.name = validated.name;
+    if (validated.slug !== undefined) updateData.slug = validated.slug;
+    if (validated.description !== undefined) updateData.description = validated.description;
+    if (validated.type !== undefined) updateData.type = validated.type;
+    if (validated.priority !== undefined) updateData.priority = validated.priority;
+    if (validated.branchId !== undefined) updateData.branchId = validated.branchId;
+    if (validated.settings !== undefined) updateData.settings = validated.settings;
+    if (validated.tags !== undefined) updateData.tags = validated.tags;
+    if (validated.sortOrder !== undefined) updateData.sortOrder = validated.sortOrder;
+    if (validated.isFeatured !== undefined) updateData.isFeatured = validated.isFeatured;
+    updateData.updatedBy = context?.userId;
+
+    // Update
+    const example = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, updateData);
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.updated', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: updateData,
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      example,
+      message: 'Example updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates example settings (merge).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param settings - Settings to merge
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated example
+   */
+  async updateSettings(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    settings: Partial<ExampleSettings>,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const example = await this.repository.updateSettings(id, organizationId, settings);
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.updated', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: { settings },
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return example;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes example status with validation.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param data - Status change request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Status change response
+   */
+  async changeStatus(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: ChangeStatusRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<StatusChangeResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changeStatusSchema) as ChangeStatusInput;
+
+    // Get current example
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    const previousStatus = current.status;
+
+    // Validate status transition
+    if (!isValidStatusTransition(previousStatus, validated.status)) {
+      throw new AppException('INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION', 400, {
+        message: `Cannot transition from ${previousStatus} to ${validated.status}`,
+        currentStatus: previousStatus,
+        targetStatus: validated.status,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Update status
+    const example = await this.repository.updateStatus(
+      id,
+      organizationId,
+      validated.status,
+      context?.userId
+    );
+
+    // Emit status change event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.status.changed', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      previousStatus,
+      newStatus: validated.status,
+      reason: validated.reason,
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      example,
+      previousStatus,
+      message: `Status changed from ${previousStatus} to ${validated.status}.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Processes an example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param data - Process request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Process response
+   */
+  async process(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data?: ProcessExampleRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ProcessExampleResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = data
+      ? (this.validateInput(data, processExampleSchema) as ProcessExampleInput)
+      : { options: {} };
+
+    // Get example
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if already processed
+    if (current.isProcessed) {
+      return {
+        example: current,
+        result: 'success',
+        duration: 0,
+        message: 'Example was already processed.',
+      };
+    }
+
+    // Simulate processing
+    const startTime = Date.now();
+
+    try {
+      // In a real module, this would do actual processing
+      // For example: AI processing, data transformation, etc.
+      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
+
+      // Mark as processed
+      const example = await this.repository.markProcessed(id, organizationId);
+      const duration = Date.now() - startTime;
+
+      // Emit processed event
+      await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.processed', {
+        exampleId: example.id,
+        organizationId,
+        result: 'success',
+        duration,
+        triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+      });
+
+      return {
+        example,
+        result: 'success',
+        duration,
+        message: 'Example processed successfully.',
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      const duration = Date.now() - startTime;
+
+      // Emit failure event
+      await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.processed', {
+        exampleId: current.id,
+        organizationId,
+        result: 'failure',
+        duration,
+        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
+        triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+      });
+
+      return {
+        example: current,
+        result: 'failure',
+        duration,
+        message: 'Processing failed.',
+      };
+    }
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Performs bulk operation.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Bulk operation request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Bulk operation response
+   */
+  async bulkOperation(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: BulkOperationRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<BulkOperationResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, bulkOperationSchema) as BulkOperationInput;
+
+    let affected = 0;
+
+    switch (validated.operation) {
+      case 'delete':
+        affected = await this.repository.bulkSoftDelete(organizationId, validated.ids);
+        break;
+
+      case 'archive':
+        // Would update status to ARCHIVED
+        break;
+
+      case 'activate':
+        // Would update status to ACTIVE
+        break;
+
+      case 'deactivate':
+        // Would update status to INACTIVE
+        break;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      affected,
+      message: `Bulk ${validated.operation} completed. ${affected} items affected.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes an example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async delete(organizationId: string, id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<void> {
+    const example = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    await this.repository.softDelete(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.deleted', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: example.name,
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Example ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Restored example
+   */
+  async restore(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<AdvancedExample> {
+    const example = await this.repository.restore(id, organizationId);
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('advanced-example.updated', {
+      exampleId: example.id,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: { restored: true },
+      triggeredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return example;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a slug is available.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isSlugAvailable(
+    organizationId: string,
+    slug: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug, excludeId));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Item Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists items for an example.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated items
+   */
+  async listItems(
+    organizationId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    params?: ListExampleItemsQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<ExampleItem>> {
+    return this.repository.findItems(exampleId, organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates an item.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param data - Item data
+   * @returns Created item
+   */
+  async createItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    data: CreateExampleItemRequest
+  ): Promise<ItemResponse> {
+    const item = await this.repository.createItem(exampleId, organizationId, {
+      name: data.name,
+      value: data.value,
+      sortOrder: data.sortOrder,
+      isActive: data.isActive,
+    });
+
+    return {
+      item,
+      message: 'Item created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an item.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns Updated item
+   */
+  async updateItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    itemId: string,
+    data: UpdateExampleItemRequest
+  ): Promise<ItemResponse> {
+    const item = await this.repository.updateItem(
+      itemId,
+      exampleId,
+      organizationId,
+      data
+    );
+
+    return {
+      item,
+      message: 'Item updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes an item.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param exampleId - Example ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   */
+  async deleteItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    exampleId: string,
+    itemId: string
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.repository.deleteItem(itemId, exampleId, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "advanced-example",
+  "name": "Advanced Example Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Reference implementation demonstrating all E-Menum module patterns and best practices. Use this as a template for building production modules.",
+
+  "type": "example",
+  "category": "examples",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
+    "optional": ["notification", "media"]
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "advanced-example.created",
+      "advanced-example.updated",
+      "advanced-example.deleted",
+      "advanced-example.status.changed",
+      "advanced-example.processed"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeExampleCreate",
+      "afterExampleCreate",
+      "beforeExampleUpdate",
+      "afterExampleUpdate",
+      "beforeExampleDelete",
+      "afterExampleDelete",
+      "onExampleProcess"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "example:read",
+      "example:create",
+      "example:update",
+      "example:delete",
+      "example:process",
+      "example:export"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": [
+      "auth:verify",
+      "organization:read"
+    ],
+    "events": [
+      "organization.created",
+      "user.created"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["basic_crud"],
+      "starter": ["basic_crud", "export"],
+      "professional": ["basic_crud", "export", "bulk_operations"],
+      "business": ["basic_crud", "export", "bulk_operations", "advanced_processing"],
+      "enterprise": ["basic_crud", "export", "bulk_operations", "advanced_processing", "custom_hooks"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Advanced Example",
+      "icon": "ph-code",
+      "route": "/admin/examples",
+      "order": 999
+    },
+    "settings": {
+      "label": "Example Settings",
+      "route": "/admin/settings/examples"
+    }
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "defaults": {
+      "maxItemsPerPage": 20,
+      "enableProcessing": true,
+      "processingTimeout": 30000,
+      "notifyOnCreate": false,
+      "logLevel": "info"
+    }
+  },
+
+  "documentation": {
+    "readme": "README.md",
+    "api": "https://docs.e-menum.net/modules/advanced-example",
+    "changelog": "CHANGELOG.md"
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/_stubs/integration/integration.types.ts b/src/modules/_stubs/integration/integration.types.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..fbda91c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/_stubs/integration/integration.types.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,606 @@
+/**
+ * Integration Module Types
+ *
+ * Type definitions for future integration module implementation.
+ * This file defines interfaces for API management, webhooks,
+ * and third-party service connections.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_stubs/integration/types
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import type {
+ *   IIntegrationService,
+ *   Integration,
+ *   Webhook,
+ * } from '@/modules/_stubs/integration';
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Enums
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Integration status
+ */
+export enum IntegrationStatus {
+  /** Integration is active */
+  ACTIVE = 'ACTIVE',
+  /** Integration is inactive */
+  INACTIVE = 'INACTIVE',
+  /** Integration has errors */
+  ERROR = 'ERROR',
+  /** Integration is pending setup */
+  PENDING = 'PENDING',
+}
+
+/**
+ * Integration type
+ */
+export enum IntegrationType {
+  /** POS system */
+  POS = 'POS',
+  /** Payment gateway */
+  PAYMENT = 'PAYMENT',
+  /** Delivery service */
+  DELIVERY = 'DELIVERY',
+  /** Accounting software */
+  ACCOUNTING = 'ACCOUNTING',
+  /** CRM system */
+  CRM = 'CRM',
+  /** Marketing platform */
+  MARKETING = 'MARKETING',
+  /** Custom webhook */
+  WEBHOOK = 'WEBHOOK',
+  /** Custom API */
+  CUSTOM = 'CUSTOM',
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook event type
+ */
+export enum WebhookEvent {
+  /** Order created */
+  ORDER_CREATED = 'order.created',
+  /** Order updated */
+  ORDER_UPDATED = 'order.updated',
+  /** Order completed */
+  ORDER_COMPLETED = 'order.completed',
+  /** Order cancelled */
+  ORDER_CANCELLED = 'order.cancelled',
+  /** Menu updated */
+  MENU_UPDATED = 'menu.updated',
+  /** Item updated */
+  ITEM_UPDATED = 'item.updated',
+  /** Customer created */
+  CUSTOMER_CREATED = 'customer.created',
+  /** Payment completed */
+  PAYMENT_COMPLETED = 'payment.completed',
+  /** Reservation created */
+  RESERVATION_CREATED = 'reservation.created',
+  /** Feedback submitted */
+  FEEDBACK_SUBMITTED = 'feedback.submitted',
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook delivery status
+ */
+export enum WebhookDeliveryStatus {
+  /** Pending delivery */
+  PENDING = 'PENDING',
+  /** Successfully delivered */
+  DELIVERED = 'DELIVERED',
+  /** Delivery failed */
+  FAILED = 'FAILED',
+  /** Retrying delivery */
+  RETRYING = 'RETRYING',
+}
+
+/**
+ * API key status
+ */
+export enum ApiKeyStatus {
+  /** Key is active */
+  ACTIVE = 'ACTIVE',
+  /** Key is revoked */
+  REVOKED = 'REVOKED',
+  /** Key is expired */
+  EXPIRED = 'EXPIRED',
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Entity Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Integration entity
+ */
+export interface Integration {
+  /** Integration ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** Organization ID */
+  organizationId: string;
+  /** Integration name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Integration type */
+  type: IntegrationType;
+  /** Provider (e.g., 'stripe', 'iyzico') */
+  provider: string;
+  /** Status */
+  status: IntegrationStatus;
+  /** Configuration (encrypted) */
+  config: Record<string, unknown>;
+  /** Credentials (encrypted) */
+  credentials: Record<string, unknown>;
+  /** Last sync timestamp */
+  lastSyncAt: Date | null;
+  /** Last error message */
+  lastError: string | null;
+  /** Created by user ID */
+  createdById: string;
+  /** Created at */
+  createdAt: Date;
+  /** Updated at */
+  updatedAt: Date;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook entity
+ */
+export interface Webhook {
+  /** Webhook ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** Organization ID */
+  organizationId: string;
+  /** Webhook name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Target URL */
+  url: string;
+  /** Events to trigger webhook */
+  events: WebhookEvent[];
+  /** Is active */
+  isActive: boolean;
+  /** Secret key for signature */
+  secret: string;
+  /** Custom headers */
+  headers: Record<string, string> | null;
+  /** Retry count */
+  retryCount: number;
+  /** Retry delay (seconds) */
+  retryDelaySeconds: number;
+  /** Total deliveries */
+  totalDeliveries: number;
+  /** Successful deliveries */
+  successfulDeliveries: number;
+  /** Failed deliveries */
+  failedDeliveries: number;
+  /** Last triggered at */
+  lastTriggeredAt: Date | null;
+  /** Created at */
+  createdAt: Date;
+  /** Updated at */
+  updatedAt: Date;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook delivery
+ */
+export interface WebhookDelivery {
+  /** Delivery ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** Webhook ID */
+  webhookId: string;
+  /** Event type */
+  event: WebhookEvent;
+  /** Payload sent */
+  payload: Record<string, unknown>;
+  /** Status */
+  status: WebhookDeliveryStatus;
+  /** HTTP status code */
+  statusCode: number | null;
+  /** Response body */
+  response: string | null;
+  /** Error message */
+  error: string | null;
+  /** Attempt count */
+  attemptCount: number;
+  /** Next retry at */
+  nextRetryAt: Date | null;
+  /** Duration (ms) */
+  durationMs: number | null;
+  /** Created at */
+  createdAt: Date;
+  /** Delivered at */
+  deliveredAt: Date | null;
+}
+
+/**
+ * API key entity
+ */
+export interface ApiKey {
+  /** Key ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** Organization ID */
+  organizationId: string;
+  /** Key name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Key prefix (visible part) */
+  keyPrefix: string;
+  /** Key hash (for verification) */
+  keyHash: string;
+  /** Status */
+  status: ApiKeyStatus;
+  /** Scopes/permissions */
+  scopes: string[];
+  /** Rate limit (requests per minute) */
+  rateLimit: number;
+  /** Expires at */
+  expiresAt: Date | null;
+  /** Last used at */
+  lastUsedAt: Date | null;
+  /** Total requests */
+  totalRequests: number;
+  /** Created by user ID */
+  createdById: string;
+  /** Created at */
+  createdAt: Date;
+  /** Revoked at */
+  revokedAt: Date | null;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Request Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create integration request
+ */
+export interface CreateIntegrationRequest {
+  /** Integration name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Integration type */
+  type: IntegrationType;
+  /** Provider */
+  provider: string;
+  /** Configuration */
+  config?: Record<string, unknown>;
+  /** Credentials */
+  credentials: Record<string, unknown>;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create webhook request
+ */
+export interface CreateWebhookRequest {
+  /** Webhook name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Target URL */
+  url: string;
+  /** Events to subscribe */
+  events: WebhookEvent[];
+  /** Custom headers */
+  headers?: Record<string, string>;
+  /** Retry count (default: 3) */
+  retryCount?: number;
+  /** Retry delay in seconds (default: 60) */
+  retryDelaySeconds?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update webhook request
+ */
+export interface UpdateWebhookRequest {
+  /** Webhook name */
+  name?: string;
+  /** Target URL */
+  url?: string;
+  /** Events to subscribe */
+  events?: WebhookEvent[];
+  /** Is active */
+  isActive?: boolean;
+  /** Custom headers */
+  headers?: Record<string, string>;
+  /** Retry count */
+  retryCount?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create API key request
+ */
+export interface CreateApiKeyRequest {
+  /** Key name */
+  name: string;
+  /** Scopes/permissions */
+  scopes: string[];
+  /** Rate limit (default: 1000) */
+  rateLimit?: number;
+  /** Expires in days (optional) */
+  expiresInDays?: number;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Response Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Integration test result
+ */
+export interface IntegrationTestResult {
+  /** Test passed */
+  success: boolean;
+  /** Response time (ms) */
+  responseTimeMs: number;
+  /** Error message */
+  errorMessage?: string;
+  /** Details */
+  details?: Record<string, unknown>;
+}
+
+/**
+ * API key creation result
+ */
+export interface ApiKeyCreationResult {
+  /** Key ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** The actual API key (only shown once) */
+  key: string;
+  /** Key prefix */
+  keyPrefix: string;
+  /** Scopes */
+  scopes: string[];
+  /** Expires at */
+  expiresAt: Date | null;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook stats
+ */
+export interface WebhookStats {
+  /** Total deliveries */
+  totalDeliveries: number;
+  /** Successful deliveries */
+  successfulDeliveries: number;
+  /** Failed deliveries */
+  failedDeliveries: number;
+  /** Success rate percentage */
+  successRate: number;
+  /** Average response time (ms) */
+  avgResponseTimeMs: number;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service Interfaces
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Integration service interface
+ */
+export interface IIntegrationService {
+  /**
+   * Create integration
+   */
+  createIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    request: CreateIntegrationRequest
+  ): Promise<Integration>;
+
+  /**
+   * Get integration by ID
+   */
+  getIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    integrationId: string
+  ): Promise<Integration>;
+
+  /**
+   * List integrations
+   */
+  listIntegrations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    type?: IntegrationType
+  ): Promise<Integration[]>;
+
+  /**
+   * Update integration
+   */
+  updateIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    integrationId: string,
+    updates: Partial<CreateIntegrationRequest>
+  ): Promise<Integration>;
+
+  /**
+   * Delete integration
+   */
+  deleteIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    integrationId: string
+  ): Promise<void>;
+
+  /**
+   * Test integration connection
+   */
+  testIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    integrationId: string
+  ): Promise<IntegrationTestResult>;
+
+  /**
+   * Sync integration data
+   */
+  syncIntegration(
+    organizationId: string,
+    integrationId: string
+  ): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook service interface
+ */
+export interface IWebhookService {
+  /**
+   * Create webhook
+   */
+  createWebhook(
+    organizationId: string,
+    request: CreateWebhookRequest
+  ): Promise<Webhook>;
+
+  /**
+   * Get webhook by ID
+   */
+  getWebhook(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string
+  ): Promise<Webhook>;
+
+  /**
+   * List webhooks
+   */
+  listWebhooks(
+    organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<Webhook[]>;
+
+  /**
+   * Update webhook
+   */
+  updateWebhook(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string,
+    request: UpdateWebhookRequest
+  ): Promise<Webhook>;
+
+  /**
+   * Delete webhook
+   */
+  deleteWebhook(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string
+  ): Promise<void>;
+
+  /**
+   * Get webhook deliveries
+   */
+  getDeliveries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string,
+    limit?: number
+  ): Promise<WebhookDelivery[]>;
+
+  /**
+   * Retry failed delivery
+   */
+  retryDelivery(
+    organizationId: string,
+    deliveryId: string
+  ): Promise<WebhookDelivery>;
+
+  /**
+   * Get webhook stats
+   */
+  getStats(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string
+  ): Promise<WebhookStats>;
+
+  /**
+   * Test webhook
+   */
+  testWebhook(
+    organizationId: string,
+    webhookId: string
+  ): Promise<WebhookDelivery>;
+}
+
+/**
+ * API key service interface
+ */
+export interface IApiKeyService {
+  /**
+   * Create API key
+   */
+  createApiKey(
+    organizationId: string,
+    request: CreateApiKeyRequest
+  ): Promise<ApiKeyCreationResult>;
+
+  /**
+   * List API keys
+   */
+  listApiKeys(
+    organizationId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiKey[]>;
+
+  /**
+   * Get API key by ID
+   */
+  getApiKey(
+    organizationId: string,
+    keyId: string
+  ): Promise<ApiKey>;
+
+  /**
+   * Revoke API key
+   */
+  revokeApiKey(
+    organizationId: string,
+    keyId: string
+  ): Promise<void>;
+
+  /**
+   * Validate API key
+   */
+  validateApiKey(
+    key: string
+  ): Promise<{ valid: boolean; organizationId?: string; scopes?: string[] }>;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Event Payload Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Integration connected event payload
+ */
+export interface IntegrationConnectedEventPayload {
+  organizationId: string;
+  integrationId: string;
+  type: IntegrationType;
+  provider: string;
+  timestamp: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Integration disconnected event payload
+ */
+export interface IntegrationDisconnectedEventPayload {
+  organizationId: string;
+  integrationId: string;
+  reason: string;
+  timestamp: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Webhook triggered event payload
+ */
+export interface WebhookTriggeredEventPayload {
+  organizationId: string;
+  webhookId: string;
+  deliveryId: string;
+  event: WebhookEvent;
+  status: WebhookDeliveryStatus;
+  timestamp: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * API key created event payload
+ */
+export interface ApiKeyCreatedEventPayload {
+  organizationId: string;
+  keyId: string;
+  keyPrefix: string;
+  scopes: string[];
+  createdById: string;
+  timestamp: string;
+}

+/**
+ * Payment Module Stub
+ *
+ * This is a placeholder module for future payment integration.
+ * Only interfaces and types are exported - no implementation.
+ *
+ * @module modules/_stubs/payment
+ */
+
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types Export
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Enums
+  PaymentStatus,
+  PaymentMethod,
+  PaymentGateway,
+  // Entity types
+  type PaymentTransaction,
+  type PaymentMethodConfig,
+  // Request types
+  type ProcessPaymentRequest,
+  type CardDetails,
+  type CustomerInfo,
+  type AddressInfo,
+  type RefundRequest,
+  // Response types
+  type PaymentResult,
+  type RefundResult,
+  // Service interfaces
+  type IPaymentService,
+  type IPaymentGatewayService,
+  // Event payloads
+  type PaymentInitiatedEventPayload,
+  type PaymentCompletedEventPayload,
+  type PaymentFailedEventPayload,
+  type PaymentRefundedEventPayload,
+} from '@/modules/_stubs/payment/payment.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Stub Implementation
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Payment service stub implementation
+ *
+ * This stub throws NotImplementedError for all methods.
+ * Replace with actual implementation when payment module is developed.
+ */
+export class PaymentServiceStub {
+  async processPayment(): Promise<never> {
+    throw new AppException('PAYMENT_MODULE_NOT_INSTALLED', 501, {
+      message: 'Payment module is not installed. Please install the payment module to use this feature.',
+    });
+  }
+
+  async refund(): Promise<never> {
+    throw new AppException('PAYMENT_MODULE_NOT_INSTALLED', 501, {
+      message: 'Payment module is not installed. Please install the payment module to use this feature.',
+    });
+  }
+
+  async getPaymentStatus(): Promise<never> {
+    throw new AppException('PAYMENT_MODULE_NOT_INSTALLED', 501, {
+      message: 'Payment module is not installed. Please install the payment module to use this feature.',
+    });
+  }
+
+  async getOrderPayments(): Promise<never> {
+    throw new AppException('PAYMENT_MODULE_NOT_INSTALLED', 501, {
+      message: 'Payment module is not installed. Please install the payment module to use this feature.',
+    });
+  }
+
+  async cancelPayment(): Promise<never> {
+    throw new AppException('PAYMENT_MODULE_NOT_INSTALLED', 501, {
+      message: 'Payment module is not installed. Please install the payment module to use this feature.',
+    });
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Check if payment module is available
+ */
+export function isPaymentModuleAvailable(): boolean {
+  return false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Module metadata
+ */
+export const PAYMENT_MODULE_METADATA = {
+  id: 'payment',
+  name: 'Payment Module',
+  status: 'stub' as const,
+  version: '0.0.0',
+};

+/**

+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.schema';
+
+export type {
+  CreateMenuInput,

+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.schema';
