+++ b/src/modules/menu/menu.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,1670 @@
+/**
+ * Menu Module Controllers
+ *
+ * REST API controllers for the Menu module including:
+ * - MenuController: Menu CRUD, publishing, duplication
+ * - CategoryController: Category CRUD, reordering
+ * - ProductController: Product CRUD, variants, modifiers
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/menu/menu.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List menus
+ * GET /api/v1/menus
+ *
+ * // Create menu
+ * POST /api/v1/menus
+ *
+ * // Publish menu
+ * POST /api/v1/menus/:id/publish
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Put,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse, PaginatedApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, CurrentOrg, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+import { TenantOrganization } from '@/core/middleware/tenant.middleware';
+
+import { MenuService, type CreateMenuResponse, type UpdateMenuResponse, type PublishMenuResponse, type UnpublishMenuResponse, type DuplicateMenuResponse, type UpdateSettingsResponse } from '@/modules/menu/menu.service';
+import { CategoryService, type CreateCategoryResponse, type UpdateCategoryResponse, type ReorderCategoriesResponse } from '@/modules/menu/category.service';
+import { ProductService, type CreateProductResponse, type UpdateProductResponse, type CreateVariantResponse, type UpdateVariantResponse, type CreateModifierResponse, type UpdateModifierResponse, type UpdateNutritionInfoResponse, type UpdateAvailabilityResponse, type ReorderProductsResponse } from '@/modules/menu/product.service';
+import { PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/menu/menu.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Menu,
+  MenuWithRelations,
+  CreateMenuRequest,
+  UpdateMenuRequest,
+  PublishMenuRequest,
+  ListMenusQuery,
+  MenuSettings,
+  Category,
+  CategoryWithRelations,
+  CreateCategoryRequest,
+  UpdateCategoryRequest,
+  ReorderCategoriesRequest,
+  ListCategoriesQuery,
+  Product,
+  ProductWithRelations,
+  ProductVariant,
+  ProductModifier,
+  NutritionInfo,
+  CreateProductRequest,
+  UpdateProductRequest,
+  UpdateAvailabilityRequest,
+  ListProductsQuery,
+  CreateVariantRequest,
+  UpdateVariantRequest,
+  CreateModifierRequest,
+  UpdateModifierRequest,
+  CreateNutritionInfoRequest,
+  UpdateNutritionInfoRequest,
+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.types';
+
+// =============================================================================
+// MENU CONTROLLER
+// =============================================================================
+
+/**
+ * Menu Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all menu-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete menus
+ * - Publishing and unpublishing
+ * - Menu duplication
+ * - Settings management
+ * - Category listing for a menu
+ *
+ * @route /api/v1/menus
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List menus
+ * GET /api/v1/menus?page=1&perPage=10&isPublished=true
+ *
+ * // Create menu
+ * POST /api/v1/menus
+ * {
+ *   "name": "Lunch Menu",
+ *   "description": "Our delicious lunch options"
+ * }
+ *
+ * // Publish menu
+ * POST /api/v1/menus/:id/publish
+ * {
+ *   "generateQrCode": true
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/menus')
+@injectable()
+export class MenuController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('MenuService') private readonly menuService: MenuService,
+    @inject('CategoryService') private readonly categoryService: CategoryService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List menus with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization from tenant middleware
+   * @param query - Query parameters (page, perPage, isPublished, branchId, search)
+   * @returns Paginated list of menus
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/menus?page=1&perPage=10&isPublished=true
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 10, "total": 5, "totalPages": 1 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: ListMenusQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedApiResponse<Menu>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.list(org.id, query);
+    return this.paginated(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List menu summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/summaries
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of menu summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Array<{ id: string; name: string; slug: string; isPublished: boolean }>>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.listSummaries(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get menu by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/:id
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Menu with relations
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/menus/mnu_123
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "mnu_123",
+   *     "name": "Lunch Menu",
+   *     "categories": [...]
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async getById(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<MenuWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.getByIdWithRelations(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get menu by slug.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/slug/:slug
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param slug - Menu slug
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Menu
+   */
+  @Get('/slug/:slug')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async getBySlug(
+    @Param('slug') slug: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Menu | null>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.getBySlug(org.id, slug);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get menu settings.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/:id/settings
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Menu settings
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async getSettings(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<MenuSettings>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.getSettings(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get categories for a menu.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/:id/categories
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of categories
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/categories')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async getCategories(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Category[]>> {
+    // Verify menu exists
+    await this.menuService.getByIdOrThrow(org.id, id);
+    const result = await this.categoryService.getByMenuId(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus
+   * @access Requires menu.create permission
+   *
+   * @param data - Menu creation data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created menu
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/menus
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Lunch Menu",
+   *   "description": "Our delicious lunch options",
+   *   "settings": {
+   *     "showPrices": true,
+   *     "enableOrdering": true
+   *   }
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "menu": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Menu created successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('menu.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @Body() data: CreateMenuRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateMenuResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.create(org.id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update a menu.
+   *
+   * @route PUT /api/v1/menus/:id
+   * @access Requires menu.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated menu
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PUT /api/v1/menus/mnu_123
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Updated Lunch Menu",
+   *   "description": "Even better lunch options"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Put('/:id')
+  @Authorized('menu.update')
+  async update(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateMenuRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateMenuResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.update(org.id, id, data, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update menu settings.
+   *
+   * Settings are merged with existing settings, not replaced.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/menus/:id/settings
+   * @access Requires menu.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param settings - Settings to update
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated settings
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/menus/mnu_123/settings
+   * {
+   *   "showPrices": false,
+   *   "enableOrdering": true
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/settings')
+  @Authorized('menu.update')
+  async updateSettings(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() settings: MenuSettings,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateSettingsResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.updateSettings(org.id, id, settings, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Publishing Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Publish a menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus/:id/publish
+   * @access Requires menu.publish permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param options - Publish options (generateQrCode)
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Published menu with optional QR code URL
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/menus/mnu_123/publish
+   * {
+   *   "generateQrCode": true
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "menu": { "isPublished": true, ... },
+   *     "qrCodeUrl": "https://...",
+   *     "message": "Menu published successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/publish')
+  @Authorized('menu.publish')
+  async publish(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() options: PublishMenuRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PublishMenuResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.publish(org.id, id, options, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Unpublish a menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus/:id/unpublish
+   * @access Requires menu.publish permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Unpublished menu
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/menus/mnu_123/unpublish
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "menu": { "isPublished": false, ... },
+   *     "message": "Menu unpublished successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/unpublish')
+  @Authorized('menu.publish')
+  async unpublish(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UnpublishMenuResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.unpublish(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Duplicate a menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus/:id/duplicate
+   * @access Requires menu.create permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID to duplicate
+   * @param body - Duplicate options (name for the new menu)
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Duplicated menu
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/menus/mnu_123/duplicate
+   * {
+   *   "name": "Lunch Menu (Copy)"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "menu": { "id": "mnu_456", "name": "Lunch Menu (Copy)", ... },
+   *     "message": "Menu duplicated successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/duplicate')
+  @Authorized('menu.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async duplicate(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: { name: string },
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<DuplicateMenuResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.duplicate(org.id, id, body.name, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Reorder categories within a menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus/:id/categories/reorder
+   * @access Requires menu.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param body - Reorder data with items array
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Reorder response
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/menus/mnu_123/categories/reorder
+   * {
+   *   "items": [
+   *     { "id": "cat_1", "sortOrder": 0 },
+   *     { "id": "cat_2", "sortOrder": 1 },
+   *     { "id": "cat_3", "sortOrder": 2 }
+   *   ]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/categories/reorder')
+  @Authorized('menu.update')
+  async reorderCategories(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: { items: Array<{ id: string; sortOrder: number }> },
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ReorderCategoriesResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.categoryService.reorder(
+      org.id,
+      { menuId: id, items: body.items },
+      { userId: user.id }
+    );
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a menu (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/menus/:id
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/menus/mnu_123
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.menuService.delete(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted menu.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/menus/:id/restore
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Restored menu
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Menu>> {
+    const result = await this.menuService.restore(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a slug is available.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/menus/check-slug/:slug
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-slug/:slug')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async checkSlug(
+    @Param('slug') slug: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.menuService.isSlugAvailable(org.id, slug);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// CATEGORY CONTROLLER
+// =============================================================================
+
+/**
+ * Category Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all category-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete categories
+ * - Product listing for a category
+ * - Product reordering
+ *
+ * @route /api/v1/categories
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List categories
+ * GET /api/v1/categories?menuId=mnu_123
+ *
+ * // Create category
+ * POST /api/v1/categories
+ * {
+ *   "menuId": "mnu_123",
+ *   "name": "Appetizers"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/categories')
+@injectable()
+export class CategoryController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('CategoryService') private readonly categoryService: CategoryService,
+    @inject('ProductService') private readonly productService: ProductService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List categories with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/categories
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param query - Query parameters (menuId, parentId, isActive, search, page, perPage)
+   * @returns Paginated list of categories
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/categories?menuId=mnu_123&isActive=true
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 50, "total": 10, "totalPages": 1 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: ListCategoriesQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedApiResponse<Category>> {

+/**
+ * Product Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all product-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update, delete products
+ * - Availability toggling
+ * - Variant management (CRUD)

+ * - Allergen management
+ *
+ * @route /api/v1/products
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List products
+ * GET /api/v1/products?categoryId=cat_123

+ * // Create product with variants
+ * POST /api/v1/products
+ * {
+ *   "categoryId": "cat_123",
+ *   "name": "Delicious Burger",
+ *   "basePrice": 150,
+ *   "variants": [
+ *     { "name": "Regular", "price": 150 },
+ *     { "name": "Large", "price": 200 }
+ *   ]
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */

+  constructor(

+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,

+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ message: string }>> {
+    await this.productService.setAllergens(org.id, id, body.allergenIds, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success({ message: 'Allergens updated successfully.' });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a product (soft delete).
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/products/:id
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/products/prod_123
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async delete(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.productService.delete(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a product variant.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/products/:id/variants/:variantId
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param variantId - Variant ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/products/prod_123/variants/var_456
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/variants/:variantId')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async deleteVariant(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('variantId') variantId: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.productService.deleteVariant(org.id, id, variantId, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete a product modifier.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/products/:id/modifiers/:modifierId
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param modifierId - Modifier ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/products/prod_123/modifiers/mod_456
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/modifiers/:modifierId')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async deleteModifier(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('modifierId') modifierId: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.productService.deleteModifier(org.id, id, modifierId, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Delete nutrition info for a product.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/products/:id/nutrition
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/products/prod_123/nutrition
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/nutrition')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async deleteNutritionInfo(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.productService.deleteNutritionInfo(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restore a deleted product.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/products/:id/restore
+   * @access Requires menu.delete permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Restored product
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/restore')
+  @Authorized('menu.delete')
+  async restore(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Product>> {
+    const result = await this.productService.restore(org.id, id, { userId: user.id });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Check if a slug is available within a category.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/products/check-slug/:categoryId/:slug
+   * @access Requires menu.view permission
+   *
+   * @param categoryId - Category ID
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Availability status
+   */
+  @Get('/check-slug/:categoryId/:slug')
+  @Authorized('menu.view')
+  async checkSlug(
+    @Param('categoryId') categoryId: string,
+    @Param('slug') slug: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<{ available: boolean }>> {
+    const available = await this.productService.isSlugAvailable(org.id, categoryId, slug);
+    return this.success({ available });
+  }
+}

+/**
+ * Menu Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Menu module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for menus, categories, and products.
+ *
+ * @module modules/menu/menu.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { menuRoutes } from '@/modules/menu/menu.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/menus/*, /api/v1/categories/*, /api/v1/products/*
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/menus/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Menu module route configuration
+ */
+export interface MenuRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for menus */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Category route configuration
+ */
+export interface CategoryRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for categories */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Product route configuration
+ */
+export interface ProductRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for products */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Combined module routes configuration
+ */
+export interface MenuModuleRouteConfig {
+  /** Menu routes */
+  menus: MenuRouteConfig;
+  /** Category routes */
+  categories: CategoryRouteConfig;
+  /** Products routes */
+  products: ProductRouteConfig;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configurations
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Menu routes configuration
+ */
+export const menuRoutes: MenuRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for menu endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/menus',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/menus',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   * Public menu viewing is handled separately
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/public/:slug', // Public menu view by slug
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/:id',
+    '/slug/:slug',
+    '/:id/settings',
+    '/:id/categories',
+    '/check-slug/:slug',
+    '/:id/publish',
+    '/:id/unpublish',
+    '/:id/duplicate',
+    '/:id/categories/reorder',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Category routes configuration
+ */
+export const categoryRoutes: CategoryRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for category endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/categories',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/products',
+    '/check-slug/:menuId/:slug',
+    '/:id/products/reorder',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Product routes configuration
+ */
+export const productRoutes: ProductRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for product endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/products',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/variants',
+    '/:id/modifiers',
+    '/:id/nutrition',
+    '/:id/allergens',
+    '/:id/availability',
+    '/check-slug/:categoryId/:slug',
+    '/:id/variants/:variantId',
+    '/:id/modifiers/:modifierId',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Combined menu module routes configuration
+ */
+export const menuModuleRoutes: MenuModuleRouteConfig = {
+  menus: menuRoutes,
+  categories: categoryRoutes,
+  products: productRoutes,
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a menu endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/summaries')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/menus/summaries')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildMenuApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/menus/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildMenuApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${menuRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for a menu endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/create')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/menus/create')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildMenuAdminPath('/create');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/menus/create'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildMenuAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${menuRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a category endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildCategoryApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${categoryRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a product endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildProductApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${productRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a public menu route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a public route
+ */
+export function isPublicMenuRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path matches any public route
+  for (const publicRoute of menuRoutes.public) {
+    const fullPublicPath = buildMenuApiPath(publicRoute);
+    // Handle routes with parameters
+    if (publicRoute.includes(':')) {
+      const pattern = fullPublicPath.replace(/:[\w]+/g, '[^/]+');
+      const regex = new RegExp(`^${pattern}$`);
+      if (regex.test(normalizedPath)) {
+        return true;
+      }
+    } else if (normalizedPath === fullPublicPath) {
+      return true;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected menu route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ */
+export function isProtectedMenuRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with any of our prefixes
+  const prefixes = [menuRoutes.prefix, categoryRoutes.prefix, productRoutes.prefix];
+  if (!prefixes.some((p) => normalizedPath.startsWith(p))) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // If not a public route, assume it's protected
+  return !isPublicMenuRoute(path);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

+}

@@ -0,0 +1,862 @@
+/**
+ * Menu Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Menu module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/menu/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createMenuSchema,
+ *   createProductSchema,
+ *   updateCategorySchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/menu/menu.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate menu input
+ * const validatedData = createMenuSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Default limits for menu module
+ */
+const LIMITS = {
+  name: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+  slug: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+  description: { max: 2000 },
+  shortDescription: { max: 100 },
+  customCss: { max: 50000 },
+  tags: { max: 20 },
+  gallery: { max: 10 },
+  price: { min: 0, max: 999999.99 },
+  sortOrder: { min: 0, max: 10000 },
+  spicyLevel: { min: 1, max: 5 },
+  preparationTime: { min: 1, max: 1440 }, // max 24 hours
+  maxQuantity: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Color validation regex (hex color)
+ */
+const HEX_COLOR_REGEX = /^#([A-Fa-f0-9]{6}|[A-Fa-f0-9]{3})$/;
+
+/**
+ * Slug validation regex
+ */
+const SLUG_REGEX = /^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Name schema for menu entities
+ */
+export const nameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(LIMITS.name.min, 'Name is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.name.max, `Name must be at most ${LIMITS.name.max} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Slug schema
+ */
+export const slugSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .toLowerCase()
+  .min(LIMITS.slug.min, 'Slug is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.slug.max, `Slug must be at most ${LIMITS.slug.max} characters`)
+  .regex(SLUG_REGEX, 'Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens');
+
+/**
+ * Optional slug schema
+ */
+export const optionalSlugSchema = slugSchema.optional();
+
+/**
+ * Description schema
+ */
+export const descriptionSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.description.max, `Description must be at most ${LIMITS.description.max} characters`)
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Short description schema
+ */
+export const shortDescriptionSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.shortDescription.max, `Short description must be at most ${LIMITS.shortDescription.max} characters`)
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Price schema
+ */
+export const priceSchema = z
+  .union([z.string(), z.number()])
+  .transform((val) => (typeof val === 'string' ? parseFloat(val) : val))
+  .refine((val) => !isNaN(val), 'Price must be a valid number')
+  .refine((val) => val >= LIMITS.price.min, `Price must be at least ${LIMITS.price.min}`)
+  .refine((val) => val <= LIMITS.price.max, `Price must be at most ${LIMITS.price.max}`);
+
+/**
+ * Optional price schema
+ */
+export const optionalPriceSchema = z
+  .union([z.string(), z.number()])
+  .transform((val) => (typeof val === 'string' ? parseFloat(val) : val))
+  .refine((val) => !isNaN(val), 'Price must be a valid number')
+  .refine((val) => val >= LIMITS.price.min, `Price must be at least ${LIMITS.price.min}`)
+  .refine((val) => val <= LIMITS.price.max, `Price must be at most ${LIMITS.price.max}`)
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Sort order schema
+ */
+export const sortOrderSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.sortOrder.min)
+  .max(LIMITS.sortOrder.max)
+  .optional()
+  .default(0);
+
+/**
+ * CUID schema
+ */
+export const cuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format');
+
+/**
+ * Optional CUID schema
+ */
+export const optionalCuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format').optional().nullable();
+
+/**
+ * URL schema
+ */
+export const urlSchema = z.string().url('Invalid URL format').optional().nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Hex color schema
+ */
+export const hexColorSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(HEX_COLOR_REGEX, 'Invalid hex color format (e.g., #FF5733)')
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Tags array schema
+ */
+export const tagsSchema = z
+  .array(z.string().trim().min(1).max(50))
+  .max(LIMITS.tags.max, `Maximum ${LIMITS.tags.max} tags allowed`)
+  .optional()
+  .default([]);
+
+/**
+ * Gallery array schema
+ */
+export const gallerySchema = z
+  .array(z.string().url('Invalid image URL'))
+  .max(LIMITS.gallery.max, `Maximum ${LIMITS.gallery.max} gallery images allowed`)
+  .optional()
+  .default([]);
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Menu Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Menu settings schema
+ */
+export const menuSettingsSchema = z
+  .object({
+    showImages: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+    showPrices: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+    showDescriptions: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+    showAllergens: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+    showNutritionInfo: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+    enableOrdering: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+    footerText: z.string().max(500).optional(),
+    socialLinks: z.record(z.string().url()).optional().default({}),
+  })
+  .optional()
+  .default({});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from menu settings schema
+ */
+export type MenuSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof menuSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Theme Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Theme settings schema
+ */
+export const themeSettingsSchema = z
+  .object({
+    borderRadius: z.number().int().min(0).max(50).optional(),
+    cardShadow: z.enum(['none', 'sm', 'md', 'lg']).optional(),
+    headerStyle: z.enum(['fixed', 'sticky', 'static']).optional(),
+    categoryLayout: z.enum(['grid', 'list', 'horizontal']).optional(),
+    productCardStyle: z.enum(['minimal', 'detailed', 'image-focused']).optional(),
+    enableAnimations: z.boolean().optional(),
+    cssVariables: z.record(z.string()).optional(),
+  })
+  .optional()
+  .default({});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from theme settings schema
+ */
+export type ThemeSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof themeSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Menu Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create menu schema
+ */
+export const createMenuSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema,
+  slug: optionalSlugSchema,
+  description: descriptionSchema,
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  themeId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  isDefault: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  settings: menuSettingsSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from create menu schema
+ */
+export type CreateMenuInput = z.infer<typeof createMenuSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update menu schema
+ */
+export const updateMenuSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema.optional(),
+  slug: slugSchema.optional(),
+  description: descriptionSchema,
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  themeId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  isDefault: z.boolean().optional(),
+  settings: menuSettingsSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from update menu schema
+ */
+export type UpdateMenuInput = z.infer<typeof updateMenuSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Publish menu schema

+export const publishMenuSchema = z.object({

+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from publish menu schema

+export type PublishMenuInput = z.infer<typeof publishMenuSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List menus query schema
+ */
+export const listMenusQuerySchema = z.object({
+  isPublished: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')

+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['name', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt', 'sortOrder']).optional().default('sortOrder'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('asc'),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list menus query schema
+ */
+export type ListMenusQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listMenusQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Category Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create category schema
+ */
+export const createCategorySchema = z.object({
+  menuId: cuidSchema,
+  parentId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  name: nameSchema,
+  slug: optionalSlugSchema,

+/**
+ * Inferred type from create category schema

+export type CreateCategoryInput = z.infer<typeof createCategorySchema>;
+
+/**

+
+/**
+ * List categories query schema

+export const listCategoriesQuerySchema = z.object({

+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  includeProducts: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Inferred type from list categories query schema

+export type ListCategoriesQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listCategoriesQuerySchema>;

+  carbohydrates: z.number().min(0).max(1000).optional(),
+  fat: z.number().min(0).max(1000).optional(),
+  fiber: z.number().min(0).max(1000).optional(),

+/**

+export const createProductSchema = z.object({

+  calories: z.number().int().min(0).max(10000).optional().nullable(),
+  spicyLevel: z.number().int().min(LIMITS.spicyLevel.min).max(LIMITS.spicyLevel.max).optional().nullable(),
+  tags: tagsSchema,

+  shortDescription: shortDescriptionSchema,
+  basePrice: optionalPriceSchema,
+  currency: z.string().length(3).toUpperCase().optional(),
+  image: urlSchema,
+  gallery: gallerySchema,
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
+  isAvailable: z.boolean().optional(),
+  isFeatured: z.boolean().optional(),
+  isChefRecommended: z.boolean().optional(),
+  preparationTime: z.number().int().min(LIMITS.preparationTime.min).max(LIMITS.preparationTime.max).optional().nullable(),
+  calories: z.number().int().min(0).max(10000).optional().nullable(),
+  spicyLevel: z.number().int().min(LIMITS.spicyLevel.min).max(LIMITS.spicyLevel.max).optional().nullable(),
+  tags: tagsSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+  allergenIds: z.array(cuidSchema).optional(),
+});
+
+/**

+export type UpdateProductInput = z.infer<typeof updateProductSchema>;

+/**

+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
