+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Generates a URL-friendly slug from a string
+ *
+ * @param text - Text to convert to slug
+ * @returns URL-friendly slug
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const slug = generateSlug('Kahvaltı Menüsü');
+ * // Returns: 'kahvalti-menusu'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateSlug(text: string): string {
+  return text
+    .toLowerCase()
+    .trim()
+    // Turkish character replacements
+    .replace(/ğ/g, 'g')
+    .replace(/ü/g, 'u')
+    .replace(/ş/g, 's')
+    .replace(/ı/g, 'i')
+    .replace(/ö/g, 'o')
+    .replace(/ç/g, 'c')
+    // General transformations
+    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '') // Remove special characters
+    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-') // Replace spaces and underscores with hyphens
+    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, ''); // Remove leading/trailing hyphens
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates and parses price input
+ *
+ * @param value - Price value (string or number)
+ * @returns Parsed price as number
+ * @throws ZodError if invalid
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const price = parsePrice('25.50');
+ * // Returns: 25.5
+ * ```
+ */
+export function parsePrice(value: string | number): number {
+  return priceSchema.parse(value);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates hex color format
+ *
+ * @param color - Color string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid hex color
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidHexColor('#FF5733');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidHexColor(color: string): boolean {
+  return HEX_COLOR_REGEX.test(color);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates slug format
+ *
+ * @param slug - Slug string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid slug
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidSlug('my-menu-slug');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidSlug(slug: string): boolean {
+  return SLUG_REGEX.test(slug);
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/menu/menu.service.ts b/src/modules/menu/menu.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bad464e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/menu/menu.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,794 @@
+/**
+ * Menu Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Menu module.
+ * Handles menu CRUD, publishing, and settings management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/menu/menu.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { MenuService } from '@/modules/menu/menu.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const menuService = resolve<MenuService>('MenuService');
+ *
+ * // Create a new menu
+ * const result = await menuService.create('org_123', {
+ *   name: 'Lunch Menu',
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import { MenuRepository, PaginatedResult } from '@/modules/menu/menu.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Menu,
+  MenuWithRelations,
+  CreateMenuRequest,
+  UpdateMenuRequest,
+  PublishMenuRequest,
+  ListMenusQuery,
+  MenuSettings,
+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.types';
+
+import {
+  createMenuSchema,
+  updateMenuSchema,
+  publishMenuSchema,
+  listMenusQuerySchema,
+  generateSlug,
+  type CreateMenuInput,
+  type UpdateMenuInput,
+  type PublishMenuInput,
+  type ListMenusQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create menu response
+ */
+export interface CreateMenuResponse {
+  /** Created menu */
+  menu: Menu;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update menu response
+ */
+export interface UpdateMenuResponse {
+  /** Updated menu */
+  menu: Menu;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Publish menu response
+ */
+export interface PublishMenuResponse {
+  /** Published menu */
+  menu: Menu;
+  /** QR code URL if generated */
+  qrCodeUrl?: string;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Unpublish menu response
+ */
+export interface UnpublishMenuResponse {
+  /** Unpublished menu */
+  menu: Menu;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update settings response
+ */
+export interface UpdateSettingsResponse {
+  /** Updated settings */
+  settings: MenuSettings;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Duplicate menu response
+ */
+export interface DuplicateMenuResponse {
+  /** Duplicated menu */
+  menu: Menu;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Menu Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Menu module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all menu-related business operations including:
+ * - Menu CRUD operations with tenant isolation
+ * - Publishing and unpublishing menus
+ * - Settings management
+ * - Menu duplication
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('MenuService') private menuService: MenuService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.menuService.create(req.orgId, req.body);
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class MenuService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('MenuRepository') private readonly repository: MenuRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists menus for an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of menus
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await menuService.list('org_123', {
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 10,
+   *   isPublished: true,
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListMenusQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Menu>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listMenusQuerySchema) as ListMenusQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAll(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists menu summaries (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of menu summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params?: Partial<ListMenusQuery>
+  ) {
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a menu by ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @returns Menu or null
+   */
+  async getById(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Menu | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a menu by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @returns Menu with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string
+  ): Promise<MenuWithRelations> {
+    const menu = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id, organizationId);
+
+    if (!menu) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Menu', id);
+    }
+
+    return menu;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a menu by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @returns Menu
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Menu> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a menu by slug.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Menu slug
+   * @returns Menu or null
+   */
+  async getBySlug(organizationId: string, slug: string): Promise<Menu | null> {
+    return this.repository.findBySlug(organizationId, slug);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets the default menu for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Default menu or null
+   */
+  async getDefaultMenu(organizationId: string): Promise<Menu | null> {
+    return this.repository.findDefaultMenu(organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets all published menus for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param branchId - Optional branch ID filter
+   * @returns Array of published menus
+   */
+  async getPublishedMenus(
+    organizationId: string,
+    branchId?: string
+  ): Promise<Menu[]> {
+    return this.repository.findPublished(organizationId, branchId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets menu settings.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @returns Menu settings
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getSettings(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<MenuSettings> {
+    const menu = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    return menu.settings;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts menus for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param isPublished - Optional published status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(organizationId: string, isPublished?: boolean): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(organizationId, isPublished);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new menu.
+   *
+   * Validates input, generates slug if not provided, creates menu,
+   * and emits creation event.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created menu response
+   * @throws {AppException} If slug already exists
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await menuService.create('org_123', {
+   *   name: 'Lunch Menu',
+   * });
+   * console.log('Created:', result.menu.id);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateMenuRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateMenuResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createMenuSchema) as CreateMenuInput;
+
+    // Generate slug if not provided
+    let slug = validated.slug;
+    if (!slug) {
+      slug = generateSlug(validated.name);
+      // Ensure uniqueness
+      let counter = 1;
+      const baseSlug = slug;
+      while (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug)) {
+        slug = `${baseSlug}-${counter}`;
+        counter++;
+      }
+    } else {
+      // Check if provided slug exists
+      if (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Menu slug', slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // If this is the first menu or marked as default, handle default status
+    const menuCount = await this.repository.count(organizationId);
+    const isDefault = validated.isDefault ?? menuCount === 0;
+
+    // Create menu
+    const menu = await this.repository.create(organizationId, {
+      name: validated.name,
+      slug,
+      description: validated.description || null,
+      branchId: validated.branchId || null,
+      themeId: validated.themeId || null,
+      isDefault,
+      settings: (validated.settings || {}) as Prisma.JsonValue,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    });
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.created', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: menu.name,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      menu,
+      message: 'Menu created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated menu response
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or slug conflicts
+   */
+  async update(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateMenuRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateMenuResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateMenuSchema) as UpdateMenuInput;
+
+    // Get current menu
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check slug uniqueness if changing
+    if (validated.slug && validated.slug !== current.slug) {
+      if (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, validated.slug, id)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Menu slug', validated.slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.name !== undefined) updateData.name = validated.name;
+    if (validated.slug !== undefined) updateData.slug = validated.slug;
+    if (validated.description !== undefined) updateData.description = validated.description;
+    if (validated.branchId !== undefined) updateData.branchId = validated.branchId;
+    if (validated.themeId !== undefined) updateData.themeId = validated.themeId;
+    if (validated.isDefault !== undefined) updateData.isDefault = validated.isDefault;
+    if (validated.settings !== undefined) updateData.settings = validated.settings;
+    if (validated.sortOrder !== undefined) updateData.sortOrder = validated.sortOrder;
+
+    // Update menu
+    const menu = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, updateData);
+
+    // If setting as default, unset others
+    if (validated.isDefault === true) {
+      await this.repository.setAsDefault(id, organizationId);
+    }
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.updated', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: updateData,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      menu,
+      message: 'Menu updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates menu settings.
+   *
+   * Settings are merged with existing settings, not replaced.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param settings - Settings to update
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated settings response
+   */
+  async updateSettings(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    settings: MenuSettings,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateSettingsResponse> {
+    // Get current settings
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    const previousSettings = current.settings;
+
+    // Update settings (merge)
+    const menu = await this.repository.updateSettings(
+      id,
+      organizationId,
+      settings as Prisma.JsonValue
+    );
+
+    // Emit settings update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.settings.updated', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      previousSettings,
+      newSettings: menu.settings,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      settings: menu.settings,
+      message: 'Menu settings updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Publishes a menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param options - Publish options
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Publish response
+   */
+  async publish(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    options?: PublishMenuRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<PublishMenuResponse> {
+    // Validate options if provided
+    const validated = options
+      ? (this.validateInput(options, publishMenuSchema) as PublishMenuInput)
+      : { generateQrCode: true };
+
+    // Get current menu
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if already published
+    if (current.isPublished) {
+      return {
+        menu: current,
+        message: 'Menu is already published.',
+      };
+    }
+
+    // Publish menu
+    const menu = await this.repository.publish(id, organizationId);
+
+    // TODO: Generate QR code if requested
+    // This would integrate with the order module's QR code service
+    let qrCodeUrl: string | undefined;
+    if (validated.generateQrCode) {
+      // QR code generation would be handled here
+      // qrCodeUrl = await qrCodeService.generate(menu);
+    }
+
+    // Emit publish event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.published', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      publishedAt: menu.publishedAt?.toISOString(),
+      qrCodeGenerated: validated.generateQrCode,
+      publishedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      menu,
+      qrCodeUrl,
+      message: 'Menu published successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Unpublishes a menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Unpublish response
+   */
+  async unpublish(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UnpublishMenuResponse> {
+    // Get current menu
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if already unpublished
+    if (!current.isPublished) {
+      return {
+        menu: current,
+        message: 'Menu is not published.',
+      };
+    }
+
+    // Unpublish menu
+    const menu = await this.repository.unpublish(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit unpublish event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.unpublished', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      unpublishedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      menu,
+      message: 'Menu unpublished successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Sets a menu as the default menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated menu
+   */
+  async setAsDefault(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Menu> {
+    const menu = await this.repository.setAsDefault(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.updated', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: { isDefault: true },
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return menu;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Duplicates a menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID to duplicate
+   * @param newName - Name for the duplicated menu
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Duplicate response
+   */
+  async duplicate(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    newName: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<DuplicateMenuResponse> {
+    // Verify original exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Generate slug for duplicate
+    let slug = generateSlug(newName);
+    let counter = 1;
+    const baseSlug = slug;
+    while (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug)) {
+      slug = `${baseSlug}-${counter}`;
+      counter++;
+    }
+
+    // Duplicate menu
+    const menu = await this.repository.duplicate(
+      id,
+      organizationId,
+      newName,
+      slug
+    );
+
+    // Emit creation event for duplicate
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.created', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: menu.name,
+      duplicatedFrom: id,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      menu,
+      message: 'Menu duplicated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes a menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or is the only menu
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * await menuService.delete('org_123', 'menu_456');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async delete(organizationId: string, id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<void> {
+    const menu = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if this is the only menu
+    const menuCount = await this.repository.count(organizationId);
+    if (menuCount === 1) {
+      throw new AppException('CANNOT_DELETE_ONLY_MENU', 400, {
+        message: 'Cannot delete the only menu. Create another menu first.',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Check if this is the default menu
+    if (menu.isDefault) {
+      throw new AppException('CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_MENU', 400, {
+        message: 'Cannot delete the default menu. Set another menu as default first.',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Soft delete
+    await this.repository.softDelete(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.deleted', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: menu.name,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted menu.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Menu ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Restored menu
+   */
+  async restore(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Menu> {
+    const menu = await this.repository.restore(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit restore event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('menu.restored', {
+      menuId: menu.id,
+      organizationId,
+      name: menu.name,
+      restoredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return menu;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a slug is available.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isSlugAvailable(
+    organizationId: string,
+    slug: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, slug, excludeId));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/menu/module.json b/src/modules/menu/module.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6e4dca8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/menu/module.json
@@ -0,0 +1,178 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "menu",
+  "name": "Menu Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Digital menu management module providing menu, category, product, variant, and modifier CRUD operations with publishing and QR code support",
+
+  "type": "feature",
+  "category": "core-feature",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "media"],
+    "optional": ["ai"]
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "menu.created",
+      "menu.updated",
+      "menu.deleted",
+      "menu.published",
+      "menu.unpublished",
+      "category.created",
+      "category.updated",
+      "category.deleted",
+      "category.reordered",
+      "product.created",
+      "product.updated",
+      "product.deleted",
+      "product.availability.changed",
+      "variant.created",
+      "variant.updated",
+      "variant.deleted",
+      "modifier.created",
+      "modifier.updated",
+      "modifier.deleted",
+      "theme.created",
+      "theme.updated",
+      "theme.deleted"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeMenuCreate",
+      "afterMenuCreate",
+      "beforeMenuPublish",
+      "afterMenuPublish",
+      "beforeProductCreate",
+      "afterProductCreate",
+      "beforeProductUpdate",
+      "afterProductUpdate",
+      "beforeCategoryCreate",
+      "afterCategoryCreate"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "menu:read",
+      "menu:create",
+      "menu:update",
+      "menu:delete",
+      "menu:publish",
+      "category:read",
+      "category:create",
+      "category:update",
+      "category:delete",
+      "product:read",
+      "product:create",
+      "product:update",
+      "product:delete",
+      "variant:read",
+      "variant:create",
+      "variant:update",
+      "variant:delete",
+      "modifier:read",
+      "modifier:create",
+      "modifier:update",
+      "modifier:delete",
+      "theme:read",
+      "theme:create",
+      "theme:update",
+      "theme:delete"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "MenuService",
+      "CategoryService",
+      "ProductService",
+      "VariantService",
+      "ModifierService",
+      "ThemeService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read", "media:upload"],
+    "events": ["organization.created"]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "free",
+    "features": {
+      "free": ["basic_menu", "single_menu", "max_50_products"],
+      "starter": ["multiple_menus", "max_200_products", "custom_themes"],
+      "professional": ["unlimited_products", "advanced_modifiers", "nutrition_info"],
+      "business": ["ai_descriptions", "bulk_import", "analytics"],
+      "enterprise": ["api_access", "white_label", "custom_integrations"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Menus",
+      "icon": "ph-list-bullets",
+      "route": "/admin/menus",
+      "order": 20,
+      "hidden": false
+    },
+    "submenu": [
+      {
+        "label": "All Menus",
+        "route": "/admin/menus",
+        "icon": "ph-list",
+        "order": 1
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Categories",
+        "route": "/admin/menus/categories",
+        "icon": "ph-folders",
+        "order": 2
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Products",
+        "route": "/admin/menus/products",
+        "icon": "ph-package",
+        "order": 3
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Themes",
+        "route": "/admin/menus/themes",
+        "icon": "ph-palette",
+        "order": 4
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
+      "enableVariants": true,
+      "enableModifiers": true,
+      "enableNutritionInfo": false,
+      "enableAllergens": true,
+      "maxCategoriesPerMenu": 50,
+      "maxProductsPerCategory": 100,
+      "maxVariantsPerProduct": 10,
+      "maxModifiersPerProduct": 20,
+      "maxImagesPerProduct": 10,
+      "imageMaxSizeKb": 2048,
+      "slugAutoGenerate": true
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/menu/product.service.ts b/src/modules/menu/product.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..392b246
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/menu/product.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,1337 @@
+/**
+ * Product Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Product module.
+ * Handles product CRUD, variants, modifiers, allergens, and nutrition info.
+ *
+ * @module modules/menu/product.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { ProductService } from '@/modules/menu/product.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const productService = resolve<ProductService>('ProductService');
+ *
+ * // Create a new product with variants
+ * const result = await productService.create('org_123', {
+ *   categoryId: 'cat_456',
+ *   name: 'Delicious Burger',
+ *   basePrice: 150,
+ *   variants: [
+ *     { name: 'Regular', price: 150 },
+ *     { name: 'Large', price: 200 },
+ *   ],
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import {
+  ProductRepository,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  type CreateProductData,
+  type CreateVariantData,
+  type CreateModifierData,
+  type CreateNutritionInfoData,
+} from '@/modules/menu/product.repository';
+import { CategoryRepository } from '@/modules/menu/category.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Product,
+  ProductWithRelations,
+  ProductVariant,
+  ProductModifier,
+  NutritionInfo,
+  CreateProductRequest,
+  UpdateProductRequest,
+  CreateVariantRequest,
+  UpdateVariantRequest,
+  CreateModifierRequest,
+  UpdateModifierRequest,
+  CreateNutritionInfoRequest,
+  UpdateNutritionInfoRequest,
+  ListProductsQuery,
+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.types';
+
+import {
+  createProductSchema,
+  updateProductSchema,
+  createVariantSchema,
+  updateVariantSchema,
+  createModifierSchema,
+  updateModifierSchema,
+  createNutritionInfoSchema,
+  updateNutritionInfoSchema,
+  listProductsQuerySchema,
+  generateSlug,
+  type CreateProductInput,
+  type UpdateProductInput,
+  type CreateVariantInput,
+  type UpdateVariantInput,
+  type CreateModifierInput,
+  type UpdateModifierInput,
+  type CreateNutritionInfoInput,
+  type ListProductsQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/menu/menu.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create product response
+ */
+export interface CreateProductResponse {
+  /** Created product */
+  product: ProductWithRelations;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update product response
+ */
+export interface UpdateProductResponse {
+  /** Updated product */
+  product: Product;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create variant response
+ */
+export interface CreateVariantResponse {
+  /** Created variant */
+  variant: ProductVariant;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update variant response
+ */
+export interface UpdateVariantResponse {
+  /** Updated variant */
+  variant: ProductVariant;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create modifier response
+ */
+export interface CreateModifierResponse {
+  /** Created modifier */
+  modifier: ProductModifier;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update modifier response
+ */
+export interface UpdateModifierResponse {
+  /** Updated modifier */
+  modifier: ProductModifier;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update nutrition info response
+ */
+export interface UpdateNutritionInfoResponse {
+  /** Updated nutrition info */
+  nutritionInfo: NutritionInfo;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Reorder products response
+ */
+export interface ReorderProductsResponse {
+  /** Reordered product count */
+  count: number;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update availability response
+ */
+export interface UpdateAvailabilityResponse {
+  /** Updated product */
+  product: Product;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Product Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Product module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all product-related business operations including:
+ * - Product CRUD operations with tenant isolation
+ * - Variant management (size/portion options)
+ * - Modifier management (add-ons)
+ * - Allergen associations
+ * - Nutrition information
+ * - Availability toggling
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('ProductService') private productService: ProductService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.productService.create(req.orgId, req.body);
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class ProductService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('ProductRepository') private readonly repository: ProductRepository,
+    @inject('CategoryRepository') private readonly categoryRepository: CategoryRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists products for an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of products
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await productService.list('org_123', {
+   *   categoryId: 'cat_456',
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 20,
+   *   isActive: true,
+   *   include: ['variants', 'modifiers'],
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListProductsQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Product>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listProductsQuerySchema) as ListProductsQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAll(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists products with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of products with relations
+   */
+  async listWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListProductsQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<ProductWithRelations>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listProductsQuerySchema) as ListProductsQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAllWithRelations(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists product summaries for a category (for dropdowns, etc.).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Optional category ID
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of product summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId?: string,
+    params?: Partial<ListProductsQuery>
+  ) {
+    // Verify category exists if provided
+    if (categoryId) {
+      await this.categoryRepository.findByIdOrThrow(categoryId, organizationId);
+    }
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, categoryId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets products by category ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Category ID
+   * @returns Array of products
+   */
+  async getByCategoryId(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId: string
+  ): Promise<Product[]> {
+    // Verify category exists and belongs to org
+    await this.categoryRepository.findByIdOrThrow(categoryId, organizationId);
+    return this.repository.findByCategoryId(organizationId, categoryId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a product by ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @returns Product or null
+   */
+  async getById(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Product | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a product by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @returns Product with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string
+  ): Promise<ProductWithRelations> {
+    const product = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id, organizationId);
+
+    if (!product) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Product', id);
+    }
+
+    return product;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a product by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @returns Product
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Product> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a product by slug within a category.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Category ID
+   * @param slug - Product slug
+   * @returns Product or null
+   */
+  async getBySlug(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId: string,
+    slug: string
+  ): Promise<Product | null> {
+    return this.repository.findBySlug(organizationId, categoryId, slug);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets featured products for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param limit - Maximum number of products to return
+   * @returns Array of featured products
+   */
+  async getFeatured(organizationId: string, limit = 10): Promise<Product[]> {
+    return this.repository.findFeatured(organizationId, limit);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts products for an organization or category.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Optional category ID
+   * @param isActive - Optional active status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId?: string,
+    isActive?: boolean
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(organizationId, categoryId, isActive);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new product with optional variants, modifiers, allergens, and nutrition info.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created product response
+   * @throws {AppException} If category not found or slug already exists
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await productService.create('org_123', {
+   *   categoryId: 'cat_456',
+   *   name: 'Delicious Burger',
+   *   basePrice: 150,
+   *   variants: [
+   *     { name: 'Regular', price: 150 },
+   *     { name: 'Large', price: 200 },
+   *   ],
+   *   modifiers: [
+   *     { name: 'Extra Cheese', price: 20 },
+   *     { name: 'No Onions', price: 0 },
+   *   ],
+   *   allergenIds: ['allergen_gluten', 'allergen_dairy'],
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateProductRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateProductResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createProductSchema) as CreateProductInput;
+
+    // Verify category exists and belongs to org
+    const category = await this.categoryRepository.findByIdOrThrow(
+      validated.categoryId,
+      organizationId
+    );
+
+    // Generate slug if not provided
+    let slug = validated.slug;
+    if (!slug) {
+      slug = generateSlug(validated.name);
+      // Ensure uniqueness within category
+      let counter = 1;
+      const baseSlug = slug;
+      while (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, validated.categoryId, slug)) {
+        slug = `${baseSlug}-${counter}`;
+        counter++;
+      }
+    } else {
+      // Check if provided slug exists
+      if (await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, validated.categoryId, slug)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Product slug', slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Build product data
+    const productData: CreateProductData = {
+      categoryId: validated.categoryId,
+      name: validated.name,
+      slug,
+      description: validated.description || null,
+      shortDescription: validated.shortDescription || null,
+      basePrice: validated.basePrice,
+      currency: validated.currency ?? 'TRY',
+      image: validated.image || null,
+      gallery: validated.gallery ?? [],
+      isActive: validated.isActive ?? true,
+      isAvailable: validated.isAvailable ?? true,
+      isFeatured: validated.isFeatured ?? false,
+      isChefRecommended: validated.isChefRecommended ?? false,
+      preparationTime: validated.preparationTime ?? null,
+      calories: validated.calories ?? null,
+      spicyLevel: validated.spicyLevel ?? null,
+      tags: validated.tags ?? [],
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    };
+
+    // Build variants data
+    const variantsData = validated.variants?.map((v) => ({
+      name: v.name,
+      price: v.price,
+      isDefault: v.isDefault ?? false,
+      isAvailable: v.isAvailable ?? true,
+      sortOrder: v.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    }));
+
+    // Build modifiers data
+    const modifiersData = validated.modifiers?.map((m) => ({
+      name: m.name,
+      price: m.price,
+      isDefault: m.isDefault ?? false,
+      isRequired: m.isRequired ?? false,
+      maxQuantity: m.maxQuantity ?? 1,
+      sortOrder: m.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    }));
+
+    // Build nutrition info data
+    const nutritionInfoData = validated.nutritionInfo
+      ? {
+          calories: validated.nutritionInfo.calories ?? null,
+          protein: validated.nutritionInfo.protein ?? null,
+          carbohydrates: validated.nutritionInfo.carbohydrates ?? null,
+          fat: validated.nutritionInfo.fat ?? null,
+          fiber: validated.nutritionInfo.fiber ?? null,
+          sodium: validated.nutritionInfo.sodium ?? null,
+          sugar: validated.nutritionInfo.sugar ?? null,
+          servingSize: validated.nutritionInfo.servingSize ?? null,
+          servingUnit: validated.nutritionInfo.servingUnit ?? null,
+        }
+      : undefined;
+
+    // Create product with relations
+    const product = await this.repository.createWithRelations(
+      organizationId,
+      productData,
+      variantsData,
+      modifiersData,
+      validated.allergenIds ?? [],
+      nutritionInfoData
+    );
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.created', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      categoryId: product.categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      name: product.name,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      product,
+      message: 'Product created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated product response
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or slug conflicts
+   */
+  async update(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateProductRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateProductResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateProductSchema) as UpdateProductInput;
+
+    // Get current product
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Verify new category if changing
+    if (validated.categoryId && validated.categoryId !== current.categoryId) {
+      await this.categoryRepository.findByIdOrThrow(validated.categoryId, organizationId);
+    }
+
+    // Check slug uniqueness if changing
+    const targetCategoryId = validated.categoryId ?? current.categoryId;
+    if (validated.slug && validated.slug !== current.slug) {
+      if (
+        await this.repository.slugExists(
+          organizationId,
+          targetCategoryId,
+          validated.slug,
+          id
+        )
+      ) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Product slug', validated.slug);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.categoryId !== undefined) updateData.categoryId = validated.categoryId;
+    if (validated.name !== undefined) updateData.name = validated.name;
+    if (validated.slug !== undefined) updateData.slug = validated.slug;
+    if (validated.description !== undefined) updateData.description = validated.description;
+    if (validated.shortDescription !== undefined) updateData.shortDescription = validated.shortDescription;
+    if (validated.basePrice !== undefined) updateData.basePrice = validated.basePrice;
+    if (validated.currency !== undefined) updateData.currency = validated.currency;
+    if (validated.image !== undefined) updateData.image = validated.image;
+    if (validated.gallery !== undefined) updateData.gallery = validated.gallery;
+    if (validated.isActive !== undefined) updateData.isActive = validated.isActive;
+    if (validated.isAvailable !== undefined) updateData.isAvailable = validated.isAvailable;
+    if (validated.isFeatured !== undefined) updateData.isFeatured = validated.isFeatured;
+    if (validated.isChefRecommended !== undefined) updateData.isChefRecommended = validated.isChefRecommended;
+    if (validated.preparationTime !== undefined) updateData.preparationTime = validated.preparationTime;
+    if (validated.calories !== undefined) updateData.calories = validated.calories;
+    if (validated.spicyLevel !== undefined) updateData.spicyLevel = validated.spicyLevel;
+    if (validated.tags !== undefined) updateData.tags = validated.tags;
+    if (validated.sortOrder !== undefined) updateData.sortOrder = validated.sortOrder;
+
+    // Update product
+    const product = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, updateData);
+
+    // Update allergens if provided
+    if (validated.allergenIds !== undefined) {
+      await this.repository.setAllergens(id, validated.allergenIds);
+    }
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.updated', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      categoryId: product.categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: updateData,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      product,
+      message: 'Product updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates product availability.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param isAvailable - New availability status
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated product response
+   */
+  async updateAvailability(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    isAvailable: boolean,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateAvailabilityResponse> {
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Skip if no change
+    if (current.isAvailable === isAvailable) {
+      return {
+        product: current,
+        message: `Product is already ${isAvailable ? 'available' : 'unavailable'}.`,
+      };
+    }
+
+    const product = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, { isAvailable });
+
+    // Emit availability changed event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.availability.changed', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      organizationId,
+      previousAvailability: current.isAvailable,
+      newAvailability: isAvailable,
+      changedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      product,
+      message: `Product is now ${isAvailable ? 'available' : 'unavailable'}.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Toggles product availability.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated product response
+   */
+  async toggleAvailability(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateAvailabilityResponse> {
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    return this.updateAvailability(organizationId, id, !current.isAvailable, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Toggles product featured status.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated product
+   */
+  async toggleFeatured(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Product> {
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    const product = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, {
+      isFeatured: !current.isFeatured,
+    });
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.updated', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      categoryId: product.categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: { isFeatured: product.isFeatured },
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return product;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Reorders products within a category.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Category ID
+   * @param items - Product ID to sort order mapping
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Reorder response
+   */
+  async reorder(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId: string,
+    items: Array<{ id: string; sortOrder: number }>,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ReorderProductsResponse> {
+    // Verify category exists
+    await this.categoryRepository.findByIdOrThrow(categoryId, organizationId);
+
+    // Reorder products
+    await this.repository.reorder(organizationId, categoryId, items);
+
+    // Emit reorder event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.reordered', {
+      categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      items,
+      reorderedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      count: items.length,
+      message: 'Products reordered successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async delete(organizationId: string, id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<void> {
+    const product = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Soft delete
+    await this.repository.softDelete(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.deleted', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      categoryId: product.categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      name: product.name,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Product ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Restored product
+   */
+  async restore(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Product> {
+    const product = await this.repository.restore(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit restore event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.restored', {
+      productId: product.id,
+      categoryId: product.categoryId,
+      organizationId,
+      name: product.name,
+      restoredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return product;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Variant Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets all variants for a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @returns Array of variants
+   */
+  async getVariants(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string
+  ): Promise<ProductVariant[]> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+    return this.repository.findVariants(productId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a product variant.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create variant request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created variant response
+   */
+  async createVariant(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateVariantRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateVariantResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createVariantSchema) as CreateVariantInput;
+
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(validated.productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Create variant
+    const variant = await this.repository.createVariant({
+      productId: validated.productId,
+      name: validated.name,
+      price: validated.price,
+      isDefault: validated.isDefault ?? false,
+      isAvailable: validated.isAvailable ?? true,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    });
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.variant.created', {
+      variantId: variant.id,
+      productId: variant.productId,
+      organizationId,
+      name: variant.name,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      variant,
+      message: 'Variant created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a product variant.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param variantId - Variant ID
+   * @param data - Update variant request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated variant response
+   */
+  async updateVariant(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    variantId: string,
+    data: UpdateVariantRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateVariantResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateVariantSchema) as UpdateVariantInput;
+
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Update variant
+    const variant = await this.repository.updateVariant(variantId, productId, {
+      name: validated.name,
+      price: validated.price,
+      isDefault: validated.isDefault,
+      isAvailable: validated.isAvailable,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder,
+    });
+
+    // If setting as default, unset others
+    if (validated.isDefault === true) {
+      await this.repository.setDefaultVariant(variantId, productId);
+    }
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.variant.updated', {
+      variantId: variant.id,
+      productId: variant.productId,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: validated,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      variant,
+      message: 'Variant updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes a product variant.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param variantId - Variant ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async deleteVariant(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    variantId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Delete variant
+    await this.repository.deleteVariant(variantId, productId);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.variant.deleted', {
+      variantId,
+      productId,
+      organizationId,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Modifier Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets all modifiers for a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @returns Array of modifiers
+   */
+  async getModifiers(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string
+  ): Promise<ProductModifier[]> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+    return this.repository.findModifiers(productId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a product modifier.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create modifier request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created modifier response
+   */
+  async createModifier(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateModifierRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateModifierResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createModifierSchema) as CreateModifierInput;
+
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(validated.productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Create modifier
+    const modifier = await this.repository.createModifier({
+      productId: validated.productId,
+      name: validated.name,
+      price: validated.price,
+      isDefault: validated.isDefault ?? false,
+      isRequired: validated.isRequired ?? false,
+      maxQuantity: validated.maxQuantity ?? 1,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    });
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.modifier.created', {
+      modifierId: modifier.id,
+      productId: modifier.productId,
+      organizationId,
+      name: modifier.name,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      modifier,
+      message: 'Modifier created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a product modifier.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param modifierId - Modifier ID
+   * @param data - Update modifier request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated modifier response
+   */
+  async updateModifier(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    modifierId: string,
+    data: UpdateModifierRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateModifierResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateModifierSchema) as UpdateModifierInput;
+
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Update modifier
+    const modifier = await this.repository.updateModifier(modifierId, productId, {
+      name: validated.name,
+      price: validated.price,
+      isDefault: validated.isDefault,
+      isRequired: validated.isRequired,
+      maxQuantity: validated.maxQuantity,
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder,
+    });
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.modifier.updated', {
+      modifierId: modifier.id,
+      productId: modifier.productId,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: validated,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      modifier,
+      message: 'Modifier updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes a product modifier.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param modifierId - Modifier ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async deleteModifier(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    modifierId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Delete modifier
+    await this.repository.deleteModifier(modifierId, productId);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.modifier.deleted', {
+      modifierId,
+      productId,
+      organizationId,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Allergen Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Sets allergens for a product (replaces existing).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param allergenIds - Array of allergen IDs
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async setAllergens(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    allergenIds: string[],
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Set allergens
+    await this.repository.setAllergens(productId, allergenIds);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.allergens.updated', {
+      productId,
+      organizationId,
+      allergenIds,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Adds an allergen to a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param allergenId - Allergen ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async addAllergen(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    allergenId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Add allergen
+    await this.repository.addAllergen(productId, allergenId);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.allergen.added', {
+      productId,
+      allergenId,
+      organizationId,
+      addedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Removes an allergen from a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param allergenId - Allergen ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async removeAllergen(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    allergenId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Remove allergen
+    await this.repository.removeAllergen(productId, allergenId);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.allergen.removed', {
+      productId,
+      allergenId,
+      organizationId,
+      removedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Nutrition Info Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets nutrition info for a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @returns Nutrition info or null
+   */
+  async getNutritionInfo(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string
+  ): Promise<NutritionInfo | null> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+    return this.repository.findNutritionInfo(productId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates nutrition info for a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param data - Nutrition info data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated nutrition info response
+   */
+  async updateNutritionInfo(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    data: CreateNutritionInfoRequest | UpdateNutritionInfoRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateNutritionInfoResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createNutritionInfoSchema) as CreateNutritionInfoInput;
+
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Upsert nutrition info
+    const nutritionInfo = await this.repository.upsertNutritionInfo(productId, {
+      calories: validated.calories ?? null,
+      protein: validated.protein ?? null,
+      carbohydrates: validated.carbohydrates ?? null,
+      fat: validated.fat ?? null,
+      fiber: validated.fiber ?? null,
+      sodium: validated.sodium ?? null,
+      sugar: validated.sugar ?? null,
+      servingSize: validated.servingSize ?? null,
+      servingUnit: validated.servingUnit ?? null,
+    });
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.nutritionInfo.updated', {
+      productId,
+      organizationId,
+      nutritionInfo,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      nutritionInfo,
+      message: 'Nutrition info updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Deletes nutrition info for a product.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param productId - Product ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   */
+  async deleteNutritionInfo(
+    organizationId: string,
+    productId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify product exists
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(productId, organizationId);
+
+    // Delete nutrition info
+    await this.repository.deleteNutritionInfo(productId);
+
+    // Emit event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('product.nutritionInfo.deleted', {
+      productId,
+      organizationId,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a slug is available within a category.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param categoryId - Category ID
+   * @param slug - Slug to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isSlugAvailable(
+    organizationId: string,
+    categoryId: string,
+    slug: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.slugExists(organizationId, categoryId, slug, excludeId));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

+/**
+ * Order Module Public API
+ *
+ * Centralized exports for the Order module.
+ * Import from this file when using order module functionality
+ * from other parts of the application.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   OrderModule,
+ *   OrderService,
+ *   orderRoutes,
+ *   type Order,
+ *   type CreateOrderRequest,
+ * } from '@/modules/order';
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Definition
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { OrderModule, default } from '@/modules/order/order.module';
+export type {
+  OrderModuleContext,
+  OrderModuleHooks,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.module';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Services
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { OrderService } from '@/modules/order/order.service';
+export type {
+  CreateOrderResponse,
+  UpdateOrderResponse,
+  ChangeStatusResponse,
+  AddItemResponse,
+  UpdateItemResponse,
+  CancelOrderResponse,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.service';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Repositories
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { OrderRepository } from '@/modules/order/order.repository';
+export type {
+  PaginatedResult,
+  OrderSummary,
+  CreateOrderData,
+  CreateOrderItemData,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.repository';
+
+export { TableRepository } from '@/modules/order/table.repository';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Controllers
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export { OrderController } from '@/modules/order/order.controller';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Routes
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  orderRoutes,
+  tableRoutes,
+  zoneRoutes,
+  qrcodeRoutes,
+  customerRoutes,
+  serviceRequestRoutes,
+  feedbackRoutes,
+  orderModuleRoutes,
+  buildOrderApiPath,
+  buildOrderAdminPath,
+  buildTableApiPath,
+  buildZoneApiPath,
+  buildQRCodeApiPath,
+  buildCustomerApiPath,
+  buildServiceRequestApiPath,
+  buildFeedbackApiPath,
+  isPublicOrderRoute,
+  isProtectedOrderRoute,
+  orderEndpoints,
+  tableEndpoints,
+  qrcodeEndpoints,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.routes';
+export type {
+  OrderRouteConfig,
+  TableRouteConfig,
+  ZoneRouteConfig,
+  QRCodeRouteConfig,
+  CustomerRouteConfig,
+  ServiceRequestRouteConfig,
+  FeedbackRouteConfig,
+  OrderModuleRouteConfig,
+  OrderEndpointMetadata,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.routes';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Events
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  ORDER_MODULE_EVENTS,
+  emitOrderCreated,
+  emitOrderUpdated,
+  emitOrderStatusChanged,
+  emitOrderConfirmed,
+  emitOrderCompleted,
+  emitOrderCancelled,
+  emitOrderItemAdded,
+  emitTableCreated,
+  emitTableStatusChanged,
+  emitQRCodeScanned,
+  emitServiceRequested,
+  emitFeedbackSubmitted,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.events';
+export type {
+  OrderModuleEvents,
+  OrderModuleEventName,
+  BaseEventPayload,
+  OrderCreatedEventPayload,
+  OrderUpdatedEventPayload,
+  OrderStatusChangedEventPayload,
+  OrderConfirmedEventPayload,
+  OrderPreparingEventPayload,
+  OrderReadyEventPayload,
+  OrderDeliveredEventPayload,
+  OrderCompletedEventPayload,
+  OrderCancelledEventPayload,
+  OrderItemAddedEventPayload,
+  OrderItemUpdatedEventPayload,
+  OrderItemRemovedEventPayload,
+  OrderItemStatusChangedEventPayload,
+  TableCreatedEventPayload,
+  TableUpdatedEventPayload,
+  TableDeletedEventPayload,
+  TableStatusChangedEventPayload,
+  ZoneCreatedEventPayload,

+} from '@/modules/order/order.events';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types - Core Entities
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export type {
+  // Enum types
+  OrderStatus,

+  OrderItemStatus,
+  TableStatus,

+
+  // Zone types
+  Zone,

+
+  // Table types

+
+  // QR Code types

+
+  // Order types
+  Order,

+  CreateOrderItemRequest,
+  UpdateOrderRequest,

+  AddOrderItemRequest,
+  UpdateOrderItemRequest,
+  ListOrdersQuery,
+
+  // Customer types
+  Customer,
+  CustomerWithRelations,
+  CreateCustomerRequest,
+  UpdateCustomerRequest,
+  ListCustomersQuery,
+
+  // Service request types
+  ServiceRequest,
+  ServiceRequestWithRelations,
+  CreateServiceRequest,
+  ListServiceRequestsQuery,
+
+  // Feedback types
+  Feedback,
+  FeedbackWithRelations,
+  CreateFeedbackRequest,
+  ListFeedbackQuery,
+
+  // Loyalty types
+  LoyaltyPoint,
+
+  // Response types
+  OrderResponse,
+  TableResponse,
+  OrderStatistics,
+  KitchenOrder,
+
+  // Module settings
+  OrderModuleSettings,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types - Event Payloads (from types file)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export type {
+  OrderCreatedEvent,
+  OrderStatusChangedEvent,
+  TableStatusChangedEvent,
+  QRCodeScannedEvent,
+  ServiceRequestedEvent,
+  FeedbackSubmittedEvent,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types - Hook Contexts (from types file)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export type {
+  BeforeOrderCreateContext,
+  AfterOrderCreateContext,
+  BeforeStatusChangeContext,
+  AfterStatusChangeContext,
+  BeforeItemAddContext,
+  AfterItemAddContext,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Schemas (Zod validation)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  // Order schemas
+  createOrderSchema,
+  updateOrderSchema,
+  changeOrderStatusSchema,
+  listOrdersQuerySchema,
+  generateOrderNumber,
+  calculateOrderTotals,
+  isValidStatusTransition,
+
+  // Order item schemas
+  createOrderItemSchema,
+  addOrderItemSchema,
+  updateOrderItemSchema,
+
+  // Table schemas
+  createTableSchema,
+  updateTableSchema,
+  changeTableStatusSchema,
+  listTablesQuerySchema,
+
+  // Zone schemas
+  createZoneSchema,
+  updateZoneSchema,
+  listZonesQuerySchema,
+
+  // QR Code schemas
+  createQRCodeSchema,
+  updateQRCodeSchema,
+  listQRCodesQuerySchema,
+
+  // Customer schemas
+  createCustomerSchema,
+  updateCustomerSchema,
+  listCustomersQuerySchema,
+
+  // Service request schemas
+  createServiceRequestSchema,
+  listServiceRequestsQuerySchema,
+
+  // Feedback schemas
+  createFeedbackSchema,
+  listFeedbackQuerySchema,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.schema';
+
+export type {
+  CreateOrderInput,
+  UpdateOrderInput,
+  ChangeOrderStatusInput,
+  ListOrdersQueryInput,
+  CreateOrderItemInput,
+  AddOrderItemInput,
+  UpdateOrderItemInput,
+  CreateTableInput,
+  UpdateTableInput,
+  ChangeTableStatusInput,
+  ListTablesQueryInput,
+  CreateZoneInput,
+  UpdateZoneInput,
+  ListZonesQueryInput,
+  CreateQRCodeInput,
+  UpdateQRCodeInput,
+  ListQRCodesQueryInput,
+  CreateCustomerInput,
+  UpdateCustomerInput,
+  ListCustomersQueryInput,
+  CreateServiceRequestInput,
+  ListServiceRequestsQueryInput,
+  CreateFeedbackInput,
+  ListFeedbackQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.schema';

diff --git a/src/modules/order/module.json b/src/modules/order/module.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..18046cf
