+++ b/src/modules/order/module.json
@@ -0,0 +1,195 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
+  "id": "order",
+  "name": "Order Module",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Order management module providing table, zone, QR code, order, and customer management with status workflow support",
+
+  "type": "feature",
+  "category": "core-feature",
+
+  "author": {
+    "name": "E-Menum Team",
+    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
+  },
+
+  "compatibility": {
+    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
+    "node": ">=20.0.0"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "menu"],
+    "optional": ["notification"]
+  },
+
+  "provides": {
+    "routes": true,
+    "events": [
+      "order.created",
+      "order.updated",
+      "order.confirmed",
+      "order.preparing",
+      "order.ready",
+      "order.delivered",
+      "order.completed",
+      "order.cancelled",
+      "order.item.added",
+      "order.item.updated",
+      "order.item.removed",
+      "table.created",
+      "table.updated",
+      "table.deleted",
+      "table.status.changed",
+      "zone.created",
+      "zone.updated",
+      "zone.deleted",
+      "qrcode.created",
+      "qrcode.scanned",
+      "qrcode.deleted",
+      "customer.created",
+      "customer.updated",
+      "service.requested",
+      "service.resolved",
+      "feedback.submitted"
+    ],
+    "hooks": [
+      "beforeOrderCreate",
+      "afterOrderCreate",
+      "beforeStatusChange",
+      "afterStatusChange",
+      "beforeItemAdd",
+      "afterItemAdd",
+      "beforeTableCreate",
+      "afterTableCreate",
+      "beforeQRCodeGenerate",
+      "afterQRCodeGenerate"
+    ],
+    "permissions": [
+      "order:read",
+      "order:create",
+      "order:update",
+      "order:delete",
+      "order:manage",
+      "table:read",
+      "table:create",
+      "table:update",
+      "table:delete",
+      "table:manage",
+      "zone:read",
+      "zone:create",
+      "zone:update",
+      "zone:delete",
+      "qrcode:read",
+      "qrcode:create",
+      "qrcode:delete",
+      "customer:read",
+      "customer:create",
+      "customer:update",
+      "customer:delete",
+      "feedback:read",
+      "feedback:manage",
+      "service:read",
+      "service:manage"
+    ],
+    "services": [
+      "OrderService",
+      "TableService",
+      "ZoneService",
+      "QRCodeService",
+      "CustomerService",
+      "ServiceRequestService",
+      "FeedbackService"
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "requires": {
+    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read", "menu:read"],
+    "events": ["organization.created", "menu.published"]
+  },
+
+  "tier": {
+    "minimum": "starter",
+    "features": {
+      "starter": ["basic_orders", "max_500_orders_month", "service_requests"],
+      "professional": ["table_management", "kitchen_display", "waiter_app", "max_2500_orders_month"],
+      "business": ["advanced_analytics", "loyalty_program", "max_10000_orders_month"],
+      "enterprise": ["unlimited_orders", "custom_workflows", "api_access"]
+    }
+  },
+
+  "lifecycle": {
+    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
+    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
+    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
+    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
+    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
+  },
+
+  "admin": {
+    "menu": {
+      "label": "Orders",
+      "icon": "ph-receipt",
+      "route": "/admin/orders",
+      "order": 30,
+      "hidden": false
+    },
+    "submenu": [
+      {
+        "label": "All Orders",
+        "route": "/admin/orders",
+        "icon": "ph-list-numbers",
+        "order": 1
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Tables",
+        "route": "/admin/orders/tables",
+        "icon": "ph-table",
+        "order": 2
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Zones",
+        "route": "/admin/orders/zones",
+        "icon": "ph-squares-four",
+        "order": 3
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "QR Codes",
+        "route": "/admin/orders/qrcodes",
+        "icon": "ph-qr-code",
+        "order": 4
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Customers",
+        "route": "/admin/orders/customers",
+        "icon": "ph-users",
+        "order": 5
+      },
+      {
+        "label": "Feedback",
+        "route": "/admin/orders/feedback",
+        "icon": "ph-chat-circle-text",
+        "order": 6
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "settings": {
+    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
+    "defaults": {
+      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
+      "orderNumberPrefix": "ORD",
+      "autoCompleteDelayMinutes": 30,
+      "enableTableOrdering": true,
+      "enableTakeaway": true,
+      "enableDelivery": false,
+      "enableServiceRequests": true,
+      "requireCustomerInfo": false,
+      "enableFeedback": true,
+      "feedbackReminderDelayMinutes": 60,
+      "taxRate": 10,
+      "maxItemsPerOrder": 50,
+      "maxOrderNoteLength": 500
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/order/order.controller.ts b/src/modules/order/order.controller.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..543a208
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/order/order.controller.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,811 @@
+/**
+ * Order Module Controller
+ *
+ * REST API controller for the Order module including:
+ * - Order CRUD operations
+ * - Status workflow management
+ * - Order item management
+ * - Kitchen display endpoints
+ *
+ * All endpoints follow the API contracts defined in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/order.controller
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List orders
+ * GET /api/v1/orders
+ *
+ * // Create order
+ * POST /api/v1/orders
+ *
+ * // Change order status
+ * PATCH /api/v1/orders/:id/status
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import {
+  JsonController,
+  Get,
+  Post,
+  Patch,
+  Delete,
+  Body,
+  Param,
+  QueryParams,
+  HttpCode,
+} from 'routing-controllers';
+
+import { BaseController, ApiResponse, PaginatedApiResponse } from '@/core/base/base.controller';
+import { CurrentUser, CurrentOrg, Authorized } from '@/shared/decorators';
+import { AuthUser } from '@/core/middleware/auth.middleware';
+import { TenantOrganization } from '@/core/middleware/tenant.middleware';
+
+import {
+  OrderService,
+  type CreateOrderResponse,
+  type UpdateOrderResponse,
+  type ChangeStatusResponse,
+  type AddItemResponse,
+  type UpdateItemResponse,
+  type CancelOrderResponse,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.service';
+
+import { PaginatedResult, OrderSummary } from '@/modules/order/order.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Order,
+  OrderWithRelations,
+  OrderItem,
+  OrderStatus,
+  CreateOrderRequest,
+  UpdateOrderRequest,
+  ChangeOrderStatusRequest,
+  AddOrderItemRequest,
+  UpdateOrderItemRequest,
+  ListOrdersQuery,
+  KitchenOrder,
+  OrderStatistics,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+// =============================================================================
+// ORDER CONTROLLER
+// =============================================================================
+
+/**
+ * Order Controller
+ *
+ * Handles all order-related HTTP endpoints:
+ * - List, get, create, update orders
+ * - Status workflow (confirm, prepare, ready, deliver, complete, cancel)
+ * - Order item management (add, update, remove)
+ * - Kitchen display endpoints
+ * - Order statistics
+ *
+ * @route /api/v1/orders
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // List orders with filters
+ * GET /api/v1/orders?status=PENDING&page=1&perPage=10
+ *
+ * // Create order with items
+ * POST /api/v1/orders
+ * {
+ *   "tableId": "table_123",
+ *   "items": [
+ *     { "productId": "prod_456", "quantity": 2 }
+ *   ]
+ * }
+ *
+ * // Change order status
+ * PATCH /api/v1/orders/:id/status
+ * {
+ *   "status": "CONFIRMED"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@JsonController('/api/v1/orders')
+@injectable()
+export class OrderController extends BaseController {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('OrderService') private readonly orderService: OrderService
+  ) {
+    super();
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // List Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * List orders with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization from tenant middleware
+   * @param query - Query parameters (status, type, tableId, page, perPage, etc.)
+   * @returns Paginated list of orders
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/orders?status=PENDING&page=1&perPage=10
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [...],
+   *   "meta": { "page": 1, "perPage": 10, "total": 25, "totalPages": 3 }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async list(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: ListOrdersQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedApiResponse<Order>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.list(org.id, query);
+    return this.paginated(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * List order summaries (for quick displays).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/summaries
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param query - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of order summaries
+   */
+  @Get('/summaries')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async listSummaries(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: Partial<ListOrdersQuery>
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrderSummary[]>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.listSummaries(org.id, query);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get active orders (not completed or cancelled).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/active
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param query - Optional tableId filter
+   * @returns Array of active orders
+   */
+  @Get('/active')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getActiveOrders(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: { tableId?: string }
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Order[]>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getActiveOrders(org.id, query.tableId);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get orders for kitchen display (optimized).
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/kitchen
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of kitchen-optimized orders
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/orders/kitchen
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [
+   *     {
+   *       "id": "ord_123",
+   *       "orderNumber": "ORD-20260201-001",
+   *       "tableNumber": "5",
+   *       "status": "PREPARING",
+   *       "items": [...],
+   *       "waitTimeMinutes": 12
+   *     }
+   *   ]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/kitchen')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getKitchenOrders(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<KitchenOrder[]>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getKitchenOrders(org.id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get orders by status.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/status/:status
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param status - Order status to filter by
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of orders with the specified status
+   */
+  @Get('/status/:status')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getByStatus(
+    @Param('status') status: OrderStatus,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Order[]>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getByStatus(org.id, status);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get order statistics.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/statistics
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param query - Date range filters
+   * @returns Order statistics
+   */
+  @Get('/statistics')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getStatistics(
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: { dateFrom?: Date; dateTo?: Date }
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrderStatistics>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getStatistics(
+      org.id,
+      query.dateFrom,
+      query.dateTo
+    );
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Get order by ID.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/:id
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param query - Include options for relations
+   * @returns Order with relations
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/orders/ord_123?include=items,table,customer
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "id": "ord_123",
+   *     "orderNumber": "ORD-20260201-001",
+   *     "status": "PENDING",
+   *     "items": [...],
+   *     "table": { ... }
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getById(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @QueryParams() query: { include?: Array<'items' | 'table' | 'customer' | 'feedback'> }
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrderWithRelations>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getByIdWithRelations(org.id, id, query.include);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get order by order number.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param orderNumber - Order number
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Order or null
+   */
+  @Get('/number/:orderNumber')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getByOrderNumber(
+    @Param('orderNumber') orderNumber: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<Order | null>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getByOrderNumber(org.id, orderNumber);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Get order items.
+   *
+   * @route GET /api/v1/orders/:id/items
+   * @access Requires orders.view permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @returns Array of order items
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * GET /api/v1/orders/ord_123/items
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": [
+   *     {
+   *       "id": "item_456",
+   *       "productName": "Burger",
+   *       "quantity": 2,
+   *       "unitPrice": 150,
+   *       "status": "PREPARING"
+   *     }
+   *   ]
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Get('/:id/items')
+  @Authorized('orders.view')
+  async getOrderItems(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<OrderItem[]>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.getOrderItems(org.id, id);
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Create Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Create a new order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders
+   * @access Requires orders.create permission
+   *
+   * @param data - Order creation data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Created order with items
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/orders
+   * {
+   *   "tableId": "table_123",
+   *   "type": "DINE_IN",
+   *   "items": [
+   *     { "productId": "prod_456", "quantity": 2 },
+   *     { "productId": "prod_789", "quantity": 1, "notes": "No onions" }
+   *   ],
+   *   "notes": "Allergic to peanuts"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "order": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Order created successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/')
+  @Authorized('orders.create')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async create(
+    @Body() data: CreateOrderRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CreateOrderResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.create(org.id, data, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Add an item to an order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/items
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param data - Item data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Added item and updated order
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/orders/ord_123/items
+   * {
+   *   "productId": "prod_456",
+   *   "quantity": 1,
+   *   "modifiers": [{ "id": "mod_789", "quantity": 1 }]
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "item": { ... },
+   *     "order": { ... },
+   *     "message": "Item added to order."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/items')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  @HttpCode(201)
+  async addItem(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: AddOrderItemRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<AddItemResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.addItem(org.id, id, data, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Update Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Update an order.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/orders/:id
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated order
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/orders/ord_123
+   * {
+   *   "notes": "Customer requested extra napkins"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async update(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateOrderRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateOrderResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.update(org.id, id, data, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Change order status.
+   *
+   * Status workflow:
+   * PENDING → CONFIRMED → PREPARING → READY → DELIVERED → COMPLETED
+   *    ↓          ↓           ↓
+   * CANCELLED  CANCELLED  CANCELLED (manager only)
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/orders/:id/status
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param data - Status change data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated order with previous status
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/orders/ord_123/status
+   * {
+   *   "status": "CONFIRMED"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "order": { "status": "CONFIRMED", ... },
+   *     "previousStatus": "PENDING",
+   *     "message": "Order status changed from PENDING to CONFIRMED."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/status')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async changeStatus(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() data: ChangeOrderStatusRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.changeStatus(org.id, id, data, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Cancel an order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/cancel
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param body - Cancellation reason
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Cancelled order
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * POST /api/v1/orders/ord_123/cancel
+   * {
+   *   "reason": "Customer changed their mind"
+   * }
+   *
+   * Response:
+   * {
+   *   "success": true,
+   *   "data": {
+   *     "order": { "status": "CANCELLED", ... },
+   *     "message": "Order cancelled successfully."
+   *   }
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/cancel')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async cancel(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Body() body: { reason: string },
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<CancelOrderResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.cancel(org.id, id, body.reason, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Confirm an order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/confirm
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Confirmed order
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/confirm')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async confirm(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.confirm(org.id, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Start preparing an order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/prepare
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Order in preparing status
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/prepare')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async startPreparing(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.startPreparing(org.id, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Mark an order as ready.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/ready
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Order in ready status
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/ready')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async markReady(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.markReady(org.id, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Mark an order as delivered.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/deliver
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Order in delivered status
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/deliver')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async markDelivered(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.markDelivered(org.id, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Complete an order.
+   *
+   * @route POST /api/v1/orders/:id/complete
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Completed order
+   */
+  @Post('/:id/complete')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async complete(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<ChangeStatusResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.complete(org.id, id, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Update an order item.
+   *
+   * @route PATCH /api/v1/orders/:id/items/:itemId
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   * @returns Updated item
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * PATCH /api/v1/orders/ord_123/items/item_456
+   * {
+   *   "quantity": 3,
+   *   "notes": "Extra sauce"
+   * }
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Patch('/:id/items/:itemId')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  async updateItem(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('itemId') itemId: string,
+    @Body() data: UpdateOrderItemRequest,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<ApiResponse<UpdateItemResponse>> {
+    const result = await this.orderService.updateItem(org.id, id, itemId, data, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+    return this.success(result);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Remove an item from an order.
+   *
+   * Items can only be removed from PENDING orders.
+   *
+   * @route DELETE /api/v1/orders/:id/items/:itemId
+   * @access Requires orders.update permission
+   *
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param org - Current organization
+   * @param user - Current authenticated user
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```
+   * DELETE /api/v1/orders/ord_123/items/item_456
+   * ```
+   */
+  @Delete('/:id/items/:itemId')
+  @Authorized('orders.update')
+  @HttpCode(204)
+  async removeItem(
+    @Param('id') id: string,
+    @Param('itemId') itemId: string,
+    @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+    @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    await this.orderService.removeItem(org.id, id, itemId, {
+      userId: user.id,
+      role: user.role,
+    });
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/order/order.routes.ts b/src/modules/order/order.routes.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1d60f9c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/order/order.routes.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,784 @@
+/**
+ * Order Module Routes
+ *
+ * Route configuration for the Order module.
+ * Defines API route prefixes and admin routes for orders, tables, zones,
+ * QR codes, customers, service requests, and feedback.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/order.routes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { orderRoutes, tableRoutes } from '@/modules/order/order.routes';
+ *
+ * // API routes: /api/v1/orders/*, /api/v1/tables/*, etc.
+ * // Admin routes: /admin/orders/*
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configuration Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order route configuration
+ */
+export interface OrderRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for orders */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: string;
+  /** Public routes (no auth required) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes (auth required) */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Table route configuration
+ */
+export interface TableRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for tables */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Zone route configuration
+ */
+export interface ZoneRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for zones */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * QR Code route configuration
+ */
+export interface QRCodeRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for QR codes */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes (QR scan handling) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Customer route configuration
+ */
+export interface CustomerRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for customers */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Service request route configuration
+ */
+export interface ServiceRequestRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for service requests */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes (customer can request) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Feedback route configuration
+ */
+export interface FeedbackRouteConfig {
+  /** API route prefix for feedback */
+  prefix: string;
+  /** Public routes (customer can submit) */
+  public: string[];
+  /** Protected routes */
+  protected: string[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * Combined module routes configuration
+ */
+export interface OrderModuleRouteConfig {
+  /** Order routes */
+  orders: OrderRouteConfig;
+  /** Table routes */
+  tables: TableRouteConfig;
+  /** Zone routes */
+  zones: ZoneRouteConfig;
+  /** QR Code routes */
+  qrcodes: QRCodeRouteConfig;
+  /** Customer routes */
+  customers: CustomerRouteConfig;
+  /** Service request routes */
+  serviceRequests: ServiceRequestRouteConfig;
+  /** Feedback routes */
+  feedback: FeedbackRouteConfig;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Configurations
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order routes configuration
+ */
+export const orderRoutes: OrderRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for order endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/orders',
+
+  /** Admin panel route prefix */
+  admin: '/admin/orders',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   * These endpoints require a valid JWT access token
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/summaries',
+    '/active',
+    '/kitchen',
+    '/statistics',
+    '/status/:status',
+    '/number/:orderNumber',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/items',
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/confirm',
+    '/:id/prepare',
+    '/:id/ready',
+    '/:id/deliver',
+    '/:id/complete',
+    '/:id/cancel',
+    '/:id/items/:itemId',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Table routes configuration
+ */
+export const tableRoutes: TableRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for table endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/tables',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - no authentication required
+   */
+  public: [],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/number/:number',
+    '/:id/status',
+    '/:id/orders',
+    '/:id/qrcode',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Zone routes configuration
+ */
+export const zoneRoutes: ZoneRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for zone endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/zones',
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/tables',
+    '/reorder',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * QR Code routes configuration
+ */
+export const qrcodeRoutes: QRCodeRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for QR code endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/qrcodes',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - QR code scan handling
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/scan/:code',
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/menu/:menuId',
+    '/table/:tableId',
+    '/:id/regenerate',
+    '/:id/analytics',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Customer routes configuration
+ */
+export const customerRoutes: CustomerRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for customer endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/customers',
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/orders',
+    '/:id/feedback',
+    '/:id/loyalty',
+    '/:id/restore',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Service request routes configuration
+ */
+export const serviceRequestRoutes: ServiceRequestRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for service request endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/service-requests',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - customers can request service
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/public/:tableCode',
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/active',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/resolve',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Feedback routes configuration
+ */
+export const feedbackRoutes: FeedbackRouteConfig = {
+  /** Base API prefix for feedback endpoints */
+  prefix: '/api/v1/feedback',
+
+  /**
+   * Public routes - customers can submit feedback
+   */
+  public: [
+    '/public/:orderCode',
+  ],
+
+  /**
+   * Protected routes - authentication required
+   */
+  protected: [
+    '/',
+    '/statistics',
+    '/:id',
+    '/:id/visibility',
+    '/:id/response',
+  ],
+};
+
+/**
+ * Combined order module routes configuration
+ */
+export const orderModuleRoutes: OrderModuleRouteConfig = {
+  orders: orderRoutes,
+  tables: tableRoutes,
+  zones: zoneRoutes,
+  qrcodes: qrcodeRoutes,
+  customers: customerRoutes,
+  serviceRequests: serviceRequestRoutes,
+  feedback: feedbackRoutes,
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Route Path Builders
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for an order endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/summaries')
+ * @returns Full API path (e.g., '/api/v1/orders/summaries')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildOrderApiPath('/summaries');
+ * // Returns: '/api/v1/orders/summaries'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildOrderApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${orderRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full admin path for an order endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path (e.g., '/create')
+ * @returns Full admin path (e.g., '/admin/orders/create')
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const path = buildOrderAdminPath('/create');
+ * // Returns: '/admin/orders/create'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function buildOrderAdminPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${orderRoutes.admin}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a table endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildTableApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${tableRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a zone endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildZoneApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${zoneRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a QR code endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildQRCodeApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${qrcodeRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a customer endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildCustomerApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${customerRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a service request endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildServiceRequestApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${serviceRequestRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Builds full API path for a feedback endpoint.
+ *
+ * @param endpoint - Endpoint path
+ * @returns Full API path
+ */
+export function buildFeedbackApiPath(endpoint: string): string {
+  const normalizedEndpoint = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;
+  return `${feedbackRoutes.prefix}${normalizedEndpoint}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a public order route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a public route
+ */
+export function isPublicOrderRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path by removing query strings and trailing slashes
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check all public routes
+  const publicRoutes = [
+    ...orderRoutes.public.map((r) => buildOrderApiPath(r)),
+    ...qrcodeRoutes.public.map((r) => buildQRCodeApiPath(r)),
+    ...serviceRequestRoutes.public.map((r) => buildServiceRequestApiPath(r)),
+    ...feedbackRoutes.public.map((r) => buildFeedbackApiPath(r)),
+  ];
+
+  for (const publicRoute of publicRoutes) {
+    // Handle routes with parameters
+    if (publicRoute.includes(':')) {
+      const pattern = publicRoute.replace(/:[\w]+/g, '[^/]+');
+      const regex = new RegExp(`^${pattern}$`);
+      if (regex.test(normalizedPath)) {
+        return true;
+      }
+    } else if (normalizedPath === publicRoute) {
+      return true;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a given path is a protected order route.
+ *
+ * @param path - Full API path to check
+ * @returns True if the path is a protected route
+ */
+export function isProtectedOrderRoute(path: string): boolean {
+  // Normalize path
+  const normalizedPath = path.split('?')[0].replace(/\/$/, '');
+
+  // Check if path starts with any of our prefixes
+  const prefixes = [
+    orderRoutes.prefix,
+    tableRoutes.prefix,
+    zoneRoutes.prefix,
+    qrcodeRoutes.prefix,
+    customerRoutes.prefix,
+    serviceRequestRoutes.prefix,
+    feedbackRoutes.prefix,
+  ];
+
+  if (!prefixes.some((p) => normalizedPath.startsWith(p))) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  // If not a public route, assume it's protected
+  return !isPublicOrderRoute(path);
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

+  /** HTTP method */
+  method: 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';

+/**
+ * Order Module Zod Schemas
+ *
+ * Validation schemas for all Order module inputs/outputs.
+ * Follows the validation rules defined in CODING_STANDARDS.md.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/schema
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   createOrderSchema,
+ *   createTableSchema,
+ *   changeOrderStatusSchema,
+ * } from '@/modules/order/order.schema';
+ *
+ * // Validate order input
+ * const validatedData = createOrderSchema.parse(req.body);
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { z } from 'zod';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Default limits for order module
+ */
+const LIMITS = {
+  name: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+  tableNumber: { min: 1, max: 20 },
+  notes: { max: 500 },
+  message: { max: 500 },
+  comment: { max: 2000 },
+  reason: { max: 500 },
+  quantity: { min: 1, max: 999 },
+  capacity: { min: 1, max: 50 },
+  sortOrder: { min: 0, max: 10000 },
+  rating: { min: 1, max: 5 },
+  price: { min: 0, max: 999999.99 },
+  taxRate: { min: 0, max: 100 },
+  maxItemsPerOrder: { min: 1, max: 100 },
+} as const;
+
+/**
+ * Color validation regex (hex color)
+ */
+const HEX_COLOR_REGEX = /^#([A-Fa-f0-9]{6}|[A-Fa-f0-9]{3})$/;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Enum Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order status enum schema
+ */
+export const orderStatusSchema = z.enum([
+  'PENDING',
+  'CONFIRMED',
+  'PREPARING',
+  'READY',
+  'DELIVERED',
+  'COMPLETED',
+  'CANCELLED',
+]);
+
+/**
+ * Order type enum schema
+ */
+export const orderTypeSchema = z.enum(['DINE_IN', 'TAKEAWAY', 'DELIVERY']);
+
+/**
+ * Order item status enum schema
+ */
+export const orderItemStatusSchema = z.enum(['PENDING', 'PREPARING', 'READY', 'SERVED']);
+
+/**
+ * Table status enum schema
+ */
+export const tableStatusSchema = z.enum(['AVAILABLE', 'OCCUPIED', 'RESERVED']);
+
+/**
+ * QR code type enum schema
+ */
+export const qrCodeTypeSchema = z.enum(['MENU', 'TABLE', 'CAMPAIGN']);
+
+/**
+ * Service request type enum schema
+ */
+export const serviceRequestTypeSchema = z.enum(['CALL_WAITER', 'REQUEST_BILL', 'CUSTOM']);
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Base Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * CUID schema
+ */
+export const cuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format');
+
+/**
+ * Optional CUID schema
+ */
+export const optionalCuidSchema = z.string().cuid('Invalid ID format').optional().nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Name schema
+ */
+export const nameSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(LIMITS.name.min, 'Name is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.name.max, `Name must be at most ${LIMITS.name.max} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Table number schema
+ */
+export const tableNumberSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .min(LIMITS.tableNumber.min, 'Table number is required')
+  .max(LIMITS.tableNumber.max, `Table number must be at most ${LIMITS.tableNumber.max} characters`);
+
+/**
+ * Notes schema (order/item notes)
+ */
+export const notesSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.notes.max, `Notes must be at most ${LIMITS.notes.max} characters`)
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Comment schema (feedback)
+ */
+export const commentSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.comment.max, `Comment must be at most ${LIMITS.comment.max} characters`)
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Message schema (service request)
+ */
+export const messageSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.message.max, `Message must be at most ${LIMITS.message.max} characters`)
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Cancel reason schema
+ */
+export const cancelReasonSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .trim()
+  .max(LIMITS.reason.max, `Reason must be at most ${LIMITS.reason.max} characters`)
+  .optional();
+
+/**
+ * Quantity schema
+ */
+export const quantitySchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.quantity.min, `Quantity must be at least ${LIMITS.quantity.min}`)
+  .max(LIMITS.quantity.max, `Quantity must be at most ${LIMITS.quantity.max}`);
+
+/**
+ * Optional quantity schema
+ */
+export const optionalQuantitySchema = quantitySchema.optional();
+
+/**
+ * Capacity schema
+ */
+export const capacitySchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.capacity.min, `Capacity must be at least ${LIMITS.capacity.min}`)
+  .max(LIMITS.capacity.max, `Capacity must be at most ${LIMITS.capacity.max}`);
+
+/**
+ * Sort order schema
+ */
+export const sortOrderSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.sortOrder.min)
+  .max(LIMITS.sortOrder.max)
+  .optional()
+  .default(0);
+
+/**
+ * Rating schema (1-5)
+ */
+export const ratingSchema = z
+  .number()
+  .int()
+  .min(LIMITS.rating.min, `Rating must be at least ${LIMITS.rating.min}`)
+  .max(LIMITS.rating.max, `Rating must be at most ${LIMITS.rating.max}`);
+
+/**
+ * Price schema
+ */
+export const priceSchema = z
+  .union([z.string(), z.number()])
+  .transform((val) => (typeof val === 'string' ? parseFloat(val) : val))
+  .refine((val) => !isNaN(val), 'Price must be a valid number')
+  .refine((val) => val >= LIMITS.price.min, `Price must be at least ${LIMITS.price.min}`)
+  .refine((val) => val <= LIMITS.price.max, `Price must be at most ${LIMITS.price.max}`);
+
+/**
+ * Hex color schema
+ */
+export const hexColorSchema = z
+  .string()
+  .regex(HEX_COLOR_REGEX, 'Invalid hex color format (e.g., #FF5733)')
+  .optional()
+  .nullable();
+
+/**
+ * Date schema (accepts string or Date)
+ */
+export const dateSchema = z.coerce.date().optional();
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Zone Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create zone schema
+ */
+export const createZoneSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema,
+  color: hexColorSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+});
+
+export type CreateZoneInput = z.infer<typeof createZoneSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update zone schema
+ */
+export const updateZoneSchema = z.object({
+  name: nameSchema.optional(),
+  color: hexColorSchema,
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+});
+
+export type UpdateZoneInput = z.infer<typeof updateZoneSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List zones query schema
+ */
+export const listZonesQuerySchema = z.object({
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+});
+
+export type ListZonesQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listZonesQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Table Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create table schema
+ */
+export const createTableSchema = z.object({
+  number: tableNumberSchema,
+  capacity: capacitySchema,
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  zoneId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  status: tableStatusSchema.optional().default('AVAILABLE'),
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema,
+});
+
+export type CreateTableInput = z.infer<typeof createTableSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update table schema
+ */
+export const updateTableSchema = z.object({
+  number: tableNumberSchema.optional(),
+  capacity: capacitySchema.optional(),
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  zoneId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  status: tableStatusSchema.optional(),
+  sortOrder: sortOrderSchema.optional(),
+});
+
+export type UpdateTableInput = z.infer<typeof updateTableSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change table status schema
+ */
+export const changeTableStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: tableStatusSchema,
+});
+
+export type ChangeTableStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeTableStatusSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List tables query schema
+ */
+export const listTablesQuerySchema = z.object({
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  zoneId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  status: tableStatusSchema.optional(),
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['number', 'capacity', 'sortOrder', 'createdAt']).optional().default('sortOrder'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('asc'),
+});
+
+export type ListTablesQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listTablesQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// QR Code Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create QR code schema
+ */
+export const createQRCodeSchema = z.object({
+  menuId: cuidSchema,
+  tableId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  type: qrCodeTypeSchema.optional().default('MENU'),
+  expiresAt: dateSchema,
+});
+
+export type CreateQRCodeInput = z.infer<typeof createQRCodeSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update QR code schema
+ */
+export const updateQRCodeSchema = z.object({
+  isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
+  expiresAt: dateSchema.nullable(),
+});
+
+export type UpdateQRCodeInput = z.infer<typeof updateQRCodeSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List QR codes query schema
+ */
+export const listQRCodesQuerySchema = z.object({
+  menuId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  tableId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  type: qrCodeTypeSchema.optional(),
+  isActive: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+});
+
+export type ListQRCodesQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listQRCodesQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Order Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order item modifier schema
+ */
+export const orderItemModifierSchema = z.object({
+  id: cuidSchema,
+  quantity: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).optional().default(1),
+});
+
+/**
+ * Create order item schema (nested)
+ */
+export const createOrderItemSchema = z.object({
+  productId: cuidSchema,
+  variantId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  quantity: quantitySchema,
+  notes: notesSchema,
+  modifiers: z.array(orderItemModifierSchema).optional().default([]),
+});
+
+export type CreateOrderItemInput = z.infer<typeof createOrderItemSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Create order schema
+ */
+export const createOrderSchema = z.object({
+  tableId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  customerId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  type: orderTypeSchema.optional().default('DINE_IN'),
+  notes: notesSchema,
+  items: z.array(createOrderItemSchema).min(1, 'At least one item is required'),
+});
+
+export type CreateOrderInput = z.infer<typeof createOrderSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update order schema
+ */
+export const updateOrderSchema = z.object({
+  notes: notesSchema,
+  staffId: optionalCuidSchema,
+});
+
+export type UpdateOrderInput = z.infer<typeof updateOrderSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Change order status schema
+ */
+export const changeOrderStatusSchema = z.object({
+  status: orderStatusSchema,
+  reason: cancelReasonSchema,
+});
+
+export type ChangeOrderStatusInput = z.infer<typeof changeOrderStatusSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Add order item schema
+ */
+export const addOrderItemSchema = createOrderItemSchema;
+
+export type AddOrderItemInput = z.infer<typeof addOrderItemSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update order item schema
+ */
+export const updateOrderItemSchema = z.object({
+  quantity: optionalQuantitySchema,
+  notes: notesSchema,
+  status: orderItemStatusSchema.optional(),
+});
+
+export type UpdateOrderItemInput = z.infer<typeof updateOrderItemSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List orders query schema
+ */
+export const listOrdersQuerySchema = z.object({
+  status: orderStatusSchema.optional(),
+  type: orderTypeSchema.optional(),
+  branchId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  tableId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  customerId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  dateFrom: dateSchema,
+  dateTo: dateSchema,
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  include: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val.split(',') as Array<'items' | 'table' | 'customer' | 'feedback'>)
+    .optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['orderNumber', 'totalAmount', 'createdAt', 'status']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+export type ListOrdersQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listOrdersQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Customer Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create customer schema
+ */
+export const createCustomerSchema = z
+  .object({
+    email: z.string().email('Invalid email format').optional(),
+    phone: z
+      .string()
+      .regex(/^\+?[0-9]{10,15}$/, 'Invalid phone number format')
+      .optional(),
+    firstName: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+    lastName: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+    notes: notesSchema,
+    metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional().default({}),
+  })
+  .refine((data) => data.email || data.phone, {
+    message: 'Either email or phone is required',
+    path: ['email'],
+  });
+
+export type CreateCustomerInput = z.infer<typeof createCustomerSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Update customer schema
+ */
+export const updateCustomerSchema = z.object({
+  email: z.string().email('Invalid email format').optional().nullable(),
+  phone: z
+    .string()
+    .regex(/^\+?[0-9]{10,15}$/, 'Invalid phone number format')
+    .optional()
+    .nullable(),
+  firstName: z.string().trim().max(100).optional().nullable(),
+  lastName: z.string().trim().max(100).optional().nullable(),
+  avatar: z.string().url('Invalid URL format').optional().nullable(),
+  notes: notesSchema,
+  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),
+});
+
+export type UpdateCustomerInput = z.infer<typeof updateCustomerSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List customers query schema
+ */
+export const listCustomersQuerySchema = z.object({
+  search: z.string().trim().max(100).optional(),
+  minOrders: z.coerce.number().int().min(0).optional(),
+  minSpent: z.coerce.number().min(0).optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['totalOrders', 'totalSpent', 'lastOrderAt', 'createdAt']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+export type ListCustomersQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listCustomersQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Service Request Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create service request schema
+ */
+export const createServiceRequestSchema = z.object({
+  tableId: cuidSchema,
+  type: serviceRequestTypeSchema,
+  message: messageSchema,
+});
+
+export type CreateServiceRequestInput = z.infer<typeof createServiceRequestSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * Resolve service request schema
+ */
+export const resolveServiceRequestSchema = z.object({
+  resolvedById: cuidSchema.optional(),
+});
+
+export type ResolveServiceRequestInput = z.infer<typeof resolveServiceRequestSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List service requests query schema
+ */
+export const listServiceRequestsQuerySchema = z.object({
+  tableId: optionalCuidSchema,
+  isResolved: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  type: serviceRequestTypeSchema.optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(50),
+});
+
+export type ListServiceRequestsQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listServiceRequestsQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Feedback Schemas
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Create feedback schema
+ */
+export const createFeedbackSchema = z.object({
+  orderId: cuidSchema,
+  rating: ratingSchema,
+  comment: commentSchema,
+  isPublic: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+});
+
+export type CreateFeedbackInput = z.infer<typeof createFeedbackSchema>;
+
+/**
+ * List feedback query schema
+ */
+export const listFeedbackQuerySchema = z.object({
+  minRating: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(5).optional(),
+  maxRating: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(5).optional(),
+  isPublic: z
+    .string()
+    .transform((val) => val === 'true')
+    .optional(),
+  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().optional().default(1),
+  perPage: z.coerce.number().int().positive().max(100).optional().default(20),
+  sortBy: z.enum(['rating', 'createdAt']).optional().default('createdAt'),
+  sortOrder: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).optional().default('desc'),
+});
+
+export type ListFeedbackQueryInput = z.infer<typeof listFeedbackQuerySchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Module Settings Schema
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order module settings schema
+ */
+export const orderModuleSettingsSchema = z.object({
+  defaultCurrency: z.string().length(3).toUpperCase().optional().default('TRY'),
+  orderNumberPrefix: z.string().max(10).optional().default('ORD'),
+  autoCompleteDelayMinutes: z.number().int().min(1).max(1440).optional().default(30),
+  enableTableOrdering: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+  enableTakeaway: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+  enableDelivery: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  enableServiceRequests: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+  requireCustomerInfo: z.boolean().optional().default(false),
+  enableFeedback: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
+  feedbackReminderDelayMinutes: z.number().int().min(1).max(1440).optional().default(60),
+  taxRate: z.number().min(LIMITS.taxRate.min).max(LIMITS.taxRate.max).optional().default(10),
+  maxItemsPerOrder: z.number().int().min(LIMITS.maxItemsPerOrder.min).max(LIMITS.maxItemsPerOrder.max).optional().default(50),
+  maxOrderNoteLength: z.number().int().min(1).max(2000).optional().default(500),
+});
+
+export type OrderModuleSettingsInput = z.infer<typeof orderModuleSettingsSchema>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Functions
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validates if an order status transition is allowed
+ *
+ * @param currentStatus - Current order status
+ * @param targetStatus - Target order status
+ * @returns True if transition is valid
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidStatusTransition('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidStatusTransition(currentStatus: string, targetStatus: string): boolean {
+  const transitions: Record<string, string[]> = {
+    PENDING: ['CONFIRMED', 'CANCELLED'],
+    CONFIRMED: ['PREPARING', 'CANCELLED'],
+    PREPARING: ['READY', 'CANCELLED'],
+    READY: ['DELIVERED'],
+    DELIVERED: ['COMPLETED'],
+    COMPLETED: [],
+    CANCELLED: [],
+  };
+
+  return transitions[currentStatus]?.includes(targetStatus) ?? false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generates a unique order number
+ *
+ * @param prefix - Order number prefix (default: 'ORD')
+ * @returns Unique order number
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const orderNumber = generateOrderNumber('ORD');
+ * // Returns: 'ORD-20260131-ABC123'
+ * ```
+ */
+export function generateOrderNumber(prefix: string = 'ORD'): string {
+  const date = new Date();
+  const dateStr = date.toISOString().slice(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');
+  const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase();
+  return `${prefix}-${dateStr}-${random}`;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Calculates order totals
+ *
+ * @param items - Order items with prices
+ * @param taxRate - Tax rate percentage
+ * @param discountAmount - Discount amount
+ * @returns Calculated totals
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const totals = calculateOrderTotals(items, 10, 0);
+ * // Returns: { subtotal: 100, taxAmount: 10, totalAmount: 110 }
+ * ```
+ */
+export function calculateOrderTotals(
+  items: Array<{ quantity: number; unitPrice: number; modifiers?: Array<{ price: number; quantity: number }> }>,
+  taxRate: number,
+  discountAmount: number = 0
+): { subtotal: number; taxAmount: number; totalAmount: number } {
+  const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => {
+    const itemTotal = item.quantity * item.unitPrice;
+    const modifiersTotal = (item.modifiers || []).reduce(
+      (modSum, mod) => modSum + mod.price * mod.quantity,
+      0
+    );
+    return sum + itemTotal + modifiersTotal;
+  }, 0);
+
+  const taxAmount = (subtotal - discountAmount) * (taxRate / 100);
+  const totalAmount = subtotal - discountAmount + taxAmount;
+
+  return {
+    subtotal: Math.round(subtotal * 100) / 100,
+    taxAmount: Math.round(taxAmount * 100) / 100,
+    totalAmount: Math.round(totalAmount * 100) / 100,
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates phone number format
+ *
+ * @param phone - Phone number to validate
+ * @returns True if valid
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidPhoneNumber('+905551234567');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidPhoneNumber(phone: string): boolean {
+  return /^\+?[0-9]{10,15}$/.test(phone);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Validates hex color format
+ *
+ * @param color - Color string to validate
+ * @returns True if valid hex color
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const isValid = isValidHexColor('#FF5733');
+ * // Returns: true
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isValidHexColor(color: string): boolean {
+  return HEX_COLOR_REGEX.test(color);
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/order/order.service.ts b/src/modules/order/order.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..8cfd30c
