@@ -0,0 +1,1146 @@
+/**
+ * Order Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Order module.
+ * Handles order CRUD, status workflow, and order item management.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/order.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { OrderService } from '@/modules/order/order.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const orderService = resolve<OrderService>('OrderService');
+ *
+ * // Create a new order
+ * const result = await orderService.create('org_123', {
+ *   tableId: 'table_456',
+ *   items: [{ productId: 'prod_789', quantity: 2 }],
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+import {
+  ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITIONS,
+  isValidOrderTransition,
+  type OrderStatus as OrderStatusConst,
+} from '@/config/constants';
+
+import {
+  OrderRepository,
+  PaginatedResult,
+  OrderSummary,
+  CreateOrderItemData,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.repository';
+
+import { TableRepository } from '@/modules/order/table.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Order,
+  OrderWithRelations,
+  OrderItem,
+  OrderStatus,
+  OrderType,
+  OrderItemStatus,
+  CreateOrderRequest,
+  UpdateOrderRequest,
+  ChangeOrderStatusRequest,
+  AddOrderItemRequest,
+  UpdateOrderItemRequest,
+  ListOrdersQuery,
+  OrderCreatedEvent,
+  OrderStatusChangedEvent,
+  KitchenOrder,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+import {
+  createOrderSchema,
+  updateOrderSchema,
+  changeOrderStatusSchema,
+  addOrderItemSchema,
+  updateOrderItemSchema,
+  listOrdersQuerySchema,
+  generateOrderNumber,
+  calculateOrderTotals,
+  isValidStatusTransition,
+  type CreateOrderInput,
+  type UpdateOrderInput,
+  type ChangeOrderStatusInput,
+  type AddOrderItemInput,
+  type UpdateOrderItemInput,
+  type ListOrdersQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** User role */
+  role?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create order response
+ */
+export interface CreateOrderResponse {
+  /** Created order */
+  order: OrderWithRelations;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update order response
+ */
+export interface UpdateOrderResponse {
+  /** Updated order */
+  order: Order;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Change status response
+ */
+export interface ChangeStatusResponse {
+  /** Updated order */
+  order: Order;
+  /** Previous status */
+  previousStatus: OrderStatus;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Add item response
+ */
+export interface AddItemResponse {
+  /** Added item */
+  item: OrderItem;
+  /** Updated order */
+  order: Order;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update item response
+ */
+export interface UpdateItemResponse {
+  /** Updated item */
+  item: OrderItem;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Cancel order response
+ */
+export interface CancelOrderResponse {
+  /** Cancelled order */
+  order: Order;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Status Transition Rules
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Status transition permissions based on role
+ */
+const STATUS_TRANSITION_PERMISSIONS: Record<string, OrderStatus[]> = {
+  // Customer can only cancel from PENDING
+  customer: ['CANCELLED'],
+  // Staff can transition most states
+  staff: ['CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING', 'READY', 'DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED'],
+  // Manager can do everything including cancellation from any state
+  manager: ['CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING', 'READY', 'DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED'],
+  // Owner has full control
+  owner: ['CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING', 'READY', 'DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED'],
+};
+
+/**
+ * States from which cancellation is allowed per role
+ */
+const CANCELLATION_ALLOWED_FROM: Record<string, OrderStatus[]> = {
+  customer: ['PENDING'],
+  staff: ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED'],
+  manager: ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING'],
+  owner: ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING'],
+};
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Order Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Order module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all order-related business operations including:
+ * - Order CRUD operations with tenant isolation
+ * - Status workflow management
+ * - Order item management
+ * - Price calculations
+ * - Event emission
+ *
+ * Order Status Workflow:
+ * PENDING → CONFIRMED → PREPARING → READY → DELIVERED → COMPLETED
+ *    ↓          ↓           ↓
+ *  CANCELLED  CANCELLED  CANCELLED (manager only)
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('OrderService') private orderService: OrderService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.orderService.create(req.orgId, req.body);
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class OrderService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('OrderRepository') private readonly repository: OrderRepository,
+    @inject('TableRepository') private readonly tableRepository: TableRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists orders for an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of orders
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await orderService.list('org_123', {
+   *   status: 'PENDING',
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 20,
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListOrdersQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Order>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listOrdersQuerySchema) as ListOrdersQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAll(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists order summaries (for quick displays).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of order summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params?: Partial<ListOrdersQuery>
+  ): Promise<OrderSummary[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets active orders (not completed or cancelled).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param tableId - Optional table filter
+   * @returns Array of active orders
+   */
+  async getActiveOrders(organizationId: string, tableId?: string): Promise<Order[]> {
+    return this.repository.findActiveOrders(organizationId, tableId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets orders by status.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Order status
+   * @returns Array of orders
+   */
+  async getByStatus(organizationId: string, status: OrderStatus): Promise<Order[]> {
+    return this.repository.findByStatus(organizationId, status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets pending orders (for kitchen display).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Array of pending orders
+   */
+  async getPendingOrders(organizationId: string): Promise<Order[]> {
+    return this.repository.findByStatus(organizationId, 'PENDING');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets orders for kitchen display.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Array of kitchen orders
+   */
+  async getKitchenOrders(organizationId: string): Promise<KitchenOrder[]> {
+    const activeStatuses: OrderStatus[] = ['CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING', 'READY'];
+    const orders: KitchenOrder[] = [];
+
+    for (const status of activeStatuses) {
+      const statusOrders = await this.repository.findByStatus(organizationId, status);
+
+      for (const order of statusOrders) {
+        const orderWithRelations = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(
+          order.id,
+          organizationId,
+          ['items', 'table']
+        );
+
+        if (orderWithRelations) {
+          const now = new Date();
+          const waitTimeMinutes = Math.floor(
+            (now.getTime() - new Date(orderWithRelations.createdAt).getTime()) / 60000
+          );
+
+          orders.push({
+            id: orderWithRelations.id,
+            orderNumber: orderWithRelations.orderNumber,
+            tableNumber: orderWithRelations.table?.number || null,
+            type: orderWithRelations.type as OrderType,
+            status: orderWithRelations.status as OrderStatus,
+            items: (orderWithRelations.items || []).map((item) => ({
+              id: item.id,
+              productName: item.productName,
+              variantName: item.variantName || null,
+              quantity: item.quantity,
+              modifiers: (item.modifiers || []) as Array<{
+                id: string;
+                name: string;
+                price: number;
+                quantity: number;
+              }>,
+              notes: item.notes || null,
+              status: item.status as OrderItemStatus,
+            })),
+            notes: orderWithRelations.notes || null,
+            createdAt: orderWithRelations.createdAt,
+            waitTimeMinutes,
+          });
+        }
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Sort by creation time (oldest first)
+    return orders.sort(
+      (a, b) => new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(b.createdAt).getTime()
+    );
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an order by ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @returns Order or null
+   */
+  async getById(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Order | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an order by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param include - Relations to include
+   * @returns Order with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    include?: Array<'items' | 'table' | 'customer' | 'feedback'>
+  ): Promise<OrderWithRelations> {
+    const order = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id, organizationId, include);
+
+    if (!order) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Order', id);
+    }
+
+    return order;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an order by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @returns Order
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Order> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets an order by order number.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderNumber - Order number
+   * @returns Order or null
+   */
+  async getByOrderNumber(organizationId: string, orderNumber: string): Promise<Order | null> {
+    return this.repository.findByOrderNumber(organizationId, orderNumber);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts orders for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(organizationId: string, status?: OrderStatus): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(organizationId, status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets order statistics.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param startDate - Start date
+   * @param endDate - End date
+   * @returns Statistics object
+   */
+  async getStatistics(
+    organizationId: string,
+    startDate?: Date,
+    endDate?: Date
+  ) {
+    return this.repository.getStatistics(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new order.
+   *
+   * Validates input, generates order number, calculates totals,
+   * creates order with items, and emits creation event.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created order response
+   * @throws {AppException} If validation fails
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await orderService.create('org_123', {
+   *   tableId: 'table_456',
+   *   items: [
+   *     { productId: 'prod_789', quantity: 2 },
+   *   ],
+   * });
+   * console.log('Created:', result.order.orderNumber);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateOrderRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateOrderResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createOrderSchema) as CreateOrderInput;
+
+    // Validate table if provided
+    if (validated.tableId) {
+      const table = await this.tableRepository.findById(validated.tableId, organizationId);
+      if (!table) {
+        throw AppException.notFound('Table', validated.tableId);
+      }
+
+      // Check if table is available or already occupied by another order
+      if (table.status === 'RESERVED') {
+        throw new AppException('TABLE_RESERVED', 400, {
+          message: 'Table is reserved and cannot accept orders.',
+          tableId: validated.tableId,
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Generate order number
+    const datePrefix = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');
+    const orderNumber = await this.repository.getNextOrderNumber(
+      organizationId,
+      datePrefix,
+      'ORD'
+    );
+
+    // Prepare items (this would normally fetch product details)
+    // For now, we assume the caller provides complete item data
+    const itemsData: CreateOrderItemData[] = validated.items.map((item) => ({
+      productId: item.productId,
+      variantId: item.variantId || null,
+      productName: 'Product', // TODO: Fetch from product service
+      variantName: null,
+      quantity: item.quantity,
+      unitPrice: 0, // TODO: Fetch from product service
+      totalPrice: 0,
+      modifiers: item.modifiers || [],
+      notes: item.notes || null,
+      status: 'PENDING' as OrderItemStatus,
+    }));
+
+    // Calculate totals (placeholder - should use actual prices)
+    const taxRate = 10; // TODO: Get from organization settings
+    const totals = calculateOrderTotals(
+      itemsData.map((i) => ({
+        quantity: i.quantity,
+        unitPrice: i.unitPrice,
+        modifiers: [],
+      })),
+      taxRate,
+      0
+    );
+
+    // Create order
+    const order = await this.repository.create(
+      organizationId,
+      {
+        orderNumber,
+        branchId: null,
+        tableId: validated.tableId || null,
+        customerId: validated.customerId || null,
+        staffId: context?.userId || null,
+        status: 'PENDING',
+        type: validated.type ?? 'DINE_IN',
+        subtotal: totals.subtotal,
+        taxAmount: totals.taxAmount,
+        discountAmount: 0,
+        totalAmount: totals.totalAmount,
+        currency: 'TRY',
+        notes: validated.notes || null,
+      },
+      itemsData
+    );
+
+    // Update table status if dine-in
+    if (validated.tableId && validated.type === 'DINE_IN') {
+      await this.tableRepository.setCurrentOrder(validated.tableId, organizationId, order.id);
+    }
+
+    // Get order with relations
+    const orderWithRelations = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(
+      order.id,
+      organizationId,
+      ['items', 'table', 'customer']
+    );
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    const event: OrderCreatedEvent = {
+      orderId: order.id,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      type: order.type as OrderType,
+      totalAmount: Number(order.totalAmount),
+      tableId: order.tableId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    };
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.created', event);
+
+    return {
+      order: orderWithRelations!,
+      message: 'Order created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an order.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated order response
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or order is not modifiable
+   */
+  async update(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateOrderRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateOrderResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateOrderSchema) as UpdateOrderInput;
+
+    // Get current order
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if order is modifiable
+    if (!this.isOrderModifiable(current.status as OrderStatus)) {
+      throw new AppException('ORDER_NOT_MODIFIABLE', 400, {
+        message: 'Order cannot be modified in its current status.',
+        status: current.status,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Update order
+    const order = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, {
+      notes: validated.notes,
+      staffId: validated.staffId,
+    });
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.updated', {
+      orderId: order.id,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      order,
+      message: 'Order updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes order status with workflow validation.
+   *
+   * Validates the status transition against the workflow rules,
+   * updates the order with appropriate timestamp, and emits status change event.
+   *
+   * Status Workflow:
+   * PENDING → CONFIRMED → PREPARING → READY → DELIVERED → COMPLETED
+   *
+   * Cancellation Rules:
+   * - Customer: Can cancel from PENDING only
+   * - Staff: Can cancel from PENDING, CONFIRMED
+   * - Manager: Can cancel from PENDING, CONFIRMED, PREPARING (with reason)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param data - Status change request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   * @throws {AppException} If transition is invalid
+   */
+  async changeStatus(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: ChangeOrderStatusRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changeOrderStatusSchema) as ChangeOrderStatusInput;
+
+    // Get current order
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    const currentStatus = current.status as OrderStatus;
+    const targetStatus = validated.status;
+
+    // Validate status transition
+    if (!isValidStatusTransition(currentStatus, targetStatus)) {
+      throw new AppException('INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION', 400, {
+        message: `Cannot transition from ${currentStatus} to ${targetStatus}.`,
+        currentStatus,
+        targetStatus,
+        allowedTransitions: ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITIONS[currentStatus as OrderStatusConst],
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Validate cancellation permissions
+    if (targetStatus === 'CANCELLED') {
+      this.validateCancellationPermission(currentStatus, context);
+
+      // Cancellation reason is required
+      if (!validated.reason) {
+        throw new AppException('CANCELLATION_REASON_REQUIRED', 400, {
+          message: 'A reason is required when cancelling an order.',
+        });
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Update status
+    const order = await this.repository.updateStatus(
+      id,
+      organizationId,
+      targetStatus,
+      validated.reason
+    );
+
+    // Handle table status on order completion/cancellation
+    if (current.tableId && (targetStatus === 'COMPLETED' || targetStatus === 'CANCELLED')) {
+      await this.tableRepository.setCurrentOrder(current.tableId, organizationId, null);
+    }
+
+    // Emit status changed event
+    const event: OrderStatusChangedEvent = {
+      orderId: order.id,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      previousStatus: currentStatus,
+      newStatus: targetStatus,
+      cancelReason: validated.reason || null,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    };
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.status_changed', event);
+
+    return {
+      order,
+      previousStatus: currentStatus,
+      message: `Order status changed from ${currentStatus} to ${targetStatus}.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Confirms an order (shortcut for changeStatus to CONFIRMED).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async confirm(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    return this.changeStatus(organizationId, id, { status: 'CONFIRMED' }, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Starts preparing an order (shortcut for changeStatus to PREPARING).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async startPreparing(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    return this.changeStatus(organizationId, id, { status: 'PREPARING' }, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks order as ready (shortcut for changeStatus to READY).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async markReady(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    return this.changeStatus(organizationId, id, { status: 'READY' }, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Marks order as delivered (shortcut for changeStatus to DELIVERED).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async markDelivered(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    return this.changeStatus(organizationId, id, { status: 'DELIVERED' }, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Completes an order (shortcut for changeStatus to COMPLETED).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async complete(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    return this.changeStatus(organizationId, id, { status: 'COMPLETED' }, context);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Cancels an order.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Order ID
+   * @param reason - Cancellation reason
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Cancel order response
+   */
+  async cancel(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    reason: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CancelOrderResponse> {
+    const result = await this.changeStatus(
+      organizationId,
+      id,
+      { status: 'CANCELLED', reason },
+      context
+    );
+
+    return {
+      order: result.order,
+      message: 'Order cancelled successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Order Item Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Gets order items.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID
+   * @returns Array of order items
+   */
+  async getOrderItems(organizationId: string, orderId: string): Promise<OrderItem[]> {
+    // Verify order exists and belongs to organization
+    await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(orderId, organizationId);
+    return this.repository.getOrderItems(orderId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Adds an item to an order.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID
+   * @param data - Item data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Add item response
+   * @throws {AppException} If order is not modifiable
+   */
+  async addItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderId: string,
+    data: AddOrderItemRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<AddItemResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, addOrderItemSchema) as AddOrderItemInput;
+
+    // Get order
+    const order = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if items can be added
+    if (!this.canAddItems(order.status as OrderStatus)) {
+      throw new AppException('CANNOT_ADD_ITEMS', 400, {
+        message: 'Items can only be added to PENDING or CONFIRMED orders.',
+        status: order.status,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Create item (placeholder data - should fetch from product service)
+    const item = await this.repository.addOrderItem(orderId, {
+      productId: validated.productId,
+      variantId: validated.variantId || null,
+      productName: 'Product', // TODO: Fetch from product service
+      variantName: null,
+      quantity: validated.quantity,
+      unitPrice: 0, // TODO: Fetch from product service
+      totalPrice: 0,
+      modifiers: validated.modifiers || [],
+      notes: validated.notes || null,
+      status: 'PENDING',
+    });
+
+    // Recalculate order totals
+    const updatedOrder = await this.repository.recalculateTotals(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit item added event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.item_added', {
+      orderId,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      itemId: item.id,
+      addedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      item,
+      order: updatedOrder,
+      message: 'Item added to order.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates an order item.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Update item response
+   */
+  async updateItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderId: string,
+    itemId: string,
+    data: UpdateOrderItemRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateItemResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateOrderItemSchema) as UpdateOrderItemInput;
+
+    // Get order
+    const order = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if order is in a state that allows item updates
+    if (!this.canModifyItems(order.status as OrderStatus)) {
+      throw new AppException('CANNOT_MODIFY_ITEMS', 400, {
+        message: 'Items cannot be modified in this order status.',
+        status: order.status,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Verify item exists
+    await this.repository.getOrderItemOrThrow(itemId);
+
+    // Update item
+    const item = await this.repository.updateOrderItem(itemId, {
+      quantity: validated.quantity,
+      notes: validated.notes,
+      status: validated.status,
+    });
+
+    // Recalculate order totals if quantity changed
+    if (validated.quantity !== undefined) {
+      await this.repository.recalculateTotals(orderId, organizationId);
+    }
+
+    // Emit item updated event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.item_updated', {
+      orderId,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      itemId,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      item,
+      message: 'Item updated.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Removes an item from an order.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @throws {AppException} If order is not modifiable
+   */
+  async removeItem(
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderId: string,
+    itemId: string,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Get order
+    const order = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Items can only be removed from PENDING orders
+    if (order.status !== 'PENDING') {
+      throw new AppException('CANNOT_REMOVE_ITEMS', 400, {
+        message: 'Items can only be removed from PENDING orders.',
+        status: order.status,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Verify item exists
+    await this.repository.getOrderItemOrThrow(itemId);
+
+    // Remove item
+    await this.repository.removeOrderItem(itemId);
+
+    // Recalculate order totals
+    await this.repository.recalculateTotals(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit item removed event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.item_removed', {
+      orderId,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      itemId,
+      removedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates item status (for kitchen display).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID
+   * @param itemId - Item ID
+   * @param status - New status
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated item
+   */
+  async updateItemStatus(
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderId: string,
+    itemId: string,
+    status: OrderItemStatus,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<OrderItem> {
+    // Verify order exists
+    const order = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(orderId, organizationId);
+
+    // Verify item exists
+    await this.repository.getOrderItemOrThrow(itemId);
+
+    // Update item status
+    const item = await this.repository.updateOrderItemStatus(itemId, status);
+
+    // Emit item status changed event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('order.item_status_changed', {
+      orderId,
+      orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
+      organizationId,
+      itemId,
+      status,
+      changedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return item;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if an order number is available.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderNumber - Order number to check
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isOrderNumberAvailable(
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderNumber: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.orderNumberExists(organizationId, orderNumber));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if an order can be modified based on status.
+   */
+  private isOrderModifiable(status: OrderStatus): boolean {
+    return ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED'].includes(status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if items can be added to an order based on status.
+   */
+  private canAddItems(status: OrderStatus): boolean {
+    return ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED'].includes(status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if items can be modified based on order status.
+   */
+  private canModifyItems(status: OrderStatus): boolean {
+    return ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PREPARING'].includes(status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Validates cancellation permission based on user role and order status.
+   */
+  private validateCancellationPermission(
+    currentStatus: OrderStatus,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): void {
+    const role = context?.role || 'customer';
+    const allowedFromStates = CANCELLATION_ALLOWED_FROM[role] || CANCELLATION_ALLOWED_FROM.customer;
+
+    if (!allowedFromStates.includes(currentStatus)) {
+      throw new AppException('CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED', 403, {
+        message: `Users with role '${role}' cannot cancel orders in ${currentStatus} status.`,
+        role,
+        currentStatus,
+        allowedFromStates,
+      });
+    }
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/order/table.repository.ts b/src/modules/order/table.repository.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f27ec89
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/order/table.repository.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,692 @@
+/**
+ * Table Repository
+ *
+ * Data access layer for Table entities.
+ * Provides tenant-scoped database operations with CRUD support.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/table.repository
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { TableRepository } from '@/modules/order/table.repository';
+ *
+ * const repo = container.resolve('TableRepository');
+ * const table = await repo.findByNumber('org_123', 'A1');
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+import { PrismaClient, Prisma } from '@prisma/client';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { notDeleted, softDelete } from '@/config/database';
+
+import type {
+  Table,
+  TableWithRelations,
+  TableStatus,
+  ListTablesQuery,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Paginated result type
+ */
+export interface PaginatedResult<T> {
+  /** Array of entities */
+  data: T[];
+  /** Pagination metadata */
+  meta: {
+    page: number;
+    perPage: number;
+    total: number;
+    totalPages: number;
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Table summary for list displays
+ */
+export interface TableSummary {
+  /** Table ID */
+  id: string;
+  /** Table number */
+  number: string;
+  /** Seating capacity */
+  capacity: number;
+  /** Table status */
+  status: TableStatus;
+  /** Zone ID */
+  zoneId: string | null;
+  /** Zone name */
+  zoneName: string | null;
+  /** Has active order */
+  hasActiveOrder: boolean;
+  /** Sort order */
+  sortOrder: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create table data (input for repository)
+ */
+export interface CreateTableData {
+  number: string;
+  capacity: number;
+  branchId?: string | null;
+  zoneId?: string | null;
+  status?: TableStatus;
+  sortOrder?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update table data (input for repository)
+ */
+export interface UpdateTableData {
+  number?: string;
+  capacity?: number;
+  branchId?: string | null;
+  zoneId?: string | null;
+  status?: TableStatus;
+  currentOrderId?: string | null;
+  sortOrder?: number;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Constants
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 50;
+const MAX_PER_PAGE = 100;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Table Repository
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Repository for Table entity operations.
+ *
+ * Handles all database operations for tables including:
+ * - CRUD operations with tenant isolation
+ * - Table number lookups within organizations
+ * - Status management
+ * - Zone filtering
+ *
+ * @remarks
+ * All operations require organizationId for tenant isolation.
+ * Soft delete is enforced on all operations.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class TableService {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('TableRepository') private repo: TableRepository
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async getByNumber(orgId: string, number: string) {
+ *     return this.repo.findByNumber(orgId, number);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class TableRepository {
+  constructor(
+    @inject(TOKENS.PrismaClient) private readonly prisma: PrismaClient
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all tables for an organization with pagination and filtering
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters (pagination, sorting, filtering)
+   * @returns Paginated list of tables
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await repo.findAll('org_123', {
+   *   zoneId: 'zone_456',
+   *   status: 'AVAILABLE',
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 50,
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async findAll(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListTablesQuery = {}
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Table>> {
+    const {
+      branchId,
+      zoneId,
+      status,
+      search,
+      page = 1,
+      perPage = DEFAULT_PER_PAGE,
+      sortBy = 'sortOrder',
+      sortOrder = 'asc',
+    } = params;
+
+    // Normalize pagination
+    const normalizedPerPage = Math.min(Math.max(1, perPage), MAX_PER_PAGE);
+    const normalizedPage = Math.max(1, page);
+    const skip = (normalizedPage - 1) * normalizedPerPage;
+
+    // Build where clause
+    const where: Prisma.TableWhereInput = {
+      organizationId,
+      ...notDeleted,
+      ...(branchId !== undefined && { branchId }),
+      ...(zoneId !== undefined && { zoneId }),
+      ...(status !== undefined && { status }),
+      ...(search && {
+        number: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' },
+      }),
+    };
+
+    // Build orderBy clause
+    const orderBy: Prisma.TableOrderByWithRelationInput = { [sortBy]: sortOrder };
+
+    // Execute count and find in parallel
+    const [total, data] = await Promise.all([
+      this.prisma.table.count({ where }),
+      this.prisma.table.findMany({
+        where,
+        orderBy,
+        skip,
+        take: normalizedPerPage,
+      }),
+    ]);
+
+    return {
+      data: data as Table[],
+      meta: {
+        page: normalizedPage,
+        perPage: normalizedPerPage,
+        total,
+        totalPages: Math.ceil(total / normalizedPerPage),
+      },
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds all tables as summaries (for dropdowns, floor plans, etc.)
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of table summaries
+   */
+  async findAllSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: Partial<ListTablesQuery> = {}
+  ): Promise<TableSummary[]> {
+    const { zoneId, status, branchId } = params;
+
+    const where: Prisma.TableWhereInput = {
+      organizationId,
+      ...notDeleted,
+      ...(zoneId !== undefined && { zoneId }),
+      ...(status !== undefined && { status }),
+      ...(branchId !== undefined && { branchId }),
+    };
+
+    const tables = await this.prisma.table.findMany({
+      where,
+      select: {
+        id: true,
+        number: true,
+        capacity: true,
+        status: true,
+        zoneId: true,
+        currentOrderId: true,
+        sortOrder: true,
+        zone: {
+          select: {
+            name: true,
+          },
+        },
+      },
+      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { number: 'asc' }],
+    });
+
+    return tables.map((table) => ({
+      id: table.id,
+      number: table.number,
+      capacity: table.capacity,
+      status: table.status as TableStatus,
+      zoneId: table.zoneId,
+      zoneName: table.zone?.name || null,
+      hasActiveOrder: table.currentOrderId !== null,
+      sortOrder: table.sortOrder,
+    }));
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds tables by zone ID
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param zoneId - Zone ID
+   * @returns Array of tables
+   */
+  async findByZoneId(organizationId: string, zoneId: string): Promise<Table[]> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.findMany({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        zoneId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { number: 'asc' }],
+    });
+
+    return result as Table[];
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds tables by status
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param status - Table status
+   * @returns Array of tables
+   */
+  async findByStatus(organizationId: string, status: TableStatus): Promise<Table[]> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.findMany({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        status,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { number: 'asc' }],
+    });
+
+    return result as Table[];
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a table by ID with tenant isolation
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns Table or null
+   */
+  async findById(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<Table | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table | null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a table by ID with relations
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param includeOrders - Include orders in response
+   * @returns Table with relations or null
+   */
+  async findByIdWithRelations(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    includeOrders = false
+  ): Promise<TableWithRelations | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId, ...notDeleted },
+      include: {
+        zone: true,
+        qrCode: true,
+        currentOrder: true,
+        ...(includeOrders && {
+          orders: {
+            orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
+            take: 10,
+          },
+        }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as TableWithRelations | null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a table by ID or throws
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns Table
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async findByIdOrThrow(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<Table> {
+    const table = await this.findById(id, organizationId);
+
+    if (!table) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Table', id);
+    }
+
+    return table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Finds a table by number within an organization
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param number - Table number
+   * @returns Table or null
+   */
+  async findByNumber(organizationId: string, number: string): Promise<Table | null> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.findFirst({
+      where: { organizationId, number, ...notDeleted },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table | null;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a table number exists within an organization
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param number - Table number to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude from check
+   * @returns True if number exists
+   */
+  async numberExists(
+    organizationId: string,
+    number: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    const count = await this.prisma.table.count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        number,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...(excludeId && { id: { not: excludeId } }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return count > 0;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts tables for an organization
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @param zoneId - Optional zone filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(
+    organizationId: string,
+    status?: TableStatus,
+    zoneId?: string
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    return this.prisma.table.count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+        ...(status !== undefined && { status }),
+        ...(zoneId !== undefined && { zoneId }),
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts available tables for an organization
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Count of available tables
+   */
+  async countAvailable(organizationId: string): Promise<number> {
+    return this.prisma.table.count({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        status: 'AVAILABLE',
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+    });
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new table
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant association
+   * @param data - Create data
+   * @returns Created table
+   */
+  async create(organizationId: string, data: CreateTableData): Promise<Table> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.create({
+      data: {
+        organizationId,
+        number: data.number,
+        capacity: data.capacity,
+        branchId: data.branchId || null,
+        zoneId: data.zoneId || null,
+        status: data.status ?? 'AVAILABLE',
+        sortOrder: data.sortOrder ?? 0,
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates multiple tables in a batch
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant association
+   * @param dataList - Array of create data
+   * @returns Count of created tables
+   */
+  async createMany(
+    organizationId: string,
+    dataList: CreateTableData[]
+  ): Promise<{ count: number }> {
+    return this.prisma.table.createMany({
+      data: dataList.map((data) => ({
+        organizationId,
+        number: data.number,
+        capacity: data.capacity,
+        branchId: data.branchId || null,
+        zoneId: data.zoneId || null,
+        status: data.status ?? 'AVAILABLE',
+        sortOrder: data.sortOrder ?? 0,
+      })),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a table
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param data - Update data
+   * @returns Updated table
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async update(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: UpdateTableData
+  ): Promise<Table> {
+    // Verify exists
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: {
+        ...(data.number !== undefined && { number: data.number }),
+        ...(data.capacity !== undefined && { capacity: data.capacity }),
+        ...(data.branchId !== undefined && { branchId: data.branchId }),
+        ...(data.zoneId !== undefined && { zoneId: data.zoneId }),
+        ...(data.status !== undefined && { status: data.status }),
+        ...(data.currentOrderId !== undefined && { currentOrderId: data.currentOrderId }),
+        ...(data.sortOrder !== undefined && { sortOrder: data.sortOrder }),
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates table status
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - New status
+   * @returns Updated table
+   */
+  async updateStatus(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    status: TableStatus
+  ): Promise<Table> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { status },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Sets the current order for a table
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID (null to clear)
+   * @returns Updated table
+   */
+  async setCurrentOrder(
+    id: string,
+    organizationId: string,
+    orderId: string | null
+  ): Promise<Table> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: {
+        currentOrderId: orderId,
+        status: orderId ? 'OCCUPIED' : 'AVAILABLE',
+      },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates table sort orders in batch
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param items - Array of ID and sortOrder pairs
+   */
+  async reorder(
+    organizationId: string,
+    items: Array<{ id: string; sortOrder: number }>
+  ): Promise<void> {
+    // Verify all tables exist and belong to the organization
+    const tableIds = items.map((item) => item.id);
+    const existingCount = await this.prisma.table.count({
+      where: {
+        id: { in: tableIds },
+        organizationId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+    });
+
+    if (existingCount !== tableIds.length) {
+      throw new AppException('INVALID_TABLES', 400, {
+        message: 'Some tables do not exist or do not belong to this organization',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Update sort orders in transaction
+    await this.prisma.$transaction(
+      items.map((item) =>
+        this.prisma.table.update({
+          where: { id: item.id },
+          data: { sortOrder: item.sortOrder },
+        })
+      )
+    );
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes a table
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @returns Deleted table
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async softDelete(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<Table> {
+    await this.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted table
+   *
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Restored table
+   */
+  async restore(id: string, organizationId: string): Promise<Table> {
+    // Find including deleted
+    const table = await this.prisma.table.findFirst({
+      where: { id, organizationId },
+    });
+
+    if (!table) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Table', id);
+    }
+
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.update({
+      where: { id },
+      data: { deletedAt: null },
+    });
+
+    return result as Table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes all tables in a zone
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param zoneId - Zone ID
+   * @returns Number of deleted tables
+   */
+  async softDeleteByZoneId(organizationId: string, zoneId: string): Promise<number> {
+    const result = await this.prisma.table.updateMany({
+      where: {
+        organizationId,
+        zoneId,
+        ...notDeleted,
+      },
+      data: softDelete(),
+    });
+
+    return result.count;
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/modules/order/table.service.ts b/src/modules/order/table.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..653aca5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/order/table.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,710 @@
+/**
+ * Table Module Service
+ *
+ * Business logic service for the Table module.
+ * Handles table CRUD, status management, and zone assignment.
+ *
+ * @module modules/order/table.service
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import { TableService } from '@/modules/order/table.service';
+ * import { resolve } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+ *
+ * const tableService = resolve<TableService>('TableService');
+ *
+ * // Create a new table
+ * const result = await tableService.create('org_123', {
+ *   number: 'A1',
+ *   capacity: 4,
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+import { injectable, inject } from 'tsyringe';
+
+import { TOKENS } from '@/core/kernel/container';
+import { AppException } from '@/core/exceptions/app.exception';
+import { EventService } from '@/core/services/event.service';
+
+import { TableRepository, PaginatedResult, TableSummary } from '@/modules/order/table.repository';
+
+import type {
+  Table,
+  TableWithRelations,
+  TableStatus,
+  CreateTableRequest,
+  UpdateTableRequest,
+  ChangeTableStatusRequest,
+  ListTablesQuery,
+  TableStatusChangedEvent,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.types';
+
+import {
+  createTableSchema,
+  updateTableSchema,
+  changeTableStatusSchema,
+  listTablesQuerySchema,
+  type CreateTableInput,
+  type UpdateTableInput,
+  type ChangeTableStatusInput,
+  type ListTablesQueryInput,
+} from '@/modules/order/order.schema';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * User context for operations
+ */
+interface UserContext {
+  /** User ID making the request */
+  userId?: string;
+  /** Whether user is a platform admin */
+  isPlatformAdmin?: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Create table response
+ */
+export interface CreateTableResponse {
+  /** Created table */
+  table: Table;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update table response
+ */
+export interface UpdateTableResponse {
+  /** Updated table */
+  table: Table;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Change status response
+ */
+export interface ChangeStatusResponse {
+  /** Updated table */
+  table: Table;
+  /** Previous status */
+  previousStatus: TableStatus;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Reorder tables response
+ */
+export interface ReorderTablesResponse {
+  /** Reordered table count */
+  count: number;
+  /** Response message */
+  message: string;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Table Service
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Table module business logic service.
+ *
+ * Handles all table-related business operations including:
+ * - Table CRUD operations with tenant isolation
+ * - Status management (available, occupied, reserved)
+ * - Zone assignment
+ * - Table number uniqueness
+ * - Event emission for status changes
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * @injectable()
+ * class SomeController {
+ *   constructor(
+ *     @inject('TableService') private tableService: TableService,
+ *   ) {}
+ *
+ *   async handleCreate(req: Request, res: Response) {
+ *     const result = await this.tableService.create(req.orgId, req.body);
+ *     res.json(result);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+@injectable()
+export class TableService {
+  constructor(
+    @inject('TableRepository') private readonly repository: TableRepository,
+    @inject(TOKENS.EventService) private readonly eventService: EventService
+  ) {}
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Read Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Lists tables for an organization with pagination and filtering.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID for tenant isolation
+   * @param params - Query parameters
+   * @returns Paginated list of tables
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await tableService.list('org_123', {
+   *   zoneId: 'zone_456',
+   *   status: 'AVAILABLE',
+   *   page: 1,
+   *   perPage: 50,
+   * });
+   * ```
+   */
+  async list(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params: ListTablesQuery
+  ): Promise<PaginatedResult<Table>> {
+    const validated = this.validateInput(params, listTablesQuerySchema) as ListTablesQueryInput;
+    return this.repository.findAll(organizationId, validated);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Lists table summaries (for dropdowns, floor plans, etc.).
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param params - Optional filtering params
+   * @returns Array of table summaries
+   */
+  async listSummaries(
+    organizationId: string,
+    params?: Partial<ListTablesQuery>
+  ): Promise<TableSummary[]> {
+    return this.repository.findAllSummaries(organizationId, params);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets tables by zone ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param zoneId - Zone ID
+   * @returns Array of tables
+   */
+  async getByZoneId(organizationId: string, zoneId: string): Promise<Table[]> {
+    return this.repository.findByZoneId(organizationId, zoneId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets tables by status.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Table status
+   * @returns Array of tables
+   */
+  async getByStatus(organizationId: string, status: TableStatus): Promise<Table[]> {
+    return this.repository.findByStatus(organizationId, status);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets available tables.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Array of available tables
+   */
+  async getAvailable(organizationId: string): Promise<Table[]> {
+    return this.repository.findByStatus(organizationId, 'AVAILABLE');
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a table by ID.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @returns Table or null
+   */
+  async getById(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Table | null> {
+    return this.repository.findById(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a table by ID with relations.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param includeOrders - Include orders in response
+   * @returns Table with relations
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdWithRelations(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    includeOrders = false
+  ): Promise<TableWithRelations> {
+    const table = await this.repository.findByIdWithRelations(id, organizationId, includeOrders);
+
+    if (!table) {
+      throw AppException.notFound('Table', id);
+    }
+
+    return table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a table by ID or throws.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @returns Table
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found
+   */
+  async getByIdOrThrow(organizationId: string, id: string): Promise<Table> {
+    return this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Gets a table by number.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param number - Table number
+   * @returns Table or null
+   */
+  async getByNumber(organizationId: string, number: string): Promise<Table | null> {
+    return this.repository.findByNumber(organizationId, number);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts tables for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param status - Optional status filter
+   * @param zoneId - Optional zone filter
+   * @returns Count
+   */
+  async count(
+    organizationId: string,
+    status?: TableStatus,
+    zoneId?: string
+  ): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.count(organizationId, status, zoneId);
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Counts available tables for an organization.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @returns Count of available tables
+   */
+  async countAvailable(organizationId: string): Promise<number> {
+    return this.repository.countAvailable(organizationId);
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Write Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Creates a new table.
+   *
+   * Validates input, checks number uniqueness, creates table,
+   * and emits creation event.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param data - Create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Created table response
+   * @throws {AppException} If table number already exists
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * const result = await tableService.create('org_123', {
+   *   number: 'A1',
+   *   capacity: 4,
+   *   zoneId: 'zone_456',
+   * });
+   * console.log('Created:', result.table.id);
+   * ```
+   */
+  async create(
+    organizationId: string,
+    data: CreateTableRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<CreateTableResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, createTableSchema) as CreateTableInput;
+
+    // Check if table number already exists
+    if (await this.repository.numberExists(organizationId, validated.number)) {
+      throw AppException.alreadyExists('Table number', validated.number);
+    }
+
+    // Create table
+    const table = await this.repository.create(organizationId, {
+      number: validated.number,
+      capacity: validated.capacity,
+      branchId: validated.branchId || null,
+      zoneId: validated.zoneId || null,
+      status: validated.status ?? 'AVAILABLE',
+      sortOrder: validated.sortOrder ?? 0,
+    });
+
+    // Emit creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.created', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      zoneId: table.zoneId,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      table,
+      message: 'Table created successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Creates multiple tables in a batch.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param dataList - Array of create request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Count of created tables
+   */
+  async createMany(
+    organizationId: string,
+    dataList: CreateTableRequest[],
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<{ count: number }> {
+    // Validate all inputs
+    const validated = dataList.map((data) =>
+      this.validateInput(data, createTableSchema) as CreateTableInput
+    );
+
+    // Check for duplicate numbers in the batch
+    const numbers = validated.map((t) => t.number);
+    const uniqueNumbers = new Set(numbers);
+    if (uniqueNumbers.size !== numbers.length) {
+      throw new AppException('DUPLICATE_TABLE_NUMBERS', 400, {
+        message: 'Duplicate table numbers in batch',
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Check for existing numbers
+    for (const tableData of validated) {
+      if (await this.repository.numberExists(organizationId, tableData.number)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Table number', tableData.number);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Create tables
+    const result = await this.repository.createMany(organizationId, validated);
+
+    // Emit batch creation event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.batch_created', {
+      organizationId,
+      count: result.count,
+      createdBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return result;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Updates a table.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param data - Update request data
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated table response
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or number conflicts
+   */
+  async update(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: UpdateTableRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<UpdateTableResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, updateTableSchema) as UpdateTableInput;
+
+    // Get current table
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check number uniqueness if changing
+    if (validated.number && validated.number !== current.number) {
+      if (await this.repository.numberExists(organizationId, validated.number, id)) {
+        throw AppException.alreadyExists('Table number', validated.number);
+      }
+    }
+
+    // Build update data
+    const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
+    if (validated.number !== undefined) updateData.number = validated.number;
+    if (validated.capacity !== undefined) updateData.capacity = validated.capacity;
+    if (validated.branchId !== undefined) updateData.branchId = validated.branchId;
+    if (validated.zoneId !== undefined) updateData.zoneId = validated.zoneId;
+    if (validated.status !== undefined) updateData.status = validated.status;
+    if (validated.sortOrder !== undefined) updateData.sortOrder = validated.sortOrder;
+
+    // Update table
+    const table = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, updateData);
+
+    // Emit update event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.updated', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      changes: updateData,
+      updatedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      table,
+      message: 'Table updated successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Changes table status.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param data - Status change request
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Change status response
+   */
+  async changeStatus(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    data: ChangeTableStatusRequest,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ChangeStatusResponse> {
+    // Validate input
+    const validated = this.validateInput(data, changeTableStatusSchema) as ChangeTableStatusInput;
+
+    // Get current table
+    const current = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+    const previousStatus = current.status as TableStatus;
+
+    // Update status
+    const table = await this.repository.updateStatus(id, organizationId, validated.status);
+
+    // Emit status changed event
+    const event: TableStatusChangedEvent = {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      previousStatus,
+      newStatus: validated.status,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    };
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.status_changed', event);
+
+    return {
+      table,
+      previousStatus,
+      message: `Table status changed from ${previousStatus} to ${validated.status}.`,
+    };
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Sets the current order for a table.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param orderId - Order ID (null to clear)
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated table
+   */
+  async setCurrentOrder(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    orderId: string | null,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Table> {
+    const table = await this.repository.setCurrentOrder(id, organizationId, orderId);
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.order_assigned', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      orderId,
+      assignedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Assigns a table to a zone.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param zoneId - Zone ID (null to unassign)
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Updated table
+   */
+  async assignToZone(
+    organizationId: string,
+    id: string,
+    zoneId: string | null,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<Table> {
+    const table = await this.repository.update(id, organizationId, { zoneId });
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.zone_assigned', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      zoneId,
+      assignedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return table;
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Reorders tables.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param items - Array of ID and sortOrder pairs
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Reorder response
+   */
+  async reorder(
+    organizationId: string,
+    items: Array<{ id: string; sortOrder: number }>,
+    context?: UserContext
+  ): Promise<ReorderTablesResponse> {
+    await this.repository.reorder(organizationId, items);
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.reordered', {
+      organizationId,
+      items,
+      reorderedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return {
+      count: items.length,
+      message: 'Tables reordered successfully.',
+    };
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Delete Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Soft deletes a table.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @throws {AppException} If not found or has active order
+   *
+   * @example
+   * ```typescript
+   * await tableService.delete('org_123', 'table_456');
+   * ```
+   */
+  async delete(organizationId: string, id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<void> {
+    const table = await this.repository.findByIdOrThrow(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Check if has active order
+    if (table.currentOrderId) {
+      throw new AppException('TABLE_HAS_ACTIVE_ORDER', 400, {
+        message: 'Cannot delete table with active order. Complete or cancel the order first.',
+        orderId: table.currentOrderId,
+      });
+    }
+
+    // Soft delete
+    await this.repository.softDelete(id, organizationId);
+
+    // Emit deletion event
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.deleted', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      deletedBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+  }
+
+  /**
+   * Restores a soft-deleted table.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param id - Table ID
+   * @param context - User context
+   * @returns Restored table
+   */
+  async restore(organizationId: string, id: string, context?: UserContext): Promise<Table> {
+    const table = await this.repository.restore(id, organizationId);
+
+    await this.eventService.emitCustom('table.restored', {
+      tableId: table.id,
+      tableNumber: table.number,
+      organizationId,
+      restoredBy: context?.userId,
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+    });
+
+    return table;
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Validation Operations
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Checks if a table number is available.
+   *
+   * @param organizationId - Organization ID
+   * @param number - Table number to check
+   * @param excludeId - Optional ID to exclude
+   * @returns True if available
+   */
+  async isNumberAvailable(
+    organizationId: string,
+    number: string,
+    excludeId?: string
+  ): Promise<boolean> {
+    return !(await this.repository.numberExists(organizationId, number, excludeId));
+  }
+
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+  // Helper Methods
+  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+  /**
+   * Validates input data against a Zod schema.
+   */
+  private validateInput<T>(data: unknown, schema: { parse: (data: unknown) => T }): T {
+    try {
+      return schema.parse(data);
+    } catch (error) {
+      if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'errors' in error) {
+        const zodError = error as { errors: Array<{ path: string[]; message: string; code: string }> };
+        const validationErrors = zodError.errors.map((err) => ({
+          field: err.path.join('.'),
+          message: err.message,
+          rule: err.code,
+        }));
+        throw AppException.validation(validationErrors);
+      }
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+/**
+ * Shared Decorators
+ *
+ * Re-exports all custom decorators for the E-Menum application.
+ * These decorators work with routing-controllers and the core middleware.
+ *
+ * @module shared/decorators
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   CurrentUser,
+ *   CurrentOrg,
+ *   CurrentOrgId,
+ *   Authorized,
+ *   RequireRoles,
+ *   RequirePlan,
+ * } from '@/shared/decorators';
+ *
+ * @JsonController('/api/v1/menus')
+ * @injectable()
+ * export class MenuController extends BaseController {
+ *
+ *   @Get('/')
+ *   @Authorized(['menu.view'])
+ *   async list(
+ *     @CurrentUser() user: AuthUser,
+ *     @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+ *   ): Promise<ApiResponse<Menu[]>> {
+ *     const menus = await this.menuService.findAll(org.id);
+ *     return this.success(menus);
+ *   }
+ *
+ *   @Post('/')
+ *   @Authorized(['menu.create'])
+ *   async create(
+ *     @CurrentOrg() org: TenantOrganization,
+ *     @Body() data: CreateMenuDto,
+ *   ): Promise<ApiResponse<Menu>> {
+ *     const menu = await this.menuService.create(org.id, data);
+ *     return this.created(menu);
+ *   }
+ *
+ *   @Delete('/:id')
+ *   @Authorized(['menu.delete'])
+ *   @RequireRoles(['owner', 'manager'])
+ *   async delete(
+ *     @Param('id') id: string,
+ *     @CurrentOrgId() orgId: string,
+ *   ): Promise<void> {
+ *     await this.menuService.delete(id, orgId);
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CurrentUser Decorator
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  CurrentUser,
+  CurrentUserOptions,
+  getCurrentUser,
+  getCurrentUserOptional,
+  isAuthenticated,
+} from './current-user.decorator';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// CurrentOrg Decorator
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  CurrentOrg,
+  CurrentOrgId,
+  CurrentOrgOptions,
+  getCurrentOrg,
+  getCurrentOrgOptional,
+  getCurrentOrgId,
+  hasOrgContext,
+  validateOrgAccess,
+} from './current-org.decorator';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Authorized Decorator
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  Authorized,
+  AuthorizedOptions,
+  PermissionString,
+  PermissionSpec,
+  RequireRoles,
+  RequirePlan,
+  RequireAnyPermission,
+  RequireAllPermissions,
+} from './authorized.decorator';
