diff --git a/src/shared/types/api.types.ts b/src/shared/types/api.types.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b093581
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/shared/types/api.types.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,564 @@
+/**
+ * Shared API Types
+ *
+ * Centralized type definitions for API request/response formats.
+ * Following the specifications in API_CONTRACTS.md.
+ *
+ * @module shared/types/api
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   ApiResponse,
+ *   PaginatedResponse,
+ *   ApiErrorResponse,
+ *   PaginationMeta,
+ * } from '@/shared/types';
+ *
+ * // Use in controller return types
+ * async list(): Promise<PaginatedResponse<Menu>> { ... }
+ * async get(): Promise<ApiResponse<Menu>> { ... }
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Success Response Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Standard API success response format.
+ *
+ * Used for all successful responses that return data.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of the response data
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // GET /api/v1/menus/:id
+ * {
+ *   "success": true,
+ *   "data": {
+ *     "id": "mnu_123",
+ *     "name": "Ana Menü",
+ *     "slug": "ana-menu"
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface ApiResponse<T> {
+  /** Indicates the request was successful */
+  success: true;
+  /** Response payload */
+  data: T;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Pagination metadata structure.
+ *
+ * Provides information about the current page, total items, and navigation hints.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * {
+ *   "page": 1,
+ *   "perPage": 20,
+ *   "total": 150,
+ *   "totalPages": 8,
+ *   "hasNextPage": true,
+ *   "hasPrevPage": false
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface PaginationMeta {
+  /** Current page number (1-indexed) */
+  page: number;
+  /** Number of items per page */
+  perPage: number;
+  /** Total number of items across all pages */
+  total: number;
+  /** Total number of pages */
+  totalPages: number;
+  /** Whether there is a next page available */
+  hasNextPage: boolean;
+  /** Whether there is a previous page available */
+  hasPrevPage: boolean;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Paginated API response format with metadata.
+ *
+ * Used for collection endpoints that support pagination.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of items in the collection
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // GET /api/v1/menus?page=1&perPage=20
+ * {
+ *   "success": true,
+ *   "data": [
+ *     { "id": "mnu_1", "name": "Ana Menü" },
+ *     { "id": "mnu_2", "name": "İçecek Menüsü" }
+ *   ],
+ *   "meta": {
+ *     "page": 1,
+ *     "perPage": 20,
+ *     "total": 45,
+ *     "totalPages": 3,
+ *     "hasNextPage": true,
+ *     "hasPrevPage": false
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface PaginatedResponse<T> {
+  /** Indicates the request was successful */
+  success: true;
+  /** Array of items */
+  data: T[];
+  /** Pagination metadata */
+  meta: PaginationMeta;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Error Response Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Validation error detail structure.
+ *
+ * Describes a single field-level validation error.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * {
+ *   "field": "name",
+ *   "message": "Name is required",
+ *   "rule": "required"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface ValidationErrorDetail {
+  /** Field path that failed validation (dot notation for nested) */
+  field: string;
+  /** Human-readable error message */
+  message: string;
+  /** Validation rule that failed (e.g., 'required', 'min', 'max') */
+  rule?: string;
+  /** Additional parameters for the validation rule */
+  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
+}
+
+/**
+ * API error detail structure.
+ *
+ * Contains full error information for debugging and user feedback.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * {
+ *   "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
+ *   "message": "Validation failed",
+ *   "details": [
+ *     { "field": "name", "message": "Name is required" }
+ *   ],
+ *   "requestId": "req_abc123",
+ *   "timestamp": "2026-01-31T12:00:00Z"
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface ApiError {
+  /** Machine-readable error code for i18n and programmatic handling */
+  code: string;
+  /** Human-readable error message */
+  message: string;
+  /** Field-level validation errors (for VALIDATION_ERROR) */
+  details?: ValidationErrorDetail[];
+  /** Request ID for support reference and debugging */
+  requestId?: string;
+  /** Error occurrence timestamp in ISO 8601 format */
+  timestamp: string;
+  /** Seconds to wait before retrying (for RATE_LIMITED errors) */
+  retryAfter?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Standard API error response format.
+ *
+ * Used for all error responses.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // 400 Bad Request
+ * {
+ *   "success": false,
+ *   "error": {
+ *     "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
+ *     "message": "Validation failed",
+ *     "details": [
+ *       { "field": "name", "message": "Name is required", "rule": "required" }
+ *     ],
+ *     "requestId": "req_abc123",
+ *     "timestamp": "2026-01-31T12:00:00Z"
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface ApiErrorResponse {
+  /** Indicates the request failed */
+  success: false;
+  /** Error details */
+  error: ApiError;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Union Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Combined API response type (success or error).
+ *
+ * Use this when a function can return either success or error response.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of the success response data
+ */
+export type ApiResult<T> = ApiResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse;
+
+/**
+ * Combined paginated API response type (success or error).
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of items in the collection
+ */
+export type PaginatedResult<T> = PaginatedResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Request Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Standard pagination query parameters.
+ *
+ * Used in GET requests for list endpoints.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // GET /api/v1/menus?page=2&perPage=20
+ * const query: PaginationQuery = { page: 2, perPage: 20 };
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface PaginationQuery {
+  /** Page number (1-indexed, default: 1) */
+  page?: number;
+  /** Items per page (default: 20, max: 100) */
+  perPage?: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Standard sorting query parameters.
+ *
+ * Used in GET requests for sortable list endpoints.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // GET /api/v1/menus?sort=-createdAt
+ * const query: SortQuery = { sort: '-createdAt' };
+ *
+ * // Alternative format
+ * // GET /api/v1/menus?sortBy=name&sortOrder=asc
+ * const query: SortQuery = { sortBy: 'name', sortOrder: 'asc' };
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface SortQuery {
+  /** Sort field with optional - prefix for descending (e.g., '-createdAt') */
+  sort?: string;
+  /** Sort field name */
+  sortBy?: string;
+  /** Sort direction */
+  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Filter operator types for query parameters.
+ *
+ * Maps to query parameter operators like field[gte]=value.
+ */
+export type FilterOperator = 'eq' | 'ne' | 'gt' | 'gte' | 'lt' | 'lte' | 'like' | 'in' | 'null';
+
+/**
+ * Standard filtering query parameters.
+ *
+ * Used for filtered list endpoints.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // GET /api/v1/products?status=active&price[gte]=100
+ * const query: FilterQuery = {
+ *   status: 'active',
+ *   price: { gte: 100 }
+ * };
+ * ```
+ */
+export type FilterQuery = Record<string, unknown>;
+
+/**
+ * Combined list query parameters.
+ *
+ * Combines pagination, sorting, and filtering.
+ */
+export interface ListQuery extends PaginationQuery, SortQuery {
+  /** Field selection (comma-separated) */
+  fields?: string;
+  /** Related resources to include (comma-separated) */
+  include?: string;
+  /** Additional filters */
+  [key: string]: unknown;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// HTTP Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Standard HTTP methods used in the API.
+ */
+export type HttpMethod = 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE';
+
+/**
+ * Standard HTTP status codes used in the API.
+ */
+export type HttpStatusCode =
+  | 200 // OK - GET, PUT, PATCH success
+  | 201 // Created - POST success
+  | 204 // No Content - DELETE success
+  | 400 // Bad Request - Validation error
+  | 401 // Unauthorized - Missing/invalid token
+  | 403 // Forbidden - Insufficient permissions
+  | 404 // Not Found - Resource not found
+  | 409 // Conflict - Already exists / state conflict
+  | 422 // Unprocessable Entity - Business rule violation
+  | 429 // Rate Limited - Too many requests
+  | 500 // Internal Server Error
+  | 503; // Service Unavailable
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Utility Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Extracts the data type from an ApiResponse.
+ *
+ * @template T - ApiResponse type
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * type MenuResponse = ApiResponse<Menu>;
+ * type MenuData = ExtractApiData<MenuResponse>; // Menu
+ * ```
+ */
+export type ExtractApiData<T> = T extends ApiResponse<infer U> ? U : never;
+
+/**
+ * Extracts the item type from a PaginatedResponse.
+ *
+ * @template T - PaginatedResponse type
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * type MenusResponse = PaginatedResponse<Menu>;
+ * type MenuItem = ExtractPaginatedItem<MenusResponse>; // Menu
+ * ```
+ */
+export type ExtractPaginatedItem<T> = T extends PaginatedResponse<infer U> ? U : never;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a type for async API handler return value.
+ *
+ * @template T - Data type
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * async function getMenu(id: string): AsyncApiResponse<Menu> {
+ *   const menu = await menuService.findById(id);
+ *   return { success: true, data: menu };
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export type AsyncApiResponse<T> = Promise<ApiResponse<T>>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a type for async paginated API handler return value.
+ *
+ * @template T - Item type
+ */
+export type AsyncPaginatedResponse<T> = Promise<PaginatedResponse<T>>;
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Cursor-based Pagination Types (Alternative)
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Cursor-based pagination metadata.
+ *
+ * Alternative to offset pagination for large datasets.
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * {
+ *   "cursor": "mnu_123",
+ *   "hasMore": true,
+ *   "count": 20
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface CursorPaginationMeta {
+  /** Cursor for the next page (last item ID) */
+  cursor: string | null;
+  /** Whether there are more items */
+  hasMore: boolean;
+  /** Number of items returned */
+  count: number;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Cursor-based paginated response format.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of items in the collection
+ */
+export interface CursorPaginatedResponse<T> {
+  /** Indicates the request was successful */
+  success: true;
+  /** Array of items */
+  data: T[];
+  /** Cursor pagination metadata */
+  meta: CursorPaginationMeta;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Cursor-based pagination query parameters.
+ */
+export interface CursorPaginationQuery {
+  /** Cursor from previous response */
+  cursor?: string;
+  /** Number of items to return */
+  limit?: number;
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Batch Operation Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Batch operation result for individual item.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of the result data
+ */
+export interface BatchItemResult<T> {
+  /** Item identifier */
+  id: string;
+  /** Whether operation succeeded for this item */
+  success: boolean;
+  /** Result data (if successful) */
+  data?: T;
+  /** Error details (if failed) */
+  error?: {
+    code: string;
+    message: string;
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Batch operation response format.
+ *
+ * Used for endpoints that process multiple items.
+ *
+ * @template T - Type of the result data
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * // POST /api/v1/products/batch-update
+ * {
+ *   "success": true,
+ *   "data": {
+ *     "results": [
+ *       { "id": "prd_1", "success": true, "data": {...} },
+ *       { "id": "prd_2", "success": false, "error": { "code": "NOT_FOUND" } }
+ *     ],
+ *     "summary": {
+ *       "total": 2,
+ *       "succeeded": 1,
+ *       "failed": 1
+ *     }
+ *   }
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export interface BatchResponse<T> {
+  /** Indicates the request was processed (individual items may have failed) */
+  success: true;
+  /** Batch operation data */
+  data: {
+    /** Individual item results */
+    results: BatchItemResult<T>[];
+    /** Operation summary */
+    summary: {
+      /** Total items processed */
+      total: number;
+      /** Number of successful operations */
+      succeeded: number;
+      /** Number of failed operations */
+      failed: number;
+    };
+  };
+}
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Type Guards
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/**
+ * Type guard to check if a response is successful.
+ *
+ * @param response - API response to check
+ * @returns True if the response is successful
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * const response = await fetchMenu(id);
+ * if (isApiSuccess(response)) {
+ *   // TypeScript knows response is ApiResponse<Menu>
+ *   console.log(response.data.name);
+ * } else {
+ *   // TypeScript knows response is ApiErrorResponse
+ *   console.error(response.error.message);
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+export function isApiSuccess<T>(
+  response: ApiResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse
+): response is ApiResponse<T> {
+  return response.success === true;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Type guard to check if a response is an error.
+ *
+ * @param response - API response to check
+ * @returns True if the response is an error
+ */
+export function isApiError<T>(
+  response: ApiResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse
+): response is ApiErrorResponse {
+  return response.success === false;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Type guard to check if a response is paginated.
+ *
+ * @param response - API response to check
+ * @returns True if the response is paginated
+ */
+export function isPaginatedResponse<T>(
+  response: ApiResponse<T[]> | PaginatedResponse<T>
+): response is PaginatedResponse<T> {
+  return response.success === true && 'meta' in response;
+}

diff --git a/src/shared/types/index.ts b/src/shared/types/index.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9f7ec35
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/shared/types/index.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+/**
+ * Shared Types
+ *
+ * Re-exports all shared type definitions for the E-Menum application.
+ * Import types from this module for consistent API contracts.
+ *
+ * @module shared/types
+ *
+ * @example
+ * ```typescript
+ * import {
+ *   ApiResponse,
+ *   PaginatedResponse,
+ *   ApiErrorResponse,
+ *   PaginationMeta,
+ *   ValidationErrorDetail,
+ *   ListQuery,
+ *   isApiSuccess,
+ * } from '@/shared/types';
+ *
+ * // In a controller
+ * @Get('/')
+ * @Authorized(['menu.view'])
+ * async list(
+ *   @QueryParams() query: ListQuery,
+ * ): Promise<PaginatedResponse<Menu>> {
+ *   const result = await this.menuService.findAll(orgId, query);
+ *   return this.paginated(result);
+ * }
+ *
+ * // In a service or utility
+ * function handleApiResult<T>(response: ApiResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse): T {
+ *   if (isApiSuccess(response)) {
+ *     return response.data;
+ *   }
+ *   throw new Error(response.error.message);
+ * }
+ * ```
+ */
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// API Response Types
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export type {
+  // Success responses
+  ApiResponse,
+  PaginatedResponse,
+  PaginationMeta,
+
+  // Error responses
+  ApiErrorResponse,
+  ApiError,
+  ValidationErrorDetail,
+
+  // Union types
+  ApiResult,
+  PaginatedResult,
+
+  // Request types
+  PaginationQuery,
+  SortQuery,
+  FilterOperator,
+  FilterQuery,
+  ListQuery,
+
+  // HTTP types
+  HttpMethod,
+  HttpStatusCode,
+
+  // Utility types
+  ExtractApiData,
+  ExtractPaginatedItem,
+  AsyncApiResponse,
+  AsyncPaginatedResponse,
+
+  // Cursor pagination
+  CursorPaginationMeta,
+  CursorPaginatedResponse,
+  CursorPaginationQuery,
+
+  // Batch operations
+  BatchItemResult,
+  BatchResponse,
+} from './api.types';
+
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Type Guards
+// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+export {
+  isApiSuccess,
+  isApiError,
+  isPaginatedResponse,
+} from './api.types';

diff --git a/themes/admin-theme/theme.json b/themes/admin-theme/theme.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b6d92a4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/themes/admin-theme/theme.json
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+{
+  "name": "admin-theme",
+  "displayName": "E-Menum Admin Theme",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Professional admin panel theme for E-Menum platform with dark mode support, WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, and responsive design",
+  "author": "E-Menum",
+  "type": "admin",
+  "enabled": true,
+  "priority": 100,
+
+  "layouts": {
+    "default": "layouts/default.ejs",
+    "auth": "layouts/auth.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "components": {
+    "header": "components/header.ejs",
+    "sidebar": "components/sidebar.ejs",
+    "footer": "components/footer.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "partials": {
+    "breadcrumb": "partials/breadcrumb.ejs",
+    "alerts": "partials/alerts.ejs",
+    "pagination": "partials/pagination.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "styles": {
+    "main": "styles/main.css"
+  },
+
+  "assets": {
+    "logo": {
+      "light": "/images/logo-light.svg",
+      "dark": "/images/logo-dark.svg"
+    },
+    "favicon": "/favicon.ico"
+  },
+
+  "features": {
+    "darkMode": true,
+    "rtlSupport": false,
+    "responsive": true,
+    "accessibility": {
+      "wcagLevel": "AA",
+      "highContrast": true,
+      "reducedMotion": true
+    }
+  },
+
+  "navigation": {
+    "sidebar": {
+      "collapsible": true,
+      "defaultCollapsed": false,
+      "hoverExpand": true,
+      "icons": "phosphor"
+    },
+    "header": {
+      "fixed": true,
+      "showSearch": true,
+      "showNotifications": true,
+      "showUserMenu": true
+    }
+  },
+
+  "colors": {
+    "primary": "#2563eb",
+    "primaryLight": "#3b82f6",
+    "primaryDark": "#1d4ed8",
+    "secondary": "#7c3aed",
+    "accent": "#f59e0b"
+  },
+
+  "breakpoints": {
+    "sm": "640px",
+    "md": "768px",
+    "lg": "1024px",
+    "xl": "1280px",
+    "2xl": "1536px"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "css": ["tailwindcss"],
+    "js": ["alpinejs"],
+    "icons": ["phosphor-icons"]
+  }
+}

diff --git a/themes/example-theme/README.md b/themes/example-theme/README.md new file mode 100644 index 0000000..c058aea --- /dev/null +++ b/themes/example-theme/README.md @@ -0,0 +1,213 @@ +# Example Theme + +A minimal, well-documented reference theme for E-Menum developers. + +> **Purpose:** Use this theme as a starting point when creating custom themes. It demonstrates best practices, required structure, and coding conventions. + +## Quick Start + +1. Copy this entire folder to create your theme: + ```bash + cp -r themes/example-theme themes/my-custom-theme + ``` + +2. Update `theme.json`: + - Change `name` to your theme's unique identifier + - Update `displayName`, `description`, `version` + - Set `enabled: true` when ready to use + - Customize colors in the `colors` section + +3. Modify the CSS in `styles/main.css`: + - Update CSS variables in `:root` + - Add your custom styles + +4. Customize the EJS templates in `layouts/` and `components/` + +## File Structure + +``` +example-theme/ +├── theme.json # Theme manifest (required) +├── layouts/ +│ └── default.ejs # Main layout template (required) +├── components/ +│ ├── header.ejs # Header component (required) +│ ├── footer.ejs # Footer component (required) +│ └── menu-item.ejs # Product card component (required) +├── styles/ +│ └── main.css # Main stylesheet (required) +└── README.md # Documentation +``` + +## Theme Manifest (theme.json) + +The manifest defines your theme's configuration: + +```json +{ + "name": "my-theme", // Unique identifier (kebab-case) + "displayName": "My Theme", // Human-readable name + "version": "1.0.0", // Semantic version + "description": "...", // Brief description + "type": "product", // "product" or "admin" + "enabled": true, // Enable/disable theme + "priority": 100, // Order in theme selector (lower = higher priority) + + "layouts": { + "default": "layouts/default.ejs" + }, + + "components": { + "header": "components/header.ejs", + "footer": "components/footer.ejs", + "menu-item": "components/menu-item.ejs" + }, + + "styles": { + "main": "styles/main.css" + }, + + "colors": { + "primary": "#6366f1", + "primaryLight": "#818cf8", + "primaryDark": "#4f46e5" + }, + + "features": { + "darkMode": true, + "responsive": true + } +} +``` + +## Template Variables + +These variables are available in all EJS templates: + +### Global Variables + +| Variable | Type | Description | +|----------|------|-------------| +| `locals.lang` | string | Current language code ('tr', 'en') | +| `locals.theme` | string | Theme preference ('light', 'dark') | +| `locals.pageTitle` | string | Page title | +| `locals.organizationName` | string | Organization name | +| `locals.brandColor` | string | Organization's brand color | +| `t()` | function | i18n translation function | + +### Menu Page Variables + +| Variable | Type | Description | +|----------|------|-------------| +| `locals.menu` | object | Menu object {id, name, slug, ...} | +| `locals.organization` | object | Organization {name, logo, address, phone, ...} | +| `locals.categories` | array | Menu categories with products | +| `locals.tableNumber` | string | Table number from QR scan | + +### Component Props + +Components receive props via EJS include: + +```ejs +<%- include('../components/header', { + menu: locals.menu, + organization: locals.organization, + tableNumber: locals.tableNumber +}) %> +``` + +## CSS Variables + +All colors must use CSS variables for dark mode support: + +```css +:root { + /* Brand Colors */ + --brand-primary: #6366f1; + --brand-primary-light: #818cf8; + --brand-primary-dark: #4f46e5; + --brand-on-primary: #ffffff; + + /* Surface Colors */ + --surface: #f8fafc; + --surface-card: #ffffff; + --surface-elevated: #f1f5f9; + + /* Text Colors */ + --text-primary: #0f172a; + --text-secondary: #475569; + --text-muted: #94a3b8; + + /* Border Colors */ + --border: #e2e8f0; + --border-strong: #cbd5e1; +} + +/* Dark mode overrides */ +[data-theme="dark"] { + --surface: #0f172a; + --surface-card: #1e293b; + --text-primary: #f8fafc; + /* ... */ +} +``` + +## Important Rules + +### DO: + +- ✅ Use CSS variables for ALL colors +- ✅ Use `t()` function for ALL text strings +- ✅ Support dark mode via `[data-theme="dark"]` +- ✅ Use Phosphor icons (`ph ph-icon-name`) +- ✅ Ensure minimum 48x48px touch targets +- ✅ Add proper ARIA labels for accessibility +- ✅ Use semantic HTML elements +- ✅ Test on mobile devices + +### DON'T: + +- ❌ Hardcode colors (e.g., `color: #333`) +- ❌ Hardcode text strings (e.g., `

Menu

`) +- ❌ Add business logic in templates +- ❌ Make API calls from templates +- ❌ Access database from templates +- ❌ Use inline styles (use classes instead) +- ❌ Remove E-Menum branding from footer + +## Alpine.js State + +The layout provides these Alpine.js methods: + +```javascript +// Available in all components +addToCart(product, quantity) // Add item to cart +removeFromCart(index) // Remove item from cart +formatPrice(price) // Format as currency +cartItemCount // Number of items in cart +cartTotal // Total cart value +cartOpen // Boolean to open/close cart +``` + +## Accessibility Requirements + +1. **Skip Link**: Include for keyboard navigation +2. **Focus Indicators**: Clear `:focus-visible` styles +3. **Color Contrast**: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum (4.5:1 for text) +4. **Touch Targets**: Minimum 48x48px +5. **Alt Text**: Use empty alt for decorative images +6. **ARIA Labels**: For interactive elements +7. **Semantic HTML**: Use proper heading hierarchy + +## Browser Support + +- Chrome 90+ +- Firefox 88+ +- Safari 14+ +- Edge 90+ +- Mobile Safari (iOS 14+) +- Chrome for Android + +## License + +Proprietary - E-Menum. All rights reserved.

diff --git a/themes/product-theme/theme.json b/themes/product-theme/theme.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b605742
--- /dev/null
+++ b/themes/product-theme/theme.json
@@ -0,0 +1,108 @@
+{
+  "name": "product-theme",
+  "displayName": "E-Menum Customer Menu Theme",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "Mobile-first customer-facing menu theme for QR code ordering with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, dark mode support, and touch-optimized interface",
+  "author": "E-Menum",
+  "type": "product",
+  "enabled": true,
+  "priority": 100,
+
+  "layouts": {
+    "default": "layouts/default.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "components": {
+    "header": "components/header.ejs",
+    "footer": "components/footer.ejs",
+    "menu-item": "components/menu-item.ejs",
+    "category-nav": "components/category-nav.ejs",
+    "cart": "components/cart.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "partials": {
+    "product-modal": "partials/product-modal.ejs",
+    "allergen-icons": "partials/allergen-icons.ejs"
+  },
+
+  "styles": {
+    "main": "styles/main.css"
+  },
+
+  "assets": {
+    "logo": {
+      "light": "/images/logo-light.svg",
+      "dark": "/images/logo-dark.svg"
+    },
+    "favicon": "/favicon.ico",
+    "placeholder": "/images/product-placeholder.svg"
+  },
+
+  "features": {
+    "darkMode": true,
+    "rtlSupport": false,
+    "responsive": true,
+    "offlineSupport": true,
+    "pwa": true,
+    "accessibility": {
+      "wcagLevel": "AA",
+      "highContrast": true,
+      "reducedMotion": true,
+      "touchTargetSize": "48px"
+    }
+  },
+
+  "navigation": {
+    "header": {
+      "fixed": true,
+      "showLogo": true,
+      "showSearch": true,
+      "showCart": true
+    },
+    "categoryNav": {
+      "style": "horizontal-scroll",
+      "sticky": true,
+      "showIcons": true
+    },
+    "footer": {
+      "showBranding": true,
+      "showSocialLinks": false
+    }
+  },
+
+  "colors": {
+    "primary": "#2563eb",
+    "primaryLight": "#3b82f6",
+    "primaryDark": "#1d4ed8",
+    "secondary": "#7c3aed",
+    "accent": "#f59e0b"
+  },
+
+  "cart": {
+    "position": "bottom-fixed",
+    "animation": "slide-up",
+    "showItemCount": true,
+    "showTotal": true
+  },
+
+  "product": {
+    "imageAspectRatio": "4:3",
+    "showPrice": true,
+    "showDescription": true,
+    "showAllergens": true,
+    "showBadges": true
+  },
+
+  "breakpoints": {
+    "sm": "640px",
+    "md": "768px",
+    "lg": "1024px",
+    "xl": "1280px"
+  },
+
+  "dependencies": {
+    "css": ["tailwindcss"],
+    "js": ["alpinejs"],
+    "icons": ["phosphor-icons"]
+  }
+}

diff --git a/tsconfig.json b/tsconfig.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6a72760
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tsconfig.json
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    // Language and Environment
+    "target": "ES2022",
+    "lib": ["ES2022"],
+    "module": "NodeNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
+
+    // Strict Type-Checking (CRITICAL per CLAUDE.md)
+    "strict": true,
+    "noImplicitAny": true,
+    "strictNullChecks": true,
+    "strictFunctionTypes": true,
+    "strictBindCallApply": true,
+    "strictPropertyInitialization": true,
+    "noImplicitThis": true,
+    "useUnknownInCatchVariables": true,
+    "alwaysStrict": true,
+
+    // Additional Checks
+    "noUnusedLocals": true,
+    "noUnusedParameters": true,
+    "exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
+    "noImplicitReturns": true,
+    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
+    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
+    "noImplicitOverride": true,
+    "noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
+
+    // Emit
+    "outDir": "./dist",
+    "rootDir": "./src",
+    "declaration": true,
+    "declarationMap": true,
+    "sourceMap": true,
+    "removeComments": false,
+    "importHelpers": true,
+
+    // Interop Constraints
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "isolatedModules": true,
+    "verbatimModuleSyntax": false,
+
+    // Path Aliases (CRITICAL per CLAUDE.md - Rule 3.4)
+    "baseUrl": ".",
+    "paths": {
+      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
+    },
+
+    // Decorators (required for routing-controllers and tsyringe)
+    "experimentalDecorators": true,
+    "emitDecoratorMetadata": true,
+
+    // Type Acquisition
+    "types": ["node"],
+
+    // Skip lib check for faster builds
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+
+    // Resolve JSON modules
+    "resolveJsonModule": true
+  },
+  "include": [
+    "src/**/*.ts",
+    "prisma/**/*.ts",
+    "scripts/**/*.ts"
+  ],
+  "exclude": [
+    "node_modules",
+    "dist",
+    "coverage",
+    "**/*.spec.ts",
+    "**/*.test.ts",
+    "**/__tests__/**"
+  ],
+  "ts-node": {
+    "esm": true,
+    "experimentalSpecifierResolution": "node"
+  }
+}

+
+    // Coverage configuration
